authors_text: Mehrnoosh Mirtaheri,Mohammad Rostami,Xiang Ren,Fred Morstatter,Aram Galstyan
title: One-shot Learning for Temporal Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 时态知识图的一次性学习
abstract: Most real-world knowledge graphs are characterized by a long-tail relation frequency distribution where a significant fraction of relations occurs only a handful of times. This observation has given rise to recent interest in low-shot learning methods that are able to generalize from only a few examples. The existing approaches, however, are tailored to static knowledge graphs and not easily generalized to temporal settings, where data scarcity poses even bigger problems, e.g., due to occurrence of new, previously unseen relations. We address this shortcoming by proposing a one-shot learning framework for link prediction in temporal knowledge graphs. Our proposed method employs a self-attention mechanism to effectively encode temporal interactions between entities, and a network to compute a similarity score between a given query and a (one-shot) example. Our experiments show that the proposed algorithm outperforms the state of the art baselines for two well-studied benchmarks while achieving significantly better performance for sparse relations.
summary: Most real-world knowledge graphs are characterized by a long-tail relation frequency distribution where a significant fraction of relations occurs only a handful of times. This observation has given rise to recent interest in low-shot learning methods that are able to generalize from only a few examples. The existing approaches, however, are tailored to static knowledge graphs and not easily generalized to temporal settings, where data scarcity poses even bigger problems, e.g., due to occurrence of new, previously unseen relations. We address this shortcoming by proposing a one-shot learning framework for link prediction in temporal knowledge graphs. Our proposed method employs a self-attention mechanism to effectively encode temporal interactions between entities, and a network to compute a similarity score between a given query and a (one-shot) example. Our experiments show that the proposed algorithm outperforms the state of the art baselines for two well-studied benchmarks while achieving significantly better performance for sparse relations.
abstract_zh: 大多数现实世界的知识图谱都具有长尾关系频率分布的特征，其中很大一部分关系仅出现几次。这一观察引起了人们最近对低样本学习方法的兴趣，这些方法只能从几个例子中进行概括。然而，现有的方法是针对静态知识图定制的，并且不容易推广到时间设置，在时间设置中，数据稀缺会带来更大的问题，例如，由于出现新的、以前未见过的关系。我们通过提出一种用于时间知识图中链接预测的一次性学习框架来解决这一缺点。我们提出的方法采用自注意力机制来有效地编码实体之间的时间交互，并使用网络来计算给定查询和（一次性）示例之间的相似性得分。我们的实验表明，所提出的算法优于两个经过充分研究的基准的最新基线，同时在稀疏关系方面实现了显着更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对时态知识图谱的单次学习框架，用于解决链接预测问题。
AI.motivation: 现实世界知识图谱中关系出现频率呈长尾分布，现有低样本学习方法多针对静态场景，难以处理时态数据中新增关系和更严重的数据稀缺问题。
AI.method: 采用自注意力机制编码实体间时序交互，并设计网络计算查询与单次示例间的相似度得分。
AI.result: 在两个经典基准测试中优于现有方法，尤其在稀疏关系场景下性能提升显著。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了时态知识图谱中单次学习的挑战，为处理动态稀疏关系提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tingzhi Mao,Yerbolat Khassanov,Van Tung Pham,Haihua Xu,Hao Huang,Aishan Wumaier,Eng Siong Chng
title: Enriching Under-Represented Named-Entities To Improve Speech Recognition Performance
title_zh: 丰富代表性不足的命名实体以提高语音识别性能
abstract: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) for under-represented named-entity (UR-NE) is challenging due to such named-entities (NE) have insufficient instances and poor contextual coverage in the training data to learn reliable estimates and representations. In this paper, we propose approaches to enriching UR-NEs to improve speech recognition performance. Specifically, our first priority is to ensure those UR-NEs to appear in the word lattice if there is any. To this end, we make exemplar utterances for those UR-NEs according to their categories (e.g. location, person, organization, etc.), ending up with an improved language model (LM) that boosts the UR-NE occurrence in the word lattice. With more UR-NEs appearing in the lattice, we then boost the recognition performance through lattice rescoring methods. We first enrich the representations of UR-NEs in a pre-trained recurrent neural network LM (RNNLM) by borrowing the embedding representations of the rich-represented NEs (RR-NEs), yielding the lattices that statistically favor the UR-NEs. Finally, we directly boost the likelihood scores of the utterances containing UR-NEs and gain further performance improvement.
summary: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) for under-represented named-entity (UR-NE) is challenging due to such named-entities (NE) have insufficient instances and poor contextual coverage in the training data to learn reliable estimates and representations. In this paper, we propose approaches to enriching UR-NEs to improve speech recognition performance. Specifically, our first priority is to ensure those UR-NEs to appear in the word lattice if there is any. To this end, we make exemplar utterances for those UR-NEs according to their categories (e.g. location, person, organization, etc.), ending up with an improved language model (LM) that boosts the UR-NE occurrence in the word lattice. With more UR-NEs appearing in the lattice, we then boost the recognition performance through lattice rescoring methods. We first enrich the representations of UR-NEs in a pre-trained recurrent neural network LM (RNNLM) by borrowing the embedding representations of the rich-represented NEs (RR-NEs), yielding the lattices that statistically favor the UR-NEs. Finally, we directly boost the likelihood scores of the utterances containing UR-NEs and gain further performance improvement.
abstract_zh: 针对代表性不足的命名实体 (UR-NE) 的自动语音识别 (ASR) 具有挑战性，因为此类命名实体 (NE) 的实例不足且训练数据中的上下文覆盖率较差，无法学习可靠的估计和表示。在本文中，我们提出了丰富 UR-NE 以提高语音识别性能的方法。具体来说，我们的首要任务是确保这些 UR-NE 出现在词格中（如果有的话）。为此，我们根据这些 UR-NE 的类别（例如位置、人物、组织等）为这些 UR-NE 制作示例话语，最终得到改进的语言模型 (LM)，从而提高词格中 UR-NE 的出现率。随着更多的 UR-NE 出现在晶格中，我们然后通过晶格重新评分方法来提高识别性能。我们首先通过借用丰富表示的 NE (RR-NE) 的嵌入表示来丰富预训练的循环神经网络 LM (RNNLM) 中 UR-NE 的表示，产生统计上有利于 UR-NE 的格子。最后，我们直接提高包含 UR-NE 的话语的似然得分，并获得进一步的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过丰富欠代表命名实体（UR-NE）的表示来提升语音识别性能。
AI.motivation: 欠代表命名实体在训练数据中实例不足且上下文覆盖有限，导致语音识别模型难以准确识别。
AI.method: 通过生成UR-NE示例语音增强语言模型，利用预训练RNNLM中丰富实体的嵌入表示优化UR-NE表示，并通过词格重打分和直接提升包含UR-NE语音的似然分数进行优化。
AI.result: 有效提升了UR-NE在词格中的出现频率及语音识别整体性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过增强UR-NE表示与模型优化，可显著改善语音识别系统对欠代表实体的识别效果。

authors_text: Mahesh Kumar Krishna Reddy,Mrigank Rochan,Yiwei Lu,Yang Wang
title: AdaCrowd: Unlabeled Scene Adaptation for Crowd Counting
title_zh: AdaCrowd：用于人群计数的无标签场景适应
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Multimedia (TMM)
comments: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Multimedia (TMM)
abstract: We address the problem of image-based crowd counting. In particular, we propose a new problem called unlabeled scene-adaptive crowd counting. Given a new target scene, we would like to have a crowd counting model specifically adapted to this particular scene based on the target data that capture some information about the new scene. In this paper, we propose to use one or more unlabeled images from the target scene to perform the adaptation. In comparison with the existing problem setups (e.g. fully supervised), our proposed problem setup is closer to the real-world applications of crowd counting systems. We introduce a novel AdaCrowd framework to solve this problem. Our framework consists of a crowd counting network and a guiding network. The guiding network predicts some parameters in the crowd counting network based on the unlabeled images from a particular scene. This allows our model to adapt to different target scenes. The experimental results on several challenging benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach compared with other alternative methods. Code is available at https://github.com/maheshkkumar/adacrowd.
summary: We address the problem of image-based crowd counting. In particular, we propose a new problem called unlabeled scene-adaptive crowd counting. Given a new target scene, we would like to have a crowd counting model specifically adapted to this particular scene based on the target data that capture some information about the new scene. In this paper, we propose to use one or more unlabeled images from the target scene to perform the adaptation. In comparison with the existing problem setups (e.g. fully supervised), our proposed problem setup is closer to the real-world applications of crowd counting systems. We introduce a novel AdaCrowd framework to solve this problem. Our framework consists of a crowd counting network and a guiding network. The guiding network predicts some parameters in the crowd counting network based on the unlabeled images from a particular scene. This allows our model to adapt to different target scenes. The experimental results on several challenging benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach compared with other alternative methods. Code is available at https://github.com/maheshkkumar/adacrowd.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了基于图像的人群计数问题。特别是，我们提出了一个新问题，称为无标签场景自适应人群计数。给定一个新的目标场景，我们希望有一个基于捕获有关新场景的一些信息的目标数据专门适应该特定场景的人群计数模型。在本文中，我们建议使用目标场景中的一幅或多幅未标记图像来执行适应。与现有的问题设置（例如完全监督）相比，我们提出的问题设置更接近人群计数系统的实际应用。我们引入了一种新颖的 AdaCrowd 框架来解决这个问题。我们的框架由人群计数网络和引导网络组成。引导网络根据特定场景的未标记图像来预测人群计数网络中的一些参数。这使得我们的模型能够适应不同的目标场景。几个具有挑战性的基准数据集的实验结果证明了我们提出的方法与其他替代方法相比的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/maheshkkumar/adacrowd 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于未标记场景自适应的人群计数方法AdaCrowd，通过利用目标场景的未标记图像调整模型参数以适应新场景。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖完全监督数据进行场景适应，但实际应用中难以获取标注数据，需更贴近现实的无标签适应方案。
AI.method: 提出AdaCrowd框架，包含人群计数网络和引导网络。引导网络基于未标记图像预测计数网络参数，实现跨场景自适应。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实验验证了方法有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: AdaCrowd在无标签场景自适应任务中优于现有方法，为实际人群计数系统提供可行解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于未标记场景自适应的人群计数方法AdaCrowd，通过利用目标场景的未标记图像调整模型参数以适应新场景。
motivation: 现有方法依赖完全监督数据进行场景适应，但实际应用中难以获取标注数据，需更贴近现实的无标签适应方案。
method: 提出AdaCrowd框架，包含人群计数网络和引导网络。引导网络基于未标记图像预测计数网络参数，实现跨场景自适应。
result: 在多个基准数据集上实验验证了方法有效性，代码已开源。
conclusion: AdaCrowd在无标签场景自适应任务中优于现有方法，为实际人群计数系统提供可行解决方案。
search_text: AdaCrowd: Unlabeled Scene Adaptation for Crowd Counting AdaCrowd：用于人群计数的无标签场景适应 We address the problem of image-based crowd counting. In particular, we propose a new problem called unlabeled scene-adaptive crowd counting. Given a new target scene, we would like to have a crowd counting model specifically adapted to this particular scene based on the target data that capture some information about the new scene. In this paper, we propose to use one or more unlabeled images from the target scene to perform the adaptation. In comparison with the existing problem setups (e.g. fully supervised), our proposed problem setup is closer to the real-world applications of crowd counting systems. We introduce a novel AdaCrowd framework to solve this problem. Our framework consists of a crowd counting network and a guiding network. The guiding network predicts some parameters in the crowd counting network based on the unlabeled images from a particular scene. This allows our model to adapt to different target scenes. The experimental results on several challenging benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach compared with other alternative methods. Code is available at https://github.com/maheshkkumar/adacrowd. 我们解决了基于图像的人群计数问题。特别是，我们提出了一个新问题，称为无标签场景自适应人群计数。给定一个新的目标场景，我们希望有一个基于捕获有关新场景的一些信息的目标数据专门适应该特定场景的人群计数模型。在本文中，我们建议使用目标场景中的一幅或多幅未标记图像来执行适应。与现有的问题设置（例如完全监督）相比，我们提出的问题设置更接近人群计数系统的实际应用。我们引入了一种新颖的 AdaCrowd 框架来解决这个问题。我们的框架由人群计数网络和引导网络组成。引导网络根据特定场景的未标记图像来预测人群计数网络中的一些参数。这使得我们的模型能够适应不同的目标场景。几个具有挑战性的基准数据集的实验结果证明了我们提出的方法与其他替代方法相比的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/maheshkkumar/adacrowd 获取。 本文提出了一种基于未标记场景自适应的人群计数方法AdaCrowd，通过利用目标场景的未标记图像调整模型参数以适应新场景。 Mahesh Kumar Krishna Reddy,Mrigank Rochan,Yiwei Lu,Yang Wang cs.CV

title: GSEP: A robust vocal and accompaniment separation system using gated CBHG module and loudness normalization
title_zh: GSEP：使用门控 CBHG 模块和响度归一化的强大人声和伴奏分离系统
abstract: In the field of audio signal processing research, source separation has been a popular research topic for a long time and the recent adoption of the deep neural networks have shown a significant improvement in performance. The improvement vitalizes the industry to productize audio deep learning based products and services including Karaoke in the music streaming apps and dialogue enhancement in the UHDTV. For these early markets, we defined a set of design principles of the vocal and accompaniment separation model in terms of robustness, quality, and cost. In this paper, we introduce GSEP (Gaudio source SEParation system), a robust vocal and accompaniment separation system using a Gated- CBHG module, mask warping, and loudness normalization and it was verified that the proposed system satisfies all three principles and outperforms the state-of-the-art systems both in objective measure and subjective assessment through experiments.
summary: In the field of audio signal processing research, source separation has been a popular research topic for a long time and the recent adoption of the deep neural networks have shown a significant improvement in performance. The improvement vitalizes the industry to productize audio deep learning based products and services including Karaoke in the music streaming apps and dialogue enhancement in the UHDTV. For these early markets, we defined a set of design principles of the vocal and accompaniment separation model in terms of robustness, quality, and cost. In this paper, we introduce GSEP (Gaudio source SEParation system), a robust vocal and accompaniment separation system using a Gated- CBHG module, mask warping, and loudness normalization and it was verified that the proposed system satisfies all three principles and outperforms the state-of-the-art systems both in objective measure and subjective assessment through experiments.
abstract_zh: 在音频信号处理研究领域，源分离长期以来一直是热门研究课题，最近深度神经网络的采用显示出性能的显着提高。这一改进激发了行业生产基于音频深度学习的产品和服务，包括音乐流应用中的卡拉 OK 和超高清电视中的对话增强。针对这些早期市场，我们从稳健性、质量和成本方面定义了一套人声和伴奏分离模型的设计原则。在本文中，我们介绍了 GSEP（Gaudio source SEParation 系统），这是一种使用门控 CBHG 模块、掩模变形和响度归一化的鲁棒人声和伴奏分离系统，并通过实验验证了所提出的系统满足所有三个原则，并且在客观测量和主观评估方面均优于最先进的系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GSEP系统，利用门控CBHG模块和响度归一化技术，实现鲁棒的人声与伴奏分离。
AI.motivation: 深度学习虽提升了源分离性能，但早期市场需满足鲁棒性、质量与成本要求，现有方法尚未完全满足。
AI.method: 设计GSEP系统，整合门控CBHG模块、mask warping及响度归一化技术，优化分离效果与计算成本。
AI.result: 实验验证GSEP在客观指标和主观评估中均优于现有方法，满足鲁棒性、质量与成本设计原则。
AI.conclusion: GSEP系统通过创新模块与归一化技术，有效提升分离性能，适用于音乐流媒体与UHDTV等实际场景。

authors_text: Chao Liang,Zhipeng Zhang,Xue Zhou,Bing Li,Shuyuan Zhu,Weiming Hu
title: Rethinking the competition between detection and ReID in Multi-Object Tracking
title_zh: 重新思考多目标跟踪中检测和 ReID 之间的竞争
abstract: Due to balanced accuracy and speed, one-shot models which jointly learn detection and identification embeddings, have drawn great attention in multi-object tracking (MOT). However, the inherent differences and relations between detection and re-identification (ReID) are unconsciously overlooked because of treating them as two isolated tasks in the one-shot tracking paradigm. This leads to inferior performance compared with existing two-stage methods. In this paper, we first dissect the reasoning process for these two tasks, which reveals that the competition between them inevitably would destroy task-dependent representations learning. To tackle this problem, we propose a novel reciprocal network (REN) with a self-relation and cross-relation design so that to impel each branch to better learn task-dependent representations. The proposed model aims to alleviate the deleterious tasks competition, meanwhile improve the cooperation between detection and ReID. Furthermore, we introduce a scale-aware attention network (SAAN) that prevents semantic level misalignment to improve the association capability of ID embeddings. By integrating the two delicately designed networks into a one-shot online MOT system, we construct a strong MOT tracker, namely CSTrack. Our tracker achieves the state-of-the-art performance on MOT16, MOT17 and MOT20 datasets, without other bells and whistles. Moreover, CSTrack is efficient and runs at 16.4 FPS on a single modern GPU, and its lightweight version even runs at 34.6 FPS. The complete code has been released at https://github.com/JudasDie/SOTS.
summary: Due to balanced accuracy and speed, one-shot models which jointly learn detection and identification embeddings, have drawn great attention in multi-object tracking (MOT). However, the inherent differences and relations between detection and re-identification (ReID) are unconsciously overlooked because of treating them as two isolated tasks in the one-shot tracking paradigm. This leads to inferior performance compared with existing two-stage methods. In this paper, we first dissect the reasoning process for these two tasks, which reveals that the competition between them inevitably would destroy task-dependent representations learning. To tackle this problem, we propose a novel reciprocal network (REN) with a self-relation and cross-relation design so that to impel each branch to better learn task-dependent representations. The proposed model aims to alleviate the deleterious tasks competition, meanwhile improve the cooperation between detection and ReID. Furthermore, we introduce a scale-aware attention network (SAAN) that prevents semantic level misalignment to improve the association capability of ID embeddings. By integrating the two delicately designed networks into a one-shot online MOT system, we construct a strong MOT tracker, namely CSTrack. Our tracker achieves the state-of-the-art performance on MOT16, MOT17 and MOT20 datasets, without other bells and whistles. Moreover, CSTrack is efficient and runs at 16.4 FPS on a single modern GPU, and its lightweight version even runs at 34.6 FPS. The complete code has been released at https://github.com/JudasDie/SOTS.
abstract_zh: 由于平衡的精度和速度，联合学习检测和识别嵌入的一次性模型在多目标跟踪（MOT）中引起了极大的关注。然而，由于在一次性跟踪范式中将检测和重新识别（ReID）视为两个孤立的任务，因此无意识地忽视了检测和重新识别（ReID）之间的固有差异和关系。与现有的两阶段方法相比，这导致性能较差。在本文中，我们首先剖析了这两个任务的推理过程，揭示了它们之间的竞争不可避免地会破坏任务依赖的表示学习。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种具有自关系和交叉关系设计的新型互惠网络（REN），以促使每个分支更好地学习任务相关的表示。所提出的模型旨在缓解有害的任务竞争，同时改善检测和 ReID 之间的合作。此外，我们引入了一种尺度感知注意力网络（SAAN），可以防止语义级别的错位，以提高 ID 嵌入的关联能力。通过将两个精心设计的网络集成到一次性在线 MOT 系统中，我们构建了一个强大的 MOT 跟踪器，即 CSTrack。我们的跟踪器在 MOT16、MOT17 和 MOT20 数据集上实现了最先进的性能，没有其他花哨的功能。此外，CSTrack 非常高效，在单个现代 GPU 上以 16.4 FPS 的速度运行，其轻量级版本甚至可以以 34.6 FPS 的速度运行。完整的代码已发布在 https://github.com/JudasDie/SOTS。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过解决检测与重识别（ReID）任务间的竞争关系，提升多目标跟踪（MOT）的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有单次学习模型将检测与ReID视为独立任务，忽视了二者内在差异与关联，导致性能劣于传统两阶段方法。
AI.method: 提出双向网络（REN）通过自关联与跨关联设计缓解任务竞争，并引入尺度感知注意力网络（SAAN）优化特征对齐，构建轻量级单次在线跟踪系统CSTrack。
AI.result: CSTrack在MOT16/17/20数据集上达到SOTA性能，单GPU下实现16.4 FPS，轻量版达34.6 FPS，无需额外模块。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦任务竞争与增强协作，CSTrack在保持高效性的同时显著提升了多目标跟踪的准确性与实时性。

authors_text: Bowen Li,Xiaojuan Qi,Philip H. S. Torr,Thomas Lukasiewicz
title: Lightweight Generative Adversarial Networks for Text-Guided Image Manipulation
title_zh: 用于文本引导图像操作的轻量级生成对抗网络
abstract: We propose a novel lightweight generative adversarial network for efficient image manipulation using natural language descriptions. To achieve this, a new word-level discriminator is proposed, which provides the generator with fine-grained training feedback at word-level, to facilitate training a lightweight generator that has a small number of parameters, but can still correctly focus on specific visual attributes of an image, and then edit them without affecting other contents that are not described in the text. Furthermore, thanks to the explicit training signal related to each word, the discriminator can also be simplified to have a lightweight structure. Compared with the state of the art, our method has a much smaller number of parameters, but still achieves a competitive manipulation performance. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our method can better disentangle different visual attributes, then correctly map them to corresponding semantic words, and thus achieve a more accurate image modification using natural language descriptions.
summary: We propose a novel lightweight generative adversarial network for efficient image manipulation using natural language descriptions. To achieve this, a new word-level discriminator is proposed, which provides the generator with fine-grained training feedback at word-level, to facilitate training a lightweight generator that has a small number of parameters, but can still correctly focus on specific visual attributes of an image, and then edit them without affecting other contents that are not described in the text. Furthermore, thanks to the explicit training signal related to each word, the discriminator can also be simplified to have a lightweight structure. Compared with the state of the art, our method has a much smaller number of parameters, but still achieves a competitive manipulation performance. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our method can better disentangle different visual attributes, then correctly map them to corresponding semantic words, and thus achieve a more accurate image modification using natural language descriptions.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的轻量级生成对抗网络，用于使用自然语言描述进行有效的图像处理。为了实现这一目标，提出了一种新的词级判别器，它为生成器提供了词级的细粒度训练反馈，以方便训练一个具有少量参数，但仍然可以正确关注图像的特定视觉属性的轻量级生成器，然后对其进行编辑，而不会影响文本中未描述的其他内容。此外，由于与每个单词相关的显式训练信号，鉴别器也可以简化为轻量级结构。与现有技术相比，我们的方法具有更少的参数数量，但仍然实现了有竞争力的操纵性能。大量的实验结果表明，我们的方法可以更好地解开不同的视觉属性，然后将它们正确地映射到相应的语义词，从而利用自然语言描述实现更准确的图像修改。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级生成对抗网络，用于基于自然语言描述的图像编辑，通过词级判别器实现高效精准的图像属性修改。
AI.motivation: 现有文本引导图像编辑方法参数量大且难以精准控制特定视觉属性，需开发更高效且能准确分离语义属性的轻量模型。
AI.method: 设计词级判别器提供细粒度训练信号，使轻量生成器能聚焦文本描述的视觉属性进行编辑，同时简化判别器结构以减少参数量。
AI.result: 参数量远低于现有方法，实验表明能更好分离视觉属性并准确映射到语义词，实现更精确的文本引导图像修改。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过词级判别机制有效平衡模型轻量化与编辑精度，在文本引导图像操作任务中具有竞争力。

title: Lamina-specific neuronal properties promote robust, stable signal propagation in feedforward networks
title_zh: 层特异性神经元特性促进前馈网络中稳健、稳定的信号传播
abstract: Feedforward networks (FFN) are ubiquitous structures in neural systems and have been studied to understand mechanisms of reliable signal and information transmission. In many FFNs, neurons in one layer have intrinsic properties that are distinct from those in their pre-/postsynaptic layers, but how this affects network-level information processing remains unexplored. Here we show that layer-to-layer heterogeneity arising from lamina-specific cellular properties facilitates signal and information transmission in FFNs. Specifically, we found that signal transformations, made by each layer of neurons on an input-driven spike signal, demodulate signal distortions introduced by preceding layers. This mechanism boosts information transfer carried by a propagating spike signal and thereby supports reliable spike signal and information transmission in a deep FFN. Our study suggests that distinct cell types in neural circuits, performing different computational functions, facilitate information processing on the whole.
summary: Feedforward networks (FFN) are ubiquitous structures in neural systems and have been studied to understand mechanisms of reliable signal and information transmission. In many FFNs, neurons in one layer have intrinsic properties that are distinct from those in their pre-/postsynaptic layers, but how this affects network-level information processing remains unexplored. Here we show that layer-to-layer heterogeneity arising from lamina-specific cellular properties facilitates signal and information transmission in FFNs. Specifically, we found that signal transformations, made by each layer of neurons on an input-driven spike signal, demodulate signal distortions introduced by preceding layers. This mechanism boosts information transfer carried by a propagating spike signal and thereby supports reliable spike signal and information transmission in a deep FFN. Our study suggests that distinct cell types in neural circuits, performing different computational functions, facilitate information processing on the whole.
abstract_zh: 前馈网络（FFN）是神经系统中普遍存在的结构，人们对其进行研究以了解可靠信号和信息传输的机制。在许多 FFN 中，一层中的神经元具有与其突触前/后层中的神经元不同的内在属性，但这如何影响网络级信息处理仍有待探索。在这里，我们表明，由层板特异性细胞特性引起的层间异质性促进了 FFN 中的信号和信息传输。具体来说，我们发现每层神经元对输入驱动的尖峰信号进行的信号变换可以解调前一层引入的信号失真。该机制增强了传播尖峰信号携带的信息传输，从而支持深度 FFN 中可靠的尖峰信号和信息传输。我们的研究表明，神经回路中不同的细胞类型执行不同的计算功能，总体上促进信息处理。

AI.tldr: 研究前馈网络中不同层神经元特异性如何促进信号稳定传播
AI.motivation: 探讨神经网络中层间神经元特性异质性对信息传递的影响机制
AI.method: 通过分析各层神经元对输入尖峰信号的转换机制，研究其如何校正前一层的信号失真
AI.result: 发现层间异质性通过校正信号失真，提升信息传递效率，确保深度前馈网络中的可靠信号传输
AI.conclusion: 不同细胞类型的多样化计算功能协同提升神经网络的信息处理能力

title: Beyond the Deep Metric Learning: Enhance the Cross-Modal Matching with Adversarial Discriminative Domain Regularization
title_zh: 超越深度度量学习：通过对抗性判别域正则化增强跨模态匹配
abstract: Matching information across image and text modalities is a fundamental challenge for many applications that involve both vision and natural language processing. The objective is to find efficient similarity metrics to compare the similarity between visual and textual information. Existing approaches mainly match the local visual objects and the sentence words in a shared space with attention mechanisms. The matching performance is still limited because the similarity computation is based on simple comparisons of the matching features, ignoring the characteristics of their distribution in the data. In this paper, we address this limitation with an efficient learning objective that considers the discriminative feature distributions between the visual objects and sentence words. Specifically, we propose a novel Adversarial Discriminative Domain Regularization (ADDR) learning framework, beyond the paradigm metric learning objective, to construct a set of discriminative data domains within each image-text pairs. Our approach can generally improve the learning efficiency and the performance of existing metrics learning frameworks by regulating the distribution of the hidden space between the matching pairs. The experimental results show that this new approach significantly improves the overall performance of several popular cross-modal matching techniques (SCAN, VSRN, BFAN) on the MS-COCO and Flickr30K benchmarks.
summary: Matching information across image and text modalities is a fundamental challenge for many applications that involve both vision and natural language processing. The objective is to find efficient similarity metrics to compare the similarity between visual and textual information. Existing approaches mainly match the local visual objects and the sentence words in a shared space with attention mechanisms. The matching performance is still limited because the similarity computation is based on simple comparisons of the matching features, ignoring the characteristics of their distribution in the data. In this paper, we address this limitation with an efficient learning objective that considers the discriminative feature distributions between the visual objects and sentence words. Specifically, we propose a novel Adversarial Discriminative Domain Regularization (ADDR) learning framework, beyond the paradigm metric learning objective, to construct a set of discriminative data domains within each image-text pairs. Our approach can generally improve the learning efficiency and the performance of existing metrics learning frameworks by regulating the distribution of the hidden space between the matching pairs. The experimental results show that this new approach significantly improves the overall performance of several popular cross-modal matching techniques (SCAN, VSRN, BFAN) on the MS-COCO and Flickr30K benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 对于涉及视觉和自然语言处理的许多应用来说，跨图像和文本模式匹配信息是一个基本挑战。目标是找到有效的相似性度量来比较视觉和文本信息之间的相似性。现有的方法主要通过注意机制将共享空间中的局部视觉对象和句子单词进行匹配。匹配性能仍然受到限制，因为相似度计算基于匹配特征的简单比较，忽略了它们在数据中的分布特征。在本文中，我们通过考虑视觉对象和句子单词之间的区分特征分布的有效学习目标来解决这一限制。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的对抗性判别域正则化（ADDR）学习框架，超越范式度量学习目标，在每个图像文本对中构建一组判别性数据域。我们的方法通常可以通过调节匹配对之间隐藏空间的分布来提高现有度量学习框架的学习效率和性能。实验结果表明，这种新方法显着提高了几种流行的跨模态匹配技术（SCAN、VSRN、BFAN）在 MS-COCO 和 Flickr30K 基准上的整体性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的对抗判别域正则化（ADDR）框架，以提升跨模态匹配的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在跨模态匹配中依赖简单特征比较，忽略了数据分布特性，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 设计ADDR框架，在共享空间中通过对抗学习增强视觉与文本特征的判别性分布，调节匹配对的隐空间分布。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO和Flickr30K基准测试中，ADDR显著提升了SCAN、VSRN、BFAN等方法的跨模态匹配效果。
AI.conclusion: ADDR通过考虑数据分布特性，超越了传统度量学习范式，有效提升了跨模态匹配的性能。

In this paper, we address this limitation with an efficient learning objective that considers the discriminative feature distributions between the visual objects and sentence words. Specifically, we propose a novel Adversarial Discriminative Domain Regularization (ADDR) learning framework, beyond the paradigm metric learning objective, to construct a set of discriminative data domains within each image-text pairs. Our approach can generally improve the learning efficiency and the performance of existing metrics learning frameworks by regulating the distribution of the hidden space between the matching pairs. The experimental results show that this new approach significantly improves the overall performance of several popular cross-modal matching techniques (SCAN, VSRN, BFAN) on the MS-COCO and Flickr30K benchmarks. 对于涉及视觉和自然语言处理的许多应用来说，跨图像和文本模式匹配信息是一个基本挑战。目标是找到有效的相似性度量来比较视觉和文本信息之间的相似性。现有的方法主要通过注意机制将共享空间中的局部视觉对象和句子单词进行匹配。匹配性能仍然受到限制，因为相似度计算基于匹配特征的简单比较，忽略了它们在数据中的分布特征。在本文中，我们通过考虑视觉对象和句子单词之间的区分特征分布的有效学习目标来解决这一限制。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的对抗性判别域正则化（ADDR）学习框架，超越范式度量学习目标，在每个图像文本对中构建一组判别性数据域。我们的方法通常可以通过调节匹配对之间隐藏空间的分布来提高现有度量学习框架的学习效率和性能。实验结果表明，这种新方法显着提高了几种流行的跨模态匹配技术（SCAN、VSRN、BFAN）在 MS-COCO 和 Flickr30K 基准上的整体性能。 本文提出一种新的对抗判别域正则化（ADDR）框架，以提升跨模态匹配的性能。 Li Ren,Kai Li,LiQiang Wang,Kien Hua cs.CV

title: Quantum Meets Fine-grained Complexity: Sublinear Time Quantum Algorithms for String Problems
title_zh: 量子遇上细粒度的复杂性：解决弦问题的次线性时间量子算法
abstract: Longest common substring (LCS), longest palindrome substring (LPS), and Ulam distance (UL) are three fundamental string problems that can be classically solved in near linear time. In this work, we present sublinear time quantum algorithms for these problems along with quantum lower bounds. Our results shed light on a very surprising fact: Although the classic solutions for LCS and LPS are almost identical (via suffix trees), their quantum computational complexities are different. While we give an exact $\tilde O(\sqrt{n})$ time algorithm for LPS, we prove that LCS needs at least time $\tilde Ω(n^{2/3})$ even for 0/1 strings.
summary: Longest common substring (LCS), longest palindrome substring (LPS), and Ulam distance (UL) are three fundamental string problems that can be classically solved in near linear time. In this work, we present sublinear time quantum algorithms for these problems along with quantum lower bounds. Our results shed light on a very surprising fact: Although the classic solutions for LCS and LPS are almost identical (via suffix trees), their quantum computational complexities are different. While we give an exact $\tilde O(\sqrt{n})$ time algorithm for LPS, we prove that LCS needs at least time $\tilde Ω(n^{2/3})$ even for 0/1 strings.
abstract_zh: 最长公共子串（LCS）、最长回文子串（LPS）和乌拉姆距离（UL）是三个可以在近线性时间内经典解决的基本字符串问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了针对这些问题的亚线性时间量子算法以及量子下界。我们的结果揭示了一个非常令人惊讶的事实：虽然 LCS 和 LPS 的经典解决方案几乎相同（通过后缀树），但它们的量子计算复杂性不同。虽然我们为 LPS 给出了精确的 $\tilde O(\sqrt{n})$ 时间算法，但我们证明即使对于 0/1 字符串，LCS 也至少需要 $\tilde Ω(n^{2/3})$ 时间。

AI.tldr: 研究三个基本字符串问题（最长公共子串LCS、最长回文子串LPS、Ulam距离UL）的亚线性时间量子算法及量子下界。
AI.motivation: 经典算法中LCS和LPS的解法几乎相同（均使用后缀树），但想探究它们在量子计算复杂度上是否存在差异。
AI.method: 提出亚线性时间量子算法，结合量子查询复杂度与下界证明技术，分别针对LCS、LPS和UL问题设计量子算法并给出相应的量子下界。
AI.result: 对LPS给出了精确的Õ(√n)时间量子算法；对LCS证明即使对于0/1字符串也需要至少Ω̃(n^{2/3})时间；揭示了LCS和LPS量子计算复杂度的本质差异。
AI.conclusion: 经典解法相似的LCS和LPS在量子计算下复杂度不同，说明量子计算可以揭示经典视角下隐藏的复杂性差异。

authors_text: Feiliang Ren,Juchen Li,Huihui Zhang,Shilei Liu,Bochao Li,Ruicheng Ming,Yujia Bai
title: Knowledge Graph Embedding with Atrous Convolution and Residual Learning
title_zh: 具有空洞卷积和残差学习的知识图嵌入
abstract: Knowledge graph embedding is an important task and it will benefit lots of downstream applications. Currently, deep neural networks based methods achieve state-of-the-art performance. However, most of these existing methods are very complex and need much time for training and inference. To address this issue, we propose a simple but effective atrous convolution based knowledge graph embedding method. Compared with existing state-of-the-art methods, our method has following main characteristics. First, it effectively increases feature interactions by using atrous convolutions. Second, to address the original information forgotten issue and vanishing/exploding gradient issue, it uses the residual learning method. Third, it has simpler structure but much higher parameter efficiency. We evaluate our method on six benchmark datasets with different evaluation metrics. Extensive experiments show that our model is very effective. On these diverse datasets, it achieves better results than the compared state-of-the-art methods on most of evaluation metrics. The source codes of our model could be found at https://github.com/neukg/AcrE.
summary: Knowledge graph embedding is an important task and it will benefit lots of downstream applications. Currently, deep neural networks based methods achieve state-of-the-art performance. However, most of these existing methods are very complex and need much time for training and inference. To address this issue, we propose a simple but effective atrous convolution based knowledge graph embedding method. Compared with existing state-of-the-art methods, our method has following main characteristics. First, it effectively increases feature interactions by using atrous convolutions. Second, to address the original information forgotten issue and vanishing/exploding gradient issue, it uses the residual learning method. Third, it has simpler structure but much higher parameter efficiency. We evaluate our method on six benchmark datasets with different evaluation metrics. Extensive experiments show that our model is very effective. On these diverse datasets, it achieves better results than the compared state-of-the-art methods on most of evaluation metrics. The source codes of our model could be found at https://github.com/neukg/AcrE.
abstract_zh: 知识图嵌入是一项重要的任务，它将有利于许多下游应用程序。目前，基于深度神经网络的方法实现了最先进的性能。然而，这些现有方法大多数都非常复杂，需要大量时间进行训练和推理。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种简单但有效的基于空洞卷积的知识图嵌入方法。与现有的最先进的方法相比，我们的方法具有以下主要特点。首先，它通过使用空洞卷积有效地增加了特征交互。其次，为了解决原始信息遗忘问题和梯度消失/爆炸问题，它使用残差学习方法。第三，结构更简单，参数效率更高。我们在具有不同评估指标的六个基准数据集上评估我们的方法。大量的实验表明我们的模型非常有效。在这些不同的数据集上，它在大多数评估指标上都比最先进的方法取得了更好的结果。我们模型的源代码可以在 https://github.com/neukg/AcrE 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于空洞卷积和残差学习的知识图谱嵌入方法，旨在提高模型效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入方法复杂且训练推理耗时，需设计更高效且结构简单的模型以解决特征交互不足和梯度消失等问题。
AI.method: 采用空洞卷积增强特征交互，结合残差学习缓解信息遗忘与梯度问题，并通过简化结构提升参数效率。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集上实验表明，该模型在多数评估指标上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模型在保持简单结构的同时实现了更高的参数效率和更好的性能，验证了方法的有效性。

title: Tensor Reordering for CNN Compression
title_zh: 用于 CNN 压缩的张量重新排序
abstract: We show how parameter redundancy in Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) filters can be effectively reduced by pruning in spectral domain. Specifically, the representation extracted via Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT) is more conducive for pruning than the original space. By relying on a combination of weight tensor reshaping and reordering we achieve high levels of layer compression with just minor accuracy loss. Our approach is applied to compress pretrained CNNs and we show that minor additional fine-tuning allows our method to recover the original model performance after a significant parameter reduction. We validate our approach on ResNet-50 and MobileNet-V2 architectures for ImageNet classification task.
summary: We show how parameter redundancy in Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) filters can be effectively reduced by pruning in spectral domain. Specifically, the representation extracted via Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT) is more conducive for pruning than the original space. By relying on a combination of weight tensor reshaping and reordering we achieve high levels of layer compression with just minor accuracy loss. Our approach is applied to compress pretrained CNNs and we show that minor additional fine-tuning allows our method to recover the original model performance after a significant parameter reduction. We validate our approach on ResNet-50 and MobileNet-V2 architectures for ImageNet classification task.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了如何通过谱域修剪来有效减少卷积神经网络（CNN）滤波器中的参数冗余。具体来说，通过离散余弦变换（DCT）提取的表示比原始空间更有利于修剪。通过依靠权重张量重塑和重新排序的组合，我们实现了高水平的层压缩，而精度损失很小。我们的方法应用于压缩预训练的 CNN，并且我们表明，少量的额外微调允许我们的方法在显着参数减少后恢复原始模型性能。我们在 ResNet-50 和 MobileNet-V2 架构上针对 ImageNet 分类任务验证了我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过在频域中进行剪枝和张量重排来压缩卷积神经网络（CNN）参数，以减少冗余并保持模型性能。
AI.motivation: CNN滤波器中存在参数冗余，传统剪枝方法效果有限，需探索更高效的压缩策略以降低计算量和存储需求。
AI.method: 利用离散余弦变换（DCT）将权重张量转换到频域，通过重塑和重排张量实现高效剪枝，并结合微调恢复模型性能。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上对ResNet-50和MobileNet-V2进行实验，显著减少参数量且仅轻微损失准确率，微调后可恢复原始性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过频域剪枝和张量重排有效压缩CNN，在保持模型精度的同时实现参数缩减，适用于主流网络架构。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过频域剪枝和张量重排有效压缩CNN，在保持模型精度的同时实现参数缩减，适用于主流网络架构。

tldr: 本文提出通过在频域中进行剪枝和张量重排来压缩卷积神经网络（CNN）参数，以减少冗余并保持模型性能。
motivation: CNN滤波器中存在参数冗余，传统剪枝方法效果有限，需探索更高效的压缩策略以降低计算量和存储需求。
method: 利用离散余弦变换（DCT）将权重张量转换到频域，通过重塑和重排张量实现高效剪枝，并结合微调恢复模型性能。
result: 在ImageNet数据集上对ResNet-50和MobileNet-V2进行实验，显著减少参数量且仅轻微损失准确率，微调后可恢复原始性能。
conclusion: 该方法通过频域剪枝和张量重排有效压缩CNN，在保持模型精度的同时实现参数缩减，适用于主流网络架构。
search_text: Tensor Reordering for CNN Compression 用于 CNN 压缩的张量重新排序 We show how parameter redundancy in Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) filters can be effectively reduced by pruning in spectral domain. Specifically, the representation extracted via Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT) is more conducive for pruning than the original space. By relying on a combination of weight tensor reshaping and reordering we achieve high levels of layer compression with just minor accuracy loss. Our approach is applied to compress pretrained CNNs and we show that minor additional fine-tuning allows our method to recover the original model performance after a significant parameter reduction. We validate our approach on ResNet-50 and MobileNet-V2 architectures for ImageNet classification task. 我们展示了如何通过谱域修剪来有效减少卷积神经网络（CNN）滤波器中的参数冗余。具体来说，通过离散余弦变换（DCT）提取的表示比原始空间更有利于修剪。通过依靠权重张量重塑和重新排序的组合，我们实现了高水平的层压缩，而精度损失很小。我们的方法应用于压缩预训练的 CNN，并且我们表明，少量的额外微调允许我们的方法在显着参数减少后恢复原始模型性能。我们在 ResNet-50 和 MobileNet-V2 架构上针对 ImageNet 分类任务验证了我们的方法。 本文提出通过在频域中进行剪枝和张量重排来压缩卷积神经网络（CNN）参数，以减少冗余并保持模型性能。 Matej Ulicny,Vladimir A. Krylov,Rozenn Dahyot cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Teresa White,Jesse Wheeler,Colton Lindstrom,Randall Christensen,Kevin R. Moon
title: GPS-Denied Navigation Using SAR Images and Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用 SAR 图像和神经网络进行 GPS 拒绝导航
abstract: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAV) often rely on GPS for navigation. GPS signals, however, are very low in power and easily jammed or otherwise disrupted. This paper presents a method for determining the navigation errors present at the beginning of a GPS-denied period utilizing data from a synthetic aperture radar (SAR) system. This is accomplished by comparing an online-generated SAR image with a reference image obtained a priori. The distortions relative to the reference image are learned and exploited with a convolutional neural network to recover the initial navigational errors, which can be used to recover the true flight trajectory throughout the synthetic aperture. The proposed neural network approach is able to learn to predict the initial errors on both simulated and real SAR image data.
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAV) often rely on GPS for navigation. GPS signals, however, are very low in power and easily jammed or otherwise disrupted. This paper presents a method for determining the navigation errors present at the beginning of a GPS-denied period utilizing data from a synthetic aperture radar (SAR) system. This is accomplished by comparing an online-generated SAR image with a reference image obtained a priori. The distortions relative to the reference image are learned and exploited with a convolutional neural network to recover the initial navigational errors, which can be used to recover the true flight trajectory throughout the synthetic aperture. The proposed neural network approach is able to learn to predict the initial errors on both simulated and real SAR image data.
abstract_zh: 无人机 (UAV) 通常依靠 GPS 进行导航。然而，GPS 信号的功率非常低，很容易受到干扰或其他干扰。本文提出了一种利用合成孔径雷达 (SAR) 系统的数据来确定 GPS 失效期开始时存在的导航误差的方法。这是通过将在线生成的 SAR 图像与先验获得的参考图像进行比较来实现的。通过卷积神经网络学习和利用相对于参考图像的失真来恢复初始导航误差，这可用于恢复整个合成孔径的真实飞行轨迹。所提出的神经网络方法能够学习预测模拟和真实 SAR 图像数据的初始误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像和卷积神经网络，在GPS信号受阻环境下估计无人机初始导航误差的方法。
AI.motivation: 无人机导航高度依赖GPS，但其信号易受干扰导致导航失效，需开发无需GPS的替代导航方案。
AI.method: 通过比对实时生成的SAR图像与预先获取的参考图像，利用卷积神经网络学习图像失真特征以恢复初始导航误差。
AI.result: 该方法在模拟数据和真实SAR图像中均能有效预测初始误差，成功恢复飞行轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 神经网络结合SAR图像可有效解决GPS拒止环境下的导航问题，为相关领域提供新思路。

ai_content.result: 该方法在模拟数据和真实SAR图像中均能有效预测初始误差，成功恢复飞行轨迹。
ai_content.conclusion: 神经网络结合SAR图像可有效解决GPS拒止环境下的导航问题，为相关领域提供新思路。

authors_text: Siyuan Feng,Piotr Żelasko,Laureano Moro-Velázquez,Ali Abavisani,Mark Hasegawa-Johnson,Odette Scharenborg,Najim Dehak
title: How Phonotactics Affect Multilingual and Zero-shot ASR Performance
title_zh: 语音策略如何影响多语言和零样本 ASR 性能
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE ICASSP 2021. The first 2 authors contributed equally to this work
comments: Accepted for publication in IEEE ICASSP 2021. The first 2 authors contributed equally to this work
abstract: The idea of combining multiple languages' recordings to train a single automatic speech recognition (ASR) model brings the promise of the emergence of universal speech representation. Recently, a Transformer encoder-decoder model has been shown to leverage multilingual data well in IPA transcriptions of languages presented during training. However, the representations it learned were not successful in zero-shot transfer to unseen languages. Because that model lacks an explicit factorization of the acoustic model (AM) and language model (LM), it is unclear to what degree the performance suffered from differences in pronunciation or the mismatch in phonotactics. To gain more insight into the factors limiting zero-shot ASR transfer, we replace the encoder-decoder with a hybrid ASR system consisting of a separate AM and LM. Then, we perform an extensive evaluation of monolingual, multilingual, and crosslingual (zero-shot) acoustic and language models on a set of 13 phonetically diverse languages. We show that the gain from modeling crosslingual phonotactics is limited, and imposing a too strong model can hurt the zero-shot transfer. Furthermore, we find that a multilingual LM hurts a multilingual ASR system's performance, and retaining only the target language's phonotactic data in LM training is preferable.
summary: The idea of combining multiple languages' recordings to train a single automatic speech recognition (ASR) model brings the promise of the emergence of universal speech representation. Recently, a Transformer encoder-decoder model has been shown to leverage multilingual data well in IPA transcriptions of languages presented during training. However, the representations it learned were not successful in zero-shot transfer to unseen languages. Because that model lacks an explicit factorization of the acoustic model (AM) and language model (LM), it is unclear to what degree the performance suffered from differences in pronunciation or the mismatch in phonotactics. To gain more insight into the factors limiting zero-shot ASR transfer, we replace the encoder-decoder with a hybrid ASR system consisting of a separate AM and LM. Then, we perform an extensive evaluation of monolingual, multilingual, and crosslingual (zero-shot) acoustic and language models on a set of 13 phonetically diverse languages. We show that the gain from modeling crosslingual phonotactics is limited, and imposing a too strong model can hurt the zero-shot transfer. Furthermore, we find that a multilingual LM hurts a multilingual ASR system's performance, and retaining only the target language's phonotactic data in LM training is preferable.
abstract_zh: 结合多种语言的录音来训练单个自动语音识别（ASR）模型的想法带来了通用语音表示出现的希望。最近，Transformer 编码器-解码器模型已被证明可以在训练期间呈现的语言的 IPA 转录中很好地利用多语言数据。然而，它学到的表示在零样本迁移到未见过的语言方面并不成功。由于该模型缺乏声学模型 (AM) 和语言模型 (LM) 的显式分解，因此尚不清楚发音差异或语音策略不匹配对性能的影响有多大。为了更深入地了解限制零样本 ASR 传输的因素，我们用由单独的 AM 和 LM 组成的混合 ASR 系统替换了编码器-解码器。然后，我们对 13 种语音不同的语言进行单语言、多语言和跨语言（零样本）声学和语言模型的广泛评估。我们表明，跨语言语音策略建模的收益是有限的，并且强加一个太强的模型可能会损害零样本迁移。此外，我们发现多语言 LM 会损害多语言 ASR 系统的性能，并且在 LM 训练中仅保留目标语言的语音数据是更好的选择。

AI.tldr: 本文研究音系学对多语言和零样本语音识别（ASR）性能的影响，通过对比混合声学模型与语言模型的性能差异，探讨零样本转移的限制因素。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer模型在多语言ASR中表现良好，但零样本转移效果不佳，可能因未明确区分声学模型（AM）与语言模型（LM），导致音系差异和模型过强影响性能。
AI.method: 采用混合ASR系统（独立AM与LM），对13种语音多样性语言进行单语、多语及跨语言（零样本）模型的广泛评估，分析音系建模对性能的影响。
AI.result: 跨语言音系建模收益有限，强模型可能损害零样本性能；多语言LM降低系统表现，仅保留目标语言音系数据的LM效果更优。
AI.conclusion: 音系差异是零样本ASR的关键瓶颈，训练语言模型时应优先保留目标语言的音系数据以提升性能。

authors_text: Wen Huang,Kevin Labille,Xintao Wu,Dongwon Lee,Neil Heffernan
title: Achieving User-Side Fairness in Contextual Bandits
title_zh: 在上下文强盗中实现用户端公平
abstract: Personalized recommendation based on multi-arm bandit (MAB) algorithms has shown to lead to high utility and efficiency as it can dynamically adapt the recommendation strategy based on feedback. However, unfairness could incur in personalized recommendation. In this paper, we study how to achieve user-side fairness in personalized recommendation. We formulate our fair personalized recommendation as a modified contextual bandit and focus on achieving fairness on the individual whom is being recommended an item as opposed to achieving fairness on the items that are being recommended. We introduce and define a metric that captures the fairness in terms of rewards received for both the privileged and protected groups. We develop a fair contextual bandit algorithm, Fair-LinUCB, that improves upon the traditional LinUCB algorithm to achieve group-level fairness of users. Our algorithm detects and monitors unfairness while it learns to recommend personalized videos to students to achieve high efficiency. We provide a theoretical regret analysis and show that our algorithm has a slightly higher regret bound than LinUCB. We conduct numerous experimental evaluations to compare the performances of our fair contextual bandit to that of LinUCB and show that our approach achieves group-level fairness while maintaining a high utility.
summary: Personalized recommendation based on multi-arm bandit (MAB) algorithms has shown to lead to high utility and efficiency as it can dynamically adapt the recommendation strategy based on feedback. However, unfairness could incur in personalized recommendation. In this paper, we study how to achieve user-side fairness in personalized recommendation. We formulate our fair personalized recommendation as a modified contextual bandit and focus on achieving fairness on the individual whom is being recommended an item as opposed to achieving fairness on the items that are being recommended. We introduce and define a metric that captures the fairness in terms of rewards received for both the privileged and protected groups. We develop a fair contextual bandit algorithm, Fair-LinUCB, that improves upon the traditional LinUCB algorithm to achieve group-level fairness of users. Our algorithm detects and monitors unfairness while it learns to recommend personalized videos to students to achieve high efficiency. We provide a theoretical regret analysis and show that our algorithm has a slightly higher regret bound than LinUCB. We conduct numerous experimental evaluations to compare the performances of our fair contextual bandit to that of LinUCB and show that our approach achieves group-level fairness while maintaining a high utility.
abstract_zh: 基于多臂老虎机（MAB）算法的个性化推荐已被证明具有很高的实用性和效率，因为它可以根据反馈动态调整推荐策略。然而，个性化推荐可能会带来不公平。本文研究如何在个性化推荐中实现用户侧的公平性。我们将公平的个性化推荐制定为修改后的上下文强盗，并专注于对被推荐项目的个人实现公平，而不是对所推荐的项目实现公平。我们引入并定义了一个衡量特权和受保护群体获得奖励的公平性的指标。我们开发了一种公平的上下文强盗算法Fair-LinUCB，该算法在传统LinUCB算法的基础上进行了改进，以实现用户的组级公平性。我们的算法检测和监控不公平现象，同时学习向学生推荐个性化视频以实现高效率。我们提供了理论上的后悔分析，并表明我们的算法具有比 LinUCB 稍高的后悔界限。我们进行了大量的实验评估，将公平上下文老虎机的性能与 LinUCB 的性能进行比较，并表明我们的方法在保持高效用的同时实现了群体级别的公平性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在上下文老虎机框架中实现个性化推荐的用户侧公平性，提出了一种改进的公平算法Fair-LinUCB。
AI.motivation: 基于多臂老虎机的个性化推荐虽高效，但可能产生不公平现象。传统方法侧重物品公平性，而本文关注推荐过程中对不同用户群体的公平性保障。
AI.method: 提出Fair-LinUCB算法，在LinUCB基础上引入用户群体奖励公平性度量，通过动态监测和调整推荐策略实现组间公平性，同时保持高效率。
AI.result: 理论分析显示算法 regret 较传统LinUCB略高，实验验证其在保证推荐效用的同时有效实现了用户群体间的公平性。
AI.conclusion: Fair-LinUCB算法成功平衡了推荐系统的公平性与效率，为个性化推荐中的用户侧公平性问题提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Achieving User-Side Fairness in Contextual Bandits 在上下文强盗中实现用户端公平 Personalized recommendation based on multi-arm bandit (MAB) algorithms has shown to lead to high utility and efficiency as it can dynamically adapt the recommendation strategy based on feedback. However, unfairness could incur in personalized recommendation. In this paper, we study how to achieve user-side fairness in personalized recommendation. We formulate our fair personalized recommendation as a modified contextual bandit and focus on achieving fairness on the individual whom is being recommended an item as opposed to achieving fairness on the items that are being recommended. We introduce and define a metric that captures the fairness in terms of rewards received for both the privileged and protected groups. We develop a fair contextual bandit algorithm, Fair-LinUCB, that improves upon the traditional LinUCB algorithm to achieve group-level fairness of users. Our algorithm detects and monitors unfairness while it learns to recommend personalized videos to students to achieve high efficiency. We provide a theoretical regret analysis and show that our algorithm has a slightly higher regret bound than LinUCB. We conduct numerous experimental evaluations to compare the performances of our fair contextual bandit to that of LinUCB and show that our approach achieves group-level fairness while maintaining a high utility. 基于多臂老虎机（MAB）算法的个性化推荐已被证明具有很高的实用性和效率，因为它可以根据反馈动态调整推荐策略。然而，个性化推荐可能会带来不公平。本文研究如何在个性化推荐中实现用户侧的公平性。我们将公平的个性化推荐制定为修改后的上下文强盗，并专注于对被推荐项目的个人实现公平，而不是对所推荐的项目实现公平。我们引入并定义了一个衡量特权和受保护群体获得奖励的公平性的指标。我们开发了一种公平的上下文强盗算法Fair-LinUCB，该算法在传统LinUCB算法的基础上进行了改进，以实现用户的组级公平性。我们的算法检测和监控不公平现象，同时学习向学生推荐个性化视频以实现高效率。我们提供了理论上的后悔分析，并表明我们的算法具有比 LinUCB 稍高的后悔界限。我们进行了大量的实验评估，将公平上下文老虎机的性能与 LinUCB 的性能进行比较，并表明我们的方法在保持高效用的同时实现了群体级别的公平性。 本文研究如何在上下文老虎机框架中实现个性化推荐的用户侧公平性，提出了一种改进的公平算法Fair-LinUCB。 Wen Huang,Kevin Labille,Xintao Wu,Dongwon Lee,Neil Heffernan cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Thibault Doutre,Wei Han,Min Ma,Zhiyun Lu,Chung-Cheng Chiu,Ruoming Pang,Arun Narayanan,Ananya Misra,Yu Zhang,Liangliang Cao
title: Improving Streaming Automatic Speech Recognition With Non-Streaming Model Distillation On Unsupervised Data
title_zh: 通过对无监督数据进行非流式模型蒸馏来改进流式自动语音识别
abstract: Streaming end-to-end automatic speech recognition (ASR) models are widely used on smart speakers and on-device applications. Since these models are expected to transcribe speech with minimal latency, they are constrained to be causal with no future context, compared to their non-streaming counterparts. Consequently, streaming models usually perform worse than non-streaming models. We propose a novel and effective learning method by leveraging a non-streaming ASR model as a teacher to generate transcripts on an arbitrarily large data set, which is then used to distill knowledge into streaming ASR models. This way, we scale the training of streaming models to up to 3 million hours of YouTube audio. Experiments show that our approach can significantly reduce the word error rate (WER) of RNNT models not only on LibriSpeech but also on YouTube data in four languages. For example, in French, we are able to reduce the WER by 16.4% relatively to a baseline streaming model by leveraging a non-streaming teacher model trained on the same amount of labeled data as the baseline.
summary: Streaming end-to-end automatic speech recognition (ASR) models are widely used on smart speakers and on-device applications. Since these models are expected to transcribe speech with minimal latency, they are constrained to be causal with no future context, compared to their non-streaming counterparts. Consequently, streaming models usually perform worse than non-streaming models. We propose a novel and effective learning method by leveraging a non-streaming ASR model as a teacher to generate transcripts on an arbitrarily large data set, which is then used to distill knowledge into streaming ASR models. This way, we scale the training of streaming models to up to 3 million hours of YouTube audio. Experiments show that our approach can significantly reduce the word error rate (WER) of RNNT models not only on LibriSpeech but also on YouTube data in four languages. For example, in French, we are able to reduce the WER by 16.4% relatively to a baseline streaming model by leveraging a non-streaming teacher model trained on the same amount of labeled data as the baseline.
abstract_zh: 流式端到端自动语音识别（ASR）模型广泛用于智能扬声器和设备上应用程序。由于这些模型预计将以最小的延迟转录语音，因此与非流媒体模型相比，它们被限制为因果关系，没有未来的上下文。因此，流式模型的性能通常比非流式模型的性能更差。我们提出了一种新颖有效的学习方法，利用非流式 ASR 模型作为教师，在任意大的数据集上生成转录本，然后将其用于将知识提炼到流式 ASR 模型中。通过这种方式，我们将流媒体模型的训练扩展到最多 300 万小时的 YouTube 音频。实验表明，我们的方法不仅可以显着降低 RNNT 模型在 LibriSpeech 上的字错误率 (WER)，还可以在四种语言的 YouTube 数据上显着降低字错误率 (WER)。例如，在法语中，通过利用在与基线相同数量的标记数据上训练的非流式教师模型，我们能够相对于基线流式模型将 WER 降低 16.4%。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出利用非流式模型在无监督数据上进行知识蒸馏，以提升流式自动语音识别（ASR）的性能。
AI.motivation: 流式ASR模型因需实时处理语音而无法使用未来上下文，导致性能通常弱于非流式模型。现有方法受限于标注数据规模，难以有效提升流式模型表现。
AI.method: 通过非流式ASR模型生成大规模无监督数据（如YouTube音频）的转录文本，再将知识蒸馏至流式模型中，训练数据量扩展至300万小时。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech和YouTube数据集的四国语言实验中，流式RNNT模型的词错误率（WER）显著降低，例如法语相对基线模型降低16.4%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过非流式模型与无监督数据结合，有效提升了流式ASR性能，为大规模数据训练提供了新思路。

title: Migratable AI: Personalizing Dialog Conversations with migration context
title_zh: 可迁移的人工智能：通过迁移上下文个性化对话
abstract: The migration of conversational AI agents across different embodiments in order to maintain the continuity of the task has been recently explored to further improve user experience. However, these migratable agents lack contextual understanding of the user information and the migrated device during the dialog conversations with the user. This opens the question of how an agent might behave when migrated into an embodiment for contextually predicting the next utterance. We collected a dataset from the dialog conversations between crowdsourced workers with the migration context involving personal and non-personal utterances in different settings (public or private) of embodiment into which the agent migrated. We trained the generative and information retrieval models on the dataset using with and without migration context and report the results of both qualitative metrics and human evaluation. We believe that the migration dataset would be useful for training future migratable AI systems.
summary: The migration of conversational AI agents across different embodiments in order to maintain the continuity of the task has been recently explored to further improve user experience. However, these migratable agents lack contextual understanding of the user information and the migrated device during the dialog conversations with the user. This opens the question of how an agent might behave when migrated into an embodiment for contextually predicting the next utterance. We collected a dataset from the dialog conversations between crowdsourced workers with the migration context involving personal and non-personal utterances in different settings (public or private) of embodiment into which the agent migrated. We trained the generative and information retrieval models on the dataset using with and without migration context and report the results of both qualitative metrics and human evaluation. We believe that the migration dataset would be useful for training future migratable AI systems.
abstract_zh: 最近已经探索了会话式人工智能代理在不同实施例之间的迁移，以保持任务的连续性，以进一步改善用户体验。然而，这些可迁移代理在与用户对话期间缺乏对用户信息和迁移设备的上下文理解。这提出了当代理迁移到用于根据上下文预测下一个话语的实施例时可能如何表现的问题。我们从众包工作人员之间的对话中收集了一个数据集，其中迁移上下文涉及代理迁移到的实施例的不同设置（公共或私人）中的个人和非个人话语。我们在有或没有迁移上下文的情况下在数据集上训练生成模型和信息检索模型，并报告定性指标和人工评估的结果。我们相信迁移数据集对于训练未来的可迁移人工智能系统很有用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何通过迁移上下文实现对话代理的个性化，解决迁移过程中上下文理解不足导致的行为不连贯问题。
AI.motivation: 现有可迁移对话代理缺乏对用户信息和迁移设备的上下文理解，导致迁移后行为预测不准确，影响对话连续性。
AI.method: 收集包含个人/非个人语句的迁移对话数据集，训练生成模型与信息检索模型，对比使用/不使用迁移上下文的效果，并通过人工评估验证。
AI.result: 实验表明迁移上下文显著提升模型生成质量，人工评估显示带迁移信息的模型更符合用户预期。
AI.conclusion: 迁移数据集为未来可迁移AI系统提供了关键训练资源，有助于提升跨设备对话的个性化连续性。

tldr: 本文研究了如何通过迁移上下文实现对话代理的个性化，解决迁移过程中上下文理解不足导致的行为不连贯问题。
motivation: 现有可迁移对话代理缺乏对用户信息和迁移设备的上下文理解，导致迁移后行为预测不准确，影响对话连续性。
method: 收集包含个人/非个人语句的迁移对话数据集，训练生成模型与信息检索模型，对比使用/不使用迁移上下文的效果，并通过人工评估验证。
result: 实验表明迁移上下文显著提升模型生成质量，人工评估显示带迁移信息的模型更符合用户预期。
conclusion: 迁移数据集为未来可迁移AI系统提供了关键训练资源，有助于提升跨设备对话的个性化连续性。
search_text: Migratable AI: Personalizing Dialog Conversations with migration context 可迁移的人工智能：通过迁移上下文个性化对话 The migration of conversational AI agents across different embodiments in order to maintain the continuity of the task has been recently explored to further improve user experience. However, these migratable agents lack contextual understanding of the user information and the migrated device during the dialog conversations with the user. This opens the question of how an agent might behave when migrated into an embodiment for contextually predicting the next utterance. We collected a dataset from the dialog conversations between crowdsourced workers with the migration context involving personal and non-personal utterances in different settings (public or private) of embodiment into which the agent migrated. We trained the generative and information retrieval models on the dataset using with and without migration context and report the results of both qualitative metrics and human evaluation. We believe that the migration dataset would be useful for training future migratable AI systems. 最近已经探索了会话式人工智能代理在不同实施例之间的迁移，以保持任务的连续性，以进一步改善用户体验。然而，这些可迁移代理在与用户对话期间缺乏对用户信息和迁移设备的上下文理解。这提出了当代理迁移到用于根据上下文预测下一个话语的实施例时可能如何表现的问题。我们从众包工作人员之间的对话中收集了一个数据集，其中迁移上下文涉及代理迁移到的实施例的不同设置（公共或私人）中的个人和非个人话语。我们在有或没有迁移上下文的情况下在数据集上训练生成模型和信息检索模型，并报告定性指标和人工评估的结果。我们相信迁移数据集对于训练未来的可迁移人工智能系统很有用。 本文研究了如何通过迁移上下文实现对话代理的个性化，解决迁移过程中上下文理解不足导致的行为不连贯问题。 Ravi Tejwani,Boris Katz,Cynthia Breazeal cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Debasmit Das,J. H. Moon,C. S. George Lee
title: Few-shot Image Recognition with Manifolds
title_zh: 使用流形的少样本图像识别
abstract: In this paper, we extend the traditional few-shot learning (FSL) problem to the situation when the source-domain data is not accessible but only high-level information in the form of class prototypes is available. This limited information setup for the FSL problem deserves much attention due to its implication of privacy-preserving inaccessibility to the source-domain data but it has rarely been addressed before. Because of limited training data, we propose a non-parametric approach to this FSL problem by assuming that all the class prototypes are structurally arranged on a manifold. Accordingly, we estimate the novel-class prototype locations by projecting the few-shot samples onto the average of the subspaces on which the surrounding classes lie. During classification, we again exploit the structural arrangement of the categories by inducing a Markov chain on the graph constructed with the class prototypes. This manifold distance obtained using the Markov chain is expected to produce better results compared to a traditional nearest-neighbor-based Euclidean distance. To evaluate our proposed framework, we have tested it on two image datasets - the large-scale ImageNet and the small-scale but fine-grained CUB-200. We have also studied parameter sensitivity to better understand our framework.
summary: In this paper, we extend the traditional few-shot learning (FSL) problem to the situation when the source-domain data is not accessible but only high-level information in the form of class prototypes is available. This limited information setup for the FSL problem deserves much attention due to its implication of privacy-preserving inaccessibility to the source-domain data but it has rarely been addressed before. Because of limited training data, we propose a non-parametric approach to this FSL problem by assuming that all the class prototypes are structurally arranged on a manifold. Accordingly, we estimate the novel-class prototype locations by projecting the few-shot samples onto the average of the subspaces on which the surrounding classes lie. During classification, we again exploit the structural arrangement of the categories by inducing a Markov chain on the graph constructed with the class prototypes. This manifold distance obtained using the Markov chain is expected to produce better results compared to a traditional nearest-neighbor-based Euclidean distance. To evaluate our proposed framework, we have tested it on two image datasets - the large-scale ImageNet and the small-scale but fine-grained CUB-200. We have also studied parameter sensitivity to better understand our framework.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们将传统的小样本学习（FSL）问题扩展到源域数据不可访问但仅以类原型形式提供的高级信息可用的情况。 FSL 问题的这种有限信息设置值得高度关注，因为它意味着源域数据无法访问隐私保护，但之前很少得到解决。由于训练数据有限，我们提出了一种非参数方法来解决这个 FSL 问题，假设所有类原型在结构上排列在流形上。因此，我们通过将少数样本投影到周围类所在的子空间的平均值上来估计新类原型位置。在分类过程中，我们再次通过在用类原型构建的图上引入马尔可夫链来利用类别的结构排列。与传统的基于最近邻的欧几里德距离相比，使用马尔可夫链获得的流形距离预计会产生更好的结果。为了评估我们提出的框架，我们在两个图像数据集上对其进行了测试 - 大规模 ImageNet 和小规模但细粒度的 CUB-200。我们还研究了参数敏感性，以更好地理解我们的框架。

AI.tldr: 本文将少样本图像识别问题扩展到源域数据不可用但仅提供类别原型信息的场景，提出基于流形结构的非参数方法。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本学习研究多依赖源域数据，但实际中数据隐私限制可能导致源域数据无法获取，需探索仅依赖类别原型信息的解决方案。
AI.method: 假设类别原型分布在流形结构上，通过投影到邻近类别子空间估计新类别原型，并构建马尔可夫链计算流形距离进行分类。
AI.result: 在ImageNet和CUB-200数据集上验证了方法有效性，分析了参数敏感性以优化框架性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的流形结构与马尔可夫链结合的方法，在源域数据受限场景下实现了有效的少样本图像识别，为隐私保护型学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Simon Stepputtis,Joseph Campbell,Mariano Phielipp,Stefan Lee,Chitta Baral,Heni Ben Amor
title: Language-Conditioned Imitation Learning for Robot Manipulation Tasks
title_zh: 机器人操作任务的语言条件模仿学习
comment: Accepted to the 34th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2020), Vancouver, Canada as spotlight presentation
comments: Accepted to the 34th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2020), Vancouver, Canada as spotlight presentation
abstract: Imitation learning is a popular approach for teaching motor skills to robots. However, most approaches focus on extracting policy parameters from execution traces alone (i.e., motion trajectories and perceptual data). No adequate communication channel exists between the human expert and the robot to describe critical aspects of the task, such as the properties of the target object or the intended shape of the motion. Motivated by insights into the human teaching process, we introduce a method for incorporating unstructured natural language into imitation learning. At training time, the expert can provide demonstrations along with verbal descriptions in order to describe the underlying intent (e.g., "go to the large green bowl"). The training process then interrelates these two modalities to encode the correlations between language, perception, and motion. The resulting language-conditioned visuomotor policies can be conditioned at runtime on new human commands and instructions, which allows for more fine-grained control over the trained policies while also reducing situational ambiguity. We demonstrate in a set of simulation experiments how our approach can learn language-conditioned manipulation policies for a seven-degree-of-freedom robot arm and compare the results to a variety of alternative methods.
summary: Imitation learning is a popular approach for teaching motor skills to robots. However, most approaches focus on extracting policy parameters from execution traces alone (i.e., motion trajectories and perceptual data). No adequate communication channel exists between the human expert and the robot to describe critical aspects of the task, such as the properties of the target object or the intended shape of the motion. Motivated by insights into the human teaching process, we introduce a method for incorporating unstructured natural language into imitation learning. At training time, the expert can provide demonstrations along with verbal descriptions in order to describe the underlying intent (e.g., "go to the large green bowl"). The training process then interrelates these two modalities to encode the correlations between language, perception, and motion. The resulting language-conditioned visuomotor policies can be conditioned at runtime on new human commands and instructions, which allows for more fine-grained control over the trained policies while also reducing situational ambiguity. We demonstrate in a set of simulation experiments how our approach can learn language-conditioned manipulation policies for a seven-degree-of-freedom robot arm and compare the results to a variety of alternative methods.
abstract_zh: 模仿学习是教授机器人运动技能的一种流行方法。然而，大多数方法侧重于仅从执行轨迹（即运动轨迹和感知数据）中提取策略参数。人类专家和机器人之间不存在足够的通信渠道来描述任务的关键方面，例如目标物体的属性或运动的预期形状。受对人类教学过程的洞察的启发，我们引入了一种将非结构化自然语言融入模仿学习的方法。在培训时，专家可以提供演示和口头描述，以描述潜在的意图（例如，“去绿色大碗”）。然后，训练过程将这两种模式相互关联，以编码语言、感知和运动之间的相关性。由此产生的语言条件视觉运动策略可以在运行时以新的人类命令和指令为条件，这允许对训练后的策略进行更细粒度的控制，同时也减少情境模糊性。我们在一组模拟实验中演示了我们的方法如何学习七自由度机器人手臂的语言条件操纵策略，并将结果与​​各种替代方法进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将自然语言融入机器人模仿学习的方法，通过语言条件化策略提升机械臂操作任务的控制精度。
AI.motivation: 传统模仿学习仅依赖运动轨迹和感知数据，缺乏人类专家与机器人之间关于任务关键信息（如目标物体属性、运动意图）的有效沟通渠道。
AI.method: 在训练阶段结合专家演示与自然语言描述（如'前往大型绿色碗'），建立语言、感知与运动的关联性编码，生成可运行时响应新指令的语言条件化视觉运动策略。
AI.result: 仿真实验表明该方法能有效学习七自由度机械臂的语言条件化操作策略，且性能优于多种对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 语言条件化模仿学习通过整合自然语言信息，显著提升了机器人策略的细粒度控制能力与场景适应性。

title: Zoom on the Keystrokes: Exploiting Video Calls for Keystroke Inference Attacks
title_zh: 放大击键：利用视频通话进行击键推理攻击
abstract: Due to recent world events, video calls have become the new norm for both personal and professional remote communication. However, if a participant in a video call is not careful, he/she can reveal his/her private information to others in the call. In this paper, we design and evaluate an attack framework to infer one type of such private information from the video stream of a call -- keystrokes, i.e., text typed during the call. We evaluate our video-based keystroke inference framework using different experimental settings and parameters, including different webcams, video resolutions, keyboards, clothing, and backgrounds. Our relatively high keystroke inference accuracies under commonly occurring and realistic settings highlight the need for awareness and countermeasures against such attacks. Consequently, we also propose and evaluate effective mitigation techniques that can automatically protect users when they type during a video call.
summary: Due to recent world events, video calls have become the new norm for both personal and professional remote communication. However, if a participant in a video call is not careful, he/she can reveal his/her private information to others in the call. In this paper, we design and evaluate an attack framework to infer one type of such private information from the video stream of a call -- keystrokes, i.e., text typed during the call. We evaluate our video-based keystroke inference framework using different experimental settings and parameters, including different webcams, video resolutions, keyboards, clothing, and backgrounds. Our relatively high keystroke inference accuracies under commonly occurring and realistic settings highlight the need for awareness and countermeasures against such attacks. Consequently, we also propose and evaluate effective mitigation techniques that can automatically protect users when they type during a video call.
abstract_zh: 由于最近发生的世界事件，视频通话已成为个人和专业远程通信的新规范。然而，如果视频通话的参与者不小心，他/她可能会向通话中的其他人透露他/她的私人信息。在本文中，我们设计并评估了一种攻击框架，以从通话的视频流中推断出一种类型的此类私人信息——击键，即通话期间键入的文本。我们使用不同的实验设置和参数（包括不同的网络摄像头、视频分辨率、键盘、服装和背景）评估基于视频的击键推理框架。我们在常见和现实的环境下相对较高的击键推理精度凸显了针对此类攻击的认识和对策的必要性。因此，我们还提出并评估了有效的缓解技术，这些技术可以在用户在视频通话期间打字时自动保护他们。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并评估了一种通过视频通话推断键盘输入的攻击框架，揭示了视频通话中的隐私泄露风险。
AI.motivation: 随着视频通话成为常态，用户可能无意中通过视频泄露隐私信息，尤其是键盘输入内容，需对此类攻击进行研究并提出防护措施。
AI.method: 基于视频流分析，通过不同摄像头、分辨率、键盘类型及背景等实验设置，训练机器学习模型推断按键动作，并验证防护技术的有效性。
AI.result: 在常见场景下实现了较高的键盘输入推断准确率，同时提出的自动防护技术能有效减少信息泄露风险。
AI.conclusion: 视频通话存在严重的键盘输入泄露隐患，需提高用户安全意识并采用自动防护技术以应对此类攻击。

authors_text: Maurice Rahme,Ian Abraham,Matthew L. Elwin,Todd D. Murphey
title: Dynamics and Domain Randomized Gait Modulation with Bezier Curves for Sim-to-Real Legged Locomotion
title_zh: 使用贝塞尔曲线进行动力学和域随机步态调制，实现模拟到真实的腿部运动
abstract: We present a sim-to-real framework that uses dynamics and domain randomized offline reinforcement learning to enhance open-loop gaits for legged robots, allowing them to traverse uneven terrain without sensing foot impacts. Our approach, D$^2$-Randomized Gait Modulation with Bezier Curves (D$^2$-GMBC), uses augmented random search with randomized dynamics and terrain to train, in simulation, a policy that modifies the parameters and output of an open-loop Bezier curve gait generator for quadrupedal robots. The policy, using only inertial measurements, enables the robot to traverse unknown rough terrain, even when the robot's physical parameters do not match the open-loop model. We compare the resulting policy to hand-tuned Bezier Curve gaits and to policies trained without randomization, both in simulation and on a real quadrupedal robot. With D$^2$-GMBC, across a variety of experiments on unobserved and unknown uneven terrain, the robot walks significantly farther than with either hand-tuned gaits or gaits learned without domain randomization. Additionally, using D$^2$-GMBC, the robot can walk laterally and rotate while on the rough terrain, even though it was trained only for forward walking.
summary: We present a sim-to-real framework that uses dynamics and domain randomized offline reinforcement learning to enhance open-loop gaits for legged robots, allowing them to traverse uneven terrain without sensing foot impacts. Our approach, D$^2$-Randomized Gait Modulation with Bezier Curves (D$^2$-GMBC), uses augmented random search with randomized dynamics and terrain to train, in simulation, a policy that modifies the parameters and output of an open-loop Bezier curve gait generator for quadrupedal robots. The policy, using only inertial measurements, enables the robot to traverse unknown rough terrain, even when the robot's physical parameters do not match the open-loop model. We compare the resulting policy to hand-tuned Bezier Curve gaits and to policies trained without randomization, both in simulation and on a real quadrupedal robot. With D$^2$-GMBC, across a variety of experiments on unobserved and unknown uneven terrain, the robot walks significantly farther than with either hand-tuned gaits or gaits learned without domain randomization. Additionally, using D$^2$-GMBC, the robot can walk laterally and rotate while on the rough terrain, even though it was trained only for forward walking.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个模拟真实的框架，该框架使用动力学和领域随机离线强化学习来增强腿式机器人的开环步态，使它们能够穿越不平坦的地形而无需感知脚部冲击。我们的方法 D$^2$-贝塞尔曲线随机步态调制 (D$^2$-GMBC) 使用具有随机动态和地形的增强随机搜索，在模拟中训练修改四足机器人开环贝塞尔曲线步态生成器的参数和输出的策略。该策略仅使用惯性测量，使机器人能够穿越未知的崎岖地形，即使机器人的物理参数与开环模型不匹配。我们将最终的策略与手动调整的贝塞尔曲线步态以及未经随机化训练的策略进行比较，无论是在模拟中还是在真实的四足机器人上。借助 D$^2$-GMBC，在未观察到的和未知的不平坦地形上进行了各种实验，机器人比手动调整步态或在没有域随机化的情况下学习的步态行走得更远。此外，使用 D$^2$-GMBC，机器人可以在崎岖的地形上横向行走和旋转，即使它只接受过向前行走的训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合动力学与领域随机化的离线强化学习框架，通过贝塞尔曲线调整四足机器人步态，实现模拟到现实的复杂地形适应性行走。
AI.motivation: 传统开环步态在未知地形中鲁棒性不足，且机器人物理参数与模型不匹配时性能下降，需开发更适应复杂环境的步态控制方法。
AI.method: 提出D²-GMBC方法，利用随机化动力学与地形进行模拟训练，通过增强随机搜索优化贝塞尔曲线步态参数，仅依赖惯性测量实现地形适应。
AI.result: 实验表明，D²-GMBC在多种未知粗糙地形中行走距离显著优于手工调整步态及无随机化策略，且具备横向移动与旋转能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了四足机器人在模拟到现实场景中的地形适应性，验证了领域随机化与贝塞尔曲线结合的步态优化方案的可行性。

authors_text: Duncan C McElfresh,Michael Curry,Tuomas Sandholm,John P Dickerson
title: Improving Policy-Constrained Kidney Exchange via Pre-Screening
title_zh: 通过预筛选改善政策限制的肾脏交换
abstract: In barter exchanges, participants swap goods with one another without exchanging money; exchanges are often facilitated by a central clearinghouse, with the goal of maximizing the aggregate quality (or number) of swaps. Barter exchanges are subject to many forms of uncertainty--in participant preferences, the feasibility and quality of various swaps, and so on. Our work is motivated by kidney exchange, a real-world barter market in which patients in need of a kidney transplant swap their willing living donors, in order to find a better match. Modern exchanges include 2- and 3-way swaps, making the kidney exchange clearing problem NP-hard. Planned transplants often fail for a variety of reasons--if the donor organ is refused by the recipient's medical team, or if the donor and recipient are found to be medically incompatible. Due to 2- and 3-way swaps, failed transplants can "cascade" through an exchange; one US-based exchange estimated that about 85% of planned transplants failed in 2019. Many optimization-based approaches have been designed to avoid these failures; however most exchanges cannot implement these methods due to legal and policy constraints. Instead we consider a setting where exchanges can query the preferences of certain donors and recipients--asking whether they would accept a particular transplant. We characterize this as a two-stage decision problem, in which the exchange program (a) queries a small number of transplants before committing to a matching, and (b) constructs a matching according to fixed policy. We show that selecting these edges is a challenging combinatorial problem, which is non-monotonic and non-submodular, in addition to being NP-hard. We propose both a greedy heuristic and a Monte Carlo tree search, which outperforms previous approaches, using experiments on both synthetic data and real kidney exchange data from the United Network for Organ Sharing.
summary: In barter exchanges, participants swap goods with one another without exchanging money; exchanges are often facilitated by a central clearinghouse, with the goal of maximizing the aggregate quality (or number) of swaps. We show that selecting these edges is a challenging combinatorial problem, which is non-monotonic and non-submodular, in addition to being NP-hard. We propose both a greedy heuristic and a Monte Carlo tree search, which outperforms previous approaches, using experiments on both synthetic data and real kidney exchange data from the United Network for Organ Sharing.
abstract_zh: 在易货交换中，参与者相互交换货物而不交换金钱；交换通常由中央清算所促进，其目标是最大化掉期的总体质量（或数量）。易货交换受到多种形式的不确定性的影响——参与者的偏好、各种交换的可行性和质量等等。我们的工作受到肾脏交换的推动，这是一个现实世界的易货市场，需要肾移植的患者交换他们愿意的活体捐赠者，以便找到更好的匹配。现代交换包括 2 向和 3 向交换，使得肾脏交换清算问题成为 NP 难题。计划中的移植常常会因各种原因而失败——如果捐赠器官被接受者的医疗团队拒绝，或者如果发现捐赠者和接受者在医学上不相容。由于 2 路和 3 路交换，失败的移植可以通过交换“级联”；一家美国交易所估计，2019 年约 85% 的计划移植失败。许多基于优化的方法旨在避免这些失败；然而，由于法律和政策的限制，大多数交易所无法实施这些方法。相反，我们考虑一种设置，交易所可以查询某些捐赠者和接受者的偏好——询问他们是否会接受特定的移植。我们将其描述为一个两阶段决策问题，其中交换程序（a）在提交匹配之前查询少量移植，以及（b）根据固定策略构建匹配。我们表明，选择这些边是一个具有挑战性的组合问题，除了 NP 困难之外，它还是非单调和非子模的。我们提出了贪婪启发式搜索和蒙特卡罗树搜索，这优于以前的方法，使用来自器官共享联合网络的合成数据和真实肾脏交换数据的实验。

AI.tldr: 通过预筛选优化政策约束下的肾脏交换匹配问题
AI.motivation: 肾脏交换中因医疗兼容性问题导致移植失败率高达85%，现有优化方法受政策限制难以实施，需在政策框架内提升匹配成功率
AI.method: 提出两阶段决策模型：先预筛选少量移植方案，再基于固定政策构建匹配；设计贪心启发式算法与蒙特卡洛树搜索算法
AI.result: 在合成数据和美国器官共享网络真实数据中，新方法均优于传统方法，有效降低匹配失败风险
AI.conclusion: 预筛选策略能在政策约束下显著提升肾脏交换匹配效率，为复杂约束下的资源分配问题提供新思路
