search_text: Improving Policy-Constrained Kidney Exchange via Pre-Screening 通过预筛选改善政策限制的肾脏交换 In barter exchanges, participants swap goods with one another without exchanging money; exchanges are often facilitated by a central clearinghouse, with the goal of maximizing the aggregate quality (or number) of swaps. Barter exchanges are subject to many forms of uncertainty--in participant preferences, the feasibility and quality of various swaps, and so on. Our work is motivated by kidney exchange, a real-world barter market in which patients in need of a kidney transplant swap their willing living donors, in order to find a better match. Modern exchanges include 2- and 3-way swaps, making the kidney exchange clearing problem NP-hard. Planned transplants often fail for a variety of reasons--if the donor organ is refused by the recipient's medical team, or if the donor and recipient are found to be medically incompatible. Due to 2- and 3-way swaps, failed transplants can "cascade" through an exchange; one US-based exchange estimated that about 85% of planned transplants failed in 2019. Many optimization-based approaches have been designed to avoid these failures; however most exchanges cannot implement these methods due to legal and policy constraints. Instead we consider a setting where exchanges can query the preferences of certain donors and recipients--asking whether they would accept a particular transplant. We characterize this as a two-stage decision problem, in which the exchange program (a) queries a small number of transplants before committing to a matching, and (b) constructs a matching according to fixed policy. We show that selecting these edges is a challenging combinatorial problem, which is non-monotonic and non-submodular, in addition to being NP-hard. We propose both a greedy heuristic and a Monte Carlo tree search, which outperforms previous approaches, using experiments on both synthetic data and real kidney exchange data from the United Network for Organ Sharing. 在易货交换中，参与者相互交换货物而不交换金钱；交换通常由中央清算所促进，其目标是最大化掉期的总体质量（或数量）。易货交换受到多种形式的不确定性的影响——参与者的偏好、各种交换的可行性和质量等等。我们的工作受到肾脏交换的推动，这是一个现实世界的易货市场，需要肾移植的患者交换他们愿意的活体捐赠者，以便找到更好的匹配。现代交换包括 2 向和 3 向交换，使得肾脏交换清算问题成为 NP 难题。计划中的移植常常会因各种原因而失败——如果捐赠器官被接受者的医疗团队拒绝，或者如果发现捐赠者和接受者在医学上不相容。由于 2 路和 3 路交换，失败的移植可以通过交换“级联”；一家美国交易所估计，2019 年约 85% 的计划移植失败。许多基于优化的方法旨在避免这些失败；然而，由于法律和政策的限制，大多数交易所无法实施这些方法。相反，我们考虑一种设置，交易所可以查询某些捐赠者和接受者的偏好——询问他们是否会接受特定的移植。我们将其描述为一个两阶段决策问题，其中交换程序（a）在提交匹配之前查询少量移植，以及（b）根据固定策略构建匹配。我们表明，选择这些边是一个具有挑战性的组合问题，除了 NP 困难之外，它还是非单调和非子模的。我们提出了贪婪启发式搜索和蒙特卡罗树搜索，这优于以前的方法，使用来自器官共享联合网络的合成数据和真实肾脏交换数据的实验。 通过预筛选优化政策约束下的肾脏交换匹配问题 Duncan C McElfresh,Michael Curry,Tuomas Sandholm,John P Dickerson cs.AI

title: Learning Patterns in Imaginary Vowels for an Intelligent Brain Computer Interface (BCI) Design
title_zh: 智能脑机接口 (BCI) 设计的虚元音学习模式
abstract: Technology advancements made it easy to measure non-invasive and high-quality electroencephalograph (EEG) signals from human's brain. Hence, development of robust and high-performance AI algorithms becomes crucial to properly process the EEG signals and recognize the patterns, which lead to an appropriate control signal. Despite the advancements in processing the motor imagery EEG signals, the healthcare applications, such as emotion detection, are still in the early stages of AI design. In this paper, we propose a modular framework for the recognition of vowels as the AI part of a brain computer interface system. We carefully designed the modules to discriminate the English vowels given the raw EEG signals, and meanwhile avoid the typical issued with the data-poor environments like most of the healthcare applications. The proposed framework consists of appropriate signal segmentation, filtering, extraction of spectral features, reducing the dimensions by means of principle component analysis, and finally a multi-class classification by decision-tree-based support vector machine (DT-SVM). The performance of our framework was evaluated by a combination of test-set and resubstitution (also known as apparent) error rates. We provide the algorithms of the proposed framework to make it easy for future researchers and developers who want to follow the same workflow.
summary: Technology advancements made it easy to measure non-invasive and high-quality electroencephalograph (EEG) signals from human's brain. Hence, development of robust and high-performance AI algorithms becomes crucial to properly process the EEG signals and recognize the patterns, which lead to an appropriate control signal. Despite the advancements in processing the motor imagery EEG signals, the healthcare applications, such as emotion detection, are still in the early stages of AI design. In this paper, we propose a modular framework for the recognition of vowels as the AI part of a brain computer interface system. We carefully designed the modules to discriminate the English vowels given the raw EEG signals, and meanwhile avoid the typical issued with the data-poor environments like most of the healthcare applications. The proposed framework consists of appropriate signal segmentation, filtering, extraction of spectral features, reducing the dimensions by means of principle component analysis, and finally a multi-class classification by decision-tree-based support vector machine (DT-SVM). The performance of our framework was evaluated by a combination of test-set and resubstitution (also known as apparent) error rates. We provide the algorithms of the proposed framework to make it easy for future researchers and developers who want to follow the same workflow.
abstract_zh: 技术进步使得测量人脑的非侵入性高质量脑电图 (EEG) 信号变得更加容易。因此，开发鲁棒且高性能的人工智能算法对于正确处理脑电图信号并识别模式至关重要，从而产生适当的控制信号。尽管在处理运动想象脑电图信号方面取得了进步，但情绪检测等医疗保健应用仍处于人工智能设计的早期阶段。在本文中，我们提出了一个用于元音识别的模块化框架，作为脑机接口系统的人工智能部分。我们精心设计了模块，以在给定原始脑电图信号的情况下区分英语元音，同时避免像大多数医疗保健应用程序那样在数据匮乏的环境中出现的典型问题。所提出的框架包括适当的信号分割、滤波、频谱特征提取、通过主成分分析降低维度，最后通过基于决策树的支持向量机（DT-SVM）进行多类分类。我们的框架的性能是通过测试集和重新替换（也称为表观）错误率的组合来评估的。我们提供所提出框架的算法，以便未来想要遵循相同工作流程的研究人员和开发人员能够轻松完成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种模块化框架，用于通过脑机接口（BCI）系统识别元音，以处理脑电图（EEG）信号。
AI.motivation: 尽管运动想象EEG信号处理技术已取得进展，但医疗健康应用（如情绪检测）的AI设计仍处于早期阶段，需解决数据匮乏环境下的模式识别问题。
AI.method: 框架包含信号分段、滤波、频谱特征提取、主成分分析降维及基于决策树的支持向量机（DT-SVM）多分类。
AI.result: 通过测试集和重置错误率评估框架性能，并提供算法以供未来研究者复用。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了数据匮乏场景下的元音识别问题，为BCI系统的智能设计提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Nabit Bajwa,Kedar Bajwa,Atif Rana,M. Faique Shakeel,Kashif Haqqi,Suleiman Ali Khan
title: A generalized deep learning model for multi-disease Chest X-Ray diagnostics
title_zh: 用于多疾病胸部 X 射线诊断的通用深度学习模型
abstract: We investigate the generalizability of deep convolutional neural network (CNN) on the task of disease classification from chest x-rays collected over multiple sites. We systematically train the model using datasets from three independent sites with different patient populations: National Institute of Health (NIH), Stanford University Medical Centre (CheXpert), and Shifa International Hospital (SIH). We formulate a sequential training approach and demonstrate that the model produces generalized prediction performance using held out test sets from the three sites. Our model generalizes better when trained on multiple datasets, with the CheXpert-Shifa-NET model performing significantly better (p-values < 0.05) than the models trained on individual datasets for 3 out of the 4 distinct disease classes. The code for training the model will be made available open source at: www.github.com/link-to-code at the time of publication.
summary: We investigate the generalizability of deep convolutional neural network (CNN) on the task of disease classification from chest x-rays collected over multiple sites. We systematically train the model using datasets from three independent sites with different patient populations: National Institute of Health (NIH), Stanford University Medical Centre (CheXpert), and Shifa International Hospital (SIH). We formulate a sequential training approach and demonstrate that the model produces generalized prediction performance using held out test sets from the three sites. Our model generalizes better when trained on multiple datasets, with the CheXpert-Shifa-NET model performing significantly better (p-values < 0.05) than the models trained on individual datasets for 3 out of the 4 distinct disease classes. The code for training the model will be made available open source at: www.github.com/link-to-code at the time of publication.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 在根据多个站点收集的胸部 X 射线进行疾病分类任务中的通用性。我们使用来自三个独立地点不同患者群体的数据集系统地训练模型：美国国立卫生研究院 (NIH)、斯坦福大学医学中心 (CheXpert) 和 Shifa 国际医院 (SIH)。我们制定了顺序训练方法，并证明该模型使用来自三个站点的测试集产生广义预测性能。当在多个数据集上进行训练时，我们的模型具有更好的泛化能力，CheXpert-Shifa-NET 模型的表现明显优于在 4 个不同疾病类别中的 3 个数据集上训练的模型（p 值 < 0.05）。用于训练模型的代码将在发布时在 www.github.com/link-to-code 上开源。

AI.tldr: 开发一种可泛化的深度学习模型，用于多疾病胸部X光诊断。
AI.motivation: 解决不同医疗机构胸部X光数据分布差异导致的模型泛化能力不足问题。
AI.method: 采用顺序训练方法，结合来自NIH、CheXpert和Shifa International Hospital三个独立站点的数据集进行联合训练。
AI.result: 联合训练模型在3/4疾病类别上显著优于单数据集训练模型（p<0.05），并在三个测试集上均表现出良好泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 多数据源联合训练能有效提升模型跨机构诊断的泛化能力，代码将开源共享。

ai_content.tldr: 开发一种可泛化的深度学习模型，用于多疾病胸部X光诊断。
ai_content.motivation: 解决不同医疗机构胸部X光数据分布差异导致的模型泛化能力不足问题。
ai_content.method: 采用顺序训练方法，结合来自NIH、CheXpert和Shifa International Hospital三个独立站点的数据集进行联合训练。
ai_content.result: 联合训练模型在3/4疾病类别上显著优于单数据集训练模型（p<0.05），并在三个测试集上均表现出良好泛化性能。
ai_content.conclusion: 多数据源联合训练能有效提升模型跨机构诊断的泛化能力，代码将开源共享。

search_text: A generalized deep learning model for multi-disease Chest X-Ray diagnostics 用于多疾病胸部 X 射线诊断的通用深度学习模型 We investigate the generalizability of deep convolutional neural network (CNN) on the task of disease classification from chest x-rays collected over multiple sites. We systematically train the model using datasets from three independent sites with different patient populations: National Institute of Health (NIH), Stanford University Medical Centre (CheXpert), and Shifa International Hospital (SIH). We formulate a sequential training approach and demonstrate that the model produces generalized prediction performance using held out test sets from the three sites. Our model generalizes better when trained on multiple datasets, with the CheXpert-Shifa-NET model performing significantly better (p-values < 0.05) than the models trained on individual datasets for 3 out of the 4 distinct disease classes. The code for training the model will be made available open source at: www.github.com/link-to-code at the time of publication. 我们研究了深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 在根据多个站点收集的胸部 X 射线进行疾病分类任务中的通用性。我们使用来自三个独立地点不同患者群体的数据集系统地训练模型：美国国立卫生研究院 (NIH)、斯坦福大学医学中心 (CheXpert) 和 Shifa 国际医院 (SIH)。我们制定了顺序训练方法，并证明该模型使用来自三个站点的测试集产生广义预测性能。当在多个数据集上进行训练时，我们的模型具有更好的泛化能力，CheXpert-Shifa-NET 模型的表现明显优于在 4 个不同疾病类别中的 3 个数据集上训练的模型（p 值 < 0.05）。用于训练模型的代码将在发布时在 www.github.com/link-to-code 上开源。 开发一种可泛化的深度学习模型，用于多疾病胸部X光诊断。 Nabit Bajwa,Kedar Bajwa,Atif Rana,M. Faique Shakeel,Kashif Haqqi,Suleiman Ali Khan q-bio.QM,cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

title: Simple Neighborhood Representative Pre-processing Boosts Outlier Detectors
title_zh: 简单的邻域代表预处理增强了异常值检测器
abstract: Over the decades, traditional outlier detectors have ignored the group-level factor when calculating outlier scores for objects in data by evaluating only the object-level factor, failing to capture the collective outliers. To mitigate this issue, we present a method called neighborhood representative (NR), which empowers all the existing outlier detectors to efficiently detect outliers, including collective outliers, while maintaining their computational integrity. It achieves this by selecting representative objects, scoring these objects, then applies the score of the representative objects to its collective objects. Without altering existing detectors, NR is compatible with existing detectors, while improving performance on real world datasets with +8% (0.72 to 0.78 AUC) relative to state-of-the-art outlier detectors.
summary: Over the decades, traditional outlier detectors have ignored the group-level factor when calculating outlier scores for objects in data by evaluating only the object-level factor, failing to capture the collective outliers. To mitigate this issue, we present a method called neighborhood representative (NR), which empowers all the existing outlier detectors to efficiently detect outliers, including collective outliers, while maintaining their computational integrity. It achieves this by selecting representative objects, scoring these objects, then applies the score of the representative objects to its collective objects. Without altering existing detectors, NR is compatible with existing detectors, while improving performance on real world datasets with +8% (0.72 to 0.78 AUC) relative to state-of-the-art outlier detectors.
abstract_zh: 几十年来，传统的异常值检测器在通过仅评估对象级因素来计算数据中对象的异常值分数时忽略了组级因素，无法捕获集体异常值。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种称为邻域代表（NR）的方法，它使所有现有的异常值检测器能够有效地检测异常值，包括集体异常值，同时保持其计算完整性。它通过选择代表性对象、对这些对象进行评分、然后将代表性对象的分数应用于其集体对象来实现这一点。在不改变现有检测器的情况下，NR 与现有检测器兼容，同时相对于最先进的异常值检测器，在现实世界数据集上的性能提高了 +8%（0.72 至 0.78 AUC）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为邻域代表（NR）的预处理方法，通过增强现有异常检测器的群体级因素分析能力，有效提升集体异常检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统异常检测方法仅考虑单个对象特征，忽略群体间关联性，导致难以发现集体异常模式。
AI.method: 通过筛选具有代表性的邻域对象计算异常分数，将代表对象的评分映射至整个群体，无需修改原有检测算法框架。
AI.result: 在真实数据集测试中，该方法使检测器AUC指标提升8%（0.72→0.78），优于现有最先进的异常检测技术。
AI.conclusion: NR预处理方法有效解决了群体异常检测难题，且保持原有算法计算效率，具有良好的兼容性和实际应用价值。

title: Contrastive Learning with Adversarial Examples
title_zh: 对抗性例子的对比学习
abstract: Contrastive learning (CL) is a popular technique for self-supervised learning (SSL) of visual representations. It uses pairs of augmentations of unlabeled training examples to define a classification task for pretext learning of a deep embedding. Despite extensive works in augmentation procedures, prior works do not address the selection of challenging negative pairs, as images within a sampled batch are treated independently. This paper addresses the problem, by introducing a new family of adversarial examples for constrastive learning and using these examples to define a new adversarial training algorithm for SSL, denoted as CLAE. When compared to standard CL, the use of adversarial examples creates more challenging positive pairs and adversarial training produces harder negative pairs by accounting for all images in a batch during the optimization. CLAE is compatible with many CL methods in the literature. Experiments show that it improves the performance of several existing CL baselines on multiple datasets.
summary: Contrastive learning (CL) is a popular technique for self-supervised learning (SSL) of visual representations. It uses pairs of augmentations of unlabeled training examples to define a classification task for pretext learning of a deep embedding. Despite extensive works in augmentation procedures, prior works do not address the selection of challenging negative pairs, as images within a sampled batch are treated independently. This paper addresses the problem, by introducing a new family of adversarial examples for constrastive learning and using these examples to define a new adversarial training algorithm for SSL, denoted as CLAE. When compared to standard CL, the use of adversarial examples creates more challenging positive pairs and adversarial training produces harder negative pairs by accounting for all images in a batch during the optimization. CLAE is compatible with many CL methods in the literature. Experiments show that it improves the performance of several existing CL baselines on multiple datasets.
abstract_zh: 对比学习（CL）是一种流行的视觉表征自监督学习（SSL）技术。它使用成对的未标记训练示例的增强来定义深度嵌入的借口学习的分类任务。尽管在增强程序方面进行了大量工作，但先前的工作并未解决具有挑战性的负对的选择，因为采样批次中的图像是独立处理的。本文解决了这个问题，引入了一系列新的用于对比学习的对抗性示例，并使用这些示例定义了一种新的 SSL 对抗性训练算法，表示为 CLAE。与标准 CL 相比，使用对抗性示例会创建更具挑战性的正对，而对抗性训练则通过在优化过程中考虑批次中的所有图像来产生更难的负对。 CLAE 与文献中的许多 CL 方法兼容。实验表明，它提高了多个现有 CL 基线在多个数据集上的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对抗样本的对比学习方法CLAE，通过生成更具挑战性的正负样本对提升自监督学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法在负样本选择上存在不足，未充分考虑批次内样本间的相互影响，导致学习到的表示能力受限。
AI.method: 引入对抗样本作为正样本对，并设计对抗训练算法CLAE，在优化过程中同时考虑批次内所有样本生成更困难的负样本对。
AI.result: 实验表明CLAE在多个数据集上优于现有对比学习基线方法，验证了对抗样本与对抗训练的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 对抗样本生成与对抗训练机制能有效提升对比学习性能，且该方法兼容多种现有对比学习框架。

title: Fading memory echo state networks are universal
title_zh: 褪色记忆回声状态网络是通用的
abstract: Echo state networks (ESNs) have been recently proved to be universal approximants for input/output systems with respect to various $L ^p$-type criteria. When $1\leq p< \infty$, only $p$-integrability hypotheses need to be imposed, while in the case $p=\infty$ a uniform boundedness hypotheses on the inputs is required. This note shows that, in the last case, a universal family of ESNs can be constructed that contains exclusively elements that have the echo state and the fading memory properties. This conclusion could not be drawn with the results and methods available so far in the literature.
summary: Echo state networks (ESNs) have been recently proved to be universal approximants for input/output systems with respect to various $L ^p$-type criteria. When $1\leq p< \infty$, only $p$-integrability hypotheses need to be imposed, while in the case $p=\infty$ a uniform boundedness hypotheses on the inputs is required. This note shows that, in the last case, a universal family of ESNs can be constructed that contains exclusively elements that have the echo state and the fading memory properties. This conclusion could not be drawn with the results and methods available so far in the literature.
abstract_zh: 回声状态网络（ESN）最近被证明是输入/输出系统的通用近似，涉及各种 $L ^p$ 类型标准。当 $1\leq p< \infty$ 时，仅需要施加 $p$-可积性假设，而在 $p=\infty$ 的情况下，需要对输入进行统一有界假设。本说明表明，在最后一种情况下，可以构建一个通用的 ESN 系列，其中仅包含具有回声状态和衰落存储属性的元素。根据迄今为止文献中可用的结果和方法无法得出这一结论。

AI.tldr: 本文证明了具有淡忘记忆特性的回声状态网络（ESN）在L^∞范数下具有通用性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在L^∞范数下需依赖输入统一有界性假设，但无法保证网络同时具备回声状态和淡忘记忆特性，限制了理论完整性。
AI.method: 通过构造满足回声状态与淡忘记忆特性的ESN族，结合泛函分析方法验证其L^∞范数下的通用性。
AI.result: 成功构建了同时满足回声状态和淡忘记忆特性的ESN通用族，解决了p=∞时的理论局限性。
AI.conclusion: 该成果填补了ESN理论在L^∞范数下的空白，为实际应用提供了更严谨的数学保证。

search_text: Fading memory echo state networks are universal 褪色记忆回声状态网络是通用的 Echo state networks (ESNs) have been recently proved to be universal approximants for input/output systems with respect to various $L ^p$-type criteria. When $1\leq p< \infty$, only $p$-integrability hypotheses need to be imposed, while in the case $p=\infty$ a uniform boundedness hypotheses on the inputs is required. This note shows that, in the last case, a universal family of ESNs can be constructed that contains exclusively elements that have the echo state and the fading memory properties. This conclusion could not be drawn with the results and methods available so far in the literature. 回声状态网络（ESN）最近被证明是输入/输出系统的通用近似，涉及各种 $L ^p$ 类型标准。当 $1\leq p< \infty$ 时，仅需要施加 $p$-可积性假设，而在 $p=\infty$ 的情况下，需要对输入进行统一有界假设。本说明表明，在最后一种情况下，可以构建一个通用的 ESN 系列，其中仅包含具有回声状态和衰落存储属性的元素。根据迄今为止文献中可用的结果和方法无法得出这一结论。 本文证明了具有淡忘记忆特性的回声状态网络（ESN）在L^∞范数下具有通用性。 Lukas Gonon,Juan-Pablo Ortega cs.NE

title: Using Deep Image Priors to Generate Counterfactual Explanations
title_zh: 使用深度图像先验生成反事实解释
abstract: Through the use of carefully tailored convolutional neural network architectures, a deep image prior (DIP) can be used to obtain pre-images from latent representation encodings. Though DIP inversion has been known to be superior to conventional regularized inversion strategies such as total variation, such an over-parameterized generator is able to effectively reconstruct even images that are not in the original data distribution. This limitation makes it challenging to utilize such priors for tasks such as counterfactual reasoning, wherein the goal is to generate small, interpretable changes to an image that systematically leads to changes in the model prediction. To this end, we propose a novel regularization strategy based on an auxiliary loss estimator jointly trained with the predictor, which efficiently guides the prior to recover natural pre-images. Our empirical studies with a real-world ISIC skin lesion detection problem clearly evidence the effectiveness of the proposed approach in synthesizing meaningful counterfactuals. In comparison, we find that the standard DIP inversion often proposes visually imperceptible perturbations to irrelevant parts of the image, thus providing no additional insights into the model behavior.
summary: Through the use of carefully tailored convolutional neural network architectures, a deep image prior (DIP) can be used to obtain pre-images from latent representation encodings. Though DIP inversion has been known to be superior to conventional regularized inversion strategies such as total variation, such an over-parameterized generator is able to effectively reconstruct even images that are not in the original data distribution. This limitation makes it challenging to utilize such priors for tasks such as counterfactual reasoning, wherein the goal is to generate small, interpretable changes to an image that systematically leads to changes in the model prediction. To this end, we propose a novel regularization strategy based on an auxiliary loss estimator jointly trained with the predictor, which efficiently guides the prior to recover natural pre-images. Our empirical studies with a real-world ISIC skin lesion detection problem clearly evidence the effectiveness of the proposed approach in synthesizing meaningful counterfactuals. In comparison, we find that the standard DIP inversion often proposes visually imperceptible perturbations to irrelevant parts of the image, thus providing no additional insights into the model behavior.
abstract_zh: 通过使用精心定制的卷积神经网络架构，可以使用深度图像先验（DIP）从潜在表示编码中获取原像。尽管已知 DIP 反演优于传统的正则化反演策略（例如全变分），但这种超参数化生成器甚至能够有效地重建不在原始数据分布中的图像。这种限制使得将此类先验用于反事实推理等任务变得具有挑战性，其中目标是对图像产生小的、可解释的变化，从而系统地导致模型预测的变化。为此，我们提出了一种基于与预测器联合训练的辅助损失估计器的新颖正则化策略，该策略有效地指导先验恢复自然原像。我们对现实世界 ISIC 皮肤病变检测问题的实证研究清楚地证明了所提出的方法在合成有意义的反事实方面的有效性。相比之下，我们发现标准 DIP 反演通常会对图像的不相关部分提出视觉上难以察觉的扰动，从而无法提供对模型行为的额外见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用深度图像先验（DIP）生成反事实解释，以增强模型预测的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统DIP反转方法在生成反事实解释时，常对图像无关区域进行微小扰动，无法提供有效的模型行为洞察。
AI.method: 设计辅助损失估计器与预测器联合训练，通过正则化策略引导DIP生成更自然的预图像。
AI.result: 在ISIC皮肤病变检测任务中，新方法能生成有意义的反事实解释，而标准DIP方法效果较差。
AI.conclusion: 所提正则化策略有效解决了DIP在反事实生成中的局限性，提升了解释的可解释性与实用性。

authors_text: Dongmin Shin,Yugeun Shim,Hangyeol Yu,Seewoo Lee,Byungsoo Kim,Youngduck Choi
title: SAINT+: Integrating Temporal Features for EdNet Correctness Prediction
title_zh: SAINT+：集成时间特征以进行 EdNet 正确性预测
abstract: We propose SAINT+, a successor of SAINT which is a Transformer based knowledge tracing model that separately processes exercise information and student response information. Following the architecture of SAINT, SAINT+ has an encoder-decoder structure where the encoder applies self-attention layers to a stream of exercise embeddings, and the decoder alternately applies self-attention layers and encoder-decoder attention layers to streams of response embeddings and encoder output. Moreover, SAINT+ incorporates two temporal feature embeddings into the response embeddings: elapsed time, the time taken for a student to answer, and lag time, the time interval between adjacent learning activities. We empirically evaluate the effectiveness of SAINT+ on EdNet, the largest publicly available benchmark dataset in the education domain. Experimental results show that SAINT+ achieves state-of-the-art performance in knowledge tracing with an improvement of 1.25% in area under receiver operating characteristic curve compared to SAINT, the current state-of-the-art model in EdNet dataset.
summary: We propose SAINT+, a successor of SAINT which is a Transformer based knowledge tracing model that separately processes exercise information and student response information. Following the architecture of SAINT, SAINT+ has an encoder-decoder structure where the encoder applies self-attention layers to a stream of exercise embeddings, and the decoder alternately applies self-attention layers and encoder-decoder attention layers to streams of response embeddings and encoder output. Moreover, SAINT+ incorporates two temporal feature embeddings into the response embeddings: elapsed time, the time taken for a student to answer, and lag time, the time interval between adjacent learning activities. We empirically evaluate the effectiveness of SAINT+ on EdNet, the largest publicly available benchmark dataset in the education domain. Experimental results show that SAINT+ achieves state-of-the-art performance in knowledge tracing with an improvement of 1.25% in area under receiver operating characteristic curve compared to SAINT, the current state-of-the-art model in EdNet dataset.
abstract_zh: 我们提出 SAINT+，它是 SAINT 的继承者，它是一个基于 Transformer 的知识追踪模型，可以单独处理练习信息和学生反应信息。遵循 SAINT 的架构，SAINT+ 具有编码器-解码器结构，其中编码器将自注意力层应用于练习嵌入流，解码器交替将自注意力层和编码器-解码器注意力层应用于响应嵌入流和编码器输出。此外，SAINT+ 将两个时间特征嵌入合并到响应嵌入中：经过时间（学生回答所需的时间）和滞后时间（相邻学习活动之间的时间间隔）。我们根据经验评估了 SAINT+ 在 EdNet（教育领域最大的公开基准数据集）上的有效性。实验结果表明，SAINT+ 在知识追踪方面实现了最先进的性能，与 EdNet 数据集中当前最先进的模型 SAINT 相比，接收者操作特征曲线下面积提高了 1.25%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAINT+模型，通过整合时间特征提升教育领域知识追踪任务的正确性预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有知识追踪模型（如SAINT）未充分挖掘时间特征对学习行为预测的潜在价值，而时间信息对理解学生学习模式至关重要。
AI.method: 在SAINT的编码器-解码器框架基础上，向响应嵌入注入两个时间特征：答题耗时（elapsed time）和学习活动间隔时间（lag time）。
AI.result: 在EdNet数据集上，SAINT+的ROC曲线下面积（AUC）较原SAINT模型提升1.25%，达到当时最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 时间特征的有效整合能显著提升知识追踪准确性，为教育数据分析提供了新的改进方向。

authors_text: Tri Vu,Anthony DiSpirito III,Daiwei Li,Zixuan Zhang,Xiaoyi Zhu,Maomao Chen,Laiming Jiang,Dong Zhang,Jianwen Luo,Yu Shrike Zhang,Qifa Zhou,Roarke Horstmeyer,Junjie Yao
title: Deep image prior for undersampling high-speed photoacoustic microscopy
title_zh: 用于欠采样高速光声显微镜的深度图像先验
abstract: Photoacoustic microscopy (PAM) is an emerging imaging method combining light and sound. However, limited by the laser's repetition rate, state-of-the-art high-speed PAM technology often sacrifices spatial sampling density (i.e., undersampling) for increased imaging speed over a large field-of-view. Deep learning (DL) methods have recently been used to improve sparsely sampled PAM images; however, these methods often require time-consuming pre-training and large training dataset with ground truth. Here, we propose the use of deep image prior (DIP) to improve the image quality of undersampled PAM images. Unlike other DL approaches, DIP requires neither pre-training nor fully-sampled ground truth, enabling its flexible and fast implementation on various imaging targets. Our results have demonstrated substantial improvement in PAM images with as few as 1.4$\%$ of the fully sampled pixels on high-speed PAM. Our approach outperforms interpolation, is competitive with pre-trained supervised DL method, and is readily translated to other high-speed, undersampling imaging modalities.
summary: Photoacoustic microscopy (PAM) is an emerging imaging method combining light and sound. However, limited by the laser's repetition rate, state-of-the-art high-speed PAM technology often sacrifices spatial sampling density (i.e., undersampling) for increased imaging speed over a large field-of-view. Deep learning (DL) methods have recently been used to improve sparsely sampled PAM images; however, these methods often require time-consuming pre-training and large training dataset with ground truth. Here, we propose the use of deep image prior (DIP) to improve the image quality of undersampled PAM images. Unlike other DL approaches, DIP requires neither pre-training nor fully-sampled ground truth, enabling its flexible and fast implementation on various imaging targets. Our results have demonstrated substantial improvement in PAM images with as few as 1.4$\%$ of the fully sampled pixels on high-speed PAM. Our approach outperforms interpolation, is competitive with pre-trained supervised DL method, and is readily translated to other high-speed, undersampling imaging modalities.
abstract_zh: 光声显微镜（PAM）是一种新兴的光与声相结合的成像方法。然而，受激光器重复率的限制，最先进的高速 PAM 技术通常会牺牲空间采样密度（即欠采样）来提高大视场的成像速度。深度学习（DL）方法最近被用来改进稀疏采样的 PAM 图像；然而，这些方法通常需要耗时的预训练和具有地面实况的大型训练数据集。在这里，我们建议使用深度图像先验（DIP）来提高欠采样 PAM 图像的图像质量。与其他深度学习方法不同，DIP 既不需要预训练，也不需要完全采样的地面实况，从而能够在各种成像目标上灵活快速地实现。我们的结果表明，高速 PAM 上的完全采样像素少至 1.4$\%$，PAM 图像有了显着改善。我们的方法优于插值，与预先训练的监督深度学习方法具有竞争力，并且很容易转化为其他高速、欠采样成像模式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用深度图像先验（DIP）方法提升高速光声显微镜（PAM）中欠采样图像的质量，无需预训练或完整采样数据。
AI.motivation: 高速PAM因激光重复率限制需牺牲空间采样密度（欠采样）以提高成像速度，现有深度学习方法依赖耗时预训练和大量带标注数据，限制了其应用灵活性。
AI.method: 基于深度图像先验（DIP）框架，通过生成对抗网络直接从欠采样数据中学习图像先验信息，无需预训练或完整采样数据。
AI.result: 在仅使用1.4%完整采样像素的情况下，显著提升PAM图像质量，优于插值方法且与预训练监督学习方法具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: DIP方法为高速欠采样成像提供了一种无需预训练和标注数据的通用解决方案，可推广至其他高速成像模态。

search_text: Deep image prior for undersampling high-speed photoacoustic microscopy 用于欠采样高速光声显微镜的深度图像先验 Photoacoustic microscopy (PAM) is an emerging imaging method combining light and sound. However, limited by the laser's repetition rate, state-of-the-art high-speed PAM technology often sacrifices spatial sampling density (i.e., undersampling) for increased imaging speed over a large field-of-view. Deep learning (DL) methods have recently been used to improve sparsely sampled PAM images; however, these methods often require time-consuming pre-training and large training dataset with ground truth. Here, we propose the use of deep image prior (DIP) to improve the image quality of undersampled PAM images. Unlike other DL approaches, DIP requires neither pre-training nor fully-sampled ground truth, enabling its flexible and fast implementation on various imaging targets. Our results have demonstrated substantial improvement in PAM images with as few as 1.4$\%$ of the fully sampled pixels on high-speed PAM. Our approach outperforms interpolation, is competitive with pre-trained supervised DL method, and is readily translated to other high-speed, undersampling imaging modalities. 光声显微镜（PAM）是一种新兴的光与声相结合的成像方法。然而，受激光器重复率的限制，最先进的高速 PAM 技术通常会牺牲空间采样密度（即欠采样）来提高大视场的成像速度。深度学习（DL）方法最近被用来改进稀疏采样的 PAM 图像；然而，这些方法通常需要耗时的预训练和具有地面实况的大型训练数据集。在这里，我们建议使用深度图像先验（DIP）来提高欠采样 PAM 图像的图像质量。与其他深度学习方法不同，DIP 既不需要预训练，也不需要完全采样的地面实况，从而能够在各种成像目标上灵活快速地实现。我们的结果表明，高速 PAM 上的完全采样像素少至 1.4$\%$，PAM 图像有了显着改善。我们的方法优于插值，与预先训练的监督深度学习方法具有竞争力，并且很容易转化为其他高速、欠采样成像模式。 本文提出使用深度图像先验（DIP）方法提升高速光声显微镜（PAM）中欠采样图像的质量，无需预训练或完整采样数据。 Tri Vu,Anthony DiSpirito III,Daiwei Li,Zixuan Zhang,Xiaoyi Zhu,Maomao Chen,Laiming Jiang,Dong Zhang,Jianwen Luo,Yu Shrike Zhang,Qifa Zhou,Roarke Horstmeyer,Junjie Yao eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Lucas Tabelini,Rodrigo Berriel,Thiago M. Paixão,Claudine Badue,Alberto F. De Souza,Thiago Oliveira-Santos
title: Keep your Eyes on the Lane: Real-time Attention-guided Lane Detection
title_zh: 密切关注车道：实时注意力引导车道检测
abstract: Modern lane detection methods have achieved remarkable performances in complex real-world scenarios, but many have issues maintaining real-time efficiency, which is important for autonomous vehicles. In this work, we propose LaneATT: an anchor-based deep lane detection model, which, akin to other generic deep object detectors, uses the anchors for the feature pooling step. Since lanes follow a regular pattern and are highly correlated, we hypothesize that in some cases global information may be crucial to infer their positions, especially in conditions such as occlusion, missing lane markers, and others. Thus, this work proposes a novel anchor-based attention mechanism that aggregates global information. The model was evaluated extensively on three of the most widely used datasets in the literature. The results show that our method outperforms the current state-of-the-art methods showing both higher efficacy and efficiency. Moreover, an ablation study is performed along with a discussion on efficiency trade-off options that are useful in practice.
summary: Modern lane detection methods have achieved remarkable performances in complex real-world scenarios, but many have issues maintaining real-time efficiency, which is important for autonomous vehicles. In this work, we propose LaneATT: an anchor-based deep lane detection model, which, akin to other generic deep object detectors, uses the anchors for the feature pooling step. Since lanes follow a regular pattern and are highly correlated, we hypothesize that in some cases global information may be crucial to infer their positions, especially in conditions such as occlusion, missing lane markers, and others. Thus, this work proposes a novel anchor-based attention mechanism that aggregates global information. The model was evaluated extensively on three of the most widely used datasets in the literature. The results show that our method outperforms the current state-of-the-art methods showing both higher efficacy and efficiency. Moreover, an ablation study is performed along with a discussion on efficiency trade-off options that are useful in practice.
abstract_zh: 现代车道检测方法在复杂的现实场景中取得了显着的性能，但许多方法在保持实时效率方面存在问题，这对于自动驾驶车辆来说非常重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了 LaneATT：一种基于锚点的深度车道检测模型，与其他通用深度对象检测器类似，它使用锚点进行特征池步骤。由于车道遵循规则模式并且高度相关，因此我们假设在某些情况下全局信息对于推断其位置可能至关重要，特别是在遮挡、丢失车道标记等情况下。因此，这项工作提出了一种新颖的基于锚的注意力机制来聚合全局信息。该模型在文献中使用最广泛的三个数据集上进行了广泛的评估。结果表明，我们的方法优于当前最先进的方法，显示出更高的功效和效率。此外，还进行了消融研究，并讨论了在实践中有用的效率权衡选项。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于注意力机制的实时车道检测模型LaneATT，以提高检测效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有车道检测方法在复杂场景下性能良好，但难以兼顾实时效率，需提升检测速度与准确性，特别是在遮挡和车道线缺失的情况下。
AI.method: 提出基于锚点的LaneATT模型，结合注意力机制聚合全局信息，优化特征池化过程以提升检测效率。
AI.result: 在三个主流数据集上实验表明，该方法在检测精度和实时性上均优于现有最先进的方法，并通过消融研究验证了注意力机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: LaneATT模型在保持高检测精度的同时显著提升了实时性，为自动驾驶中的车道检测提供了高效解决方案。

title: Automating Abnormality Detection in Musculoskeletal Radiographs through Deep Learning
title_zh: 通过深度学习自动检测肌肉骨骼射线照片中的异常情况
abstract: This paper introduces MuRAD (Musculoskeletal Radiograph Abnormality Detection tool), a tool that can help radiologists automate the detection of abnormalities in musculoskeletal radiographs (bone X-rays). MuRAD utilizes a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) that can accurately predict whether a bone X-ray is abnormal, and leverages Class Activation Map (CAM) to localize the abnormality in the image. MuRAD achieves an F1 score of 0.822 and a Cohen's kappa of 0.699, which is comparable to the performance of expert radiologists.
summary: This paper introduces MuRAD (Musculoskeletal Radiograph Abnormality Detection tool), a tool that can help radiologists automate the detection of abnormalities in musculoskeletal radiographs (bone X-rays). MuRAD utilizes a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) that can accurately predict whether a bone X-ray is abnormal, and leverages Class Activation Map (CAM) to localize the abnormality in the image. MuRAD achieves an F1 score of 0.822 and a Cohen's kappa of 0.699, which is comparable to the performance of expert radiologists.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 MuRAD（肌肉骨骼射线照片异常检测工具），该工具可以帮助放射科医生自动检测肌肉骨骼射线照片（骨 X 射线）中的异常情况。 MuRAD 利用可以准确预测骨 X 射线是否异常的卷积神经网络 (CNN)，并利用类激活图 (CAM) 来定位图像中的异常。 MuRAD 的 F1 分数为 0.822，Cohen's kappa 为 0.699，与专业放射科医生的表现相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MuRAD工具，通过深度学习自动化检测肌肉骨骼X光片中的异常。
AI.motivation: 人工检测肌肉骨骼X光片耗时且易疲劳，需开发高效准确的自动化工具辅助放射科医生。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络（CNN）分类X光片是否异常，并结合类激活图（CAM）定位异常区域。
AI.result: 在测试中达到F1分数0.822和Cohen's kappa 0.699，性能与专家放射科医生相当。
AI.conclusion: MuRAD在异常检测准确率和定位能力上表现优异，可作为临床辅助诊断的有效工具。

MuRAD achieves an F1 score of 0.822 and a Cohen's kappa of 0.699, which is comparable to the performance of expert radiologists. 本文介绍了 MuRAD（肌肉骨骼射线照片异常检测工具），该工具可以帮助放射科医生自动检测肌肉骨骼射线照片（骨 X 射线）中的异常情况。 MuRAD 利用可以准确预测骨 X 射线是否异常的卷积神经网络 (CNN)，并利用类激活图 (CAM) 来定位图像中的异常。 MuRAD 的 F1 分数为 0.822，Cohen's kappa 为 0.699，与专业放射科医生的表现相当。 本文提出MuRAD工具，通过深度学习自动化检测肌肉骨骼X光片中的异常。 Goodarz Mehr eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Combination of Deep Speaker Embeddings for Diarisation
title_zh: 用于分类的深度扬声器嵌入组合
abstract: Significant progress has recently been made in speaker diarisation after the introduction of d-vectors as speaker embeddings extracted from neural network (NN) speaker classifiers for clustering speech segments. To extract better-performing and more robust speaker embeddings, this paper proposes a c-vector method by combining multiple sets of complementary d-vectors derived from systems with different NN components. Three structures are used to implement the c-vectors, namely 2D self-attentive, gated additive, and bilinear pooling structures, relying on attention mechanisms, a gating mechanism, and a low-rank bilinear pooling mechanism respectively. Furthermore, a neural-based single-pass speaker diarisation pipeline is also proposed in this paper, which uses NNs to achieve voice activity detection, speaker change point detection, and speaker embedding extraction. Experiments and detailed analyses are conducted on the challenging AMI and NIST RT05 datasets which consist of real meetings with 4--10 speakers and a wide range of acoustic conditions. For systems trained on the AMI training set, relative speaker error rate (SER) reductions of 13% and 29% are obtained by using c-vectors instead of d-vectors on the AMI dev and eval sets respectively, and a relative reduction of 15% in SER is observed on RT05, which shows the robustness of the proposed methods. By incorporating VoxCeleb data into the training set, the best c-vector system achieved 7%, 17% and16% relative SER reduction compared to the d-vector on the AMI dev, eval, and RT05 sets respectively
summary: Significant progress has recently been made in speaker diarisation after the introduction of d-vectors as speaker embeddings extracted from neural network (NN) speaker classifiers for clustering speech segments. To extract better-performing and more robust speaker embeddings, this paper proposes a c-vector method by combining multiple sets of complementary d-vectors derived from systems with different NN components. Three structures are used to implement the c-vectors, namely 2D self-attentive, gated additive, and bilinear pooling structures, relying on attention mechanisms, a gating mechanism, and a low-rank bilinear pooling mechanism respectively. Furthermore, a neural-based single-pass speaker diarisation pipeline is also proposed in this paper, which uses NNs to achieve voice activity detection, speaker change point detection, and speaker embedding extraction. Experiments and detailed analyses are conducted on the challenging AMI and NIST RT05 datasets which consist of real meetings with 4--10 speakers and a wide range of acoustic conditions. For systems trained on the AMI training set, relative speaker error rate (SER) reductions of 13% and 29% are obtained by using c-vectors instead of d-vectors on the AMI dev and eval sets respectively, and a relative reduction of 15% in SER is observed on RT05, which shows the robustness of the proposed methods. By incorporating VoxCeleb data into the training set, the best c-vector system achieved 7%, 17% and16% relative SER reduction compared to the d-vector on the AMI dev, eval, and RT05 sets respectively
abstract_zh: 最近，在引入 d 向量作为从神经网络 (NN) 说话人分类器中提取的说话人嵌入以对语音段进行聚类之后，说话人二值化方面取得了重大进展。为了提取性能更好、更鲁棒的说话人嵌入，本文提出了一种 c 向量方法，通过组合从具有不同 NN 组件的系统导出的多组互补 d 向量。使用三种结构来实现 c 向量，即 2D 自注意力、门控加性和双线性池结构，分别依赖注意力机制、门控机制和低秩双线性池机制。此外，本文还提出了一种基于神经网络的单通道说话人二值化流程，它使用神经网络来实现语音活动检测、说话人变化点检测和说话人嵌入提取。在具有挑战性的 AMI 和 NIST RT05 数据集上进行了实验和详细分析，其中包括 4--10 名发言者和各种声学条件的真实会议。对于在 AMI 训练集上训练的系统，通过在 AMI dev 和 eval 集上使用 c 向量代替 d 向量，相对说话人错误率 (SER) 分别降低了 13% 和 29%，并且在 RT05 上观察到 SER 相对降低了 15%，这表明了所提出方法的鲁棒性。通过将 VoxCeleb 数据合并到训练集中，与 AMI dev、eval 和 RT05 集上的 d 向量相比，最佳 c 向量系统分别实现了 7%、17% 和 16% 的相对 SER 降低

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过组合多种深度说话人嵌入（c-vectors）提升说话人分割效果，并设计神经网络单次流水线处理语音活动检测、说话人变化点检测和嵌入提取。
AI.motivation: 传统d-vectors作为说话人嵌入虽有效，但存在性能瓶颈，需通过结合互补的嵌入信息提升鲁棒性和准确性。
AI.method: 提出三种c-vector结构（2D自注意力、门控加法、双线性池化）融合多源d-vectors，并构建基于神经网络的单次流水线处理分割任务。
AI.result: 在AMI和NIST RT05数据集上，c-vectors相较d-vectors实现SER相对下降13%-29%，加入VoxCeleb数据后进一步提升至7%-17%。
AI.conclusion: 组合多结构嵌入与神经网络流水线显著提升分割性能，表明c-vector方法在复杂场景下更具鲁棒性与有效性。

authors_text: Jiatong Shi,Shuai Guo,Nan Huo,Yuekai Zhang,Qin Jin
title: Sequence-to-sequence Singing Voice Synthesis with Perceptual Entropy Loss
title_zh: 具有感知熵损失的序列到序列歌声合成
abstract: The neural network (NN) based singing voice synthesis (SVS) systems require sufficient data to train well and are prone to over-fitting due to data scarcity. However, we often encounter data limitation problem in building SVS systems because of high data acquisition and annotation costs. In this work, we propose a Perceptual Entropy (PE) loss derived from a psycho-acoustic hearing model to regularize the network. With a one-hour open-source singing voice database, we explore the impact of the PE loss on various mainstream sequence-to-sequence models, including the RNN-based, transformer-based, and conformer-based models. Our experiments show that the PE loss can mitigate the over-fitting problem and significantly improve the synthesized singing quality reflected in objective and subjective evaluations.
summary: The neural network (NN) based singing voice synthesis (SVS) systems require sufficient data to train well and are prone to over-fitting due to data scarcity. However, we often encounter data limitation problem in building SVS systems because of high data acquisition and annotation costs. In this work, we propose a Perceptual Entropy (PE) loss derived from a psycho-acoustic hearing model to regularize the network. With a one-hour open-source singing voice database, we explore the impact of the PE loss on various mainstream sequence-to-sequence models, including the RNN-based, transformer-based, and conformer-based models. Our experiments show that the PE loss can mitigate the over-fitting problem and significantly improve the synthesized singing quality reflected in objective and subjective evaluations.
abstract_zh: 基于神经网络（NN）的歌声合成（SVS）系统需要足够的数据才能很好地训练，并且由于数据稀缺而容易出现过度拟合。然而，由于数据获取和标注成本较高，我们在构建SVS系统时经常遇到数据限制问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种源自心理声学听力模型的感知熵（PE）损失来规范网络。通过一小时的开源歌声数据库，我们探讨了 PE 损失对各种主流序列到序列模型的影响，包括基于 RNN、基于 Transformer 和基于 Conformer 的模型。我们的实验表明，PE损失可以缓解过拟合问题，并显着提高客观和主观评价中反映的合成歌唱质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于感知熵损失的序列到序列歌唱语音合成方法，以解决数据不足导致的过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 歌唱语音合成系统因数据获取成本高导致数据稀缺，传统模型易过拟合且合成质量受限。
AI.method: 设计感知熵损失函数（基于心理声学模型），结合RNN、Transformer和Conformer等主流架构进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明感知熵损失有效缓解过拟合，显著提升客观指标和主观评价的歌唱合成质量。
AI.conclusion: 感知熵损失为数据有限场景下的歌唱语音合成提供了有效的正则化方案，具有跨模型适用性。

title: Comprehensive Attention Self-Distillation for Weakly-Supervised Object Detection
title_zh: 用于弱监督目标检测的综合注意力自蒸馏
abstract: Weakly Supervised Object Detection (WSOD) has emerged as an effective tool to train object detectors using only the image-level category labels. However, without object-level labels, WSOD detectors are prone to detect bounding boxes on salient objects, clustered objects and discriminative object parts. Moreover, the image-level category labels do not enforce consistent object detection across different transformations of the same images. To address the above issues, we propose a Comprehensive Attention Self-Distillation (CASD) training approach for WSOD. To balance feature learning among all object instances, CASD computes the comprehensive attention aggregated from multiple transformations and feature layers of the same images. To enforce consistent spatial supervision on objects, CASD conducts self-distillation on the WSOD networks, such that the comprehensive attention is approximated simultaneously by multiple transformations and feature layers of the same images. CASD produces new state-of-the-art WSOD results on standard benchmarks such as PASCAL VOC 2007/2012 and MS-COCO.
summary: Weakly Supervised Object Detection (WSOD) has emerged as an effective tool to train object detectors using only the image-level category labels. However, without object-level labels, WSOD detectors are prone to detect bounding boxes on salient objects, clustered objects and discriminative object parts. Moreover, the image-level category labels do not enforce consistent object detection across different transformations of the same images. To address the above issues, we propose a Comprehensive Attention Self-Distillation (CASD) training approach for WSOD. To balance feature learning among all object instances, CASD computes the comprehensive attention aggregated from multiple transformations and feature layers of the same images. To enforce consistent spatial supervision on objects, CASD conducts self-distillation on the WSOD networks, such that the comprehensive attention is approximated simultaneously by multiple transformations and feature layers of the same images. CASD produces new state-of-the-art WSOD results on standard benchmarks such as PASCAL VOC 2007/2012 and MS-COCO.
abstract_zh: 弱监督对象检测（WSOD）已成为仅使用图像级类别标签来训练对象检测器的有效工具。然而，如果没有对象级标签，WSOD 检测器很容易检测显着对象、聚类对象和有区别的对象部分上的边界框。此外，图像级类别标签不会在同一图像的不同变换之间强制执行一致的对象检测。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种针对 WSOD 的综合注意力自蒸馏（CASD）训练方法。为了平衡所有对象实例之间的特征学习，CASD 计算从同一图像的多个变换和特征层聚合的综合注意力。为了对对象实施一致的空间监督，CASD 在 WSOD 网络上进行自蒸馏，从而通过同一图像的多个变换和特征层同时近似综合注意力。 CASD 根据 PASCAL VOC 2007/2012 和 MS-COCO 等标准基准生成最新的 WSOD 结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种全面注意自蒸馏（CASD）方法，用于解决弱监督目标检测（WSOD）中因缺乏对象级标签导致的检测不一致问题。
AI.motivation: 现有WSOD方法因仅依赖图像级标签，导致检测框易集中在显著区域或部分，且无法在图像不同变换下保持检测一致性。
AI.method: 通过聚合多变换和多特征层的综合注意力，平衡特征学习，并利用自蒸馏使网络在多变换下同时逼近综合注意力，实现空间监督一致性。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2007/2012和MS-COCO基准测试中，CASD方法达到新的SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: CASD通过多变换注意力聚合与自蒸馏机制，有效提升了WSOD的检测一致性与准确性。

ai_content.motivation: 现有WSOD方法因仅依赖图像级标签，导致检测框易集中在显著区域或部分，且无法在图像不同变换下保持检测一致性。
ai_content.method: 通过聚合多变换和多特征层的综合注意力，平衡特征学习，并利用自蒸馏使网络在多变换下同时逼近综合注意力，实现空间监督一致性。

search_text: Comprehensive Attention Self-Distillation for Weakly-Supervised Object Detection 用于弱监督目标检测的综合注意力自蒸馏 Weakly Supervised Object Detection (WSOD) has emerged as an effective tool to train object detectors using only the image-level category labels. However, without object-level labels, WSOD detectors are prone to detect bounding boxes on salient objects, clustered objects and discriminative object parts. Moreover, the image-level category labels do not enforce consistent object detection across different transformations of the same images. To address the above issues, we propose a Comprehensive Attention Self-Distillation (CASD) training approach for WSOD. To balance feature learning among all object instances, CASD computes the comprehensive attention aggregated from multiple transformations and feature layers of the same images. To enforce consistent spatial supervision on objects, CASD conducts self-distillation on the WSOD networks, such that the comprehensive attention is approximated simultaneously by multiple transformations and feature layers of the same images. CASD produces new state-of-the-art WSOD results on standard benchmarks such as PASCAL VOC 2007/2012 and MS-COCO. 弱监督对象检测（WSOD）已成为仅使用图像级类别标签来训练对象检测器的有效工具。然而，如果没有对象级标签，WSOD 检测器很容易检测显着对象、聚类对象和有区别的对象部分上的边界框。此外，图像级类别标签不会在同一图像的不同变换之间强制执行一致的对象检测。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种针对 WSOD 的综合注意力自蒸馏（CASD）训练方法。为了平衡所有对象实例之间的特征学习，CASD 计算从同一图像的多个变换和特征层聚合的综合注意力。为了对对象实施一致的空间监督，CASD 在 WSOD 网络上进行自蒸馏，从而通过同一图像的多个变换和特征层同时近似综合注意力。 CASD 根据 PASCAL VOC 2007/2012 和 MS-COCO 等标准基准生成最新的 WSOD 结果。 本文提出了一种全面注意自蒸馏（CASD）方法，用于解决弱监督目标检测（WSOD）中因缺乏对象级标签导致的检测不一致问题。 Zeyi Huang,Yang Zou,Vijayakumar Bhagavatula,Dong Huang cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Saudi Arabian Parents' Perception of Online Marital Matchmaking Technologies
title_zh: 沙特阿拉伯家长对在线婚介技术的看法
abstract: Finding a date or a spouse online is usually considered an individualistic endeavor in Western cultures. This presents a challenge for collectivist non-Western cultures such as Saudi Arabia where choosing a spouse is viewed as a union of two families with parents of both spouses being heavily involved. Our work aims to investigate how Saudi Arabian parents view the utilization of technology by their young adults to seek potential spouses online. We report our findings of interviews conducted with 16 Saudi Arabian parents (8 fathers, 6 mothers and 1 couple). We generate qualitative themes that provide insights about how parents wanted to preserve their values, integrate technology into the traditional process and protect their young adults from potential harms. These themes lead to implications for designing suitable marital matchmaking technologies in Saudi Arabia and opportunities for future work.
summary: Finding a date or a spouse online is usually considered an individualistic endeavor in Western cultures. This presents a challenge for collectivist non-Western cultures such as Saudi Arabia where choosing a spouse is viewed as a union of two families with parents of both spouses being heavily involved. Our work aims to investigate how Saudi Arabian parents view the utilization of technology by their young adults to seek potential spouses online. We report our findings of interviews conducted with 16 Saudi Arabian parents (8 fathers, 6 mothers and 1 couple). We generate qualitative themes that provide insights about how parents wanted to preserve their values, integrate technology into the traditional process and protect their young adults from potential harms. These themes lead to implications for designing suitable marital matchmaking technologies in Saudi Arabia and opportunities for future work.
abstract_zh: 在西方文化中，在网上寻找约会对象或配偶通常被认为是个人主义的努力。这对沙特阿拉伯等集体主义非西方文化提出了挑战，在沙特阿拉伯，选择配偶被视为两个家庭的结合，配偶双方的父母都参与其中。我们的工作旨在调查沙特阿拉伯父母如何看待年轻人利用技术在网上寻找潜在配偶的情况。我们报告了对 16 名沙特阿拉伯父母（8 名父亲、6 名母亲和 1 对夫妇）进行访谈的结果。我们生成定性主题，提供有关父母希望如何保留其价值观、将技术融入传统流程以及保护年轻人免受潜在伤害的见解。这些主题对在沙特阿拉伯设计合适的婚姻配对技术以及未来的工作机会产生了影响。

AI.tldr: 研究沙特阿拉伯父母对年轻人使用在线婚恋匹配技术的看法，探讨如何将技术融入传统婚配流程并保护家庭价值观。
AI.motivation: 西方文化中婚恋线上化与沙特集体主义文化传统存在冲突，需探索技术与传统的融合方式以保护家庭利益。
AI.method: 对16名沙特父母（8位父亲、6位母亲及1对夫妇）进行深度访谈，提炼定性主题分析其核心关切。
AI.result: 发现父母关注三点：维护传统价值观、技术辅助婚配流程、防范网络风险，为技术设计提供文化适配方向。
AI.conclusion: 需开发符合沙特文化规范的婚恋技术，平衡技术创新与家庭权威，未来研究应深化文化敏感性设计。

title: AutoPruning for Deep Neural Network with Dynamic Channel Masking
title_zh: 具有动态通道掩蔽的深度神经网络自动修剪
abstract: Modern deep neural network models are large and computationally intensive. One typical solution to this issue is model pruning. However, most current pruning algorithms depend on hand crafted rules or domain expertise. To overcome this problem, we propose a learning based auto pruning algorithm for deep neural network, which is inspired by recent automatic machine learning(AutoML). A two objectives' problem that aims for the the weights and the best channels for each layer is first formulated. An alternative optimization approach is then proposed to derive the optimal channel numbers and weights simultaneously. In the process of pruning, we utilize a searchable hyperparameter, remaining ratio, to denote the number of channels in each convolution layer, and then a dynamic masking process is proposed to describe the corresponding channel evolution. To control the trade-off between the accuracy of a model and the pruning ratio of floating point operations, a novel loss function is further introduced. Preliminary experimental results on benchmark datasets demonstrate that our scheme achieves competitive results for neural network pruning.
summary: Modern deep neural network models are large and computationally intensive. One typical solution to this issue is model pruning. However, most current pruning algorithms depend on hand crafted rules or domain expertise. To overcome this problem, we propose a learning based auto pruning algorithm for deep neural network, which is inspired by recent automatic machine learning(AutoML). A two objectives' problem that aims for the the weights and the best channels for each layer is first formulated. An alternative optimization approach is then proposed to derive the optimal channel numbers and weights simultaneously. In the process of pruning, we utilize a searchable hyperparameter, remaining ratio, to denote the number of channels in each convolution layer, and then a dynamic masking process is proposed to describe the corresponding channel evolution. To control the trade-off between the accuracy of a model and the pruning ratio of floating point operations, a novel loss function is further introduced. Preliminary experimental results on benchmark datasets demonstrate that our scheme achieves competitive results for neural network pruning.
abstract_zh: 现代深度神经网络模型规模庞大且计算密集。该问题的一种典型解决方案是模型剪枝。然而，当前大多数修剪算法都依赖于手工制定的规则或领域专业知识。为了克服这个问题，我们受到最近的自动机器学习（AutoML）的启发，提出了一种基于学习的深度神经网络自动剪枝算法。首先制定了一个以每层的权重和最佳通道为目标的双目标问题。然后提出了另一种优化方法来同时导出最佳通道数和权重。在剪枝过程中，我们利用可搜索的超参数剩余比来表示每个卷积层中的通道数，然后提出动态掩蔽过程来描述相应的通道演化。为了控制模型精度和浮点运算剪枝率之间的权衡，进一步引入了一种新颖的损失函数。基准数据集上的初步实验结果表明，我们的方案在神经网络修剪方面取得了有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习的自动剪枝算法，通过动态通道掩码机制优化深度神经网络的模型大小和计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有模型剪枝方法依赖人工规则或领域知识，难以自适应平衡模型精度与计算量，需开发自动化剪枝方案以提升效率。
AI.method: 构建双目标优化问题，联合优化权重与通道数；引入剩余比例超参数和动态掩码过程控制通道演化，并设计新型损失函数协调精度与计算量的权衡。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的初步实验表明，该方法在神经网络剪枝任务中取得具有竞争力的成果。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过自动学习通道配置，在保持模型精度的同时有效降低计算量，为深度神经网络的自动化压缩提供了新思路。

title: Towards falsifiable interpretability research
title_zh: 走向可证伪的可解释性研究
abstract: Methods for understanding the decisions of and mechanisms underlying deep neural networks (DNNs) typically rely on building intuition by emphasizing sensory or semantic features of individual examples. For instance, methods aim to visualize the components of an input which are "important" to a network's decision, or to measure the semantic properties of single neurons. Here, we argue that interpretability research suffers from an over-reliance on intuition-based approaches that risk-and in some cases have caused-illusory progress and misleading conclusions. We identify a set of limitations that we argue impede meaningful progress in interpretability research, and examine two popular classes of interpretability methods-saliency and single-neuron-based approaches-that serve as case studies for how overreliance on intuition and lack of falsifiability can undermine interpretability research. To address these concerns, we propose a strategy to address these impediments in the form of a framework for strongly falsifiable interpretability research. We encourage researchers to use their intuitions as a starting point to develop and test clear, falsifiable hypotheses, and hope that our framework yields robust, evidence-based interpretability methods that generate meaningful advances in our understanding of DNNs.
summary: Methods for understanding the decisions of and mechanisms underlying deep neural networks (DNNs) typically rely on building intuition by emphasizing sensory or semantic features of individual examples. For instance, methods aim to visualize the components of an input which are "important" to a network's decision, or to measure the semantic properties of single neurons. Here, we argue that interpretability research suffers from an over-reliance on intuition-based approaches that risk-and in some cases have caused-illusory progress and misleading conclusions. We identify a set of limitations that we argue impede meaningful progress in interpretability research, and examine two popular classes of interpretability methods-saliency and single-neuron-based approaches-that serve as case studies for how overreliance on intuition and lack of falsifiability can undermine interpretability research. To address these concerns, we propose a strategy to address these impediments in the form of a framework for strongly falsifiable interpretability research. We encourage researchers to use their intuitions as a starting point to develop and test clear, falsifiable hypotheses, and hope that our framework yields robust, evidence-based interpretability methods that generate meaningful advances in our understanding of DNNs.
abstract_zh: 理解深度神经网络 (DNN) 的决策和机制的方法通常依赖于通过强调单个示例的感觉或语义特征来建立直觉。例如，方法旨在可视化对网络决策“重要”的输入组件，或者测量单个神经元的语义属性。在这里，我们认为可解释性研究过度依赖基于直觉的方法，这种方法可能带来虚幻的进展和误导性的结论，在某些情况下甚至导致了这种风险。我们确定了一系列我们认为阻碍可解释性研究取得有意义进展的局限性，并研究了两种流行的可解释性方法——显着性方法和基于单神经元的方法——作为案例研究，说明过度依赖直觉和缺乏可证伪性如何破坏可解释性研究。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一项策略，以强可证伪的可解释性研究框架的形式解决这些障碍。我们鼓励研究人员以他们的直觉为起点来开发和测试清晰的、可证伪的假设，并希望我们的框架能够产生强大的、基于证据的可解释方法，从而在我们对 DNN 的理解方面产生有意义的进步。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过提出可证伪的解释性研究框架，解决深度神经网络（DNN）解释性研究中过度依赖直觉导致的虚假进展问题。
AI.motivation: 当前DNN解释性方法过度依赖直觉，导致结论可能具有误导性，且缺乏可证伪性，阻碍了研究的实质性进展。
AI.method: 提出一种强可证伪性解释性研究框架，鼓励基于直觉构建清晰、可证伪的假设，并通过系统性验证替代传统直觉驱动的方法。
AI.result: 明确了现有方法的局限性，提出了可证伪性框架，并通过案例分析展示了如何通过该框架改进解释性研究的严谨性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可推动DNN解释性研究向基于证据、可验证的方向发展，从而实质性提升对深度网络的理解。

authors_text: Ruilin Xu,Rundi Wu,Yuko Ishiwaka,Carl Vondrick,Changxi Zheng
title: Listening to Sounds of Silence for Speech Denoising
title_zh: 聆听寂静之声以进行语音降噪
comment: 9 pages, 6 figures, accepted in NeurIPS 2020; Sound examples can be found at http://www.cs.columbia.edu/cg/listen_to_the_silence/
comments: 9 pages, 6 figures, accepted in NeurIPS 2020; Sound examples can be found at http://www.cs.columbia.edu/cg/listen_to_the_silence/
abstract: We introduce a deep learning model for speech denoising, a long-standing challenge in audio analysis arising in numerous applications. Our approach is based on a key observation about human speech: there is often a short pause between each sentence or word. In a recorded speech signal, those pauses introduce a series of time periods during which only noise is present. We leverage these incidental silent intervals to learn a model for automatic speech denoising given only mono-channel audio. Detected silent intervals over time expose not just pure noise but its time-varying features, allowing the model to learn noise dynamics and suppress it from the speech signal. Experiments on multiple datasets confirm the pivotal role of silent interval detection for speech denoising, and our method outperforms several state-of-the-art denoising methods, including those that accept only audio input (like ours) and those that denoise based on audiovisual input (and hence require more information). We also show that our method enjoys excellent generalization properties, such as denoising spoken languages not seen during training.
summary: We introduce a deep learning model for speech denoising, a long-standing challenge in audio analysis arising in numerous applications. Our approach is based on a key observation about human speech: there is often a short pause between each sentence or word. In a recorded speech signal, those pauses introduce a series of time periods during which only noise is present. We leverage these incidental silent intervals to learn a model for automatic speech denoising given only mono-channel audio. Detected silent intervals over time expose not just pure noise but its time-varying features, allowing the model to learn noise dynamics and suppress it from the speech signal. Experiments on multiple datasets confirm the pivotal role of silent interval detection for speech denoising, and our method outperforms several state-of-the-art denoising methods, including those that accept only audio input (like ours) and those that denoise based on audiovisual input (and hence require more information). We also show that our method enjoys excellent generalization properties, such as denoising spoken languages not seen during training.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种用于语音降噪的深度学习模型，这是众多应用中音频分析中长期存在的挑战。我们的方法基于对人类语音的一个关键观察：每个句子或单词之间通常有短暂的停顿。在录制的语音信号中，这些停顿引入了一系列仅存在噪声的时间段。我们利用这些偶然的静默间隔来学习仅给定单通道音频的自动语音降噪模型。随着时间的推移检测到的无声间隔不仅暴露出纯噪声，还暴露了其随时间变化的特征，从而使模型能够学习噪声动态并从语音信号中抑制它。对多个数据集的实验证实了无声间隔检测对于语音去噪的关键作用，并且我们的方法优于几种最先进的去噪方法，包括那些只接受音频输入的方法（像我们的方法）和那些基于视听输入去噪的方法（因此需要更多信息）。我们还表明，我们的方法具有出色的泛化特性，例如对训练期间未见的口语进行去噪。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的语音降噪方法，利用语音中的静默间隔学习噪声特征以实现单通道音频的自动降噪。
AI.motivation: 人类语音中存在短暂停顿，这些静默时段仅包含噪声，可作为学习噪声动态特性的有效数据源，传统方法未充分利用这一特性。
AI.method: 通过检测音频中的静默区间，提取噪声的时间变化特征并训练模型，利用这些特征从语音信号中抑制噪声，仅需单通道音频输入。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证了静默区间检测对降噪的关键作用，方法性能优于现有音频降噪和视听融合降噪技术，且对未见过的语言具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 利用静默间隔的噪声特性可显著提升语音降噪效果，该方法在无需额外信息的情况下实现了优于现有技术的降噪性能和跨语言适应性。

title: Deep neural networks for collaborative learning analytics: Evaluating team collaborations using student gaze point prediction
title_zh: 用于协作学习分析的深度神经网络：使用学生凝视点预测评估团队协作
abstract: Automatic assessment and evaluation of team performance during collaborative tasks is key to the learning analytics and computer-supported cooperative work research. There is a growing interest in the use of gaze-oriented cues for evaluating the collaboration and cooperativeness of teams. However, collecting gaze data using eye-trackers is not always feasible due to time and cost constraints. In this paper, we introduce an automated team assessment tool based on gaze points and joint visual attention (JVA) information extracted by computer vision solutions. We then evaluate team collaborations in an undergraduate anatomy learning activity (N=60, 30 teams) as a test user-study. The results indicate that higher JVA was positively associated with student learning outcomes (r(30)=0.50,p<0.005). Moreover, teams who participated in two experimental groups, and used interactive 3-D anatomy models, had higher JVA (F(1,28)=6.65,p<0.05) and better knowledge retention (F(1,28) =7.56,p<0.05) than those in the control group. Also, no significant difference was observed based on JVA for different gender compositions of teams. The findings from this work offer implications in learning sciences and collaborative computing by providing a novel mutual attention-based measure to objectively evaluate team collaboration dynamics.
summary: Automatic assessment and evaluation of team performance during collaborative tasks is key to the learning analytics and computer-supported cooperative work research. There is a growing interest in the use of gaze-oriented cues for evaluating the collaboration and cooperativeness of teams. However, collecting gaze data using eye-trackers is not always feasible due to time and cost constraints. In this paper, we introduce an automated team assessment tool based on gaze points and joint visual attention (JVA) information extracted by computer vision solutions. We then evaluate team collaborations in an undergraduate anatomy learning activity (N=60, 30 teams) as a test user-study. The results indicate that higher JVA was positively associated with student learning outcomes (r(30)=0.50,p<0.005). Moreover, teams who participated in two experimental groups, and used interactive 3-D anatomy models, had higher JVA (F(1,28)=6.65,p<0.05) and better knowledge retention (F(1,28) =7.56,p<0.05) than those in the control group. Also, no significant difference was observed based on JVA for different gender compositions of teams. The findings from this work offer implications in learning sciences and collaborative computing by providing a novel mutual attention-based measure to objectively evaluate team collaboration dynamics.
abstract_zh: 在协作任务期间自动评估和评估团队绩效是学习分析和计算机支持的协作工作研究的关键。人们越来越关注使用凝视导向的线索来评估团队的协作和配合。然而，由于时间和成本的限制，使用眼动仪收集注视数据并不总是可行。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于凝视点和计算机视觉解决方案提取的联合视觉注意（JVA）信息的自动化团队评估工具。然后，我们评估本科生解剖学学习活动（N=60，30 个团队）中的团队协作，作为测试用户研究。结果表明，较高的 JVA 与学生的学习成果呈正相关（r(30)=0.50，p<0.005）。此外，参与两个实验组并使用交互式3D解剖模型的团队比对照组具有更高的JVA（F（1,28）= 6.65，p <0.05）和更好的知识保留（F（1,28）= 7.56，p <0.05）。此外，基于 JVA，对于团队的不同性别构成，没有观察到显着差异。这项工作的结果通过提供一种新颖的基于相互关注的措施来客观评估团队协作动态，对学习科学和协作计算产生了影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于计算机视觉的团队协作评估工具，通过预测学生眼动点和联合视觉注意（JVA）信息，自动评估团队协作效果。
AI.motivation: 传统眼动仪采集数据成本高且不现实，需开发可行的替代方法以客观评估团队协作与学习效果。
AI.method: 利用计算机视觉提取眼动点和JVA数据，通过实验研究（60名学生，30支队伍）分析团队协作与学习成果的关系。
AI.result: JVA与学习成果显著正相关（r=0.50,p<0.005），使用3D模型的实验组JVA和知识留存率更高（p<0.05），团队性别构成对JVA无显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为学习科学和协作计算提供了基于互注意的新评估指标，可客观分析团队协作动态。

search_text: Deep neural networks for collaborative learning analytics: Evaluating team collaborations using student gaze point prediction 用于协作学习分析的深度神经网络：使用学生凝视点预测评估团队协作 Automatic assessment and evaluation of team performance during collaborative tasks is key to the learning analytics and computer-supported cooperative work research. There is a growing interest in the use of gaze-oriented cues for evaluating the collaboration and cooperativeness of teams. However, collecting gaze data using eye-trackers is not always feasible due to time and cost constraints. In this paper, we introduce an automated team assessment tool based on gaze points and joint visual attention (JVA) information extracted by computer vision solutions. We then evaluate team collaborations in an undergraduate anatomy learning activity (N=60, 30 teams) as a test user-study. The results indicate that higher JVA was positively associated with student learning outcomes (r(30)=0.50,p<0.005). Moreover, teams who participated in two experimental groups, and used interactive 3-D anatomy models, had higher JVA (F(1,28)=6.65,p<0.05) and better knowledge retention (F(1,28) =7.56,p<0.05) than those in the control group. Also, no significant difference was observed based on JVA for different gender compositions of teams. The findings from this work offer implications in learning sciences and collaborative computing by providing a novel mutual attention-based measure to objectively evaluate team collaboration dynamics. 在协作任务期间自动评估和评估团队绩效是学习分析和计算机支持的协作工作研究的关键。人们越来越关注使用凝视导向的线索来评估团队的协作和配合。然而，由于时间和成本的限制，使用眼动仪收集注视数据并不总是可行。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于凝视点和计算机视觉解决方案提取的联合视觉注意（JVA）信息的自动化团队评估工具。然后，我们评估本科生解剖学学习活动（N=60，30 个团队）中的团队协作，作为测试用户研究。结果表明，较高的 JVA 与学生的学习成果呈正相关（r(30)=0.50，p<0.005）。此外，参与两个实验组并使用交互式3D解剖模型的团队比对照组具有更高的JVA（F（1,28）= 6.65，p <0.05）和更好的知识保留（F（1,28）= 7.56，p <0.05）。此外，基于 JVA，对于团队的不同性别构成，没有观察到显着差异。这项工作的结果通过提供一种新颖的基于相互关注的措施来客观评估团队协作动态，对学习科学和协作计算产生了影响。 本文提出了一种基于计算机视觉的团队协作评估工具，通过预测学生眼动点和联合视觉注意（JVA）信息，自动评估团队协作效果。 Zang Guo,Roghayeh Barmaki cs.CY,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Dennis Bähr,Dennis Eschweiler,Anuk Bhattacharyya,Daniel Moreno-Andrés,Wolfram Antonin,Johannes Stegmaier
title: CellCycleGAN: Spatiotemporal Microscopy Image Synthesis of Cell Populations using Statistical Shape Models and Conditional GANs
title_zh: CellCycleGAN：使用统计形状模型和条件 GAN 进行细胞群的时空显微图像合成
abstract: Automatic analysis of spatio-temporal microscopy images is inevitable for state-of-the-art research in the life sciences. Recent developments in deep learning provide powerful tools for automatic analyses of such image data, but heavily depend on the amount and quality of provided training data to perform well. To this end, we developed a new method for realistic generation of synthetic 2D+t microscopy image data of fluorescently labeled cellular nuclei. The method combines spatiotemporal statistical shape models of different cell cycle stages with a conditional GAN to generate time series of cell populations and provides instance-level control of cell cycle stage and the fluorescence intensity of generated cells. We show the effect of the GAN conditioning and create a set of synthetic images that can be readily used for training and benchmarking of cell segmentation and tracking approaches.
summary: Automatic analysis of spatio-temporal microscopy images is inevitable for state-of-the-art research in the life sciences. Recent developments in deep learning provide powerful tools for automatic analyses of such image data, but heavily depend on the amount and quality of provided training data to perform well. To this end, we developed a new method for realistic generation of synthetic 2D+t microscopy image data of fluorescently labeled cellular nuclei. The method combines spatiotemporal statistical shape models of different cell cycle stages with a conditional GAN to generate time series of cell populations and provides instance-level control of cell cycle stage and the fluorescence intensity of generated cells. We show the effect of the GAN conditioning and create a set of synthetic images that can be readily used for training and benchmarking of cell segmentation and tracking approaches.
abstract_zh: 时空显微图像的自动分析对于生命科学研究的最先进是不可避免的。深度学习的最新发展为此类图像数据的自动分析提供了强大的工具，但在很大程度上取决于所提供的训练数据的数量和质量才能发挥良好作用。为此，我们开发了一种新方法，用于真实生成荧光标记细胞核的合成 2D+t 显微镜图像数据。该方法将不同细胞周期阶段的时空统计形状模型与条件 GAN 相结合，生成细胞群的时间序列，并提供对细胞周期阶段和生成细胞的荧光强度的实例级控制。我们展示了 GAN 调节的效果，并创建了一组合成图像，可轻松用于细胞分割和跟踪方法的训练和基准测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合统计形状模型和条件生成对抗网络（Conditional GAN）的方法，用于生成具有时空特性的细胞群体荧光显微图像。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在显微图像分析中依赖大量高质量训练数据，但实际研究中此类数据常不足。本文旨在开发一种生成合成显微图像的新方法，以支持细胞分割和追踪算法的训练与评估。
AI.method: 通过整合不同细胞周期阶段的时空统计形状模型与条件GAN，生成可控的细胞群体时间序列图像，并实现对细胞周期阶段和荧光强度的实例级控制。
AI.result: 验证了GAN条件控制的效果，生成的合成图像可直接用于训练和评估细胞分割与追踪方法，解决了数据不足的问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为生成逼真的显微图像提供了有效工具，有助于提升深度学习在细胞动态分析中的性能。

authors_text: Siamak Shakeri,Noah Constant,Mihir Sanjay Kale,Linting Xue
title: Towards Zero-Shot Multilingual Synthetic Question and Answer Generation for Cross-Lingual Reading Comprehension
title_zh: 实现跨语言阅读理解的零样本多语言综合问答生成
abstract: We propose a simple method to generate multilingual question and answer pairs on a large scale through the use of a single generative model. These synthetic samples can be used to improve the zero-shot performance of multilingual QA models on target languages. Our proposed multi-task training of the generative model only requires the labeled training samples in English, thus removing the need for such samples in the target languages, making it applicable to far more languages than those with labeled data. Human evaluations indicate the majority of such samples are grammatically correct and sensible. Experimental results show our proposed approach can achieve large gains on the XQuAD dataset, reducing the gap between zero-shot and supervised performance of smaller QA models on various languages.
summary: We propose a simple method to generate multilingual question and answer pairs on a large scale through the use of a single generative model. These synthetic samples can be used to improve the zero-shot performance of multilingual QA models on target languages. Our proposed multi-task training of the generative model only requires the labeled training samples in English, thus removing the need for such samples in the target languages, making it applicable to far more languages than those with labeled data. Human evaluations indicate the majority of such samples are grammatically correct and sensible. Experimental results show our proposed approach can achieve large gains on the XQuAD dataset, reducing the gap between zero-shot and supervised performance of smaller QA models on various languages.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种简单的方法，通过使用单个生成模型大规模生成多语言问答对。这些合成样本可用于提高目标语言上多语言 QA 模型的零样本性能。我们提出的生成模型的多任务训练只需要英语的标记训练样本，从而消除了对目标语言的此类样本的需要，使其适用于比标记数据更多的语言。人类评估表明大多数此类样本在语法上是正确且合理的。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法可以在 XQuAD 数据集上取得巨大收益，缩小各种语言上较小 QA 模型的零样本和监督性能之间的差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过单个生成模型大规模生成多语言问答对的方法，以提升多语言问答模型在目标语言上的零样本性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖目标语言的标注数据，但许多语言缺乏此类资源。本文旨在利用英语标注数据生成其他语言的合成问答，突破数据限制。
AI.method: 采用多任务训练的生成模型，仅使用英语标注数据进行训练，生成目标语言的问答对，无需目标语言的标注样本。
AI.result: 在XQuAD数据集上，该方法显著提升小型QA模型的零样本性能，缩小其与监督学习性能的差距，且生成的样本语法正确率高。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效生成高质量多语言问答数据，为资源稀缺语言的跨语言阅读理解提供可行解决方案。

method: 采用多任务训练的生成模型，仅使用英语标注数据进行训练，生成目标语言的问答对，无需目标语言的标注样本。
result: 在XQuAD数据集上，该方法显著提升小型QA模型的零样本性能，缩小其与监督学习性能的差距，且生成的样本语法正确率高。
conclusion: 该方法能有效生成高质量多语言问答数据，为资源稀缺语言的跨语言阅读理解提供可行解决方案。
search_text: Towards Zero-Shot Multilingual Synthetic Question and Answer Generation for Cross-Lingual Reading Comprehension 实现跨语言阅读理解的零样本多语言综合问答生成 We propose a simple method to generate multilingual question and answer pairs on a large scale through the use of a single generative model. These synthetic samples can be used to improve the zero-shot performance of multilingual QA models on target languages. Our proposed multi-task training of the generative model only requires the labeled training samples in English, thus removing the need for such samples in the target languages, making it applicable to far more languages than those with labeled data. Human evaluations indicate the majority of such samples are grammatically correct and sensible. Experimental results show our proposed approach can achieve large gains on the XQuAD dataset, reducing the gap between zero-shot and supervised performance of smaller QA models on various languages. 我们提出了一种简单的方法，通过使用单个生成模型大规模生成多语言问答对。这些合成样本可用于提高目标语言上多语言 QA 模型的零样本性能。我们提出的生成模型的多任务训练只需要英语的标记训练样本，从而消除了对目标语言的此类样本的需要，使其适用于比标记数据更多的语言。人类评估表明大多数此类样本在语法上是正确且合理的。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法可以在 XQuAD 数据集上取得巨大收益，缩小各种语言上较小 QA 模型的零样本和监督性能之间的差距。 本文提出一种通过单个生成模型大规模生成多语言问答对的方法，以提升多语言问答模型在目标语言上的零样本性能。 Siamak Shakeri,Noah Constant,Mihir Sanjay Kale,Linting Xue cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Reinforcement Learning with Combinatorial Actions: An Application to Vehicle Routing
title_zh: 具有组合动作的强化学习：在车辆路由中的应用
abstract: Value-function-based methods have long played an important role in reinforcement learning. However, finding the best next action given a value function of arbitrary complexity is nontrivial when the action space is too large for enumeration. We develop a framework for value-function-based deep reinforcement learning with a combinatorial action space, in which the action selection problem is explicitly formulated as a mixed-integer optimization problem. As a motivating example, we present an application of this framework to the capacitated vehicle routing problem (CVRP), a combinatorial optimization problem in which a set of locations must be covered by a single vehicle with limited capacity. On each instance, we model an action as the construction of a single route, and consider a deterministic policy which is improved through a simple policy iteration algorithm. Our approach is competitive with other reinforcement learning methods and achieves an average gap of 1.7% with state-of-the-art OR methods on standard library instances of medium size.
summary: Value-function-based methods have long played an important role in reinforcement learning. However, finding the best next action given a value function of arbitrary complexity is nontrivial when the action space is too large for enumeration. We develop a framework for value-function-based deep reinforcement learning with a combinatorial action space, in which the action selection problem is explicitly formulated as a mixed-integer optimization problem. As a motivating example, we present an application of this framework to the capacitated vehicle routing problem (CVRP), a combinatorial optimization problem in which a set of locations must be covered by a single vehicle with limited capacity. On each instance, we model an action as the construction of a single route, and consider a deterministic policy which is improved through a simple policy iteration algorithm. Our approach is competitive with other reinforcement learning methods and achieves an average gap of 1.7% with state-of-the-art OR methods on standard library instances of medium size.
abstract_zh: 基于价值函数的方法长期以来在强化学习中发挥着重要作用。然而，当动作空间太大而无法枚举时，在给定任意复杂度的值函数的情况下找到最佳的下一个动作并非易事。我们开发了一个具有组合动作空间的基于价值函数的深度强化学习框架，其中动作选择问题被明确地表述为混合整数优化问题。作为一个激励性的例子，我们提出了该框架在容量车辆路径问题（CVRP）中的应用，这是一个组合优化问题，其中一组位置必须由容量有限的单个车辆覆盖。在每个实例上，我们将一个动作建模为构建单个路由，并考虑通过简单的策略迭代算法改进的确定性策略。我们的方法与其他强化学习方法相比具有竞争力，在中等规模的标准库实例上与最先进的 OR 方法相比，平均差距为 1.7%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于价值函数的深度强化学习框架，用于处理组合动作空间，并将其应用于带容量约束的车辆路径问题（CVRP）。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习方法在动作空间过大时难以枚举最优动作，而组合优化问题（如CVRP）需要有效处理大规模组合动作空间。
AI.method: 将动作选择问题建模为混合整数优化问题，通过策略迭代算法优化确定性策略，以构建单个路线作为动作。
AI.result: 在标准中等规模CVRP实例中，方法平均与最先进的运筹学方法差距为1.7%，表现具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了组合动作空间的强化学习问题，在CVRP场景中展现出良好的应用潜力。

title: Computationally and Statistically Efficient Truncated Regression
title_zh: 计算和统计上有效的截断回归
comment: Accepted for presentation at the Conference on Learning Theory (COLT) 2019
comments: Accepted for presentation at the Conference on Learning Theory (COLT) 2019
abstract: We provide a computationally and statistically efficient estimator for the classical problem of truncated linear regression, where the dependent variable $y = w^T x + ε$ and its corresponding vector of covariates $x \in R^k$ are only revealed if the dependent variable falls in some subset $S \subseteq R$; otherwise the existence of the pair $(x, y)$ is hidden. This problem has remained a challenge since the early works of [Tobin 1958, Amemiya 1973, Hausman and Wise 1977], its applications are abundant, and its history dates back even further to the work of Galton, Pearson, Lee, and Fisher. While consistent estimators of the regression coefficients have been identified, the error rates are not well-understood, especially in high dimensions. Under a thickness assumption about the covariance matrix of the covariates in the revealed sample, we provide a computationally efficient estimator for the coefficient vector $w$ from $n$ revealed samples that attains $l_2$ error $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{k/n})$. Our estimator uses Projected Stochastic Gradient Descent (PSGD) without replacement on the negative log-likelihood of the truncated sample. For the statistically efficient estimation we only need oracle access to the set $S$.In order to achieve computational efficiency we need to assume that $S$ is a union of a finite number of intervals but still can be complicated. PSGD without replacement must be restricted to an appropriately defined convex cone to guarantee that the negative log-likelihood is strongly convex, which in turn is established using concentration of matrices on variables with sub-exponential tails. We perform experiments on simulated data to illustrate the accuracy of our estimator. As a corollary, we show that SGD learns the parameters of single-layer neural networks with noisy activation functions.
summary: We provide a computationally and statistically efficient estimator for the classical problem of truncated linear regression, where the dependent variable $y = w^T x + ε$ and its corresponding vector of covariates $x \in R^k$ are only revealed if the dependent variable falls in some subset $S \subseteq R$; otherwise the existence of the pair $(x, y)$ is hidden. This problem has remained a challenge since the early works of [Tobin 1958, Amemiya 1973, Hausman and Wise 1977], its applications are abundant, and its history dates back even further to the work of Galton, Pearson, Lee, and Fisher. While consistent estimators of the regression coefficients have been identified, the error rates are not well-understood, especially in high dimensions. Under a thickness assumption about the covariance matrix of the covariates in the revealed sample, we provide a computationally efficient estimator for the coefficient vector $w$ from $n$ revealed samples that attains $l_2$ error $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{k/n})$. Our estimator uses Projected Stochastic Gradient Descent (PSGD) without replacement on the negative log-likelihood of the truncated sample. For the statistically efficient estimation we only need oracle access to the set $S$.In order to achieve computational efficiency we need to assume that $S$ is a union of a finite number of intervals but still can be complicated. PSGD without replacement must be restricted to an appropriately defined convex cone to guarantee that the negative log-likelihood is strongly convex, which in turn is established using concentration of matrices on variables with sub-exponential tails. We perform experiments on simulated data to illustrate the accuracy of our estimator. As a corollary, we show that SGD learns the parameters of single-layer neural networks with noisy activation functions.
abstract_zh: 我们为截断线性回归的经典问题提供了一个计算和统计上有效的估计器，其中因变量 $y = w^T x + ε$ 及其相应的协变量向量 $x \in R^k$ 仅当因变量落在某个子集 $S \subseteq R$ 中时才会显示；否则 $(x, y)$ 对的存在将被隐藏。自[Tobin 1958，Amemiya 1973，Hausman and Wise 1977]的早期著作以来，这个问题一直是一个挑战，它的应用非常丰富，其历史甚至可以追溯到高尔顿、皮尔逊、李和费舍尔的工作。虽然已经确定了回归系数的一致估计量，但错误率尚不清楚，尤其是在高维情况下。在关于显示样本中协变量的协方差矩阵的厚度假设下，我们为来自 $n$ 个显示样本的系数向量 $w$ 提供了一个计算有效的估计器，该估计器达到 $l_2$ 误差 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{k/n})$。我们的估计器使用投影随机梯度下降（PSGD），而不对截断样本的负对数似然进行替换。对于统计上有效的估计，我们只需要oracle访问集合$S$。为了实现计算效率，我们需要假设$S$是有限数量的间隔的并集，但仍然可能很复杂。无放回的 PSGD 必须限制在适当定义的凸锥上，以保证负对数似然是强凸的，而负对数似然又是使用具有次指数尾部的变量上的矩阵集中来建立的。我们对模拟数据进行实验来说明我们的估计器的准确性。作为推论，我们证明 SGD 可以学习具有噪声激活函数的单层神经网络的参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种计算和统计高效的截断线性回归估计器，解决因变量仅在特定子集内被观测时的回归问题。
AI.motivation: 传统截断回归方法在高维场景下误差率不明确，且缺乏同时保证计算效率与统计效率的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于无替换投影随机梯度下降（PSGD）优化截断样本的负对数似然函数，并通过凸锥约束确保强凸性，结合协变量协方差矩阵的厚度假设。
AI.result: 在n个样本下达到$\	ilde{O}(\\sqrt{k/n})$的$l_2$误差，实验验证估计器准确性，并推导出SGD学习带噪声激活函数单层神经网络参数的结论。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在计算与统计效率上均优于现有方案，为高维截断回归及神经网络参数学习提供了理论支持。

PSGD without replacement must be restricted to an appropriately defined convex cone to guarantee that the negative log-likelihood is strongly convex, which in turn is established using concentration of matrices on variables with sub-exponential tails.
