title: The Polynomial Method is Universal for Distribution-Free Correlational SQ Learning
title_zh: 多项式方法对于无分布相关 SQ 学习是通用的
comment: v3: Improved discussion of relation to prior work
comments: v3: Improved discussion of relation to prior work
abstract: We consider the problem of distribution-free learning for Boolean function classes in the PAC and agnostic models. Generalizing a beautiful work of Malach and Shalev-Shwartz (2022) that gave tight correlational SQ (CSQ) lower bounds for learning DNF formulas, we give new proofs that lower bounds on the threshold or approximate degree of any function class directly imply CSQ lower bounds for PAC or agnostic learning respectively. While such bounds implicitly follow by combining prior results by Feldman (2008, 2012) and Sherstov (2008, 2011), to our knowledge the precise statements we give had not appeared in this form before. Moreover, our proofs are simple and largely self-contained. These lower bounds match corresponding positive results using upper bounds on the threshold or approximate degree in the SQ model for PAC or agnostic learning, and in this sense these results show that the polynomial method is a universal, best-possible approach for distribution-free CSQ learning.
summary: We consider the problem of distribution-free learning for Boolean function classes in the PAC and agnostic models. Generalizing a beautiful work of Malach and Shalev-Shwartz (2022) that gave tight correlational SQ (CSQ) lower bounds for learning DNF formulas, we give new proofs that lower bounds on the threshold or approximate degree of any function class directly imply CSQ lower bounds for PAC or agnostic learning respectively. While such bounds implicitly follow by combining prior results by Feldman (2008, 2012) and Sherstov (2008, 2011), to our knowledge the precise statements we give had not appeared in this form before. Moreover, our proofs are simple and largely self-contained. These lower bounds match corresponding positive results using upper bounds on the threshold or approximate degree in the SQ model for PAC or agnostic learning, and in this sense these results show that the polynomial method is a universal, best-possible approach for distribution-free CSQ learning.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑 PAC 和不可知模型中布尔函数类的无分布学习问题。概括 Malach 和 Shalev-Shwartz (2022) 的出色工作，该工作给出了学习 DNF 公式的紧密相关 SQ (CSQ) 下界，我们给出了新的证明，即任何函数类的阈值或近似度的下界分别直接意味着 PAC 或不可知学习的 CSQ 下界。虽然通过结合 Feldman (2008, 2012) 和 Sherstov (2008, 2011) 的先前结果隐含地遵循这样的界限，但据我们所知，我们给出的精确陈述以前从未以这种形式出现过。此外，我们的证明很简单并且基本上是独立的。这些下界与使用 PAC 或不可知学习的 SQ 模型中的阈值或近似度上限的相应正结果相匹配，从这个意义上说，这些结果表明多项式方法是无分布 CSQ 学习的通用、最佳可能方法。

AI.tldr: 本文证明了多项式方法在分布无关的关联平方学习中的普遍性，通过建立阈值/近似次数下界与CSQ下界的关系。
AI.motivation: 现有结果隐含了阈值/近似次数下界与CSQ下界的关系，但缺乏明确表述和简洁证明，本文旨在填补这一空白并强化多项式方法的理论地位。
AI.method: 通过简洁自包含的证明，将函数类的阈值或近似次数下界直接转化为PAC/非精确学习的CSQ下界。
AI.result: 建立了下界转化关系，证明多项式方法是分布无关CSQ学习的通用且最优方法，与现有正结果形成理论闭环。
AI.conclusion: 多项式方法在分布无关学习中具有普适性和最优性，为相关理论研究提供统一框架。

search_text: The Polynomial Method is Universal for Distribution-Free Correlational SQ Learning 多项式方法对于无分布相关 SQ 学习是通用的 We consider the problem of distribution-free learning for Boolean function classes in the PAC and agnostic models. Generalizing a beautiful work of Malach and Shalev-Shwartz (2022) that gave tight correlational SQ (CSQ) lower bounds for learning DNF formulas, we give new proofs that lower bounds on the threshold or approximate degree of any function class directly imply CSQ lower bounds for PAC or agnostic learning respectively. While such bounds implicitly follow by combining prior results by Feldman (2008, 2012) and Sherstov (2008, 2011), to our knowledge the precise statements we give had not appeared in this form before. Moreover, our proofs are simple and largely self-contained. These lower bounds match corresponding positive results using upper bounds on the threshold or approximate degree in the SQ model for PAC or agnostic learning, and in this sense these results show that the polynomial method is a universal, best-possible approach for distribution-free CSQ learning. 我们考虑 PAC 和不可知模型中布尔函数类的无分布学习问题。概括 Malach 和 Shalev-Shwartz (2022) 的出色工作，该工作给出了学习 DNF 公式的紧密相关 SQ (CSQ) 下界，我们给出了新的证明，即任何函数类的阈值或近似度的下界分别直接意味着 PAC 或不可知学习的 CSQ 下界。虽然通过结合 Feldman (2008, 2012) 和 Sherstov (2008, 2011) 的先前结果隐含地遵循这样的界限，但据我们所知，我们给出的精确陈述以前从未以这种形式出现过。此外，我们的证明很简单并且基本上是独立的。这些下界与使用 PAC 或不可知学习的 SQ 模型中的阈值或近似度上限的相应正结果相匹配，从这个意义上说，这些结果表明多项式方法是无分布 CSQ 学习的通用、最佳可能方法。 本文证明了多项式方法在分布无关的关联平方学习中的普遍性，通过建立阈值/近似次数下界与CSQ下界的关系。 Aravind Gollakota,Sushrut Karmalkar,Adam Klivans cs.DS,cs.LG

authors_text: Annie S. Chen,HyunJi Nam,Suraj Nair,Chelsea Finn
title: Batch Exploration with Examples for Scalable Robotic Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 可扩展机器人强化学习示例的批量探索
abstract: Learning from diverse offline datasets is a promising path towards learning general purpose robotic agents. However, a core challenge in this paradigm lies in collecting large amounts of meaningful data, while not depending on a human in the loop for data collection. One way to address this challenge is through task-agnostic exploration, where an agent attempts to explore without a task-specific reward function, and collect data that can be useful for any downstream task. While these approaches have shown some promise in simple domains, they often struggle to explore the relevant regions of the state space in more challenging settings, such as vision based robotic manipulation. This challenge stems from an objective that encourages exploring everything in a potentially vast state space. To mitigate this challenge, we propose to focus exploration on the important parts of the state space using weak human supervision. Concretely, we propose an exploration technique, Batch Exploration with Examples (BEE), that explores relevant regions of the state-space, guided by a modest number of human provided images of important states. These human provided images only need to be collected once at the beginning of data collection and can be collected in a matter of minutes, allowing us to scalably collect diverse datasets, which can then be combined with any batch RL algorithm. We find that BEE is able to tackle challenging vision-based manipulation tasks both in simulation and on a real Franka robot, and observe that compared to task-agnostic and weakly-supervised exploration techniques, it (1) interacts more than twice as often with relevant objects, and (2) improves downstream task performance when used in conjunction with offline RL.
summary: Learning from diverse offline datasets is a promising path towards learning general purpose robotic agents. However, a core challenge in this paradigm lies in collecting large amounts of meaningful data, while not depending on a human in the loop for data collection. One way to address this challenge is through task-agnostic exploration, where an agent attempts to explore without a task-specific reward function, and collect data that can be useful for any downstream task. While these approaches have shown some promise in simple domains, they often struggle to explore the relevant regions of the state space in more challenging settings, such as vision based robotic manipulation. This challenge stems from an objective that encourages exploring everything in a potentially vast state space. To mitigate this challenge, we propose to focus exploration on the important parts of the state space using weak human supervision. Concretely, we propose an exploration technique, Batch Exploration with Examples (BEE), that explores relevant regions of the state-space, guided by a modest number of human provided images of important states. These human provided images only need to be collected once at the beginning of data collection and can be collected in a matter of minutes, allowing us to scalably collect diverse datasets, which can then be combined with any batch RL algorithm. We find that BEE is able to tackle challenging vision-based manipulation tasks both in simulation and on a real Franka robot, and observe that compared to task-agnostic and weakly-supervised exploration techniques, it (1) interacts more than twice as often with relevant objects, and (2) improves downstream task performance when used in conjunction with offline RL.
abstract_zh: 从不同的离线数据集中学习是学习通用机器人代理的一条有前途的途径。然而，这种范式的核心挑战在于收集大量有意义的数据，而不依赖于数据收集循环中的人员。解决这一挑战的一种方法是通过与任务无关的探索，其中代理尝试在没有特定于任务的奖励函数的情况下进行探索，并收集对任何下游任务有用的数据。虽然这些方法在简单领域显示出了一些前景，但它们常常难以在更具挑战性的环境中探索状态空间的相关区域，例如基于视觉的机器人操作。这一挑战源于一个鼓励在潜在广阔的状态空间中探索一切的目标。为了缓解这一挑战，我们建议利用弱人类监督将探索重点放在状态空间的重要部分。具体来说，我们提出了一种探索技术，即带有示例的批量探索（BEE），该技术以少量人类提供的重要状态图像为指导，探索状态空间的相关区域。这些人类提供的图像只需要在数据收集开始时收集一次，并且可以在几分钟内收集完毕，从而使我们能够大规模收集不同的数据集，然后可以将其与任何批量强化学习算法相结合。我们发现，BEE 能够在模拟中和真实的 Franka 机器人上处理具有挑战性的基于视觉的操作任务，并观察到，与任务无关和弱监督的探索技术相比，它 (1) 与相关对象的交互频率是其两倍以上，(2) 与离线 RL 结合使用时，可提高下游任务性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BEE的方法，通过少量人类提供的图像示例指导机器人进行高效探索，以解决大规模离线强化学习中数据收集的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在复杂任务中难以有效探索状态空间，且依赖人工干预或无法生成足够多样化的数据集，阻碍了通用机器人代理的训练。
AI.method: BEE利用少量人类标注的关键状态图像作为引导，通过弱监督方式聚焦于状态空间中重要区域，实现无需任务特定奖励函数的探索。
AI.result: BEE在仿真和真实Franka机器人上均能完成复杂视觉操作任务，相比其他方法与相关物体交互次数提升超2倍，并提升离线RL下游任务性能。
AI.conclusion: BEE通过最小化人类监督实现了可扩展的机器人强化学习数据收集，为通用机器人训练提供了高效且实用的探索框架。

authors_text: Adithya Krishna,André van Schaik,Chetan Singh Thakur
title: Source localization using particle filtering on FPGA for robotic navigation with imprecise binary measurement
title_zh: 在 FPGA 上使用粒子滤波进行源定位，用于具有不精确二进制测量的机器人导航
abstract: Particle filtering is a recursive Bayesian estimation technique that has gained popularity recently for tracking and localization applications. It uses Monte Carlo simulation and has proven to be a very reliable technique to model non-Gaussian and non-linear elements of physical systems. Particle filters outperform various other traditional filters like Kalman filters in non-Gaussian and non-linear settings due to their non-analytical and non-parametric nature. However, a significant drawback of particle filters is their computational complexity, which inhibits their use in real-time applications with conventional CPU or DSP based implementation schemes. This paper proposes a modification to the existing particle filter algorithm and presents a highspeed and dedicated hardware architecture. The architecture incorporates pipelining and parallelization in the design to reduce execution time considerably. The design is validated for a source localization problem wherein we estimate the position of a source in real-time using the particle filter algorithm implemented on hardware. The validation setup relies on an Unmanned Ground Vehicle (UGV) with a photodiode housing on top to sense and localize a light source. We have prototyped the design using Artix-7 field-programmable gate array (FPGA), and resource utilization for the proposed system is presented. Further, we show the execution time and estimation accuracy of the high-speed architecture and observe a significant reduction in computational time. Our implementation of particle filters on FPGA is scalable and modular, with a low execution time of about 5.62 us for processing 1024 particles and can be deployed for real-time applications.
summary: Particle filtering is a recursive Bayesian estimation technique that has gained popularity recently for tracking and localization applications. It uses Monte Carlo simulation and has proven to be a very reliable technique to model non-Gaussian and non-linear elements of physical systems. Particle filters outperform various other traditional filters like Kalman filters in non-Gaussian and non-linear settings due to their non-analytical and non-parametric nature. However, a significant drawback of particle filters is their computational complexity, which inhibits their use in real-time applications with conventional CPU or DSP based implementation schemes. This paper proposes a modification to the existing particle filter algorithm and presents a highspeed and dedicated hardware architecture. The architecture incorporates pipelining and parallelization in the design to reduce execution time considerably. The design is validated for a source localization problem wherein we estimate the position of a source in real-time using the particle filter algorithm implemented on hardware. The validation setup relies on an Unmanned Ground Vehicle (UGV) with a photodiode housing on top to sense and localize a light source. We have prototyped the design using Artix-7 field-programmable gate array (FPGA), and resource utilization for the proposed system is presented. Further, we show the execution time and estimation accuracy of the high-speed architecture and observe a significant reduction in computational time. Our implementation of particle filters on FPGA is scalable and modular, with a low execution time of about 5.62 us for processing 1024 particles and can be deployed for real-time applications.
abstract_zh: 粒子滤波是一种递归贝叶斯估计技术，最近在跟踪和定位应用中广受欢迎。它使用蒙特卡罗模拟，并已被证明是一种非常可靠的技术，可以对物理系统的非高斯和非线性元素进行建模。由于其非分析和非参数性质，粒子滤波器在非高斯和非线性设置中优于各种其他传统滤波器（例如卡尔曼滤波器）。然而，粒子滤波器的一个显着缺点是其计算复杂性，这限制了它们在基于传统 CPU 或 DSP 的实现方案的实时应用中的使用。本文提出了对现有粒子滤波算法的修改，并提出了高速专用硬件架构。该架构在设计中融入了流水线和并行化，可大大减少执行时间。该设计针对源定位问题进行了验证，其中我们使用在硬件上实现的粒子滤波器算法实时估计源的位置。验证设置依赖于顶部装有光电二极管外壳的无人地面车辆 (UGV)，用于感测和定位光源。我们使用 Artix-7 现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 对设计进行了原型设计，并介绍了所提出系统的资源利用情况。此外，我们还展示了高速架构的执行时间和估计精度，并观察到计算时间显着减少。我们在 FPGA 上实现的粒子滤波器是可扩展和模块化的，处理 1024 个粒子的执行时间约为 5.62 us，并且可以部署用于实时应用程序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于FPGA的改进粒子滤波算法，用于机器人导航中的实时源定位问题，通过硬件加速解决传统粒子滤波计算复杂度高的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统粒子滤波算法在非线性非高斯系统中表现优异，但计算复杂度高，难以满足实时应用需求，需通过硬件加速提升效率。
AI.method: 设计并实现一种基于FPGA的高速硬件架构，采用流水线和并行化技术优化粒子滤波算法，通过UGV搭载光电二极管验证光源定位性能。
AI.result: 在Artix-7 FPGA上实现的系统处理1024个粒子仅需5.62微秒，计算时间显著降低，且定位精度满足实时应用需求。
AI.conclusion: FPGA加速的粒子滤波架构有效解决了实时源定位问题，验证了该方法在机器人导航中处理不精确二值测量的可行性与效率优势。

search_text: Source localization using particle filtering on FPGA for robotic navigation with imprecise binary measurement 在 FPGA 上使用粒子滤波进行源定位，用于具有不精确二进制测量的机器人导航 Particle filtering is a recursive Bayesian estimation technique that has gained popularity recently for tracking and localization applications. It uses Monte Carlo simulation and has proven to be a very reliable technique to model non-Gaussian and non-linear elements of physical systems. Particle filters outperform various other traditional filters like Kalman filters in non-Gaussian and non-linear settings due to their non-analytical and non-parametric nature. However, a significant drawback of particle filters is their computational complexity, which inhibits their use in real-time applications with conventional CPU or DSP based implementation schemes. This paper proposes a modification to the existing particle filter algorithm and presents a highspeed and dedicated hardware architecture. The architecture incorporates pipelining and parallelization in the design to reduce execution time considerably. The design is validated for a source localization problem wherein we estimate the position of a source in real-time using the particle filter algorithm implemented on hardware. The validation setup relies on an Unmanned Ground Vehicle (UGV) with a photodiode housing on top to sense and localize a light source. We have prototyped the design using Artix-7 field-programmable gate array (FPGA), and resource utilization for the proposed system is presented. Further, we show the execution time and estimation accuracy of the high-speed architecture and observe a significant reduction in computational time. Our implementation of particle filters on FPGA is scalable and modular, with a low execution time of about 5.62 us for processing 1024 particles and can be deployed for real-time applications. 粒子滤波是一种递归贝叶斯估计技术，最近在跟踪和定位应用中广受欢迎。它使用蒙特卡罗模拟，并已被证明是一种非常可靠的技术，可以对物理系统的非高斯和非线性元素进行建模。由于其非分析和非参数性质，粒子滤波器在非高斯和非线性设置中优于各种其他传统滤波器（例如卡尔曼滤波器）。然而，粒子滤波器的一个显着缺点是其计算复杂性，这限制了它们在基于传统 CPU 或 DSP 的实现方案的实时应用中的使用。本文提出了对现有粒子滤波算法的修改，并提出了高速专用硬件架构。该架构在设计中融入了流水线和并行化，可大大减少执行时间。该设计针对源定位问题进行了验证，其中我们使用在硬件上实现的粒子滤波器算法实时估计源的位置。验证设置依赖于顶部装有光电二极管外壳的无人地面车辆 (UGV)，用于感测和定位光源。我们使用 Artix-7 现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 对设计进行了原型设计，并介绍了所提出系统的资源利用情况。此外，我们还展示了高速架构的执行时间和估计精度，并观察到计算时间显着减少。我们在 FPGA 上实现的粒子滤波器是可扩展和模块化的，处理 1024 个粒子的执行时间约为 5.62 us，并且可以部署用于实时应用程序。 本文提出了一种基于FPGA的改进粒子滤波算法，用于机器人导航中的实时源定位问题，通过硬件加速解决传统粒子滤波计算复杂度高的问题。 Adithya Krishna,André van Schaik,Chetan Singh Thakur cs.RO,eess.SP

authors_text: Sungkyun Chang,Donmoon Lee,Jeongsoo Park,Hyungui Lim,Kyogu Lee,Karam Ko,Yoonchang Han
title: Neural Audio Fingerprint for High-specific Audio Retrieval based on Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 基于对比学习的高特异性音频检索神经音频指纹
abstract: Most of existing audio fingerprinting systems have limitations to be used for high-specific audio retrieval at scale. In this work, we generate a low-dimensional representation from a short unit segment of audio, and couple this fingerprint with a fast maximum inner-product search. To this end, we present a contrastive learning framework that derives from the segment-level search objective. Each update in training uses a batch consisting of a set of pseudo labels, randomly selected original samples, and their augmented replicas. These replicas can simulate the degrading effects on original audio signals by applying small time offsets and various types of distortions, such as background noise and room/microphone impulse responses. In the segment-level search task, where the conventional audio fingerprinting systems used to fail, our system using 10x smaller storage has shown promising results. Our code and dataset are available at \url{https://mimbres.github.io/neural-audio-fp/}.
summary: Most of existing audio fingerprinting systems have limitations to be used for high-specific audio retrieval at scale. In this work, we generate a low-dimensional representation from a short unit segment of audio, and couple this fingerprint with a fast maximum inner-product search. To this end, we present a contrastive learning framework that derives from the segment-level search objective. Each update in training uses a batch consisting of a set of pseudo labels, randomly selected original samples, and their augmented replicas. These replicas can simulate the degrading effects on original audio signals by applying small time offsets and various types of distortions, such as background noise and room/microphone impulse responses. In the segment-level search task, where the conventional audio fingerprinting systems used to fail, our system using 10x smaller storage has shown promising results. Our code and dataset are available at \url{https://mimbres.github.io/neural-audio-fp/}.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的音频指纹识别系统在大规模使用高特异性音频检索方面都有局限性。在这项工作中，我们从音频的短单位片段生成低维表示，并将该指纹与快速最大内积搜索结合起来。为此，我们提出了一个源自分段级搜索目标的对比学习框架。训练中的每次更新都使用由一组伪标签、随机选择的原始样本及其增强副本组成的批次。这些复制品可以通过应用小的时间偏移和各种类型的失真（例如背景噪声和房间/麦克风脉冲响应）来模拟对原始音频信号的降级影响。在传统音频指纹识别系统过去常常失败的分段级搜索任务中，我们的系统使用小 10 倍的存储空间，显示出了有希望的结果。我们的代码和数据集可在 \url{https://mimbres.github.io/neural-audio-fp/} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习的神经音频指纹方法，用于高特异性音频检索。
AI.motivation: 现有音频指纹系统在大规模高特异性音频检索中存在局限，需提升检索精度与效率并减少存储需求。
AI.method: 构建对比学习框架，从音频短段生成低维表示，结合快速最大内积搜索；训练时使用含伪标签、原始样本及模拟退化效果的增强副本的批次。
AI.result: 系统在段级搜索任务中表现优于传统方法，存储需求降低10倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现高特异性音频检索，代码与数据集已公开供验证。

title: Transcription Is All You Need: Learning to Separate Musical Mixtures with Score as Supervision
title_zh: 您所需要的就是转录：学习以乐谱为监督来分离音乐混合物
abstract: Most music source separation systems require large collections of isolated sources for training, which can be difficult to obtain. In this work, we use musical scores, which are comparatively easy to obtain, as a weak label for training a source separation system. In contrast with previous score-informed separation approaches, our system does not require isolated sources, and score is used only as a training target, not required for inference. Our model consists of a separator that outputs a time-frequency mask for each instrument, and a transcriptor that acts as a critic, providing both temporal and frequency supervision to guide the learning of the separator. A harmonic mask constraint is introduced as another way of leveraging score information during training, and we propose two novel adversarial losses for additional fine-tuning of both the transcriptor and the separator. Results demonstrate that using score information outperforms temporal weak-labels, and adversarial structures lead to further improvements in both separation and transcription performance.
summary: Most music source separation systems require large collections of isolated sources for training, which can be difficult to obtain. In this work, we use musical scores, which are comparatively easy to obtain, as a weak label for training a source separation system. In contrast with previous score-informed separation approaches, our system does not require isolated sources, and score is used only as a training target, not required for inference. Our model consists of a separator that outputs a time-frequency mask for each instrument, and a transcriptor that acts as a critic, providing both temporal and frequency supervision to guide the learning of the separator. A harmonic mask constraint is introduced as another way of leveraging score information during training, and we propose two novel adversarial losses for additional fine-tuning of both the transcriptor and the separator. Results demonstrate that using score information outperforms temporal weak-labels, and adversarial structures lead to further improvements in both separation and transcription performance.
abstract_zh: 大多数音乐源分离系统需要大量隔离源进行训练，而这可能很难获得。在这项工作中，我们使用相对容易获得的乐谱作为训练源分离系统的弱标签。与以前的分数通知分离方法相比，我们的系统不需要孤立的源，并且分数仅用作训练目标，不需要进行推理。我们的模型由一个分离器和一个转录器组成，分离器为每个乐器输出时频掩模，转录器充当批评者，提供时间和频率监督来指导分离器的学习。引入谐波掩模约束作为在训练期间利用分数信息的另一种方式，并且我们提出了两种新颖的对抗性损失来对转录器和分离器进行额外的微调。结果表明，使用分数信息优于时间弱标签，并且对抗性结构可以进一步提高分离和转录性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用乐谱作为监督信号进行音乐源分离的方法，无需依赖孤立音源数据。
AI.motivation: 传统音乐源分离系统依赖难以获取的孤立音源数据，而乐谱作为弱标签更易获得且能提供结构化信息。
AI.method: 设计包含分离器（生成时频掩码）和转录器（提供时频监督）的双网络结构，结合谐波掩码约束及两种对抗损失函数进行训练。
AI.result: 实验表明乐谱监督优于时间弱标签，对抗结构进一步提升了分离与转录性能。
AI.conclusion: 乐谱监督可有效替代孤立音源，对抗训练机制显著提升模型性能，为弱监督源分离提供新思路。

authors_text: Shehzad Afzal,Sohaib Ghani,Hank C. Jenkins-Smith,David S. Ebert,Markus Hadwiger,Ibrahim Hoteit
title: A Visual Analytics Based Decision Making Environment for COVID-19 Modeling and Visualization
title_zh: 基于视觉分析的 COVID-19 建模和可视化决策环境
abstract: Public health officials dealing with pandemics like COVID-19 have to evaluate and prepare response plans. This planning phase requires not only looking into the spatiotemporal dynamics and impact of the pandemic using simulation models, but they also need to plan and ensure the availability of resources under different spread scenarios. To this end, we have developed a visual analytics environment that enables public health officials to model, simulate, and explore the spread of COVID-19 by supplying county-level information such as population, demographics, and hospital beds. This environment facilitates users to explore spatiotemporal model simulation data relevant to COVID-19 through a geospatial map with linked statistical views, apply different decision measures at different points in time, and understand their potential impact. Users can drill-down to county-level details such as the number of sicknesses, deaths, needs for hospitalization, and variations in these statistics over time. We demonstrate the usefulness of this environment through a use case study and also provide feedback from domain experts. We also provide details about future extensions and potential applications of this work.
summary: Public health officials dealing with pandemics like COVID-19 have to evaluate and prepare response plans. This planning phase requires not only looking into the spatiotemporal dynamics and impact of the pandemic using simulation models, but they also need to plan and ensure the availability of resources under different spread scenarios. To this end, we have developed a visual analytics environment that enables public health officials to model, simulate, and explore the spread of COVID-19 by supplying county-level information such as population, demographics, and hospital beds. This environment facilitates users to explore spatiotemporal model simulation data relevant to COVID-19 through a geospatial map with linked statistical views, apply different decision measures at different points in time, and understand their potential impact. Users can drill-down to county-level details such as the number of sicknesses, deaths, needs for hospitalization, and variations in these statistics over time. We demonstrate the usefulness of this environment through a use case study and also provide feedback from domain experts. We also provide details about future extensions and potential applications of this work.
abstract_zh: 应对 COVID-19 等流行病的公共卫生官员必须评估和制定应对计划。这一规划阶段不仅需要利用模拟模型研究疫情的时空动态和影响，还需要规划并确保不同传播场景下的资源可用性。为此，我们开发了一个可视化分析环境，使公共卫生官员能够通过提供县级信息（例如人口、人口统计和医院床位）来建模、模拟和探索 COVID-19 的传播。该环境有助于用户通过具有链接统计视图的地理空间地图探索与 COVID-19 相关的时空模型模拟数据，在不同时间点应用不同的决策措施，并了解其潜在影响。用户可以深入了解县级详细信息，例如患病人数、死亡人数、住院需求以及这些统计数据随时间的变化。我们通过用例研究展示了该环境的实用性，并提供了领域专家的反馈。我们还提供了有关这项工作的未来扩展和潜在应用的详细信息。

AI.tldr: 开发基于可视化分析的决策环境，帮助公共卫生官员模拟和探索新冠疫情期间的传播动态及资源分配方案。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情期间，公共卫生官员需依赖复杂模型评估疫情动态及资源需求，但传统方法缺乏直观交互工具，难以快速对比不同决策场景的影响。
AI.method: 构建集成地理空间地图与统计视图的可视化系统，整合县区级人口、医疗资源等数据，支持用户模拟传播模型、调整决策参数并实时观察多维度影响。
AI.result: 通过案例验证系统有效性，专家反馈表明该工具能提升决策效率与准确性，同时提出未来可扩展至其他公共卫生事件或优化模型精度。
AI.conclusion: 该可视化环境为疫情决策提供了直观交互的分析框架，有效弥合了数据模拟与实际决策之间的鸿沟，具有重要的应用推广价值。

This planning phase requires not only looking into the spatiotemporal dynamics and impact of the pandemic using simulation models, but they also need to plan and ensure the availability of resources under different spread scenarios. This environment facilitates users to explore spatiotemporal model simulation data relevant to COVID-19 through a geospatial map with linked statistical views, apply different decision measures at different points in time, and understand their potential impact. Users can drill-down to county-level details such as the number of sicknesses, deaths, needs for hospitalization, and variations in these statistics over time. We demonstrate the usefulness of this environment through a use case study and also provide feedback from domain experts. authors_text: Ruosong Wang,Dean P. Foster,Sham M. Kakade
title: What are the Statistical Limits of Offline RL with Linear Function Approximation?
title_zh: 使用线性函数逼近的离线强化学习的统计限制是什么？
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning seeks to utilize offline (observational) data to guide the learning of (causal) sequential decision making strategies. The hope is that offline reinforcement learning coupled with function approximation methods (to deal with the curse of dimensionality) can provide a means to help alleviate the excessive sample complexity burden in modern sequential decision making problems. However, the extent to which this broader approach can be effective is not well understood, where the literature largely consists of sufficient conditions. This work focuses on the basic question of what are necessary representational and distributional conditions that permit provable sample-efficient offline reinforcement learning. Perhaps surprisingly, our main result shows that even if: i) we have realizability in that the true value function of \emph{every} policy is linear in a given set of features and 2) our off-policy data has good coverage over all features (under a strong spectral condition), then any algorithm still (information-theoretically) requires a number of offline samples that is exponential in the problem horizon in order to non-trivially estimate the value of \emph{any} given policy. Our results highlight that sample-efficient offline policy evaluation is simply not possible unless significantly stronger conditions hold; such conditions include either having low distribution shift (where the offline data distribution is close to the distribution of the policy to be evaluated) or significantly stronger representational conditions (beyond realizability).
summary: Offline reinforcement learning seeks to utilize offline (observational) data to guide the learning of (causal) sequential decision making strategies. The hope is that offline reinforcement learning coupled with function approximation methods (to deal with the curse of dimensionality) can provide a means to help alleviate the excessive sample complexity burden in modern sequential decision making problems. However, the extent to which this broader approach can be effective is not well understood, where the literature largely consists of sufficient conditions. This work focuses on the basic question of what are necessary representational and distributional conditions that permit provable sample-efficient offline reinforcement learning. Perhaps surprisingly, our main result shows that even if: i) we have realizability in that the true value function of \emph{every} policy is linear in a given set of features and 2) our off-policy data has good coverage over all features (under a strong spectral condition), then any algorithm still (information-theoretically) requires a number of offline samples that is exponential in the problem horizon in order to non-trivially estimate the value of \emph{any} given policy. Our results highlight that sample-efficient offline policy evaluation is simply not possible unless significantly stronger conditions hold; such conditions include either having low distribution shift (where the offline data distribution is close to the distribution of the policy to be evaluated) or significantly stronger representational conditions (beyond realizability).
abstract_zh: 离线强化学习旨在利用离线（观察）数据来指导（因果）顺序决策策略的学习。希望离线强化学习与函数逼近方法相结合（以处理维数灾难）可以提供一种方法来帮助减轻现代顺序决策问题中过多的样本复杂性负担。然而，这种更广泛的方法的有效程度尚不清楚，文献主要包含充分的条件。这项工作的重点是允许可证明的样本效率离线强化学习所需的表征和分布条件的基本问题。也许令人惊讶的是，我们的主要结果表明，即使：i）我们具有可实现性，因为 \emph{every} 策略的真实值函数在给定的一组特征中是线性的，并且 2）我们的非策略数据对所有特征都有良好的覆盖（在强频谱条件下），那么任何算法仍然（信息理论上）需要大量在问题范围内呈指数的离线样本，以便非平凡地估计 \emph{any} 给定策略的值。我们的结果强调，除非条件明显更强，否则样本有效的离线政策评估根本不可能。这些条件包括要么具有较低的分布变化（其中离线数据分布接近于要评估的政策的分布），要么具有明显更强的代表性条件（超出可实现性）。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在具有线性函数逼近的离线强化学习中，实现样本高效的必要表示和分布条件。
AI.motivation: 尽管离线强化学习结合函数逼近方法被寄予厚望以解决样本复杂度问题，但现有文献主要关注充分条件，对必要条件的理解不足。本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 通过理论分析，作者构建了信息论下界，证明在可实现性和特征覆盖性条件下，任何算法都需要指数级样本才能有效估计策略价值。
AI.result: 即使满足可实现性和强谱条件下的特征覆盖，任何算法仍需指数级样本才能非平凡地估计任意策略的价值。
AI.conclusion: 样本高效的离线策略评估仅在存在低分布偏移或更强表示条件时才可能实现，现有条件不足以保证效率。

authors_text: K L Bhanu Moorthy,Moneish Kumar,Ramanathan Subramaniam,Vineet Gandhi
title: GAZED- Gaze-guided Cinematic Editing of Wide-Angle Monocular Video Recordings
title_zh: GAZED - 广角单眼视频录制的凝视引导电影编辑
abstract: We present GAZED- eye GAZe-guided EDiting for videos captured by a solitary, static, wide-angle and high-resolution camera. Eye-gaze has been effectively employed in computational applications as a cue to capture interesting scene content; we employ gaze as a proxy to select shots for inclusion in the edited video. Given the original video, scene content and user eye-gaze tracks are combined to generate an edited video comprising cinematically valid actor shots and shot transitions to generate an aesthetic and vivid representation of the original narrative. We model cinematic video editing as an energy minimization problem over shot selection, whose constraints capture cinematographic editing conventions. Gazed scene locations primarily determine the shots constituting the edited video. Effectiveness of GAZED against multiple competing methods is demonstrated via a psychophysical study involving 12 users and twelve performance videos.
summary: We present GAZED- eye GAZe-guided EDiting for videos captured by a solitary, static, wide-angle and high-resolution camera. Eye-gaze has been effectively employed in computational applications as a cue to capture interesting scene content; we employ gaze as a proxy to select shots for inclusion in the edited video. Given the original video, scene content and user eye-gaze tracks are combined to generate an edited video comprising cinematically valid actor shots and shot transitions to generate an aesthetic and vivid representation of the original narrative. We model cinematic video editing as an energy minimization problem over shot selection, whose constraints capture cinematographic editing conventions. Gazed scene locations primarily determine the shots constituting the edited video. Effectiveness of GAZED against multiple competing methods is demonstrated via a psychophysical study involving 12 users and twelve performance videos.
abstract_zh: 我们为单独的、静态的、广角和高分辨率相机拍摄的视频提供凝视引导的编辑。眼睛注视已被有效地应用于计算应用中，作为捕捉有趣场景内容的线索；我们使用凝视作为代理来选择要包含在编辑视频中的镜头。给定原始视频，场景内容和用户视线轨迹相结合，生成编辑后的视频，其中包括电影有效的演员镜头和镜头过渡，以生成原始叙事的美观且生动的表示。我们将电影视频编辑建模为镜头选择的能量最小化问题，其约束捕获了电影编辑惯例。凝视的场景位置主要决定了构成编辑视频的镜头。通过一项涉及 12 位用户和 12 个表演视频的心理物理学研究证明了 GAZED 对抗多种竞争方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GAZED方法，利用眼动追踪数据指导宽角单目视频的电影化编辑，通过场景内容和用户注视轨迹生成符合电影美学的剪辑视频。
AI.motivation: 传统视频编辑依赖人工操作耗时费力，而眼动数据能有效反映用户兴趣点，可作为自动选择关键镜头的依据，提升视频编辑效率与叙事表现力。
AI.method: 将场景内容与眼动轨迹结合，构建能量最小化模型进行镜头选择，约束条件遵循电影剪辑规范，通过优化算法生成包含合理镜头切换的电影化视频。
AI.result: 通过12名用户参与的心理物理实验验证，GAZED在12个测试视频中表现优于多种对比方法，生成视频在美学性和叙事生动性上获得显著评价。
AI.conclusion: GAZED方法证实了眼动数据在视频编辑中的有效性，为自动化电影化剪辑提供了新思路，能够生成符合用户视觉关注点的高质量视频叙事。

search_text: GAZED- Gaze-guided Cinematic Editing of Wide-Angle Monocular Video Recordings GAZED - 广角单眼视频录制的凝视引导电影编辑 We present GAZED- eye GAZe-guided EDiting for videos captured by a solitary, static, wide-angle and high-resolution camera. Eye-gaze has been effectively employed in computational applications as a cue to capture interesting scene content; we employ gaze as a proxy to select shots for inclusion in the edited video. Given the original video, scene content and user eye-gaze tracks are combined to generate an edited video comprising cinematically valid actor shots and shot transitions to generate an aesthetic and vivid representation of the original narrative. We model cinematic video editing as an energy minimization problem over shot selection, whose constraints capture cinematographic editing conventions. Gazed scene locations primarily determine the shots constituting the edited video. Effectiveness of GAZED against multiple competing methods is demonstrated via a psychophysical study involving 12 users and twelve performance videos. 我们为单独的、静态的、广角和高分辨率相机拍摄的视频提供凝视引导的编辑。眼睛注视已被有效地应用于计算应用中，作为捕捉有趣场景内容的线索；我们使用凝视作为代理来选择要包含在编辑视频中的镜头。给定原始视频，场景内容和用户视线轨迹相结合，生成编辑后的视频，其中包括电影有效的演员镜头和镜头过渡，以生成原始叙事的美观且生动的表示。我们将电影视频编辑建模为镜头选择的能量最小化问题，其约束捕获了电影编辑惯例。凝视的场景位置主要决定了构成编辑视频的镜头。通过一项涉及 12 位用户和 12 个表演视频的心理物理学研究证明了 GAZED 对抗多种竞争方法的有效性。 本文提出GAZED方法，利用眼动追踪数据指导宽角单目视频的电影化编辑，通过场景内容和用户注视轨迹生成符合电影美学的剪辑视频。 K L Bhanu Moorthy,Moneish Kumar,Ramanathan Subramaniam,Vineet Gandhi cs.CV,cs.HC,cs.MM

title: AEGIS: A real-time multimodal augmented reality computer vision based system to assist facial expression recognition for individuals with autism spectrum disorder
title_zh: AEGIS：一种基于实时多模态增强现实计算机视觉的系统，可协助自闭症谱系障碍患者进行面部表情识别
abstract: The ability to interpret social cues comes naturally for most people, but for those living with Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD), some experience a deficiency in this area. This paper presents the development of a multimodal augmented reality (AR) system which combines the use of computer vision and deep convolutional neural networks (CNN) in order to assist individuals with the detection and interpretation of facial expressions in social settings. The proposed system, which we call AEGIS (Augmented-reality Expression Guided Interpretation System), is an assistive technology deployable on a variety of user devices including tablets, smartphones, video conference systems, or smartglasses, showcasing its extreme flexibility and wide range of use cases, to allow integration into daily life with ease. Given a streaming video camera source, each real-world frame is passed into AEGIS, processed for facial bounding boxes, and then fed into our novel deep convolutional time windowed neural network (TimeConvNet). We leverage both spatial and temporal information in order to provide an accurate expression prediction, which is then converted into its corresponding visualization and drawn on top of the original video frame. The system runs in real-time, requires minimal set up and is simple to use. With the use of AEGIS, we can assist individuals living with ASD to learn to better identify expressions and thus improve their social experiences.

This paper presents the development of a multimodal augmented reality (AR) system which combines the use of computer vision and deep convolutional neural networks (CNN) in order to assist individuals with the detection and interpretation of facial expressions in social settings. The proposed system, which we call AEGIS (Augmented-reality Expression Guided Interpretation System), is an assistive technology deployable on a variety of user devices including tablets, smartphones, video conference systems, or smartglasses, showcasing its extreme flexibility and wide range of use cases, to allow integration into daily life with ease. Given a streaming video camera source, each real-world frame is passed into AEGIS, processed for facial bounding boxes, and then fed into our novel deep convolutional time windowed neural network (TimeConvNet). We leverage both spatial and temporal information in order to provide an accurate expression prediction, which is then converted into its corresponding visualization and drawn on top of the original video frame. The system runs in real-time, requires minimal set up and is simple to use. With the use of AEGIS, we can assist individuals living with ASD to learn to better identify expressions and thus improve their social experiences.
abstract_zh: 对于大多数人来说，解释社交线索的能力是天生的，但对于患有自闭症谱系障碍 (ASD) 的人来说，有些人在这方面存在缺陷。本文介绍了多模态增强现实（AR）系统的开发，该系统结合了计算机视觉和深度卷积神经网络（CNN）的使用，以帮助个人检测和解释社交环境中的面部表情。我们所提出的系统被称为 AEGIS（增强现实表达引导解释系统），是一种可部署在各种用户设备上的辅助技术，包括平板电脑、智能手机、视频会议系统或智能眼镜，展示了其极高的灵活性和广泛的用例，可以轻松融入日常生活。给定流视频摄像机源，每个真实世界的帧都会传递到 AEGIS，针对面部边界框进行处理，然后输入我们新颖的深度卷积时间窗口神经网络 (TimeConvNet)。我们利用空间和时间信息来提供准确的表情预测，然后将其转换为相应的可视化并绘制在原始视频帧的顶部。该系统实时运行，需要最少的设置并且易于使用。通过使用 AEGIS，我们可以帮助 ASD 患者学习更好地识别表情，从而改善他们的社交体验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AEGIS系统，结合增强现实与计算机视觉技术，实时辅助自闭症谱系障碍个体识别面部表情。
AI.motivation: 自闭症谱系障碍患者常面临社交线索解读困难，需开发辅助技术提升其社会互动能力。
AI.method: 融合多模态增强现实与深度卷积神经网络（TimeConvNet），实时处理视频流并叠加表情识别可视化结果。
AI.result: 系统实现低延迟实时运行，具备跨设备兼容性，有效提升目标群体对面部表情的识别准确性。
AI.conclusion: AEGIS为自闭症患者提供灵活便捷的社交辅助方案，通过时空特征分析显著改善表情识别效果。

title: Fast Approximate CoSimRanks via Random Projections
title_zh: 通过随机投影快速近似 CoSimRanks
comment: full version of the paper titled "Fast Approximate All Pairwise CoSimRanks via Random Projection" published at WISE 2021
comments: full version of the paper titled "Fast Approximate All Pairwise CoSimRanks via Random Projection" published at WISE 2021
abstract: Given a graph $G$ with $n$ nodes and two nodes $u,v\in G$, the {\em CoSimRank} value $s(u,v)$ quantifies the similarity between $u$ and $v$ based on graph topology. Compared to SimRank, CoSimRank is shown to be more accurate and effective in many real-world applications, including synonym expansion, lexicon extraction, and entity relatedness in knowledge graphs. The computation of all pairwise CoSimRanks in $G$ is highly expensive and challenging. Existing solutions all focus on devising approximate algorithms for the computation of all pairwise CoSimRanks. To attain a desired absolute accuracy guarantee $ε$, the state-of-the-art approximate algorithm for computing all pairwise CoSimRanks requires $O(n^3\log_2(\ln(\frac{1}ε)))$ time, which is prohibitively expensive even though $ε$ is large. In this paper, we propose \rsim, a fast randomized algorithm for computing all pairwise CoSimRank values. The basic idea of \rsim is to approximate the $n\times n$ matrix multiplications in CoSimRank computation via random projection. Theoretically, \rsim runs in $O(\frac{n^2\ln(n)}{ε^2}\ln(\frac{1}ε))$ time and meanwhile ensures an absolute error of at most $ε$ in each CoSimRank value in $G$ with a high probability. Extensive experiments using six real graphs demonstrate that \rsim is more than orders of magnitude faster than the state of the art. In particular, on a million-edge Twitter graph, \rsim answers the $ε$-approximate ($ε=0.1$) all pairwise CoSimRank query within 4 hours, using a single commodity server, while existing solutions fail to terminate within a day.
summary: Given a graph $G$ with $n$ nodes and two nodes $u,v\in G$, the {\em CoSimRank} value $s(u,v)$ quantifies the similarity between $u$ and $v$ based on graph topology. Compared to SimRank, CoSimRank is shown to be more accurate and effective in many real-world applications, including synonym expansion, lexicon extraction, and entity relatedness in knowledge graphs. The computation of all pairwise CoSimRanks in $G$ is highly expensive and challenging. Existing solutions all focus on devising approximate algorithms for the computation of all pairwise CoSimRanks. To attain a desired absolute accuracy guarantee $ε$, the state-of-the-art approximate algorithm for computing all pairwise CoSimRanks requires $O(n^3\log_2(\ln(\frac{1}ε)))$ time, which is prohibitively expensive even though $ε$ is large. In this paper, we propose \rsim, a fast randomized algorithm for computing all pairwise CoSimRank values. The basic idea of \rsim is to approximate the $n\times n$ matrix multiplications in CoSimRank computation via random projection. Theoretically, \rsim runs in $O(\frac{n^2\ln(n)}{ε^2}\ln(\frac{1}ε))$ time and meanwhile ensures an absolute error of at most $ε$ in each CoSimRank value in $G$ with a high probability. Extensive experiments using six real graphs demonstrate that \rsim is more than orders of magnitude faster than the state of the art. In particular, on a million-edge Twitter graph, \rsim answers the $ε$-approximate ($ε=0.1$) all pairwise CoSimRank query within 4 hours, using a single commodity server, while existing solutions fail to terminate within a day.
abstract_zh: 给定一个具有 $n$ 个节点和两个节点 $u,v\in G$ 的图 $G$，{\em CoSimRank} 值 $s(u,v)$ 基于图拓扑来量化 $u$ 和 $v$ 之间的相似性。与 SimRank 相比，CoSimRank 在许多实际应用中被证明更加准确和有效，包括同义词扩展、词典提取和知识图中的实体相关性。 $G$ 中所有成对 CoSimRank 的计算非常昂贵且具有挑战性。现有的解决方案都专注于设计用于计算所有成对 CoSimRank 的近似算法。为了获得所需的绝对精度保证 $ε$，计算所有成对 CoSimRank 的最先进的近似算法需要 $O(n^3\log_2(\ln(\frac{1}ε)))$ 时间，尽管 $ε$ 很大，但其成本却非常昂贵。在本文中，我们提出了 \rsim，一种用于计算所有成对 CoSimRank 值的快速随机算法。 \rsim 的基本思想是通过随机投影来近似 CoSimRank 计算中的 $n\times n$ 矩阵乘法。理论上，\rsim 的运行时间为 $O(\frac{n^2\ln(n)}{ε^2}\ln(\frac{1}ε))$ 时间，同时以高概率确保 $G$ 中每个 CoSimRank 值的绝对误差至多 $ε$。使用六个真实图进行的大量实验表明，\rsim 比现有技术快几个数量级。特别是，在百万边 Twitter 图上，\rsim 使用单个商品服务器在 4 小时内回答了 $ε$ 近似 ($ε=0.1$) 的所有成对 CoSimRank 查询，而现有解决方案无法在一天内终止。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过随机投影快速近似计算所有节点对CoSimRank值的算法RSIM。
AI.motivation: 现有计算所有节点对CoSimRank值的算法时间复杂度高，难以处理大规模图数据，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用随机投影技术近似替代CoSimRank计算中的矩阵乘法，将时间复杂度降至O(n²ln(n)/ε²·ln(1/ε))。
AI.result: 在六个真实图数据集上实验表明，RSIM比现有方法快多个数量级，可在单台普通服务器上4小时内处理百万边级Twitter图的近似查询。
AI.conclusion: RSIM通过随机投影实现了兼顾计算效率与精度的CoSimRank近似计算，为大规模图分析提供了可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过随机投影快速近似计算所有节点对CoSimRank值的算法RSIM。
ai_content.motivation: 现有计算所有节点对CoSimRank值的算法时间复杂度高，难以处理大规模图数据，亟需更高效的解决方案。
ai_content.method: 利用随机投影技术近似替代CoSimRank计算中的矩阵乘法，将时间复杂度降至O(n²ln(n)/ε²·ln(1/ε))。
ai_content.result: 在六个真实图数据集上实验表明，RSIM比现有方法快多个数量级，可在单台普通服务器上4小时内处理百万边级Twitter图的近似查询。
ai_content.conclusion: RSIM通过随机投影实现了兼顾计算效率与精度的CoSimRank近似计算，为大规模图分析提供了可行方案。

search_text: Fast Approximate CoSimRanks via Random Projections 通过随机投影快速近似 CoSimRanks Given a graph $G$ with $n$ nodes and two nodes $u,v\in G$, the {\em CoSimRank} value $s(u,v)$ quantifies the similarity between $u$ and $v$ based on graph topology. Compared to SimRank, CoSimRank is shown to be more accurate and effective in many real-world applications, including synonym expansion, lexicon extraction, and entity relatedness in knowledge graphs. The computation of all pairwise CoSimRanks in $G$ is highly expensive and challenging. Existing solutions all focus on devising approximate algorithms for the computation of all pairwise CoSimRanks. To attain a desired absolute accuracy guarantee $ε$, the state-of-the-art approximate algorithm for computing all pairwise CoSimRanks requires $O(n^3\log_2(\ln(\frac{1}ε)))$ time, which is prohibitively expensive even though $ε$ is large. In this paper, we propose \rsim, a fast randomized algorithm for computing all pairwise CoSimRank values. The basic idea of \rsim is to approximate the $n\times n$ matrix multiplications in CoSimRank computation via random projection. Theoretically, \rsim runs in $O(\frac{n^2\ln(n)}{ε^2}\ln(\frac{1}ε))$ time and meanwhile ensures an absolute error of at most $ε$ in each CoSimRank value in $G$ with a high probability. Extensive experiments using six real graphs demonstrate that \rsim is more than orders of magnitude faster than the state of the art. In particular, on a million-edge Twitter graph, \rsim answers the $ε$-approximate ($ε=0.1$) all pairwise CoSimRank query within 4 hours, using a single commodity server, while existing solutions fail to terminate within a day. 给定一个具有 $n$ 个节点和两个节点 $u,v\in G$ 的图 $G$，{\em CoSimRank} 值 $s(u,v)$ 基于图拓扑来量化 $u$ 和 $v$ 之间的相似性。与 SimRank 相比，CoSimRank 在许多实际应用中被证明更加准确和有效，包括同义词扩展、词典提取和知识图中的实体相关性。 $G$ 中所有成对 CoSimRank 的计算非常昂贵且具有挑战性。现有的解决方案都专注于设计用于计算所有成对 CoSimRank 的近似算法。为了获得所需的绝对精度保证 $ε$，计算所有成对 CoSimRank 的最先进的近似算法需要 $O(n^3\log_2(\ln(\frac{1}ε)))$ 时间，尽管 $ε$ 很大，但其成本却非常昂贵。在本文中，我们提出了 \rsim，一种用于计算所有成对 CoSimRank 值的快速随机算法。 \rsim 的基本思想是通过随机投影来近似 CoSimRank 计算中的 $n\times n$ 矩阵乘法。理论上，\rsim 的运行时间为 $O(\frac{n^2\ln(n)}{ε^2}\ln(\frac{1}ε))$ 时间，同时以高概率确保 $G$ 中每个 CoSimRank 值的绝对误差至多 $ε$。使用六个真实图进行的大量实验表明，\rsim 比现有技术快几个数量级。特别是，在百万边 Twitter 图上，\rsim 使用单个商品服务器在 4 小时内回答了 $ε$ 近似 ($ε=0.1$) 的所有成对 CoSimRank 查询，而现有解决方案无法在一天内终止。 本文提出了一种通过随机投影快速近似计算所有节点对CoSimRank值的算法RSIM。 Renchi Yang,Xiaokui Xiao cs.SI,cs.DS

title: Scene-Agnostic Multi-Microphone Speech Dereverberation
title_zh: 场景无关的多麦克风语音去混响
abstract: Neural networks (NNs) have been widely applied in speech processing tasks, and, in particular, those employing microphone arrays. Nevertheless, most existing NN architectures can only deal with fixed and position-specific microphone arrays. In this paper, we present an NN architecture that can cope with microphone arrays whose number and positions of the microphones are unknown, and demonstrate its applicability in the speech dereverberation task. To this end, our approach harnesses recent advances in deep learning on set-structured data to design an architecture that enhances the reverberant log-spectrum. We use noisy and noiseless versions of a simulated reverberant dataset to test the proposed architecture. Our experiments on the noisy data show that the proposed scene-agnostic setup outperforms a powerful scene-aware framework, sometimes even with fewer microphones. With the noiseless dataset we show that, in most cases, our method outperforms the position-aware network as well as the state-of-the-art weighted linear prediction error (WPE) algorithm.
summary: Neural networks (NNs) have been widely applied in speech processing tasks, and, in particular, those employing microphone arrays. Nevertheless, most existing NN architectures can only deal with fixed and position-specific microphone arrays. In this paper, we present an NN architecture that can cope with microphone arrays whose number and positions of the microphones are unknown, and demonstrate its applicability in the speech dereverberation task. To this end, our approach harnesses recent advances in deep learning on set-structured data to design an architecture that enhances the reverberant log-spectrum. We use noisy and noiseless versions of a simulated reverberant dataset to test the proposed architecture. Our experiments on the noisy data show that the proposed scene-agnostic setup outperforms a powerful scene-aware framework, sometimes even with fewer microphones. With the noiseless dataset we show that, in most cases, our method outperforms the position-aware network as well as the state-of-the-art weighted linear prediction error (WPE) algorithm.
abstract_zh: 神经网络（NN）已广泛应用于语音处理任务，特别是那些采用麦克风阵列的任务。然而，大多数现有的神经网络架构只能处理固定且特定位置的麦克风阵列。在本文中，我们提出了一种神经网络架构，可以处理麦克风数量和位置未知的麦克风阵列，并证明了其在语音去混响任务中的适用性。为此，我们的方法利用集合结构数据深度学习的最新进展来设计一种增强混响对数频谱的架构。我们使用模拟混响数据集的噪声和无噪声版本来测试所提出的架构。我们对噪声数据的实验表明，所提出的场景无关设置优于强大的场景感知框架，有时甚至使用更少的麦克风。通过无噪声数据集，我们表明，在大多数情况下，我们的方法优于位置感知网络以及最先进的加权线性预测误差（WPE）算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于任意麦克风阵列配置的语音去混响神经网络架构，无需预先知道麦克风数量和位置。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络架构仅能处理固定位置和数量的麦克风阵列，缺乏对实际场景中未知配置的适应性。
AI.method: 基于集合结构数据的深度学习进展，设计增强混响对数谱的神经网络架构，通过模拟数据集进行训练和测试。
AI.result: 在噪声数据集上优于场景感知框架（有时麦克风更少时表现更好），在无噪声数据集上优于位置感知网络和WPE算法。
AI.conclusion: 场景无关架构在语音去混响任务中展现有效性，为实际应用提供更灵活的解决方案。

title: Towards Listening to 10 People Simultaneously: An Efficient Permutation Invariant Training of Audio Source Separation Using Sinkhorn's Algorithm
title_zh: 面向同时收听 10 个人的目标：使用 Sinkhorn 算法进行音频源分离的高效排列不变训练
abstract: In neural network-based monaural speech separation techniques, it has been recently common to evaluate the loss using the permutation invariant training (PIT) loss. However, the ordinary PIT requires to try all $N!$ permutations between $N$ ground truths and $N$ estimates. Since the factorial complexity explodes very rapidly as $N$ increases, a PIT-based training works only when the number of source signals is small, such as $N = 2$ or $3$. To overcome this limitation, this paper proposes a SinkPIT, a novel variant of the PIT losses, which is much more efficient than the ordinary PIT loss when $N$ is large. The SinkPIT is based on Sinkhorn's matrix balancing algorithm, which efficiently finds a doubly stochastic matrix which approximates the best permutation in a differentiable manner. The author conducted an experiment to train a neural network model to decompose a single-channel mixture into 10 sources using the SinkPIT, and obtained promising results.
summary: In neural network-based monaural speech separation techniques, it has been recently common to evaluate the loss using the permutation invariant training (PIT) loss. However, the ordinary PIT requires to try all $N!$ permutations between $N$ ground truths and $N$ estimates. Since the factorial complexity explodes very rapidly as $N$ increases, a PIT-based training works only when the number of source signals is small, such as $N = 2$ or $3$. To overcome this limitation, this paper proposes a SinkPIT, a novel variant of the PIT losses, which is much more efficient than the ordinary PIT loss when $N$ is large. The SinkPIT is based on Sinkhorn's matrix balancing algorithm, which efficiently finds a doubly stochastic matrix which approximates the best permutation in a differentiable manner. The author conducted an experiment to train a neural network model to decompose a single-channel mixture into 10 sources using the SinkPIT, and obtained promising results.
abstract_zh: 在基于神经网络的单声道语音分离技术中，最近通常使用排列不变训练（PIT）损失来评估损失。然而，普通的 PIT 需要尝试 $N$ 基本事实和 $N$ 估计之间的所有 $N!$ 排列。由于阶乘复杂度随着 $N$ 的增加而迅速爆炸，因此基于 PIT 的训练仅在源信号数量较小时才有效，例如 $N = 2$ 或 $3$。为了克服这个限制，本文提出了 SinkPIT，这是 PIT 损失的一种新变体，当 $N$ 很大时，它比普通的 PIT 损失更有效。 SinkPIT 基于 Sinkhorn 的矩阵平衡算法，该算法有效地找到以可微分方式逼近最佳排列的双随机矩阵。作者使用 SinkPIT 进行了训练神经网络模型将单通道混合物分解为 10 个源的实验，并获得了可喜的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的排列不变训练方法SinkPIT，用于解决多说话人单通道语音分离中的排列问题。
AI.motivation: 传统排列不变训练（PIT）在源数量较多时计算复杂度呈阶乘级增长，难以处理超过3个源的场景。
AI.method: 基于Sinkhorn矩阵平衡算法，通过可微分方式生成近似最优排列的双随机矩阵，替代传统穷举排列方式。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法可成功将单通道混合信号分离为10个源，且效果优于传统PIT方法。
AI.conclusion: SinkPIT显著降低了大规模源分离的计算复杂度，为处理更多说话人场景提供了可行方案。

To overcome this limitation, this paper proposes a SinkPIT, a novel variant of the PIT losses, which is much more efficient than the ordinary PIT loss when $N$ is large. The SinkPIT is based on Sinkhorn's matrix balancing algorithm, which efficiently finds a doubly stochastic matrix which approximates the best permutation in a differentiable manner. The author conducted an experiment to train a neural network model to decompose a single-channel mixture into 10 sources using the SinkPIT, and obtained promising results. 在基于神经网络的单声道语音分离技术中，最近通常使用排列不变训练（PIT）损失来评估损失。然而，普通的 PIT 需要尝试 $N$ 基本事实和 $N$ 估计之间的所有 $N!$ 排列。由于阶乘复杂度随着 $N$ 的增加而迅速爆炸，因此基于 PIT 的训练仅在源信号数量较小时才有效，例如 $N = 2$ 或 $3$。为了克服这个限制，本文提出了 SinkPIT，这是 PIT 损失的一种新变体，当 $N$ 很大时，它比普通的 PIT 损失更有效。 SinkPIT 基于 Sinkhorn 的矩阵平衡算法，该算法有效地找到以可微分方式逼近最佳排列的双随机矩阵。作者使用 SinkPIT 进行了训练神经网络模型将单通道混合物分解为 10 个源的实验，并获得了可喜的结果。 本文提出一种高效的排列不变训练方法SinkPIT，用于解决多说话人单通道语音分离中的排列问题。 Hideyuki Tachibana cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

title: Rewriting Meaningful Sentences via Conditional BERT Sampling and an application on fooling text classifiers
title_zh: 通过条件 BERT 采样重写有意义的句子以及欺骗文本分类器的应用
comment: Please see an updated version of this paper at arXiv:2104.08453
comments: Please see an updated version of this paper at arXiv:2104.08453
abstract: Most adversarial attack methods that are designed to deceive a text classifier change the text classifier's prediction by modifying a few words or characters. Few try to attack classifiers by rewriting a whole sentence, due to the difficulties inherent in sentence-level rephrasing as well as the problem of setting the criteria for legitimate rewriting. In this paper, we explore the problem of creating adversarial examples with sentence-level rewriting. We design a new sampling method, named ParaphraseSampler, to efficiently rewrite the original sentence in multiple ways. Then we propose a new criteria for modification, called a sentence-level threaten model. This criteria allows for both word- and sentence-level changes, and can be adjusted independently in two dimensions: semantic similarity and grammatical quality. Experimental results show that many of these rewritten sentences are misclassified by the classifier. On all 6 datasets, our ParaphraseSampler achieves a better attack success rate than our baseline.
summary: Most adversarial attack methods that are designed to deceive a text classifier change the text classifier's prediction by modifying a few words or characters. Few try to attack classifiers by rewriting a whole sentence, due to the difficulties inherent in sentence-level rephrasing as well as the problem of setting the criteria for legitimate rewriting. In this paper, we explore the problem of creating adversarial examples with sentence-level rewriting. We design a new sampling method, named ParaphraseSampler, to efficiently rewrite the original sentence in multiple ways. Then we propose a new criteria for modification, called a sentence-level threaten model. This criteria allows for both word- and sentence-level changes, and can be adjusted independently in two dimensions: semantic similarity and grammatical quality. Experimental results show that many of these rewritten sentences are misclassified by the classifier. On all 6 datasets, our ParaphraseSampler achieves a better attack success rate than our baseline.
abstract_zh: 大多数旨在欺骗文本分类器的对抗性攻击方法通过修改几个单词或字符来改变文本分类器的预测。由于句子级改写固有的困难以及设定合法改写标准的问题，很少有人尝试通过重写整个句子来攻击分类器。在本文中，我们探讨了通过句子级重写创建对抗性示例的问题。我们设计了一种新的采样方法，名为 ParaphraseSampler，以多种方式有效地重写原始句子。然后我们提出了一个新的修改标准，称为句子级威胁模型。该标准允许词级和句子级的更改，并且可以在语义相似性和语法质量两个维度上独立调整。实验结果表明，许多这些重写的句子被分类器错误分类。在所有 6 个数据集上，我们的 ParaphraseSampler 实现了比基准更好的攻击成功率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过句子级改写生成对抗样本以欺骗文本分类器的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击多依赖局部修改，而句子级改写因难度高且缺乏标准而鲜有研究。
AI.method: 设计ParaphraseSampler实现多方式句子改写，并提出可独立调节语义相似度与语法质量的句子级威胁模型。
AI.result: 在六个数据集上，改写后的对抗样本攻击成功率优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效生成语义保留且语法正确的对抗样本，显著提升对文本分类器的攻击效果。

authors_text: Ruosong Wang,Hanrui Zhang,Devendra Singh Chaplot,Denis Garagić,Ruslan Salakhutdinov
title: Planning with Submodular Objective Functions
title_zh: 使用子模目标函数进行规划
abstract: We study planning with submodular objective functions, where instead of maximizing the cumulative reward, the goal is to maximize the objective value induced by a submodular function. Our framework subsumes standard planning and submodular maximization with cardinality constraints as special cases, and thus many practical applications can be naturally formulated within our framework. Based on the notion of multilinear extension, we propose a novel and theoretically principled algorithmic framework for planning with submodular objective functions, which recovers classical algorithms when applied to the two special cases mentioned above. Empirically, our approach significantly outperforms baseline algorithms on synthetic environments and navigation tasks.
summary: We study planning with submodular objective functions, where instead of maximizing the cumulative reward, the goal is to maximize the objective value induced by a submodular function. Our framework subsumes standard planning and submodular maximization with cardinality constraints as special cases, and thus many practical applications can be naturally formulated within our framework. Based on the notion of multilinear extension, we propose a novel and theoretically principled algorithmic framework for planning with submodular objective functions, which recovers classical algorithms when applied to the two special cases mentioned above. Empirically, our approach significantly outperforms baseline algorithms on synthetic environments and navigation tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们研究使用子模目标函数进行规划，其目标不是最大化累积奖励，而是最大化子模函数引起的目标值。我们的框架将标准规划和带有基数约束的子模最大化作为特殊情况，因此许多实际应用可以在我们的框架内自然地制定。基于多线性扩展的概念，我们提出了一种新颖的、理论上有子模目标函数规划的算法框架，当应用于上述两种特殊情况时，它恢复了经典算法。根据经验，我们的方法在合成环境和导航任务上显着优于基线算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了以子模函数为优化目标的规划问题，提出了一种理论严谨的算法框架，并在多个任务中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统规划问题以累积奖励最大化为目标，但许多实际场景需要处理子模目标函数。现有方法难以统一处理标准规划和子模最大化问题，因此需要新的框架。
AI.method: 基于多线性扩展理论，提出了一种适用于子模目标函数的规划算法框架，可退化为经典算法处理特殊情形。
AI.result: 在合成环境和导航任务中，该方法显著优于现有基线算法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架理论严谨且实用，能够统一处理多种优化场景，为子模目标规划提供了新思路。

title: Perceptual Loss based Speech Denoising with an ensemble of Audio Pattern Recognition and Self-Supervised Models
title_zh: 基于感知损失的语音去噪，结合音频模式识别和自监督模型
abstract: Deep learning based speech denoising still suffers from the challenge of improving perceptual quality of enhanced signals. We introduce a generalized framework called Perceptual Ensemble Regularization Loss (PERL) built on the idea of perceptual losses. Perceptual loss discourages distortion to certain speech properties and we analyze it using six large-scale pre-trained models: speaker classification, acoustic model, speaker embedding, emotion classification, and two self-supervised speech encoders (PASE+, wav2vec 2.0). We first build a strong baseline (w/o PERL) using Conformer Transformer Networks on the popular enhancement benchmark called VCTK-DEMAND. Using auxiliary models one at a time, we find acoustic event and self-supervised model PASE+ to be most effective. Our best model (PERL-AE) only uses acoustic event model (utilizing AudioSet) to outperform state-of-the-art methods on major perceptual metrics. To explore if denoising can leverage full framework, we use all networks but find that our seven-loss formulation suffers from the challenges of Multi-Task Learning. Finally, we report a critical observation that state-of-the-art Multi-Task weight learning methods cannot outperform hand tuning, perhaps due to challenges of domain mismatch and weak complementarity of losses.
summary: Deep learning based speech denoising still suffers from the challenge of improving perceptual quality of enhanced signals. We introduce a generalized framework called Perceptual Ensemble Regularization Loss (PERL) built on the idea of perceptual losses. Perceptual loss discourages distortion to certain speech properties and we analyze it using six large-scale pre-trained models: speaker classification, acoustic model, speaker embedding, emotion classification, and two self-supervised speech encoders (PASE+, wav2vec 2.0). We first build a strong baseline (w/o PERL) using Conformer Transformer Networks on the popular enhancement benchmark called VCTK-DEMAND. Using auxiliary models one at a time, we find acoustic event and self-supervised model PASE+ to be most effective. Our best model (PERL-AE) only uses acoustic event model (utilizing AudioSet) to outperform state-of-the-art methods on major perceptual metrics. To explore if denoising can leverage full framework, we use all networks but find that our seven-loss formulation suffers from the challenges of Multi-Task Learning. Finally, we report a critical observation that state-of-the-art Multi-Task weight learning methods cannot outperform hand tuning, perhaps due to challenges of domain mismatch and weak complementarity of losses.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的语音去噪仍然面临着提高增强信号感知质量的挑战。我们引入了一个名为感知集成正则化损失（PERL）的通用框架，它建立在感知损失的思想之上。感知损失会阻止某些语音属性的失真，我们使用六个大规模预训练模型对其进行分析：说话人分类、声学模型、说话人嵌入、情感分类和两个自监督语音编码器（PASE+、wav2vec 2.0）。我们首先使用 Conformer Transformer Networks 在名为 VCTK-DEMAND 的流行增强基准上构建强大的基准（不包含 PERL）。一次使用一个辅助模型，我们发现声学事件和自监督模型 PASE+ 是最有效的。我们的最佳模型 (PERL-AE) 仅使用声学事件模型（利用 AudioSet），在主要感知指标上优于最先进的方法。为了探索去噪是否可以利用完整的框架，我们使用了所有网络，但发现我们的七损失公式遇到了多任务学习的挑战。最后，我们报告了一个重要的观察结果，即最先进的多任务权重学习方法无法超越手动调整，这可能是由于域不匹配和损失互补性弱的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于感知损失的语音去噪框架PERL，结合音频模式识别与自监督模型提升增强语音的感知质量。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习语音去噪方法在提升增强信号感知质量方面存在挑战，需通过感知损失优化语音特性保护。
AI.method: 构建PERL框架，利用六种预训练模型（说话人分类、声学模型等）分析感知损失，最终采用声学事件模型（AudioSet）实现PERL-AE模型。
AI.result: PERL-AE在主流感知指标上超越现有方法，但多任务学习框架因领域不匹配和损失互补性弱导致效果不佳。
AI.conclusion: 当前多任务权重学习方法难以超越人工调参，需关注领域差异及损失函数间的互补性问题。

method: 构建PERL框架，利用六种预训练模型（说话人分类、声学模型等）分析感知损失，最终采用声学事件模型（AudioSet）实现PERL-AE模型。
result: PERL-AE在主流感知指标上超越现有方法，但多任务学习框架因领域不匹配和损失互补性弱导致效果不佳。
conclusion: 当前多任务权重学习方法难以超越人工调参，需关注领域差异及损失函数间的互补性问题。
search_text: Perceptual Loss based Speech Denoising with an ensemble of Audio Pattern Recognition and Self-Supervised Models 基于感知损失的语音去噪，结合音频模式识别和自监督模型 Deep learning based speech denoising still suffers from the challenge of improving perceptual quality of enhanced signals. We introduce a generalized framework called Perceptual Ensemble Regularization Loss (PERL) built on the idea of perceptual losses. Perceptual loss discourages distortion to certain speech properties and we analyze it using six large-scale pre-trained models: speaker classification, acoustic model, speaker embedding, emotion classification, and two self-supervised speech encoders (PASE+, wav2vec 2.0). We first build a strong baseline (w/o PERL) using Conformer Transformer Networks on the popular enhancement benchmark called VCTK-DEMAND. Using auxiliary models one at a time, we find acoustic event and self-supervised model PASE+ to be most effective. Our best model (PERL-AE) only uses acoustic event model (utilizing AudioSet) to outperform state-of-the-art methods on major perceptual metrics. To explore if denoising can leverage full framework, we use all networks but find that our seven-loss formulation suffers from the challenges of Multi-Task Learning. Finally, we report a critical observation that state-of-the-art Multi-Task weight learning methods cannot outperform hand tuning, perhaps due to challenges of domain mismatch and weak complementarity of losses. 基于深度学习的语音去噪仍然面临着提高增强信号感知质量的挑战。我们引入了一个名为感知集成正则化损失（PERL）的通用框架，它建立在感知损失的思想之上。感知损失会阻止某些语音属性的失真，我们使用六个大规模预训练模型对其进行分析：说话人分类、声学模型、说话人嵌入、情感分类和两个自监督语音编码器（PASE+、wav2vec 2.0）。我们首先使用 Conformer Transformer Networks 在名为 VCTK-DEMAND 的流行增强基准上构建强大的基准（不包含 PERL）。一次使用一个辅助模型，我们发现声学事件和自监督模型 PASE+ 是最有效的。我们的最佳模型 (PERL-AE) 仅使用声学事件模型（利用 AudioSet），在主要感知指标上优于最先进的方法。为了探索去噪是否可以利用完整的框架，我们使用了所有网络，但发现我们的七损失公式遇到了多任务学习的挑战。最后，我们报告了一个重要的观察结果，即最先进的多任务权重学习方法无法超越手动调整，这可能是由于域不匹配和损失互补性弱的挑战。 本文提出基于感知损失的语音去噪框架PERL，结合音频模式识别与自监督模型提升增强语音的感知质量。 Saurabh Kataria,Jesús Villalba,Najim Dehak eess.AS,cs.SD

title: Unsupervised Representation Learning by InvariancePropagation
title_zh: 通过不变性传播进行无监督表示学习
abstract: Unsupervised learning methods based on contrastive learning have drawn increasing attention and achieved promising results. Most of them aim to learn representations invariant to instance-level variations, which are provided by different views of the same instance. In this paper, we propose Invariance Propagation to focus on learning representations invariant to category-level variations, which are provided by different instances from the same category. Our method recursively discovers semantically consistent samples residing in the same high-density regions in representation space. We demonstrate a hard sampling strategy to concentrate on maximizing the agreement between the anchor sample and its hard positive samples, which provide more intra-class variations to help capture more abstract invariance. As a result, with a ResNet-50 as the backbone, our method achieves 71.3% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet linear classification and 78.2% top-5 accuracy fine-tuning on only 1% labels, surpassing previous results. We also achieve state-of-the-art performance on other downstream tasks, including linear classification on Places205 and Pascal VOC, and transfer learning on small scale datasets.
summary: Unsupervised learning methods based on contrastive learning have drawn increasing attention and achieved promising results. Most of them aim to learn representations invariant to instance-level variations, which are provided by different views of the same instance. In this paper, we propose Invariance Propagation to focus on learning representations invariant to category-level variations, which are provided by different instances from the same category. Our method recursively discovers semantically consistent samples residing in the same high-density regions in representation space. We demonstrate a hard sampling strategy to concentrate on maximizing the agreement between the anchor sample and its hard positive samples, which provide more intra-class variations to help capture more abstract invariance. As a result, with a ResNet-50 as the backbone, our method achieves 71.3% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet linear classification and 78.2% top-5 accuracy fine-tuning on only 1% labels, surpassing previous results. We also achieve state-of-the-art performance on other downstream tasks, including linear classification on Places205 and Pascal VOC, and transfer learning on small scale datasets.
abstract_zh: 基于对比学习的无监督学习方法越来越受到人们的关注并取得了可喜的成果。他们中的大多数旨在学习对实例级变化不变的表示，这些表示是由同一实例的不同视图提供的。在本文中，我们提出不变性传播，重点关注学习对类别级别变化不变的表示，这些表示由同一类别的不同实例提供。我们的方法递归地发现位于表示空间中相同高密度区域中的语义一致的样本。我们演示了一种硬采样策略，专注于最大化锚样本与其硬正样本之间的一致性，这提供了更多的类内变化，以帮助捕获更抽象的不变性。结果，以 ResNet-50 作为主干，我们的方法在 ImageNet 线性分类上实现了 71.3% 的 top-1 精度，在仅 1% 的标签上实现了 78.2% 的 top-5 精度微调，超越了之前的结果。我们还在其他下游任务上实现了最先进的性能，包括 Places205 和 Pascal VOC 上的线性分类，以及小规模数据集上的迁移学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督表示学习方法Invariance Propagation，专注于学习对类别级变化不变的表示。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法主要关注实例级变化的不变性，而类别级变化的不变性更能捕捉抽象特征，有助于提升下游任务性能。
AI.method: 通过递归发现表示空间中语义一致的高密度区域样本，并采用硬采样策略增强锚点样本与其难正样本之间的一致性。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上以ResNet-50为骨干网络实现71.3%的top-1线性分类准确率，1%标签微调下达到78.2%的top-5准确率，多项下游任务性能达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效学习到对类别级变化鲁棒的表示，显著优于现有无监督学习方法。

title: Conversion and Implementation of State-of-the-Art Deep Learning Algorithms for the Classification of Diabetic Retinopathy
title_zh: 用于糖尿病视网膜病变分类的最先进深度学习算法的转换和实施
abstract: Diabetic retinopathy (DR) is a retinal microvascular condition that emerges in diabetic patients. DR will continue to be a leading cause of blindness worldwide, with a predicted 191.0 million globally diagnosed patients in 2030. Microaneurysms, hemorrhages, exudates, and cotton wool spots are common signs of DR. However, they can be small and hard for human eyes to detect. Early detection of DR is crucial for effective clinical treatment. Existing methods to classify images require much time for feature extraction and selection, and are limited in their performance. Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), as an emerging deep learning (DL) method, have proven their potential in image classification tasks. In this paper, comprehensive experimental studies of implementing state-of-the-art CNNs for the detection and classification of DR are conducted in order to determine the top performing classifiers for the task. Five CNN classifiers, namely Inception-V3, VGG19, VGG16, ResNet50, and InceptionResNetV2, are evaluated through experiments. They categorize medical images into five different classes based on DR severity. Data augmentation and transfer learning techniques are applied since annotated medical images are limited and imbalanced. Experimental results indicate that the ResNet50 classifier has top performance for binary classification and that the InceptionResNetV2 classifier has top performance for multi-class DR classification.
summary: Diabetic retinopathy (DR) is a retinal microvascular condition that emerges in diabetic patients. DR will continue to be a leading cause of blindness worldwide, with a predicted 191.0 million globally diagnosed patients in 2030. Microaneurysms, hemorrhages, exudates, and cotton wool spots are common signs of DR. However, they can be small and hard for human eyes to detect. Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), as an emerging deep learning (DL) method, have proven their potential in image classification tasks. In this paper, comprehensive experimental studies of implementing state-of-the-art CNNs for the detection and classification of DR are conducted in order to determine the top performing classifiers for the task. Five CNN classifiers, namely Inception-V3, VGG19, VGG16, ResNet50, and InceptionResNetV2, are evaluated through experiments. Data augmentation and transfer learning techniques are applied since annotated medical images are limited and imbalanced. Experimental results indicate that the ResNet50 classifier has top performance for binary classification and that the InceptionResNetV2 classifier has top performance for multi-class DR classification.
abstract_zh: 糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）是糖尿病患者出现的一种视网膜微血管疾病。 DR 将继续成为全球失明的主要原因，预计到 2030 年，全球将有 1.91 亿患者被确诊。微动脉瘤、出血、渗出物和棉絮斑是 DR 的常见症状。然而，它们可能很小并且人眼难以察觉。 DR的早期发现对于有效的临床治疗至关重要。现有的图像分类方法需要大量时间进行特征提取和选择，并且性能有限。卷积神经网络（CNN）作为一种新兴的深度学习（DL）方法，已经证明了其在图像分类任务中的潜力。在本文中，对实现最先进的 CNN 进行 DR 检测和分类进行了全面的实验研究，以确定该任务的最佳性能分类器。通过实验评估了五个CNN分类器，即Inception-V3、VGG19、VGG16、ResNet50和InceptionResNetV2。他们根据 DR 严重程度将医学图像分为五个不同的类别。由于带注释的医学图像有限且不平衡，因此应用了数据增强和迁移学习技术。实验结果表明，ResNet50 分类器在二元分类方面具有最佳性能，InceptionResNetV2 分类器在多类 DR 分类方面具有最佳性能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在将先进的深度学习算法应用于糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）的分类任务，并评估不同卷积神经网络（CNN）模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 糖尿病视网膜病变是全球致盲的主要原因之一，早期检测至关重要。传统方法在特征提取和分类性能上存在不足，需借助深度学习提升效率和准确性。
AI.method: 采用五种CNN模型（Inception-V3、VGG19、VGG16、ResNet50、InceptionResNetV2），结合数据增强和迁移学习技术，对医学图像进行二分类和多分类实验。
AI.result: ResNet50在二分类任务中表现最佳，InceptionResNetV2在多分类任务中效果最优。
AI.conclusion: ResNet50和InceptionResNetV2分别适合DR的二分类和多分类任务，为医学图像自动检测提供了有效方案。

title: Tackling problems of marker-based augmented reality under water
title_zh: 解决水下基于标记的增强现实问题
abstract: Underwater sites are a harsh environment for augmented reality applications. Obstacles that must be battled include poor visibility conditions, difficult navigation, and hard manipulation with devices under water. This chapter focuses on the problem of localizing a device under water using markers. It discusses various filters that enhance and improve images recorded under water, and their impact on marker-based tracking. It presents various combinations of 10 image improving algorithms and 4 marker detecting algorithms, and tests their performance in real situations. All solutions are designed to run real-time on mobile devices to provide a solid basis for augmented reality. Usability of this solution is evaluated on locations in Mediterranean Sea. It is shown that image improving algorithms with carefully chosen parameters can reduce the problems with visibility under water and improve the detection of markers. The best results are obtained with marker detecting algorithms that are specifically designed for underwater environments.

Obstacles that must be battled include poor visibility conditions, difficult navigation, and hard manipulation with devices under water. This chapter focuses on the problem of localizing a device under water using markers. It discusses various filters that enhance and improve images recorded under water, and their impact on marker-based tracking. It presents various combinations of 10 image improving algorithms and 4 marker detecting algorithms, and tests their performance in real situations. All solutions are designed to run real-time on mobile devices to provide a solid basis for augmented reality. Usability of this solution is evaluated on locations in Mediterranean Sea. It is shown that image improving algorithms with carefully chosen parameters can reduce the problems with visibility under water and improve the detection of markers. The best results are obtained with marker detecting algorithms that are specifically designed for underwater environments.
abstract_zh: 水下场地对于增强现实应用来说是一个恶劣的环境。必须克服的障碍包括能见度差、导航困难以及水下设备的难以操作。本章重点讨论使用标记定位水下设备的问题。它讨论了增强和改善水下记录图像的各种过滤器，及其对基于标记的跟踪的影响。它提出了10种图像改进算法和4种标记检测算法的各种组合，并在实际情况下测试了它们的性能。所有解决方案均设计为在移动设备上实时运行，为增强现实提供坚实的基础。该解决方案的可用性在地中海地区进行了评估。结果表明，精心选择参数的图像改进算法可以减少水下可见度问题并改善标记的检测。通过专为水下环境设计的标记检测算法可以获得最佳结果。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究如何在水下环境中通过标记实现增强现实设备的定位，并探讨图像增强算法对标记检测的影响。
AI.motivation: 水下环境存在能见度差、导航困难等问题，严重影响基于标记的增强现实应用，需寻找有效解决方案以提升水下AR的可行性。
AI.method: 结合10种图像增强算法与4种标记检测算法，测试其在真实水下场景中的性能，并在地中海实地验证实时运行效果。
AI.result: 优化参数的图像增强算法显著改善水下能见度，专为水下设计的标记检测算法取得最佳效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过针对性图像处理与标记检测算法组合，可有效解决水下增强现实中的定位难题，为实际应用提供可靠基础。

authors_text: Moktari Mostofa,Fariborz Taherkhani,Jeremy Dawson,Nasser M. Nasrabadi
title: Cross-Spectral Iris Matching Using Conditional Coupled GAN
title_zh: 使用条件耦合 GAN 进行跨光谱虹膜匹配
abstract: Cross-spectral iris recognition is emerging as a promising biometric approach to authenticating the identity of individuals. However, matching iris images acquired at different spectral bands shows significant performance degradation when compared to single-band near-infrared (NIR) matching due to the spectral gap between iris images obtained in the NIR and visual-light (VIS) spectra. Although researchers have recently focused on deep-learning-based approaches to recover invariant representative features for more accurate recognition performance, the existing methods cannot achieve the expected accuracy required for commercial applications. Hence, in this paper, we propose a conditional coupled generative adversarial network (CpGAN) architecture for cross-spectral iris recognition by projecting the VIS and NIR iris images into a low-dimensional embedding domain to explore the hidden relationship between them. The conditional CpGAN framework consists of a pair of GAN-based networks, one responsible for retrieving images in the visible domain and other responsible for retrieving images in the NIR domain. Both networks try to map the data into a common embedding subspace to ensure maximum pair-wise similarity between the feature vectors from the two iris modalities of the same subject. To prove the usefulness of our proposed approach, extensive experimental results obtained on the PolyU dataset are compared to existing state-of-the-art cross-spectral recognition methods.
summary: Cross-spectral iris recognition is emerging as a promising biometric approach to authenticating the identity of individuals. However, matching iris images acquired at different spectral bands shows significant performance degradation when compared to single-band near-infrared (NIR) matching due to the spectral gap between iris images obtained in the NIR and visual-light (VIS) spectra. Although researchers have recently focused on deep-learning-based approaches to recover invariant representative features for more accurate recognition performance, the existing methods cannot achieve the expected accuracy required for commercial applications. Hence, in this paper, we propose a conditional coupled generative adversarial network (CpGAN) architecture for cross-spectral iris recognition by projecting the VIS and NIR iris images into a low-dimensional embedding domain to explore the hidden relationship between them. The conditional CpGAN framework consists of a pair of GAN-based networks, one responsible for retrieving images in the visible domain and other responsible for retrieving images in the NIR domain. Both networks try to map the data into a common embedding subspace to ensure maximum pair-wise similarity between the feature vectors from the two iris modalities of the same subject. To prove the usefulness of our proposed approach, extensive experimental results obtained on the PolyU dataset are compared to existing state-of-the-art cross-spectral recognition methods.
abstract_zh: 跨光谱虹膜识别正在成为一种有前景的生物识别方法，用于验证个人身份。然而，由于在 NIR 和可见光 (VIS) 光谱中获得的虹膜图像之间存在光谱间隙，与单波段近红外 (NIR) 匹配相比，在不同光谱带获取的匹配虹膜图像显示出显着的性能下降。尽管研究人员最近专注于基于深度学习的方法来恢复不变的代表性特征以获得更准确的识别性能，但现有方法无法达到商业应用所需的预期精度。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种用于跨光谱虹膜识别的条件耦合生成对抗网络（CpGAN）架构，通过将 VIS 和 NIR 虹膜图像投影到低维嵌入域中来探索它们之间的隐藏关系。条件 CpGAN 框架由一对基于 GAN 的网络组成，一个负责检索可见域中的图像，另一个负责检索 NIR 域中的图像。两个网络都尝试将数据映射到公共嵌入子空间中，以确保来自同一对象的两种虹膜模态的特征向量之间的最大成对相似性。为了证明我们提出的方法的实用性，我们将在理大数据集上获得的广泛实验结果与现有最先进的跨光谱识别方法进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出条件耦合生成对抗网络（CpGAN）解决跨光谱虹膜匹配中的光谱差异问题，通过将可见光（VIS）和近红外（NIR）虹膜图像映射到共享嵌入空间以提升匹配性能。
AI.motivation: 现有跨光谱虹膜识别方法因VIS与NIR光谱差异导致性能下降，且深度学习方法尚未达到商业应用所需的准确率，需探索更有效的特征对齐方案。
AI.method: 设计条件耦合GAN框架，包含两个GAN网络分别处理VIS和NIR图像，通过映射到低维公共嵌入子空间实现跨模态特征向量的最大相似性对齐。
AI.result: 在PolyU数据集上的实验表明，该方法优于现有最先进的跨光谱虹膜识别技术，验证了CpGAN在提升匹配准确率方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CpGAN通过跨模态嵌入空间对齐有效缓解了光谱差异问题，为商业级跨光谱虹膜识别提供了可行的技术路径。

title: PlenoptiCam v1.0: A light-field imaging framework
title_zh: PlenoptiCam v1.0：光场成像框架
abstract: Light-field cameras play a vital role for rich 3-D information retrieval in narrow range depth sensing applications. The key obstacle in composing light-fields from exposures taken by a plenoptic camera is to computationally calibrate, align and rearrange four-dimensional image data. Several attempts have been proposed to enhance the overall image quality by tailoring pipelines dedicated to particular plenoptic cameras and improving the consistency across viewpoints at the expense of high computational loads. The framework presented herein advances prior outcomes thanks to its novel micro image scale-space analysis for generic camera calibration independent of the lens specifications and its parallax-invariant, cost-effective viewpoint color equalization from optimal transport theory. Artifacts from the sensor and micro lens grid are compensated in an innovative way to enable superior quality in sub-aperture image extraction, computational refocusing and Scheimpflug rendering with sub-sampling capabilities. Benchmark comparisons using established image metrics suggest that our proposed pipeline outperforms state-of-the-art tool chains in the majority of cases. Results from a Wasserstein distance further show that our color transfer outdoes the existing transport methods. Our algorithms are released under an open-source license, offer cross-platform compatibility with few dependencies and different user interfaces. This makes the reproduction of results and experimentation with plenoptic camera technology convenient for peer researchers, developers, photographers, data scientists and others working in this field.

Our algorithms are released under an open-source license, offer cross-platform compatibility with few dependencies and different user interfaces. This makes the reproduction of results and experimentation with plenoptic camera technology convenient for peer researchers, developers, photographers, data scientists and others working in this field.
abstract_zh: 光场相机在窄范围深度传感应用中的丰富 3D 信息检索中发挥着至关重要的作用。从全光相机拍摄的曝光中合成光场的主要障碍是通过计算校准、对齐和重新排列四维图像数据。已经提出了几种尝试，通过定制专用于特定全光相机的管道并以高计算负载为代价提高视点之间的一致性，来增强整体图像质量。本文提出的框架得益于其新颖的微图像尺度空间分析，用于独立于镜头规格的通用相机校准，以及来自最佳传输理论的视差不变、经济高效的视点颜色均衡。来自传感器和微透镜网格的伪像以创新的方式进行补偿，以在子孔径图像提取、计算重新聚焦和具有子采样功能的 Scheimpflug 渲染中实现卓越的质量。使用已建立的图像指标进行的基准比较表明，我们提出的管道在大多数情况下都优于最先进的工具链。 Wasserstein 距离的结果进一步表明我们的颜色传输优于现有的传输方法。我们的算法是在开源许可下发布的，提供跨平台兼容性，具有很少的依赖性和不同的用户界面。这使得同行研究人员、开发人员、摄影师、数据科学家和其他在该领域工作的人员可以方便地使用全光相机技术复制结果和进行实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PlenoptiCam v1.0光场成像框架，解决光场相机在深度感知应用中因四维图像数据校准和重排导致的计算复杂性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有光场图像处理方法依赖特定镜头规格的校准管道，计算负载高且视角一致性不足，亟需通用化、高效化的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出微图像尺度空间分析实现镜头无关的通用校准，结合最优传输理论实现视点颜色均衡化，并创新补偿传感器与微透镜网格伪影。
AI.result: 基准测试显示图像质量优于现有工具链，Wasserstein距离验证色彩迁移效果更优，开源代码支持跨平台实验与结果复现。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过算法创新与开源实现，为光场相机技术研究提供了高效、通用的解决方案，推动相关领域发展。
