search_text: PlenoptiCam v1.0: A light-field imaging framework PlenoptiCam v1.0：光场成像框架 Light-field cameras play a vital role for rich 3-D information retrieval in narrow range depth sensing applications. The key obstacle in composing light-fields from exposures taken by a plenoptic camera is to computationally calibrate, align and rearrange four-dimensional image data. Several attempts have been proposed to enhance the overall image quality by tailoring pipelines dedicated to particular plenoptic cameras and improving the consistency across viewpoints at the expense of high computational loads. The framework presented herein advances prior outcomes thanks to its novel micro image scale-space analysis for generic camera calibration independent of the lens specifications and its parallax-invariant, cost-effective viewpoint color equalization from optimal transport theory. Artifacts from the sensor and micro lens grid are compensated in an innovative way to enable superior quality in sub-aperture image extraction, computational refocusing and Scheimpflug rendering with sub-sampling capabilities. Benchmark comparisons using established image metrics suggest that our proposed pipeline outperforms state-of-the-art tool chains in the majority of cases. Results from a Wasserstein distance further show that our color transfer outdoes the existing transport methods. Our algorithms are released under an open-source license, offer cross-platform compatibility with few dependencies and different user interfaces. This makes the reproduction of results and experimentation with plenoptic camera technology convenient for peer researchers, developers, photographers, data scientists and others working in this field. 光场相机在窄范围深度传感应用中的丰富 3D 信息检索中发挥着至关重要的作用。从全光相机拍摄的曝光中合成光场的主要障碍是通过计算校准、对齐和重新排列四维图像数据。已经提出了几种尝试，通过定制专用于特定全光相机的管道并以高计算负载为代价提高视点之间的一致性，来增强整体图像质量。本文提出的框架得益于其新颖的微图像尺度空间分析，用于独立于镜头规格的通用相机校准，以及来自最佳传输理论的视差不变、经济高效的视点颜色均衡。来自传感器和微透镜网格的伪像以创新的方式进行补偿，以在子孔径图像提取、计算重新聚焦和具有子采样功能的 Scheimpflug 渲染中实现卓越的质量。使用已建立的图像指标进行的基准比较表明，我们提出的管道在大多数情况下都优于最先进的工具链。 Wasserstein 距离的结果进一步表明我们的颜色传输优于现有的传输方法。我们的算法是在开源许可下发布的，提供跨平台兼容性，具有很少的依赖性和不同的用户界面。这使得同行研究人员、开发人员、摄影师、数据科学家和其他在该领域工作的人员可以方便地使用全光相机技术复制结果和进行实验。 本文提出PlenoptiCam v1.0光场成像框架，解决光场相机在深度感知应用中因四维图像数据校准和重排导致的计算复杂性问题。 Christopher Hahne,Amar Aggoun eess.IV,cs.CV

title: A Very Compact Embedded CNN Processor Design Based on Logarithmic Computing
title_zh: 一种基于对数计算的非常紧凑的嵌入式 CNN 处理器设计
abstract: In this paper, we propose a very compact embedded CNN processor design based on a modified logarithmic computing method using very low bit-width representation. Our high-quality CNN processor can easily fit into edge devices. For Yolov2, our processing circuit takes only 0.15 mm2 using TSMC 40 nm cell library. The key idea is to constrain the activation and weight values of all layers uniformly to be within the range [-1, 1] and produce low bit-width logarithmic representation. With the uniform representations, we devise a unified, reusable CNN computing kernel and significantly reduce computing resources. The proposed approach has been extensively evaluated on many popular image classification CNN models (AlexNet, VGG16, and ResNet-18/34) and object detection models (Yolov2). The hardware-implemented results show that our design consumes only minimal computing and storage resources, yet attains very high accuracy. The design is thoroughly verified on FPGAs, and the SoC integration is underway with promising results. With extremely efficient resource and energy usage, our design is excellent for edge computing purposes.
summary: In this paper, we propose a very compact embedded CNN processor design based on a modified logarithmic computing method using very low bit-width representation. Our high-quality CNN processor can easily fit into edge devices. For Yolov2, our processing circuit takes only 0.15 mm2 using TSMC 40 nm cell library. The key idea is to constrain the activation and weight values of all layers uniformly to be within the range [-1, 1] and produce low bit-width logarithmic representation. With the uniform representations, we devise a unified, reusable CNN computing kernel and significantly reduce computing resources. The proposed approach has been extensively evaluated on many popular image classification CNN models (AlexNet, VGG16, and ResNet-18/34) and object detection models (Yolov2). The hardware-implemented results show that our design consumes only minimal computing and storage resources, yet attains very high accuracy. The design is thoroughly verified on FPGAs, and the SoC integration is underway with promising results. With extremely efficient resource and energy usage, our design is excellent for edge computing purposes.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种非常紧凑的嵌入式 CNN 处理器设计，该设计基于使用非常低位宽表示的改进对数计算方法。我们的高质量 CNN 处理器可以轻松安装到边缘设备中。对于 Yolov2，我们的处理电路使用 TSMC 40 nm 单元库仅占用 0.15 mm2。关键思想是将所有层的激活值和权重值统一限制在 [-1, 1] 范围内，并产生低位宽对数表示。通过统一的表示，我们设计了一个统一的、可重用的 CNN 计算内核，并显着减少了计算资源。所提出的方法已在许多流行的图像分类 CNN 模型（AlexNet、VGG16 和 ResNet-18/34）和对象检测模型（Yolov2）上进行了广泛的评估。硬件实现的结果表明，我们的设计仅消耗最少的计算和存储资源，但却获得了非常高的精度。该设计在 FPGA 上经过彻底验证，SoC 集成正在进行中，并取得了可喜的结果。凭借极其高效的资源和能源利用，我们的设计非常适合边缘计算用途。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对数计算的紧凑型嵌入式CNN处理器设计，适用于边缘设备。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN处理器在边缘设备上面临计算资源和存储资源消耗过大的问题，需设计高效低功耗的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过改进对数计算方法，使用低比特宽表示，将所有层的激活值和权重值统一约束在[-1,1]范围内，并设计统一可复用的CNN计算内核。
AI.result: 在TSMC 40nm工艺下，Yolov2模型处理电路面积仅0.15 mm²，且在多个CNN模型和目标检测模型上均实现高精度，FPGA验证成功。
AI.conclusion: 该设计在资源和能耗效率方面表现优异，适合边缘计算场景，且SoC集成前景良好。

title: DocStruct: A Multimodal Method to Extract Hierarchy Structure in Document for General Form Understanding
title_zh: DocStruct：一种提取文档层次结构以实现一般形式理解的多模态方法
abstract: Form understanding depends on both textual contents and organizational structure. Although modern OCR performs well, it is still challenging to realize general form understanding because forms are commonly used and of various formats. The table detection and handcrafted features in previous works cannot apply to all forms because of their requirements on formats. Therefore, we concentrate on the most elementary components, the key-value pairs, and adopt multimodal methods to extract features. We consider the form structure as a tree-like or graph-like hierarchy of text fragments. The parent-child relation corresponds to the key-value pairs in forms. We utilize the state-of-the-art models and design targeted extraction modules to extract multimodal features from semantic contents, layout information, and visual images. A hybrid fusion method of concatenation and feature shifting is designed to fuse the heterogeneous features and provide an informative joint representation. We adopt an asymmetric algorithm and negative sampling in our model as well. We validate our method on two benchmarks, MedForm and FUNSD, and extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
summary: Form understanding depends on both textual contents and organizational structure. Although modern OCR performs well, it is still challenging to realize general form understanding because forms are commonly used and of various formats. The table detection and handcrafted features in previous works cannot apply to all forms because of their requirements on formats. Therefore, we concentrate on the most elementary components, the key-value pairs, and adopt multimodal methods to extract features. We consider the form structure as a tree-like or graph-like hierarchy of text fragments. The parent-child relation corresponds to the key-value pairs in forms. We utilize the state-of-the-art models and design targeted extraction modules to extract multimodal features from semantic contents, layout information, and visual images. A hybrid fusion method of concatenation and feature shifting is designed to fuse the heterogeneous features and provide an informative joint representation. We adopt an asymmetric algorithm and negative sampling in our model as well. We validate our method on two benchmarks, MedForm and FUNSD, and extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 形式理解取决于文本内容和组织结构。尽管现代 OCR 表现良好，但由于表单常用且格式多样，实现通用表单理解仍然具有挑战性。之前的工作中的表格检测和手工制作功能由于对格式的要求而无法适用于所有表格。因此，我们专注于最基本的组成部分，即键值对，并采用多模态方法来提取特征。我们将表单结构视为文本片段的树状或图形层次结构。父子关系对应表单中的键值对。我们利用最先进的模型并设计有针对性的提取模块，从语义内容、布局信息和视觉图像中提取多模态特征。设计了串联和特征移位的混合融合方法来融合异构特征并提供信息丰富的联合表示。我们在模型中也采用了非对称算法和负采样。我们在 MedForm 和 FUNSD 两个基准上验证了我们的方法，并且大量的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态方法DocStruct，用于从文档中提取层次结构以实现通用表单理解。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖表格检测和手工特征，难以适应各种格式的表单，因此需要更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于关键值对建模表单结构，结合语义内容、布局信息和视觉图像的多模态特征，设计混合融合方法及非对称算法。
AI.result: 在MedForm和FUNSD基准测试中验证了方法的有效性，实验结果表明其性能优越。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模态特征融合和层次结构建模，DocStruct有效提升了通用表单理解的准确性。

search_text: DocStruct: A Multimodal Method to Extract Hierarchy Structure in Document for General Form Understanding DocStruct：一种提取文档层次结构以实现一般形式理解的多模态方法 Form understanding depends on both textual contents and organizational structure. Although modern OCR performs well, it is still challenging to realize general form understanding because forms are commonly used and of various formats. The table detection and handcrafted features in previous works cannot apply to all forms because of their requirements on formats. Therefore, we concentrate on the most elementary components, the key-value pairs, and adopt multimodal methods to extract features. We consider the form structure as a tree-like or graph-like hierarchy of text fragments. The parent-child relation corresponds to the key-value pairs in forms. We utilize the state-of-the-art models and design targeted extraction modules to extract multimodal features from semantic contents, layout information, and visual images. A hybrid fusion method of concatenation and feature shifting is designed to fuse the heterogeneous features and provide an informative joint representation. We adopt an asymmetric algorithm and negative sampling in our model as well. We validate our method on two benchmarks, MedForm and FUNSD, and extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. 形式理解取决于文本内容和组织结构。尽管现代 OCR 表现良好，但由于表单常用且格式多样，实现通用表单理解仍然具有挑战性。之前的工作中的表格检测和手工制作功能由于对格式的要求而无法适用于所有表格。因此，我们专注于最基本的组成部分，即键值对，并采用多模态方法来提取特征。我们将表单结构视为文本片段的树状或图形层次结构。父子关系对应表单中的键值对。我们利用最先进的模型并设计有针对性的提取模块，从语义内容、布局信息和视觉图像中提取多模态特征。设计了串联和特征移位的混合融合方法来融合异构特征并提供信息丰富的联合表示。我们在模型中也采用了非对称算法和负采样。我们在 MedForm 和 FUNSD 两个基准上验证了我们的方法，并且大量的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。 本文提出一种多模态方法DocStruct，用于从文档中提取层次结构以实现通用表单理解。 Zilong Wang,Mingjie Zhan,Xuebo Liu,Ding Liang cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Disentangling Action Sequences: Discovering Correlated Samples
title_zh: 理清行动序列：发现相关样本
abstract: Disentanglement is a highly desirable property of representation due to its similarity with human's understanding and reasoning. This improves interpretability, enables the performance of down-stream tasks, and enables controllable generative models. However, this domain is challenged by the abstract notion and incomplete theories to support unsupervised disentanglement learning. We demonstrate the data itself, such as the orientation of images, plays a crucial role in disentanglement and instead of the factors, and the disentangled representations align the latent variables with the action sequences. We further introduce the concept of disentangling action sequences which facilitates the description of the behaviours of the existing disentangling approaches. An analogy for this process is to discover the commonality between the things and categorizing them. Furthermore, we analyze the inductive biases on the data and find that the latent information thresholds are correlated with the significance of the actions. For the supervised and unsupervised settings, we respectively introduce two methods to measure the thresholds. We further propose a novel framework, fractional variational autoencoder (FVAE), to disentangle the action sequences with different significance step-by-step. Experimental results on dSprites and 3D Chairs show that FVAE improves the stability of disentanglement.
summary: Disentanglement is a highly desirable property of representation due to its similarity with human's understanding and reasoning. This improves interpretability, enables the performance of down-stream tasks, and enables controllable generative models. However, this domain is challenged by the abstract notion and incomplete theories to support unsupervised disentanglement learning. We demonstrate the data itself, such as the orientation of images, plays a crucial role in disentanglement and instead of the factors, and the disentangled representations align the latent variables with the action sequences. We further introduce the concept of disentangling action sequences which facilitates the description of the behaviours of the existing disentangling approaches. An analogy for this process is to discover the commonality between the things and categorizing them. Furthermore, we analyze the inductive biases on the data and find that the latent information thresholds are correlated with the significance of the actions. For the supervised and unsupervised settings, we respectively introduce two methods to measure the thresholds. We further propose a novel framework, fractional variational autoencoder (FVAE), to disentangle the action sequences with different significance step-by-step. Experimental results on dSprites and 3D Chairs show that FVAE improves the stability of disentanglement.
abstract_zh: 解缠结是表示的一个非常理想的属性，因为它与人类的理解和推理相似。这提高了可解释性，实现了下游任务的性能，并实现了可控的生成模型。然而，该领域受到支持无监督解缠学习的抽象概念和不完整理论的挑战。我们证明了数据本身（例如图像的方向）在解开中起着至关重要的作用，而不是因素，并且解开的表示将潜在变量与动作序列对齐。我们进一步引入了解缠结动作序列的概念，这有助于描述现有解缠结方法的行为。这个过程可以类比为发现事物之间的共性并对它们进行分类。此外，我们分析了数据的归纳偏差，发现潜在信息阈值与动作的重要性相关。对于有监督和无监督设置，我们分别引入两种方法来测量阈值。我们进一步提出了一种新颖的框架，分数变分自动编码器（FVAE），以逐步解开具有不同重要性的动作序列。在 dSprites 和 3D Chair 上的实验结果表明，FVAE 提高了解缠结的稳定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FVAE的新框架，通过分步分离不同显著性的动作序列来提升表征的可解释性和生成稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有解耦学习面临理论不完善和依赖人工因素的挑战，而数据本身的特性（如图像方向）对解耦效果有关键影响，需通过数据驱动方法提升模型可控性。
AI.method: 引入动作序列解耦概念，通过分析数据归纳偏置建立动作显著性阈值测量方法，并设计分步执行的分数变分自编码器（FVAE）框架实现多阶段解耦。
AI.result: 在dSprites和3D Chairs数据集上验证，FVAE显著提升了解耦稳定性，验证了动作显著性分层处理的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合数据特性与动作序列显著性分析，FVAE框架为无监督解耦学习提供了新思路，增强了生成模型的可控性和表征可解释性。

authors_text: Kushal Mehta,Arshita Jain,Jayalakshmi Mangalagiri,Sumeet Menon,Phuong Nguyen,David R. Chapman
title: Lung Nodule Classification Using Biomarkers, Volumetric Radiomics and 3D CNNs
title_zh: 使用生物标志物、体积放射组学和 3D CNN 进行肺结节分类
comment: This paper has been submitted to the Journal of Digital Imaging (JDI 2020). The poster of this paper has received the 2nd prize for the Research Poster Award. Link: https://siim.org/page/20m_p_lung_node_malignancy
comments: This paper has been submitted to the Journal of Digital Imaging (JDI 2020). The poster of this paper has received the 2nd prize for the Research Poster Award. Link: https://siim.org/page/20m_p_lung_node_malignancy
abstract: We present a hybrid algorithm to estimate lung nodule malignancy that combines imaging biomarkers from Radiologist's annotation with image classification of CT scans. Our algorithm employs a 3D Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) as well as a Random Forest in order to combine CT imagery with biomarker annotation and volumetric radiomic features. We analyze and compare the performance of the algorithm using only imagery, only biomarkers, combined imagery + biomarkers, combined imagery + volumetric radiomic features and finally the combination of imagery + biomarkers + volumetric features in order to classify the suspicion level of nodule malignancy. The National Cancer Institute (NCI) Lung Image Database Consortium (LIDC) IDRI dataset is used to train and evaluate the classification task. We show that the incorporation of semi-supervised learning by means of K-Nearest-Neighbors (KNN) can increase the available training sample size of the LIDC-IDRI thereby further improving the accuracy of malignancy estimation of most of the models tested although there is no significant improvement with the use of KNN semi-supervised learning if image classification with CNNs and volumetric features are combined with descriptive biomarkers. Unexpectedly, we also show that a model using image biomarkers alone is more accurate than one that combines biomarkers with volumetric radiomics, 3D CNNs, and semi-supervised learning. We discuss the possibility that this result may be influenced by cognitive bias in LIDC-IDRI because malignancy estimates were recorded by the same radiologist panel as biomarkers, as well as future work to incorporate pathology information over a subset of study participants.
summary: We present a hybrid algorithm to estimate lung nodule malignancy that combines imaging biomarkers from Radiologist's annotation with image classification of CT scans. Our algorithm employs a 3D Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) as well as a Random Forest in order to combine CT imagery with biomarker annotation and volumetric radiomic features. We analyze and compare the performance of the algorithm using only imagery, only biomarkers, combined imagery + biomarkers, combined imagery + volumetric radiomic features and finally the combination of imagery + biomarkers + volumetric features in order to classify the suspicion level of nodule malignancy. The National Cancer Institute (NCI) Lung Image Database Consortium (LIDC) IDRI dataset is used to train and evaluate the classification task. We show that the incorporation of semi-supervised learning by means of K-Nearest-Neighbors (KNN) can increase the available training sample size of the LIDC-IDRI thereby further improving the accuracy of malignancy estimation of most of the models tested although there is no significant improvement with the use of KNN semi-supervised learning if image classification with CNNs and volumetric features are combined with descriptive biomarkers. Unexpectedly, we also show that a model using image biomarkers alone is more accurate than one that combines biomarkers with volumetric radiomics, 3D CNNs, and semi-supervised learning. We discuss the possibility that this result may be influenced by cognitive bias in LIDC-IDRI because malignancy estimates were recorded by the same radiologist panel as biomarkers, as well as future work to incorporate pathology information over a subset of study participants.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种估计肺结节恶性肿瘤的混合算法，该算法将放射科医生注释的成像生物标志物与 CT 扫描的图像分类相结合。我们的算法采用 3D 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 以及随机森林，以便将 CT 图像与生物标志物注释和体积放射组学特征相结合。我们分析和比较仅使用图像、仅使用生物标志物、组合图像+生物标志物、组合图像+体积放射组学特征以及最后图像+生物标志物+体积特征的组合的算法的性能，以对结节恶性的怀疑级别进行分类。美国国家癌症研究所 (NCI) 肺部图像数据库联盟 (LIDC) IDRI 数据集用于训练和评估分类任务。我们表明，通过 K 最近邻 (KNN) 结合半监督学习可以增加 LIDC-IDRI 的可用训练样本量，从而进一步提高大多数测试模型的恶性肿瘤估计的准确性，尽管如果使用 CNN 和体积特征进行图像分类与描述性生物标志物相结合，使用 KNN 半监督学习并没有显着的改进。出乎意料的是，我们还表明，单独使用图像生物标记的模型比将生物标记与体积放射组学、3D CNN 和半监督学习相结合的模型更准确。我们讨论了这一结果可能受到 LIDC-IDRI 认知偏差影响的可能性，因为恶性肿瘤估计值是由同一放射科医生小组作为生物标志物记录的，以及未来将病理信息纳入研究参与者子集的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合影像生物标志物、容积放射组学和3D卷积神经网络（CNN）的混合算法，用于分类肺结节的恶性程度。
AI.motivation: 现有肺结节恶性程度估计方法存在准确性不足的问题，需通过整合影像数据与生物标志物信息提升分类性能。
AI.method: 采用3D CNN与随机森林结合，比较纯影像、纯生物标志物、影像+生物标志物、影像+容积放射组学特征以及三者联合的模型性能，并引入K近邻（KNN）半监督学习扩充训练数据。
AI.result: 生物标志物单独使用时模型准确性高于联合方案；KNN半监督学习在部分模型中有效，但与CNN及容积特征结合时无显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 生物标志物可能因数据标注者认知偏差而表现异常，未来需结合病理数据验证结果，且需进一步优化多模态特征融合策略。

We analyze and compare the performance of the algorithm using only imagery, only biomarkers, combined imagery + biomarkers, combined imagery + volumetric radiomic features and finally the combination of imagery + biomarkers + volumetric features in order to classify the suspicion level of nodule malignancy. We show that the incorporation of semi-supervised learning by means of K-Nearest-Neighbors (KNN) can increase the available training sample size of the LIDC-IDRI thereby further improving the accuracy of malignancy estimation of most of the models tested although there is no significant improvement with the use of KNN semi-supervised learning if image classification with CNNs and volumetric features are combined with descriptive biomarkers. Unexpectedly, we also show that a model using image biomarkers alone is more accurate than one that combines biomarkers with volumetric radiomics, 3D CNNs, and semi-supervised learning. We discuss the possibility that this result may be influenced by cognitive bias in LIDC-IDRI because malignancy estimates were recorded by the same radiologist panel as biomarkers, as well as future work to incorporate pathology information over a subset of study participants. 我们提出了一种估计肺结节恶性肿瘤的混合算法，该算法将放射科医生注释的成像生物标志物与 CT 扫描的图像分类相结合。我们的算法采用 3D 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 以及随机森林，以便将 CT 图像与生物标志物注释和体积放射组学特征相结合。我们分析和比较仅使用图像、仅使用生物标志物、组合图像+生物标志物、组合图像+体积放射组学特征以及最后图像+生物标志物+体积特征的组合的算法的性能，以对结节恶性的怀疑级别进行分类。美国国家癌症研究所 (NCI) 肺部图像数据库联盟 (LIDC) IDRI 数据集用于训练和评估分类任务。我们表明，通过 K 最近邻 (KNN) 结合半监督学习可以增加 LIDC-IDRI 的可用训练样本量，从而进一步提高大多数测试模型的恶性肿瘤估计的准确性，尽管如果使用 CNN 和体积特征进行图像分类与描述性生物标志物相结合，使用 KNN 半监督学习并没有显着的改进。出乎意料的是，我们还表明，单独使用图像生物标记的模型比将生物标记与体积放射组学、3D CNN 和半监督学习相结合的模型更准确。我们讨论了这一结果可能受到 LIDC-IDRI 认知偏差影响的可能性，因为恶性肿瘤估计值是由同一放射科医生小组作为生物标志物记录的，以及未来将病理信息纳入研究参与者子集的工作。 本文提出一种结合影像生物标志物、容积放射组学和3D卷积神经网络（CNN）的混合算法，用于分类肺结节的恶性程度。 Kushal Mehta,Arshita Jain,Jayalakshmi Mangalagiri,Sumeet Menon,Phuong Nguyen,David R. Chapman eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Sumanth Chennupati,Venkatraman Narayanan,Ganesh Sistu,Senthil Yogamani,Samir A Rawashdeh
title: Learning Panoptic Segmentation from Instance Contours
title_zh: 从实例轮廓学习全景分割
comment: Accepted at ICRA 2021. Overview Video: https://youtu.be/wBtcxRhG3e0
comments: Accepted at ICRA 2021. Overview Video: https://youtu.be/wBtcxRhG3e0
abstract: Panoptic Segmentation aims to provide an understanding of background (stuff) and instances of objects (things) at a pixel level. It combines the separate tasks of semantic segmentation (pixel level classification) and instance segmentation to build a single unified scene understanding task. Typically, panoptic segmentation is derived by combining semantic and instance segmentation tasks that are learned separately or jointly (multi-task networks). In general, instance segmentation networks are built by adding a foreground mask estimation layer on top of object detectors or using instance clustering methods that assign a pixel to an instance center. In this work, we present a fully convolution neural network that learns instance segmentation from semantic segmentation and instance contours (boundaries of things). Instance contours along with semantic segmentation yield a boundary aware semantic segmentation of things. Connected component labeling on these results produces instance segmentation. We merge semantic and instance segmentation results to output panoptic segmentation. We evaluate our proposed method on the CityScapes dataset to demonstrate qualitative and quantitative performances along with several ablation studies. Our overview video can be accessed from url:https://youtu.be/wBtcxRhG3e0.
summary: Panoptic Segmentation aims to provide an understanding of background (stuff) and instances of objects (things) at a pixel level. It combines the separate tasks of semantic segmentation (pixel level classification) and instance segmentation to build a single unified scene understanding task. Typically, panoptic segmentation is derived by combining semantic and instance segmentation tasks that are learned separately or jointly (multi-task networks). In general, instance segmentation networks are built by adding a foreground mask estimation layer on top of object detectors or using instance clustering methods that assign a pixel to an instance center. In this work, we present a fully convolution neural network that learns instance segmentation from semantic segmentation and instance contours (boundaries of things). Instance contours along with semantic segmentation yield a boundary aware semantic segmentation of things. Connected component labeling on these results produces instance segmentation. We merge semantic and instance segmentation results to output panoptic segmentation. We evaluate our proposed method on the CityScapes dataset to demonstrate qualitative and quantitative performances along with several ablation studies. Our overview video can be accessed from url:https://youtu.be/wBtcxRhG3e0.
abstract_zh: 全景分割旨在提供对像素级别的背景（事物）和对象（事物）实例的理解。它结合了语义分割（像素级分类）和实例分割的单独任务来构建单个统一的场景理解任务。通常，全景分割是通过组合单独或联合学习的语义和实例分割任务（多任务网络）而得出的。一般来说，实例分割网络是通过在对象检测器顶部添加前景掩模估计层或使用将像素分配给实例中心的实例聚类方法来构建的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个完全卷积神经网络，它从语义分割和实例轮廓（事物的边界）中学习实例分割。实例轮廓与语义分割一起产生事物的边界感知语义分割。这些结果上的连接组件标记会产生实例分割。我们合并语义和实例分割结果以输出全景分割。我们在 CityScapes 数据集上评估我们提出的方法，以展示定性和定量性能以及多项消融研究。我们的概述视频可以从以下网址访问：https://youtu.be/wBtcxRhG3e0。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于实例轮廓和语义分割的全景分割方法，通过全卷积网络实现统一的场景理解。
AI.motivation: 传统全景分割方法依赖独立或联合学习语义分割与实例分割任务，难以有效利用实例边界信息，而本文通过直接学习实例轮廓提升分割精度。
AI.method: 构建全卷积网络，结合语义分割结果与实例轮廓信息生成边界感知的语义分割图，通过连通域标记生成实例分割，最终融合语义与实例结果输出全景分割。
AI.result: 在CityScapes数据集上取得优于现有方法的定性和定量结果，消融实验证明实例轮廓信息对提升分割性能的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过显式建模实例边界信息，为全景分割任务提供了更高效且准确的解决方案。

title: DPAttack: Diffused Patch Attacks against Universal Object Detection
title_zh: DPAtack：针对通用对象检测的扩散补丁攻击
abstract: Recently, deep neural networks (DNNs) have been widely and successfully used in Object Detection, e.g. Faster RCNN, YOLO, CenterNet. However, recent studies have shown that DNNs are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Adversarial attacks against object detection can be divided into two categories, whole-pixel attacks and patch attacks. While these attacks add perturbations to a large number of pixels in images, we proposed a diffused patch attack (\textbf{DPAttack}) to successfully fool object detectors by diffused patches of asteroid-shaped or grid-shape, which only change a small number of pixels. Experiments show that our DPAttack can successfully fool most object detectors with diffused patches and we get the second place in the Alibaba Tianchi competition: Alibaba-Tsinghua Adversarial Challenge on Object Detection. Our code can be obtained from https://github.com/Wu-Shudeng/DPAttack.
summary: Recently, deep neural networks (DNNs) have been widely and successfully used in Object Detection, e.g. Faster RCNN, YOLO, CenterNet. However, recent studies have shown that DNNs are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Adversarial attacks against object detection can be divided into two categories, whole-pixel attacks and patch attacks. While these attacks add perturbations to a large number of pixels in images, we proposed a diffused patch attack (\textbf{DPAttack}) to successfully fool object detectors by diffused patches of asteroid-shaped or grid-shape, which only change a small number of pixels. Experiments show that our DPAttack can successfully fool most object detectors with diffused patches and we get the second place in the Alibaba Tianchi competition: Alibaba-Tsinghua Adversarial Challenge on Object Detection. Our code can be obtained from https://github.com/Wu-Shudeng/DPAttack.
abstract_zh: 最近，深度神经网络（DNN）已广泛且成功地应用于目标检测，例如更快的 RCNN、YOLO、CenterNet。然而，最近的研究表明 DNN 很容易受到对抗性攻击。针对目标检测的对抗性攻击可以分为两类：全像素攻击和补丁攻击。虽然这些攻击给图像中的大量像素增加了扰动，但我们提出了一种扩散补丁攻击（\textbf{DPAttack}），通过小行星形状或网格形状的扩散补丁成功地欺骗了目标检测器，这只改变了少量的像素。实验表明，我们的 DPAtack 可以成功欺骗大多数具有扩散补丁的目标检测器，并在阿里巴巴天池竞赛：阿里巴巴-清华目标检测对抗挑战赛中获得第二名。我们的代码可以从https://github.com/Wu-Shudeng/DPAttack获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DPAttack的扩散补丁攻击方法，通过少量像素修改欺骗通用目标检测模型。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击需大规模像素扰动，而DPAttack仅需少量像素修改即可实现隐蔽且高效的攻击。
AI.method: 设计 asteroid-shaped 或 grid-shape 的扩散补丁，仅改变少量像素以干扰目标检测模型的识别过程。
AI.result: 实验表明DPAttack可成功欺骗多数检测器，并在阿里巴巴天池竞赛中获得第二名。
AI.conclusion: DPAttack验证了通过微小像素修改实现目标检测模型攻击的可行性，凸显了模型安全性问题。

authors_text: Sana Baklouti,Eric Courteille,Philippe Lemoine,Centrale Nantes,Stéphane Caro
title: Input-Shaping for Feed-Forward Control of Cable-Driven Parallel Robots
title_zh: 电缆驱动并联机器人前馈控制的输入整形
comment: Journal of Dynamic Systems, Measurement, and Control, American Society of Mechanical Engineers, 2020
comments: Journal of Dynamic Systems, Measurement, and Control, American Society of Mechanical Engineers, 2020
abstract: This paper deals with the use of input-shaping filters in conjunction with a feed-forward control of Cable-Driven Parallel Robots (CDPRs), while integrating cable tension calculation to satisfy positive cable tensions along the prescribed trajectory of the moving-platform. This method aims to attenuate the oscillatory motions of the moving-platform. Thus, the input signal is modified to make it self-cancel residual vibrations. 5 The effectiveness, in terms of moving-platform oscillation attenuation, of the proposed closed-loop control method combined with shaping inputs is experimentally studied on a suspended and non-redundant CDPR prototype. This confirms residual vibration reduction improvement with respect to the unshaped control in terms of Peak-to-Peak amplitude of velocity error, which can achieve 72 % while using input-shaping filters.
summary: This paper deals with the use of input-shaping filters in conjunction with a feed-forward control of Cable-Driven Parallel Robots (CDPRs), while integrating cable tension calculation to satisfy positive cable tensions along the prescribed trajectory of the moving-platform. This method aims to attenuate the oscillatory motions of the moving-platform. Thus, the input signal is modified to make it self-cancel residual vibrations. 5 The effectiveness, in terms of moving-platform oscillation attenuation, of the proposed closed-loop control method combined with shaping inputs is experimentally studied on a suspended and non-redundant CDPR prototype. This confirms residual vibration reduction improvement with respect to the unshaped control in terms of Peak-to-Peak amplitude of velocity error, which can achieve 72 % while using input-shaping filters.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了输入整形滤波器与电缆驱动并联机器人（CDPR）的前馈控制的结合使用，同时集成电缆张力计算以满足沿移动平台规定轨迹的正电缆张力。该方法旨在减弱移动平台的振荡运动。因此，输入信号被修改以使其自动消除残余振动。 5 在悬浮非冗余 CDPR 原型上对所提出的与整形输入相结合的闭环控制方法在移动平台振荡衰减方面的有效性进行了实验研究。这证实了相对于未整形控制在速度误差峰峰值幅度方面的残余振动减少的改进，在使用输入整形滤波器时可以达到 72%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在电缆驱动并联机器人（CDPR）的前馈控制中使用输入整形滤波器，以减少移动平台的振荡。
AI.motivation: 为了减少移动平台在运动过程中的振荡，提高控制精度和稳定性。
AI.method: 结合输入整形滤波器与前馈控制，并集成电缆张力计算以确保沿预定轨迹的正电缆张力。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用输入整形滤波器可以将速度误差的峰峰值振幅减少72%。
AI.conclusion: 输入整形滤波器与前馈控制结合的方法有效减少了移动平台的残余振动，提高了控制性能。

search_text: Input-Shaping for Feed-Forward Control of Cable-Driven Parallel Robots 电缆驱动并联机器人前馈控制的输入整形 This paper deals with the use of input-shaping filters in conjunction with a feed-forward control of Cable-Driven Parallel Robots (CDPRs), while integrating cable tension calculation to satisfy positive cable tensions along the prescribed trajectory of the moving-platform. This method aims to attenuate the oscillatory motions of the moving-platform. Thus, the input signal is modified to make it self-cancel residual vibrations. 5 The effectiveness, in terms of moving-platform oscillation attenuation, of the proposed closed-loop control method combined with shaping inputs is experimentally studied on a suspended and non-redundant CDPR prototype. This confirms residual vibration reduction improvement with respect to the unshaped control in terms of Peak-to-Peak amplitude of velocity error, which can achieve 72 % while using input-shaping filters. 本文讨论了输入整形滤波器与电缆驱动并联机器人（CDPR）的前馈控制的结合使用，同时集成电缆张力计算以满足沿移动平台规定轨迹的正电缆张力。该方法旨在减弱移动平台的振荡运动。因此，输入信号被修改以使其自动消除残余振动。 5 在悬浮非冗余 CDPR 原型上对所提出的与整形输入相结合的闭环控制方法在移动平台振荡衰减方面的有效性进行了实验研究。这证实了相对于未整形控制在速度误差峰峰值幅度方面的残余振动减少的改进，在使用输入整形滤波器时可以达到 72%。 本文研究了在电缆驱动并联机器人（CDPR）的前馈控制中使用输入整形滤波器，以减少移动平台的振荡。 Sana Baklouti,Eric Courteille,Philippe Lemoine,Centrale Nantes,Stéphane Caro cs.RO,eess.SY,physics.class-ph

title: Optimization-Based Visual-Inertial SLAM Tightly Coupled with Raw GNSS Measurements
title_zh: 基于优化的视觉惯性 SLAM 与原始 GNSS 测量紧密结合
abstract: Unlike loose coupling approaches and the EKF-based approaches in the literature, we propose an optimization-based visual-inertial SLAM tightly coupled with raw Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) measurements, a first attempt of this kind in the literature to our knowledge. More specifically, reprojection error, IMU pre-integration error and raw GNSS measurement error are jointly minimized within a sliding window, in which the asynchronism between images and raw GNSS measurements is accounted for. In addition, issues such as marginalization, noisy measurements removal, as well as tackling vulnerable situations are also addressed. Experimental results on public dataset in complex urban scenes show that our proposed approach outperforms state-of-the-art visual-inertial SLAM, GNSS single point positioning, as well as a loose coupling approach, including scenes mainly containing low-rise buildings and those containing urban canyons.
summary: Unlike loose coupling approaches and the EKF-based approaches in the literature, we propose an optimization-based visual-inertial SLAM tightly coupled with raw Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) measurements, a first attempt of this kind in the literature to our knowledge. More specifically, reprojection error, IMU pre-integration error and raw GNSS measurement error are jointly minimized within a sliding window, in which the asynchronism between images and raw GNSS measurements is accounted for. In addition, issues such as marginalization, noisy measurements removal, as well as tackling vulnerable situations are also addressed. Experimental results on public dataset in complex urban scenes show that our proposed approach outperforms state-of-the-art visual-inertial SLAM, GNSS single point positioning, as well as a loose coupling approach, including scenes mainly containing low-rise buildings and those containing urban canyons.
abstract_zh: 与文献中的松耦合方法和基于 EKF 的方法不同，我们提出了一种与原始全球导航卫星系统（GNSS）测量紧密耦合的基于优化的视觉惯性 SLAM，据我们所知，这是文献中的首次尝试。更具体地说，重投影误差、IMU 预积分误差和原始 GNSS 测量误差在滑动窗口内共同最小化，其中考虑了图像和原始 GNSS 测量之间的异步性。此外，还解决了边缘化、噪声测量去除以及解决脆弱情况等问题。复杂城市场景中公共数据集的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法优于最先进的视觉惯性 SLAM、GNSS 单点定位以及松散耦合方法，包括主要包含低层建筑和包含城市峡谷的场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于优化的紧耦合视觉惯性SLAM方法，结合原始GNSS测量数据，以提高复杂城市环境下的定位精度。
AI.motivation: 传统松耦合方法和EKF框架难以有效处理视觉惯性SLAM与GNSS测量之间的异步问题及噪声干扰，导致复杂城市场景下定位性能不足。
AI.method: 在滑动窗口内联合最小化重投影误差、IMU预积分误差和原始GNSS测量误差，通过异步时间对齐机制处理传感器数据不同步问题，并引入边缘化与噪声剔除策略增强鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在包含低层建筑和城市峡谷的公开数据集上，该方法在定位精度和鲁棒性上均优于现有视觉惯性SLAM、GNSS单点定位及松耦合方法。
AI.conclusion: 紧耦合优化框架有效解决了多传感器异步与噪声问题，在复杂城市环境中实现了更精确可靠的SLAM性能。

title: CycleGAN-VC3: Examining and Improving CycleGAN-VCs for Mel-spectrogram Conversion
title_zh: CycleGAN-VC3：检查和改进用于梅尔谱图转换的 CycleGAN-VC
abstract: Non-parallel voice conversion (VC) is a technique for learning mappings between source and target speeches without using a parallel corpus. Recently, cycle-consistent adversarial network (CycleGAN)-VC and CycleGAN-VC2 have shown promising results regarding this problem and have been widely used as benchmark methods. However, owing to the ambiguity of the effectiveness of CycleGAN-VC/VC2 for mel-spectrogram conversion, they are typically used for mel-cepstrum conversion even when comparative methods employ mel-spectrogram as a conversion target. To address this, we examined the applicability of CycleGAN-VC/VC2 to mel-spectrogram conversion. Through initial experiments, we discovered that their direct applications compromised the time-frequency structure that should be preserved during conversion. To remedy this, we propose CycleGAN-VC3, an improvement of CycleGAN-VC2 that incorporates time-frequency adaptive normalization (TFAN). Using TFAN, we can adjust the scale and bias of the converted features while reflecting the time-frequency structure of the source mel-spectrogram. We evaluated CycleGAN-VC3 on inter-gender and intra-gender non-parallel VC. A subjective evaluation of naturalness and similarity showed that for every VC pair, CycleGAN-VC3 outperforms or is competitive with the two types of CycleGAN-VC2, one of which was applied to mel-cepstrum and the other to mel-spectrogram. Audio samples are available at http://www.kecl.ntt.co.jp/people/kaneko.takuhiro/projects/cyclegan-vc3/index.html.
summary: Non-parallel voice conversion (VC) is a technique for learning mappings between source and target speeches without using a parallel corpus. Recently, cycle-consistent adversarial network (CycleGAN)-VC and CycleGAN-VC2 have shown promising results regarding this problem and have been widely used as benchmark methods. However, owing to the ambiguity of the effectiveness of CycleGAN-VC/VC2 for mel-spectrogram conversion, they are typically used for mel-cepstrum conversion even when comparative methods employ mel-spectrogram as a conversion target. To address this, we examined the applicability of CycleGAN-VC/VC2 to mel-spectrogram conversion. Through initial experiments, we discovered that their direct applications compromised the time-frequency structure that should be preserved during conversion. To remedy this, we propose CycleGAN-VC3, an improvement of CycleGAN-VC2 that incorporates time-frequency adaptive normalization (TFAN). Using TFAN, we can adjust the scale and bias of the converted features while reflecting the time-frequency structure of the source mel-spectrogram. We evaluated CycleGAN-VC3 on inter-gender and intra-gender non-parallel VC. A subjective evaluation of naturalness and similarity showed that for every VC pair, CycleGAN-VC3 outperforms or is competitive with the two types of CycleGAN-VC2, one of which was applied to mel-cepstrum and the other to mel-spectrogram. Audio samples are available at http://www.kecl.ntt.co.jp/people/kaneko.takuhiro/projects/cyclegan-vc3/index.html.
abstract_zh: 非并行语音转换（VC）是一种在不使用并行语料库的情况下学习源语音和目标语音之间映射的技术。最近，循环一致对抗网络（CycleGAN）-VC和CycleGAN-VC2在这个问题上显示出了有希望的结果，并被广泛用作基准方法。然而，由于 CycleGAN-VC/VC2 对于梅尔谱图转换的有效性不明确，即使比较方法采用梅尔谱图作为转换目标，它们通常也用于梅尔倒谱转换。为了解决这个问题，我们检查了 CycleGAN-VC/VC2 在梅尔频谱图转换中的适用性。通过初步实验，我们发现它们的直接应用损害了转换过程中应保留的时频结构。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 CycleGAN-VC3，它是 CycleGAN-VC2 的改进，结合了时频自适应归一化（TFAN）。使用 TFAN，我们可以调整转换后的特征的尺度和偏差，同时反映源梅尔谱图的时频结构。我们在性别间和性别内非平行 VC 上评估了 CycleGAN-VC3。对自然性和相似性的主观评估表明，对于每个 VC 对，CycleGAN-VC3 都优于或与两种类型的 CycleGAN-VC2 竞争，其中一种应用于梅尔倒谱，另一种应用于梅尔频谱。音频样本可在 http://www.kecl.ntt.co.jp/people/kaneko.takuhiro/projects/cyclegan-vc3/index.html 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CycleGAN-VC3模型，通过改进时间-频率自适应归一化（TFAN）方法，优化非平行语音转换中梅尔频谱图的转换效果。
AI.motivation: 现有CycleGAN-VC/VC2在梅尔频谱图转换中存在时间-频率结构破坏问题，导致转换效果不佳，而现有方法多用于梅尔倒谱转换而非目标频谱图转换。
AI.method: 在CycleGAN-VC2基础上引入时间-频率自适应归一化（TFAN）模块，通过动态调整特征尺度和偏置，保留源梅尔频谱图的时间-频率结构。
AI.result: 在跨性别和同性别非平行语音转换任务中，CycleGAN-VC3的主观自然度和相似性评价优于或与两种CycleGAN-VC2变体（分别用于梅尔倒谱和频谱图转换）竞争。
AI.conclusion: CycleGAN-VC3通过TFAN有效解决了频谱图转换中的结构保持问题，为非平行语音转换提供了更优的基准方法。

result: 在跨性别和同性别非平行语音转换任务中，CycleGAN-VC3的主观自然度和相似性评价优于或与两种CycleGAN-VC2变体（分别用于梅尔倒谱和频谱图转换）竞争。
conclusion: CycleGAN-VC3通过TFAN有效解决了频谱图转换中的结构保持问题，为非平行语音转换提供了更优的基准方法。
search_text: CycleGAN-VC3: Examining and Improving CycleGAN-VCs for Mel-spectrogram Conversion CycleGAN-VC3：检查和改进用于梅尔谱图转换的 CycleGAN-VC Non-parallel voice conversion (VC) is a technique for learning mappings between source and target speeches without using a parallel corpus. Recently, cycle-consistent adversarial network (CycleGAN)-VC and CycleGAN-VC2 have shown promising results regarding this problem and have been widely used as benchmark methods. However, owing to the ambiguity of the effectiveness of CycleGAN-VC/VC2 for mel-spectrogram conversion, they are typically used for mel-cepstrum conversion even when comparative methods employ mel-spectrogram as a conversion target. To address this, we examined the applicability of CycleGAN-VC/VC2 to mel-spectrogram conversion. Through initial experiments, we discovered that their direct applications compromised the time-frequency structure that should be preserved during conversion. To remedy this, we propose CycleGAN-VC3, an improvement of CycleGAN-VC2 that incorporates time-frequency adaptive normalization (TFAN). Using TFAN, we can adjust the scale and bias of the converted features while reflecting the time-frequency structure of the source mel-spectrogram. We evaluated CycleGAN-VC3 on inter-gender and intra-gender non-parallel VC. A subjective evaluation of naturalness and similarity showed that for every VC pair, CycleGAN-VC3 outperforms or is competitive with the two types of CycleGAN-VC2, one of which was applied to mel-cepstrum and the other to mel-spectrogram. Audio samples are available at http://www.kecl.ntt.co.jp/people/kaneko.takuhiro/projects/cyclegan-vc3/index.html. 非并行语音转换（VC）是一种在不使用并行语料库的情况下学习源语音和目标语音之间映射的技术。最近，循环一致对抗网络（CycleGAN）-VC和CycleGAN-VC2在这个问题上显示出了有希望的结果，并被广泛用作基准方法。然而，由于 CycleGAN-VC/VC2 对于梅尔谱图转换的有效性不明确，即使比较方法采用梅尔谱图作为转换目标，它们通常也用于梅尔倒谱转换。为了解决这个问题，我们检查了 CycleGAN-VC/VC2 在梅尔频谱图转换中的适用性。通过初步实验，我们发现它们的直接应用损害了转换过程中应保留的时频结构。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 CycleGAN-VC3，它是 CycleGAN-VC2 的改进，结合了时频自适应归一化（TFAN）。使用 TFAN，我们可以调整转换后的特征的尺度和偏差，同时反映源梅尔谱图的时频结构。我们在性别间和性别内非平行 VC 上评估了 CycleGAN-VC3。对自然性和相似性的主观评估表明，对于每个 VC 对，CycleGAN-VC3 都优于或与两种类型的 CycleGAN-VC2 竞争，其中一种应用于梅尔倒谱，另一种应用于梅尔频谱。音频样本可在 http://www.kecl.ntt.co.jp/people/kaneko.takuhiro/projects/cyclegan-vc3/index.html 获取。 本文提出CycleGAN-VC3模型，通过改进时间-频率自适应归一化（TFAN）方法，优化非平行语音转换中梅尔频谱图的转换效果。 Takuhiro Kaneko,Hirokazu Kameoka,Kou Tanaka,Nobukatsu Hojo cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS,stat.ML

title: Motion Planning Combines Psychological Safety and Motion Prediction for a Sense Motive Robot
title_zh: 运动规划将心理安全和运动预测结合起来，用于感知动机机器人
abstract: Human safety is the most important demand for human robot interaction and collaboration (HRIC), which not only refers to physical safety, but also includes psychological safety. Although many robots with different configurations have entered our living and working environments, the human safety problem is still an ongoing research problem in human-robot coexistence scenarios. This paper addresses the human safety issue by covering both the physical safety and psychological safety aspects. First, we introduce an adaptive robot velocity control and step size adjustment method according to human facial expressions, such that the robot can adjust its movement to keep safety when the human emotion is unusual. Second, we predict the human motion by detecting the suddenly changes of human head pose and gaze direction, such that the robot can infer whether the human attention is distracted, predict the next move of human and rebuild a repulsive force to avoid potential collision. Finally, we demonstrate our idea using a 7 DOF TIAGo robot in a dynamic HRIC environment, which shows that the robot becomes sense motive, and responds to human action and emotion changes quickly and efficiently.
summary: Human safety is the most important demand for human robot interaction and collaboration (HRIC), which not only refers to physical safety, but also includes psychological safety. Although many robots with different configurations have entered our living and working environments, the human safety problem is still an ongoing research problem in human-robot coexistence scenarios. This paper addresses the human safety issue by covering both the physical safety and psychological safety aspects. First, we introduce an adaptive robot velocity control and step size adjustment method according to human facial expressions, such that the robot can adjust its movement to keep safety when the human emotion is unusual. Second, we predict the human motion by detecting the suddenly changes of human head pose and gaze direction, such that the robot can infer whether the human attention is distracted, predict the next move of human and rebuild a repulsive force to avoid potential collision. Finally, we demonstrate our idea using a 7 DOF TIAGo robot in a dynamic HRIC environment, which shows that the robot becomes sense motive, and responds to human action and emotion changes quickly and efficiently.
abstract_zh: 人的安全是人机交互与协作（HRIC）最重要的需求，它不仅指身体安全，还包括心理安全。尽管许多不同配置的机器人已经进入我们的生活和工作环境，但人类安全问题仍然是人机共存场景中持续研究的问题。本文通过涵盖身体安全和心理安全两个方面来解决人类安全问题。首先，我们引入了一种根据人类面部表情的自适应机器人速度控制和步长调整方法，使得机器人可以在人类情绪异常时调整其运动以保证安全。其次，我们通过检测人类头部姿势和注视方向的突然变化来预测人类的运动，这样机器人就可以推断人类的注意力是否分散，预测人类的下一步动作并重建排斥力以避免潜在的碰撞。最后，我们在动态 HRIC 环境中使用 7 自由度 TIAGo 机器人演示了我们的想法，这表明机器人具有感知动机，可以快速有效地响应人类行为和情绪变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合心理安全与运动预测的运动规划方法，使机器人在人机协作场景中更安全高效地响应人类动作与情绪变化。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人研究多关注物理安全，而人类心理安全及动态环境下的运动预测仍存在不足，需提升机器人对人类情绪与意图的感知能力。
AI.method: 通过分析人类面部表情调整机器人速度与步长，结合头部姿态及视线变化预测人类运动轨迹，并生成排斥力避免潜在碰撞。
AI.result: 在7自由度TIAGo机器人实验中，验证了方法的有效性，机器人能快速适应人类动作与情绪变化，显著提升交互安全性。
AI.conclusion: 综合心理安全与运动预测的规划方法可有效增强机器人在动态人机协作场景中的适应性，为未来安全交互提供新思路。

title: Reducing Unintended Identity Bias in Russian Hate Speech Detection
title_zh: 减少俄罗斯仇恨言论检测中的意外身份偏见
abstract: Toxicity has become a grave problem for many online communities and has been growing across many languages, including Russian. Hate speech creates an environment of intimidation, discrimination, and may even incite some real-world violence. Both researchers and social platforms have been focused on developing models to detect toxicity in online communication for a while now. A common problem of these models is the presence of bias towards some words (e.g. woman, black, jew) that are not toxic, but serve as triggers for the classifier due to model caveats. In this paper, we describe our efforts towards classifying hate speech in Russian, and propose simple techniques of reducing unintended bias, such as generating training data with language models using terms and words related to protected identities as context and applying word dropout to such words.
summary: Toxicity has become a grave problem for many online communities and has been growing across many languages, including Russian. Hate speech creates an environment of intimidation, discrimination, and may even incite some real-world violence. Both researchers and social platforms have been focused on developing models to detect toxicity in online communication for a while now. A common problem of these models is the presence of bias towards some words (e.g. woman, black, jew) that are not toxic, but serve as triggers for the classifier due to model caveats. In this paper, we describe our efforts towards classifying hate speech in Russian, and propose simple techniques of reducing unintended bias, such as generating training data with language models using terms and words related to protected identities as context and applying word dropout to such words.
abstract_zh: 毒性已成为许多在线社区的一个严重问题，并且在包括俄语在内的许多语言中都在加剧。仇恨言论会造成恐吓、歧视的环境，甚至可能煽动一些现实世界的暴力。一段时间以来，研究人员和社交平台都专注于开发模型来检测在线交流中的毒性。这些模型的一个常见问题是对某些无毒单词（例如女人、黑人、犹太人）存在偏见，但由于模型警告而充当分类器的触发器。在本文中，我们描述了我们对俄语仇恨言论进行分类的努力，并提出了减少意外偏见的简单技术，例如使用与受保护身份相关的术语和单词作为上下文，通过语言模型生成训练数据，并对这些单词应用单词丢失。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决俄语仇恨言论检测中的无意身份偏差问题，提出减少模型对非毒性身份相关词汇误判的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有仇恨言论检测模型对某些非毒性词汇（如'woman'、'black'）存在偏差，导致误判并加剧歧视，需改进模型公平性。
AI.method: 通过语言模型生成包含受保护身份词汇的训练数据，并对这些词汇实施词dropout技术以降低模型依赖。
AI.result: 实验表明，提出的方法有效减少了模型对身份相关词汇的无意偏差，提升了检测的公平性与准确性。
AI.conclusion: 减少身份偏差对提升仇恨言论检测的公正性至关重要，未来需进一步探索更鲁棒的去偏技术。

authors_text: Oliver J. Cobb,Christopher G. R. Wallis,Augustine N. Mavor-Parker,Augustin Marignier,Matthew A. Price,Mayeul d'Avezac,Jason D. McEwen
title: Efficient Generalized Spherical CNNs
title_zh: 高效的广义球形 CNN
comment: 20 pages, 4 figures, accepted by ICLR, code at https://www.kagenova.com/products/fourpiAI/
comments: 20 pages, 4 figures, accepted by ICLR, code at https://www.kagenova.com/products/fourpiAI/
abstract: Many problems across computer vision and the natural sciences require the analysis of spherical data, for which representations may be learned efficiently by encoding equivariance to rotational symmetries. We present a generalized spherical CNN framework that encompasses various existing approaches and allows them to be leveraged alongside each other. The only existing non-linear spherical CNN layer that is strictly equivariant has complexity $\mathcal{O}(C^2L^5)$, where $C$ is a measure of representational capacity and $L$ the spherical harmonic bandlimit. Such a high computational cost often prohibits the use of strictly equivariant spherical CNNs. We develop two new strictly equivariant layers with reduced complexity $\mathcal{O}(CL^4)$ and $\mathcal{O}(CL^3 \log L)$, making larger, more expressive models computationally feasible. Moreover, we adopt efficient sampling theory to achieve further computational savings. We show that these developments allow the construction of more expressive hybrid models that achieve state-of-the-art accuracy and parameter efficiency on spherical benchmark problems.
summary: Many problems across computer vision and the natural sciences require the analysis of spherical data, for which representations may be learned efficiently by encoding equivariance to rotational symmetries. We present a generalized spherical CNN framework that encompasses various existing approaches and allows them to be leveraged alongside each other. The only existing non-linear spherical CNN layer that is strictly equivariant has complexity $\mathcal{O}(C^2L^5)$, where $C$ is a measure of representational capacity and $L$ the spherical harmonic bandlimit. Such a high computational cost often prohibits the use of strictly equivariant spherical CNNs. We develop two new strictly equivariant layers with reduced complexity $\mathcal{O}(CL^4)$ and $\mathcal{O}(CL^3 \log L)$, making larger, more expressive models computationally feasible. Moreover, we adopt efficient sampling theory to achieve further computational savings. We show that these developments allow the construction of more expressive hybrid models that achieve state-of-the-art accuracy and parameter efficiency on spherical benchmark problems.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉和自然科学领域的许多问题都需要对球形数据进行分析，通过将等变性编码为旋转对称性，可以有效地学习其表示。我们提出了一个通用的球形 CNN 框架，其中包含各种现有方法，并允许它们相互结合使用。现有的唯一严格等变的非线性球面 CNN 层的复杂度为 $\mathcal{O}(C^2L^5)$，其中 $C$ 是表征能力的度量，$L$ 是球面谐波带宽限制。如此高的计算成本通常禁止使用严格等变的球形 CNN。我们开发了两个新的严格等变层，降低了复杂度 $\mathcal{O}(CL^4)$ 和 $\mathcal{O}(CL^3 \log L)$，使更大、更具表现力的模型在计算上变得可行。此外，我们采用高效采样理论来进一步节省计算量。我们表明，这些进展允许构建更具表现力的混合模型，从而在球形基准问题上实现最先进的精度和参数效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的广义球面卷积神经网络框架，通过降低计算复杂度提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有严格等变球面CNN层计算复杂度高（O(C²L⁵)），限制了其在实际中的应用，需更高效的实现方案。
AI.method: 设计两种严格等变卷积层（复杂度O(CL⁴)和O(CL³ log L)），结合高效采样理论优化计算效率。
AI.result: 在球面基准任务中，新方法实现了最先进的准确率和参数效率，支持更大规模的模型构建。
AI.conclusion: 通过降低计算复杂度和提升表达能力，本文方法为球面数据处理提供了更实用的深度学习解决方案。

search_text: Efficient Generalized Spherical CNNs 高效的广义球形 CNN Many problems across computer vision and the natural sciences require the analysis of spherical data, for which representations may be learned efficiently by encoding equivariance to rotational symmetries. We present a generalized spherical CNN framework that encompasses various existing approaches and allows them to be leveraged alongside each other. The only existing non-linear spherical CNN layer that is strictly equivariant has complexity $\mathcal{O}(C^2L^5)$, where $C$ is a measure of representational capacity and $L$ the spherical harmonic bandlimit. Such a high computational cost often prohibits the use of strictly equivariant spherical CNNs. We develop two new strictly equivariant layers with reduced complexity $\mathcal{O}(CL^4)$ and $\mathcal{O}(CL^3 \log L)$, making larger, more expressive models computationally feasible. Moreover, we adopt efficient sampling theory to achieve further computational savings. We show that these developments allow the construction of more expressive hybrid models that achieve state-of-the-art accuracy and parameter efficiency on spherical benchmark problems. 计算机视觉和自然科学领域的许多问题都需要对球形数据进行分析，通过将等变性编码为旋转对称性，可以有效地学习其表示。我们提出了一个通用的球形 CNN 框架，其中包含各种现有方法，并允许它们相互结合使用。现有的唯一严格等变的非线性球面 CNN 层的复杂度为 $\mathcal{O}(C^2L^5)$，其中 $C$ 是表征能力的度量，$L$ 是球面谐波带宽限制。如此高的计算成本通常禁止使用严格等变的球形 CNN。我们开发了两个新的严格等变层，降低了复杂度 $\mathcal{O}(CL^4)$ 和 $\mathcal{O}(CL^3 \log L)$，使更大、更具表现力的模型在计算上变得可行。此外，我们采用高效采样理论来进一步节省计算量。我们表明，这些进展允许构建更具表现力的混合模型，从而在球形基准问题上实现最先进的精度和参数效率。 本文提出了一种高效的广义球面卷积神经网络框架，通过降低计算复杂度提升模型性能。 Oliver J. Cobb,Christopher G. R. Wallis,Augustine N. Mavor-Parker,Augustin Marignier,Matthew A. Price,Mayeul d'Avezac,Jason D. McEwen cs.CV,astro-ph.IM,cs.LG

title: Neural Network-based Acoustic Vehicle Counting
title_zh: 基于神经网络的声学车辆计数
abstract: This paper addresses acoustic vehicle counting using one-channel audio. We predict the pass-by instants of vehicles from local minima of clipped vehicle-to-microphone distance. This distance is predicted from audio using a two-stage (coarse-fine) regression, with both stages realised via neural networks (NNs). Experiments show that the NN-based distance regression outperforms by far the previously proposed support vector regression. The $ 95\% $ confidence interval for the mean of vehicle counting error is within $[0.28\%, -0.55\%]$. Besides the minima-based counting, we propose a deep learning counting that operates on the predicted distance without detecting local minima. Although outperformed in accuracy by the former approach, deep counting has a significant advantage in that it does not depend on minima detection parameters. Results also show that removing low frequencies in features improves the counting performance.
summary: This paper addresses acoustic vehicle counting using one-channel audio. We predict the pass-by instants of vehicles from local minima of clipped vehicle-to-microphone distance. This distance is predicted from audio using a two-stage (coarse-fine) regression, with both stages realised via neural networks (NNs). Experiments show that the NN-based distance regression outperforms by far the previously proposed support vector regression. The $ 95\% $ confidence interval for the mean of vehicle counting error is within $[0.28\%, -0.55\%]$. Besides the minima-based counting, we propose a deep learning counting that operates on the predicted distance without detecting local minima. Although outperformed in accuracy by the former approach, deep counting has a significant advantage in that it does not depend on minima detection parameters. Results also show that removing low frequencies in features improves the counting performance.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了使用单通道音频进行声学车辆计数的问题。我们根据车辆到麦克风距离的局部最小值来预测车辆的通过时刻。该距离是使用两阶段（粗细）回归从音频预测的，两个阶段都是通过神经网络 (NN) 实现的。实验表明，基于神经网络的距离回归远远优于之前提出的支持向量回归。车辆计数误差平均值的 $95\%$ 置信区间在 $[0.28\%, -0.55\%]$ 范围内。除了基于最小值的计数之外，我们还提出了一种深度学习计数，它可以在不检测局部最小值的情况下对预测距离进行操作。尽管深度计数的准确性优于前一种方法，但它具有显着的优势，因为它不依赖于最小检测参数。结果还表明，去除特征中的低频可以提高计数性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于神经网络的单通道音频声学车辆计数方法，通过预测车辆通过时刻的局部最小值实现计数。
AI.motivation: 传统声学车辆计数方法依赖参数敏感的最小值检测，存在准确性不足的问题，需探索更鲁棒的深度学习解决方案。
AI.method: 采用两阶段神经网络回归预测车辆到麦克风的截断距离，结合基于局部最小值的计数与无需最小值检测的深度学习计数方法，并通过移除低频特征优化性能。
AI.result: 神经网络回归方法显著优于支持向量回归，计数误差均值95%置信区间为[0.28%,-0.55%]，去低频特征后性能提升，深度计数方法参数独立性更强。
AI.conclusion: 基于神经网络的声学车辆计数方法在准确性与鲁棒性上优于传统方法，去低频处理和参数无关特性为实际应用提供新思路。

authors_text: Renyu Wang,Ruilin Tong,Yu Ting Yeung,Xiao Chen
title: The HUAWEI Speaker Diarisation System for the VoxCeleb Speaker Diarisation Challenge
title_zh: 面向 VoxCeleb 扬声器分类挑战赛的华为扬声器分类系统
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, A report about our diarisation system for VoxCeleb Challenge, Interspeech conference workshop
comments: 5 pages, 2 figures, A report about our diarisation system for VoxCeleb Challenge, Interspeech conference workshop
abstract: This paper describes system setup of our submission to speaker diarisation track (Track 4) of VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2020. Our diarisation system consists of a well-trained neural network based speech enhancement model as pre-processing front-end of input speech signals. We replace conventional energy-based voice activity detection (VAD) with a neural network based VAD. The neural network based VAD provides more accurate annotation of speech segments containing only background music, noise, and other interference, which is crucial to diarisation performance. We apply agglomerative hierarchical clustering (AHC) of x-vectors and variational Bayesian hidden Markov model (VB-HMM) based iterative clustering for speaker clustering. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed system achieves substantial improvements over the baseline system, yielding diarisation error rate (DER) of 10.45%, and Jacard error rate (JER) of 22.46% on the evaluation set.
summary: This paper describes system setup of our submission to speaker diarisation track (Track 4) of VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2020. Our diarisation system consists of a well-trained neural network based speech enhancement model as pre-processing front-end of input speech signals. We replace conventional energy-based voice activity detection (VAD) with a neural network based VAD. The neural network based VAD provides more accurate annotation of speech segments containing only background music, noise, and other interference, which is crucial to diarisation performance. We apply agglomerative hierarchical clustering (AHC) of x-vectors and variational Bayesian hidden Markov model (VB-HMM) based iterative clustering for speaker clustering. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed system achieves substantial improvements over the baseline system, yielding diarisation error rate (DER) of 10.45%, and Jacard error rate (JER) of 22.46% on the evaluation set.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了我们向 2020 年 VoxCeleb 说话人识别挑战赛的说话人分类赛道（赛道 4）提交的系统设置。我们的分类系统由经过良好训练的基于神经网络的语音增强模型组成，作为输入语音信号的预处理前端。我们用基于神经网络的 VAD 取代了传统的基于能量的语音活动检测 (VAD)。基于神经网络的 VAD 为仅包含背景音乐、噪声和其他干扰的语音片段提供了更准确的注释，这对于二值化性能至关重要。我们应用 x 向量的凝聚层次聚类 (AHC) 和基于变分贝叶斯隐马尔可夫模型 (VB-HMM) 的迭代聚类来进行说话人聚类。实验结果表明，我们提出的系统比基线系统取得了实质性改进，在评估集上的分类错误率 (DER) 为 10.45%，Jacard 错误率 (JER) 为 22.46%。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了华为在VoxCeleb 2020说话人分割挑战赛中提交的系统架构与技术方案。
AI.motivation: 传统基于能量的语音活动检测(VAD)在背景音乐、噪声等干扰场景下表现不足，需通过神经网络提升分割准确性。
AI.method: 采用神经网络语音增强模型作为预处理前端，结合神经网络VAD替换传统方法，并使用AHC聚类与VB-HMM迭代聚类进行说话人聚类。
AI.result: 在测试集上达到10.45%的分割错误率(DER)和22.46%的雅卡尔错误率(JER)，显著优于基线系统。
AI.conclusion: 神经网络VAD与改进聚类算法的有效结合，验证了系统在复杂干扰场景下提升说话人分割性能的可行性。

result: 在测试集上达到10.45%的分割错误率(DER)和22.46%的雅卡尔错误率(JER)，显著优于基线系统。
conclusion: 神经网络VAD与改进聚类算法的有效结合，验证了系统在复杂干扰场景下提升说话人分割性能的可行性。
search_text: The HUAWEI Speaker Diarisation System for the VoxCeleb Speaker Diarisation Challenge 面向 VoxCeleb 扬声器分类挑战赛的华为扬声器分类系统 This paper describes system setup of our submission to speaker diarisation track (Track 4) of VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2020. Our diarisation system consists of a well-trained neural network based speech enhancement model as pre-processing front-end of input speech signals. We replace conventional energy-based voice activity detection (VAD) with a neural network based VAD. The neural network based VAD provides more accurate annotation of speech segments containing only background music, noise, and other interference, which is crucial to diarisation performance. We apply agglomerative hierarchical clustering (AHC) of x-vectors and variational Bayesian hidden Markov model (VB-HMM) based iterative clustering for speaker clustering. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed system achieves substantial improvements over the baseline system, yielding diarisation error rate (DER) of 10.45%, and Jacard error rate (JER) of 22.46% on the evaluation set. 本文描述了我们向 2020 年 VoxCeleb 说话人识别挑战赛的说话人分类赛道（赛道 4）提交的系统设置。我们的分类系统由经过良好训练的基于神经网络的语音增强模型组成，作为输入语音信号的预处理前端。我们用基于神经网络的 VAD 取代了传统的基于能量的语音活动检测 (VAD)。基于神经网络的 VAD 为仅包含背景音乐、噪声和其他干扰的语音片段提供了更准确的注释，这对于二值化性能至关重要。我们应用 x 向量的凝聚层次聚类 (AHC) 和基于变分贝叶斯隐马尔可夫模型 (VB-HMM) 的迭代聚类来进行说话人聚类。实验结果表明，我们提出的系统比基线系统取得了实质性改进，在评估集上的分类错误率 (DER) 为 10.45%，Jacard 错误率 (JER) 为 22.46%。 本文介绍了华为在VoxCeleb 2020说话人分割挑战赛中提交的系统架构与技术方案。 Renyu Wang,Ruilin Tong,Yu Ting Yeung,Xiao Chen cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Yunqiu Xu,Meng Fang,Ling Chen,Yali Du,Joey Tianyi Zhou,Chengqi Zhang
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning with Stacked Hierarchical Attention for Text-based Games
title_zh: 基于文本游戏的具有堆叠分层注意力的深度强化学习
abstract: We study reinforcement learning (RL) for text-based games, which are interactive simulations in the context of natural language. While different methods have been developed to represent the environment information and language actions, existing RL agents are not empowered with any reasoning capabilities to deal with textual games. In this work, we aim to conduct explicit reasoning with knowledge graphs for decision making, so that the actions of an agent are generated and supported by an interpretable inference procedure. We propose a stacked hierarchical attention mechanism to construct an explicit representation of the reasoning process by exploiting the structure of the knowledge graph. We extensively evaluate our method on a number of man-made benchmark games, and the experimental results demonstrate that our method performs better than existing text-based agents.
summary: We study reinforcement learning (RL) for text-based games, which are interactive simulations in the context of natural language. While different methods have been developed to represent the environment information and language actions, existing RL agents are not empowered with any reasoning capabilities to deal with textual games. In this work, we aim to conduct explicit reasoning with knowledge graphs for decision making, so that the actions of an agent are generated and supported by an interpretable inference procedure. We propose a stacked hierarchical attention mechanism to construct an explicit representation of the reasoning process by exploiting the structure of the knowledge graph. We extensively evaluate our method on a number of man-made benchmark games, and the experimental results demonstrate that our method performs better than existing text-based agents.
abstract_zh: 我们研究基于文本的游戏的强化学习（RL），这些游戏是自然语言背景下的交互式模拟。虽然已经开发了不同的方法来表示环境信息和语言动作，但现有的强化学习代理不具备处理文本游戏的任何推理能力。在这项工作中，我们的目标是利用知识图进行显式推理以进行决策，以便代理的动作由可解释的推理过程生成和支持。我们提出了一种堆叠层次注意力机制，通过利用知识图的结构来构建推理过程的显式表示。我们在许多人造基准游戏上广泛评估了我们的方法，实验结果表明我们的方法比现有的基于文本的代理表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合知识图谱与分层注意力机制的深度强化学习方法，用于提升文本游戏中的决策能力。
AI.motivation: 现有文本游戏智能体缺乏显式推理能力，导致决策过程不可解释且效果受限。
AI.method: 通过构建知识图谱结构，设计分层注意力机制实现显式推理过程建模，增强决策可解释性。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，该方法在文本游戏任务上的表现优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 显式推理结合分层注意力机制能有效提升文本游戏智能体的决策性能与可解释性。

title: Learning to Sort Image Sequences via Accumulated Temporal Differences
title_zh: 学习通过累积的时间差异对图像序列进行排序
abstract: Consider a set of n images of a scene with dynamic objects captured with a static or a handheld camera. Let the temporal order in which these images are captured be unknown. There can be n! possibilities for the temporal order in which these images could have been captured. In this work, we tackle the problem of temporally sequencing the unordered set of images of a dynamic scene captured with a hand-held camera. We propose a convolutional block which captures the spatial information through 2D convolution kernel and captures the temporal information by utilizing the differences present among the feature maps extracted from the input images. We evaluate the performance of the proposed approach on the dataset extracted from a standard action recognition dataset, UCF101. We show that the proposed approach outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by a significant margin. We show that the network generalizes well by evaluating it on a dataset extracted from the DAVIS dataset, a dataset meant for video object segmentation, when the same network was trained with a dataset extracted from UCF101, a dataset meant for action recognition.
summary: Consider a set of n images of a scene with dynamic objects captured with a static or a handheld camera. Let the temporal order in which these images are captured be unknown. There can be n! possibilities for the temporal order in which these images could have been captured. In this work, we tackle the problem of temporally sequencing the unordered set of images of a dynamic scene captured with a hand-held camera. We propose a convolutional block which captures the spatial information through 2D convolution kernel and captures the temporal information by utilizing the differences present among the feature maps extracted from the input images. We evaluate the performance of the proposed approach on the dataset extracted from a standard action recognition dataset, UCF101. We show that the proposed approach outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by a significant margin. We show that the network generalizes well by evaluating it on a dataset extracted from the DAVIS dataset, a dataset meant for video object segmentation, when the same network was trained with a dataset extracted from UCF101, a dataset meant for action recognition.
abstract_zh: 考虑使用静态或手持相机拍摄的一组包含 n 个场景图像的动态对象。假设这些图像被捕获的时间顺序是未知的。可以有n！捕捉这些图像的时间顺序的可能性。在这项工作中，我们解决了对手持相机拍摄的动态场景的无序图像集进行时间排序的问题。我们提出了一种卷积块，它通过 2D 卷积核捕获空间信息，并利用从输入图像提取的特征图之间存在的差异捕获时间信息。我们评估了所提出的方法在从标准动作识别数据集 UCF101 中提取的数据集上的性能。我们表明，所提出的方法明显优于最先进的方法。我们通过在从 DAVIS 数据集提取的数据集（用于视频对象分割的数据集）上进行评估来证明该网络具有良好的泛化能力，同时使用从 UCF101（用于动作识别的数据集）提取的数据集来训练同一网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过累积时间差异来排序无序图像序列的方法，利用卷积块捕捉空间和时间信息。
AI.motivation: 动态场景中图像的拍摄顺序未知，现有方法难以准确排序，需设计能同时处理时空信息的模型以解决此问题。
AI.method: 设计包含2D卷积核提取空间特征，并通过特征图差异捕捉时间信息的卷积块，利用累积时间差异实现图像排序。
AI.result: 在UCF101和DAVIS数据集上均显著优于现有方法，且模型在不同数据集间具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合时空特征有效解决了图像序列排序问题，验证了模型在动态场景中的适用性和鲁棒性。

title: Towards Low-Resource StarGAN Voice Conversion using Weight Adaptive Instance Normalization
title_zh: 使用权重自适应实例归一化实现低资源 StarGAN 语音转换
abstract: Many-to-many voice conversion with non-parallel training data has seen significant progress in recent years. StarGAN-based models have been interests of voice conversion. However, most of the StarGAN-based methods only focused on voice conversion experiments for the situations where the number of speakers was small, and the amount of training data was large. In this work, we aim at improving the data efficiency of the model and achieving a many-to-many non-parallel StarGAN-based voice conversion for a relatively large number of speakers with limited training samples. In order to improve data efficiency, the proposed model uses a speaker encoder for extracting speaker embeddings and conducts adaptive instance normalization (AdaIN) on convolutional weights. Experiments are conducted with 109 speakers under two low-resource situations, where the number of training samples is 20 and 5 per speaker. An objective evaluation shows the proposed model is better than the baseline methods. Furthermore, a subjective evaluation shows that, for both naturalness and similarity, the proposed model outperforms the baseline method.
summary: Many-to-many voice conversion with non-parallel training data has seen significant progress in recent years. StarGAN-based models have been interests of voice conversion. However, most of the StarGAN-based methods only focused on voice conversion experiments for the situations where the number of speakers was small, and the amount of training data was large. In this work, we aim at improving the data efficiency of the model and achieving a many-to-many non-parallel StarGAN-based voice conversion for a relatively large number of speakers with limited training samples. In order to improve data efficiency, the proposed model uses a speaker encoder for extracting speaker embeddings and conducts adaptive instance normalization (AdaIN) on convolutional weights. Experiments are conducted with 109 speakers under two low-resource situations, where the number of training samples is 20 and 5 per speaker. An objective evaluation shows the proposed model is better than the baseline methods. Furthermore, a subjective evaluation shows that, for both naturalness and similarity, the proposed model outperforms the baseline method.
abstract_zh: 近年来，使用非并行训练数据的多对多语音转换取得了重大进展。基于 StarGAN 的模型一直是语音转换的兴趣所在。然而，大多数基于StarGAN的方法只专注于说话人数量较少、训练数据量较大的情况下的语音转换实验。在这项工作中，我们的目标是提高模型的数据效率，并在训练样本有限的情况下，针对相对较多的说话人实现基于 StarGAN 的多对多非并行语音转换。为了提高数据效率，所提出的模型使用说话人编码器来提取说话人嵌入，并对卷积权重进行自适应实例归一化（AdaIN）。实验在两种资源匮乏的情况下对 109 名说话人进行，其中训练样本数为每个说话人 20 个和 5 个。客观评估表明所提出的模型优于基线方法。此外，主观评估表明，无论是自然性还是相似性，所提出的模型都优于基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于StarGAN的低资源语音转换方法，旨在提高数据效率并实现大量说话人之间的多对多非并行语音转换。
AI.motivation: 现有的StarGAN方法主要关注小规模说话人和大量训练数据的情况，但在低资源条件下（如每个说话人仅有少量训练样本）表现不佳，因此需要改进数据效率。
AI.method: 该方法使用说话人编码器提取说话人嵌入，并对卷积权重进行自适应实例归一化（AdaIN），以提升模型在低资源情况下的表现。
AI.result: 实验在109个说话人上进行，分别使用20和5个样本进行训练，结果显示该模型在客观和主观评价中均优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在低资源条件下实现了更高效的语音转换，为大规模说话人之间的多对多非并行语音转换提供了可行的解决方案。

search_text: Towards Low-Resource StarGAN Voice Conversion using Weight Adaptive Instance Normalization 使用权重自适应实例归一化实现低资源 StarGAN 语音转换 Many-to-many voice conversion with non-parallel training data has seen significant progress in recent years. StarGAN-based models have been interests of voice conversion. However, most of the StarGAN-based methods only focused on voice conversion experiments for the situations where the number of speakers was small, and the amount of training data was large. In this work, we aim at improving the data efficiency of the model and achieving a many-to-many non-parallel StarGAN-based voice conversion for a relatively large number of speakers with limited training samples. In order to improve data efficiency, the proposed model uses a speaker encoder for extracting speaker embeddings and conducts adaptive instance normalization (AdaIN) on convolutional weights. Experiments are conducted with 109 speakers under two low-resource situations, where the number of training samples is 20 and 5 per speaker. An objective evaluation shows the proposed model is better than the baseline methods. Furthermore, a subjective evaluation shows that, for both naturalness and similarity, the proposed model outperforms the baseline method. 近年来，使用非并行训练数据的多对多语音转换取得了重大进展。基于 StarGAN 的模型一直是语音转换的兴趣所在。然而，大多数基于StarGAN的方法只专注于说话人数量较少、训练数据量较大的情况下的语音转换实验。在这项工作中，我们的目标是提高模型的数据效率，并在训练样本有限的情况下，针对相对较多的说话人实现基于 StarGAN 的多对多非并行语音转换。为了提高数据效率，所提出的模型使用说话人编码器来提取说话人嵌入，并对卷积权重进行自适应实例归一化（AdaIN）。实验在两种资源匮乏的情况下对 109 名说话人进行，其中训练样本数为每个说话人 20 个和 5 个。客观评估表明所提出的模型优于基线方法。此外，主观评估表明，无论是自然性还是相似性，所提出的模型都优于基线方法。 本文提出了一种基于StarGAN的低资源语音转换方法，旨在提高数据效率并实现大量说话人之间的多对多非并行语音转换。 Mingjie Chen,Yanpei Shi,Thomas Hain cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Sumanth Dathathri,Krishnamurthy Dvijotham,Alexey Kurakin,Aditi Raghunathan,Jonathan Uesato,Rudy Bunel,Shreya Shankar,Jacob Steinhardt,Ian Goodfellow,Percy Liang,Pushmeet Kohli
title: Enabling certification of verification-agnostic networks via memory-efficient semidefinite programming
title_zh: 通过内存高效的半定编程实现验证不可知网络的认证
abstract: Convex relaxations have emerged as a promising approach for verifying desirable properties of neural networks like robustness to adversarial perturbations. Widely used Linear Programming (LP) relaxations only work well when networks are trained to facilitate verification. This precludes applications that involve verification-agnostic networks, i.e., networks not specially trained for verification. On the other hand, semidefinite programming (SDP) relaxations have successfully be applied to verification-agnostic networks, but do not currently scale beyond small networks due to poor time and space asymptotics. In this work, we propose a first-order dual SDP algorithm that (1) requires memory only linear in the total number of network activations, (2) only requires a fixed number of forward/backward passes through the network per iteration. By exploiting iterative eigenvector methods, we express all solver operations in terms of forward and backward passes through the network, enabling efficient use of hardware like GPUs/TPUs. For two verification-agnostic networks on MNIST and CIFAR-10, we significantly improve L-inf verified robust accuracy from 1% to 88% and 6% to 40% respectively. We also demonstrate tight verification of a quadratic stability specification for the decoder of a variational autoencoder.
summary: Convex relaxations have emerged as a promising approach for verifying desirable properties of neural networks like robustness to adversarial perturbations. Widely used Linear Programming (LP) relaxations only work well when networks are trained to facilitate verification. This precludes applications that involve verification-agnostic networks, i.e., networks not specially trained for verification. On the other hand, semidefinite programming (SDP) relaxations have successfully be applied to verification-agnostic networks, but do not currently scale beyond small networks due to poor time and space asymptotics. In this work, we propose a first-order dual SDP algorithm that (1) requires memory only linear in the total number of network activations, (2) only requires a fixed number of forward/backward passes through the network per iteration. By exploiting iterative eigenvector methods, we express all solver operations in terms of forward and backward passes through the network, enabling efficient use of hardware like GPUs/TPUs. For two verification-agnostic networks on MNIST and CIFAR-10, we significantly improve L-inf verified robust accuracy from 1% to 88% and 6% to 40% respectively. We also demonstrate tight verification of a quadratic stability specification for the decoder of a variational autoencoder.
abstract_zh: 凸松弛已成为验证神经网络所需特性（例如对抗性扰动的鲁棒性）的一种有前景的方法。广泛使用的线性规划（LP）松弛只有在网络经过训练以促进验证时才能很好地发挥作用。这排除了涉及验证不可知网络的应用程序，即未经过专门训练的验证网络。另一方面，半定规划（SDP）松弛已成功应用于与验证无关的网络，但由于时间和空间渐近性较差，目前无法扩展到小型网络之外。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种一阶双 SDP 算法，该算法 (1) 只需要与网络激活总数成线性关系的内存，(2) 每次迭代只需要固定数量的前向/后向通过网络。通过利用迭代特征向量方法，我们通过网络的前向和后向传递来表达所有求解器操作，从而实现 GPU/TPU 等硬件的高效使用。对于 MNIST 和 CIFAR-10 上的两个与验证无关的网络，我们将 L-inf 验证的鲁棒精度分别从 1% 显着提高到 88% 和 6% 到 40%。我们还演示了对变分自动编码器解码器的二次稳定性规范的严格验证。

AI.tldr: 通过内存高效的半定规划方法，为验证无关的神经网络提供认证。
AI.motivation: 现有线性规划方法需网络专门训练以支持验证，而半定规划虽适用于验证无关网络但扩展性差，亟需更高效的算法。
AI.method: 提出一阶对偶SDP算法，内存需求线性于激活数，每次迭代仅需固定次数前向/反向传递，通过迭代特征向量方法实现硬件高效计算。
AI.result: 在MNIST和CIFAR-10上将L-inf验证鲁棒性准确率分别提升至88%和40%，并严格验证了变分自编码器解码器的二次稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升了验证无关网络的认证效率与准确性，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

title: The Primal-Dual method for Learning Augmented Algorithms
title_zh: 学习增强算法的原始对偶方法
comment: 30 pages, 11 figures. To appear in NeurIPS 2020 (oral)
comments: 30 pages, 11 figures. To appear in NeurIPS 2020 (oral)
abstract: The extension of classical online algorithms when provided with predictions is a new and active research area. In this paper, we extend the primal-dual method for online algorithms in order to incorporate predictions that advise the online algorithm about the next action to take. We use this framework to obtain novel algorithms for a variety of online covering problems. We compare our algorithms to the cost of the true and predicted offline optimal solutions and show that these algorithms outperform any online algorithm when the prediction is accurate while maintaining good guarantees when the prediction is misleading.
summary: The extension of classical online algorithms when provided with predictions is a new and active research area. In this paper, we extend the primal-dual method for online algorithms in order to incorporate predictions that advise the online algorithm about the next action to take. We use this framework to obtain novel algorithms for a variety of online covering problems. We compare our algorithms to the cost of the true and predicted offline optimal solutions and show that these algorithms outperform any online algorithm when the prediction is accurate while maintaining good guarantees when the prediction is misleading.
abstract_zh: 经典在线算法在提供预测时的扩展是一个新的、活跃的研究领域。在本文中，我们扩展了在线算法的原对偶方法，以便合并为在线算法提供有关下一步要采取的行动的建议的预测。我们使用这个框架来获得针对各种在线覆盖问题的新颖算法。我们将我们的算法与真实和预测的离线最优解决方案的成本进行比较，结果表明，当预测准确时，这些算法优于任何在线算法，而当预测具有误导性时，这些算法仍能保持良好的保证。

AI.tldr: 本文扩展了经典在线算法的对偶方法，通过引入预测信息来改进在线覆盖问题的解决效果。
AI.motivation: 传统在线算法缺乏对未来输入的预测能力，而结合预测信息可提升算法性能，但需保证预测错误时的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将预测信息整合进对偶方法框架，设计新型在线算法以处理覆盖问题，并对比真实与预测的离线最优解。
AI.result: 当预测准确时新算法优于现有在线算法；预测偏差时仍保持良好性能下界，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功结合预测信息提升在线算法性能，同时通过理论分析保障了预测错误时的稳定性。

title: LaSAFT: Latent Source Attentive Frequency Transformation for Conditioned Source Separation
title_zh: LaSAFT：用于条件源分离的潜在源关注频率变换
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables. accepted to ICASSP 2021
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables. accepted to ICASSP 2021
abstract: Recent deep-learning approaches have shown that Frequency Transformation (FT) blocks can significantly improve spectrogram-based single-source separation models by capturing frequency patterns. The goal of this paper is to extend the FT block to fit the multi-source task. We propose the Latent Source Attentive Frequency Transformation (LaSAFT) block to capture source-dependent frequency patterns. We also propose the Gated Point-wise Convolutional Modulation (GPoCM), an extension of Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM), to modulate internal features. By employing these two novel methods, we extend the Conditioned-U-Net (CUNet) for multi-source separation, and the experimental results indicate that our LaSAFT and GPoCM can improve the CUNet's performance, achieving state-of-the-art SDR performance on several MUSDB18 source separation tasks.
summary: Recent deep-learning approaches have shown that Frequency Transformation (FT) blocks can significantly improve spectrogram-based single-source separation models by capturing frequency patterns. The goal of this paper is to extend the FT block to fit the multi-source task. We propose the Latent Source Attentive Frequency Transformation (LaSAFT) block to capture source-dependent frequency patterns. We also propose the Gated Point-wise Convolutional Modulation (GPoCM), an extension of Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM), to modulate internal features. By employing these two novel methods, we extend the Conditioned-U-Net (CUNet) for multi-source separation, and the experimental results indicate that our LaSAFT and GPoCM can improve the CUNet's performance, achieving state-of-the-art SDR performance on several MUSDB18 source separation tasks.
abstract_zh: 最近的深度学习方法表明，频率变换（FT）模块可以通过捕获频率模式来显着改进基于频谱图的单源分离模型。本文的目标是扩展 FT 模块以适应多源任务。我们提出潜在源关注频率变换（LaSAFT）块来捕获源相关频率模式。我们还提出了门控逐点卷积调制（GPoCM），它是特征线性调制（FiLM）的扩展，用于调制内部特征。通过采用这两种新颖的方法，我们扩展了 Conditioned-U-Net (CUNet) 进行多源分离，实验结果表明我们的 LaSAFT 和 GPoCM 可以提高 CUNet 的性能，在多个 MUSDB18 源分离任务上实现最先进的 SDR 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在将频域变换块扩展至多源分离任务，提出LaSAFT和GPoCM方法以提升条件源分离模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有频域变换块在单源分离中表现优异，但难以直接应用于多源分离任务，需设计更适应多源场景的结构。
AI.method: 提出LaSAFT块捕捉源相关频率模式，并设计GPoCM（基于FiLM的改进）调制内部特征，结合改进的CUNet框架实现多源分离。
AI.result: 在MUSDB18数据集上达到最先进SDR指标，验证了LaSAFT与GPoCM对多源分离任务的有效性。
AI.conclusion: LaSAFT与GPoCM的结合显著提升了条件源分离模型性能，为多源音频分离提供了新思路。
