search_text: LaSAFT: Latent Source Attentive Frequency Transformation for Conditioned Source Separation LaSAFT：用于条件源分离的潜在源关注频率变换 Recent deep-learning approaches have shown that Frequency Transformation (FT) blocks can significantly improve spectrogram-based single-source separation models by capturing frequency patterns. The goal of this paper is to extend the FT block to fit the multi-source task. We propose the Latent Source Attentive Frequency Transformation (LaSAFT) block to capture source-dependent frequency patterns. We also propose the Gated Point-wise Convolutional Modulation (GPoCM), an extension of Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM), to modulate internal features. By employing these two novel methods, we extend the Conditioned-U-Net (CUNet) for multi-source separation, and the experimental results indicate that our LaSAFT and GPoCM can improve the CUNet's performance, achieving state-of-the-art SDR performance on several MUSDB18 source separation tasks. 最近的深度学习方法表明，频率变换（FT）模块可以通过捕获频率模式来显着改进基于频谱图的单源分离模型。本文的目标是扩展 FT 模块以适应多源任务。我们提出潜在源关注频率变换（LaSAFT）块来捕获源相关频率模式。我们还提出了门控逐点卷积调制（GPoCM），它是特征线性调制（FiLM）的扩展，用于调制内部特征。通过采用这两种新颖的方法，我们扩展了 Conditioned-U-Net (CUNet) 进行多源分离，实验结果表明我们的 LaSAFT 和 GPoCM 可以提高 CUNet 的性能，在多个 MUSDB18 源分离任务上实现最先进的 SDR 性能。 本文旨在将频域变换块扩展至多源分离任务，提出LaSAFT和GPoCM方法以提升条件源分离模型性能。 Woosung Choi,Minseok Kim,Jaehwa Chung,Soonyoung Jung cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

title: Learning Augmented Energy Minimization via Speed Scaling
title_zh: 通过速度缩放学习增强能量最小化
comment: 30 pages, 4 figures. To appear in NeurIPS 2020 (spotlight)
comments: 30 pages, 4 figures. To appear in NeurIPS 2020 (spotlight)
abstract: As power management has become a primary concern in modern data centers, computing resources are being scaled dynamically to minimize energy consumption. We initiate the study of a variant of the classic online speed scaling problem, in which machine learning predictions about the future can be integrated naturally. Inspired by recent work on learning-augmented online algorithms, we propose an algorithm which incorporates predictions in a black-box manner and outperforms any online algorithm if the accuracy is high, yet maintains provable guarantees if the prediction is very inaccurate. We provide both theoretical and experimental evidence to support our claims.
summary: As power management has become a primary concern in modern data centers, computing resources are being scaled dynamically to minimize energy consumption. We initiate the study of a variant of the classic online speed scaling problem, in which machine learning predictions about the future can be integrated naturally. Inspired by recent work on learning-augmented online algorithms, we propose an algorithm which incorporates predictions in a black-box manner and outperforms any online algorithm if the accuracy is high, yet maintains provable guarantees if the prediction is very inaccurate. We provide both theoretical and experimental evidence to support our claims.
abstract_zh: 随着电源管理已成为现代数据中心的主要关注点，计算资源正在动态扩展以最大限度地减少能耗。我们发起了对经典在线速度扩展问题的变体的研究，其中可以自然地集成对未来的机器学习预测。受到最近学习增强在线算法工作的启发，我们提出了一种算法，该算法以黑盒方式合并预测，如果精度很高，则优于任何在线算法，但如果预测非常不准确，则仍能保持可证明的保证。我们提供理论和实验证据来支持我们的主张。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合机器学习预测的速度缩放算法，以动态调整计算资源并最小化数据中心的能耗。
AI.motivation: 现代数据中心需要高效电源管理，传统在线算法难以有效利用未来预测信息，需结合机器学习提升能效。
AI.method: 设计一种黑盒集成机器学习预测的算法，结合预测准确性调整资源分配策略，确保高准确性时的最优性和低准确性时的理论保障。
AI.result: 理论分析与实验验证表明，该算法在预测准确时优于传统在线算法，且在预测错误时仍保持可证明的性能下限。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效融合机器学习预测，平衡性能与鲁棒性，为学习增强的在线算法设计提供新思路。

title: From trees to barcodes and back again: theoretical and statistical perspectives
title_zh: 从树木到条形码再返回：理论和统计视角
abstract: Methods of topological data analysis have been successfully applied in a wide range of fields to provide useful summaries of the structure of complex data sets in terms of topological descriptors, such as persistence diagrams. While there are many powerful techniques for computing topological descriptors, the inverse problem, i.e., recovering the input data from topological descriptors, has proved to be challenging. In this article we study in detail the Topological Morphology Descriptor (TMD), which assigns a persistence diagram to any tree embedded in Euclidean space, and a sort of stochastic inverse to the TMD, the Topological Neuron Synthesis (TNS) algorithm, gaining both theoretical and computational insights into the relation between the two. We propose a new approach to classify barcodes using symmetric groups, which provides a concrete language to formulate our results. We investigate to what extent the TNS recovers a geometric tree from its TMD and describe the effect of different types of noise on the process of tree generation from persistence diagrams. We prove moreover that the TNS algorithm is stable with respect to specific types of noise.
summary: Methods of topological data analysis have been successfully applied in a wide range of fields to provide useful summaries of the structure of complex data sets in terms of topological descriptors, such as persistence diagrams. While there are many powerful techniques for computing topological descriptors, the inverse problem, i.e., recovering the input data from topological descriptors, has proved to be challenging. In this article we study in detail the Topological Morphology Descriptor (TMD), which assigns a persistence diagram to any tree embedded in Euclidean space, and a sort of stochastic inverse to the TMD, the Topological Neuron Synthesis (TNS) algorithm, gaining both theoretical and computational insights into the relation between the two. We propose a new approach to classify barcodes using symmetric groups, which provides a concrete language to formulate our results. We investigate to what extent the TNS recovers a geometric tree from its TMD and describe the effect of different types of noise on the process of tree generation from persistence diagrams. We prove moreover that the TNS algorithm is stable with respect to specific types of noise.
abstract_zh: 拓扑数据分析方法已成功应用于广泛的领域，以拓扑描述符（例如持久性图）的形式提供复杂数据集结构的有用总结。虽然有许多强大的技术用于计算拓扑描述符，但逆问题，即从拓扑描述符恢复输入数据，已被证明具有挑战性。在本文中，我们详细研究了拓扑形态描述符 (TMD)，它为嵌入欧几里德空间中的任何树分配持久性图，以及 TMD 的一种随机逆，即拓扑神经元合成 (TNS) 算法，获得了对两者之间关系的理论和计算见解。我们提出了一种使用对称组对条形码进行分类的新方法，它提供了一种具体的语言来表述我们的结果。我们研究了 TNS 从 TMD 中恢复几何树的程度，并描述了不同类型的噪声对持久性图树生成过程的影响。此外，我们证明 TNS 算法对于特定类型的噪声是稳定的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究从拓扑形态描述符（TMD）到树结构的逆问题，提出拓扑神经元合成（TNS）算法并分析其稳定性。
AI.motivation: 尽管拓扑数据分析方法广泛应用于复杂数据集的结构总结，但如何从拓扑描述符恢复原始数据（逆问题）仍具挑战性，尤其针对树结构的逆向重建。
AI.method: 通过对称群分类条形码，结合TMD与TNS算法，分析噪声对树生成过程的影响，并证明TNS算法对特定噪声的稳定性。
AI.result: TNS算法能有效从TMD恢复几何树结构，且在噪声干扰下保持稳定性；揭示了TMD与TNS之间的理论关联。
AI.conclusion: TNS算法为解决拓扑逆问题提供了稳定方法，深化了对拓扑描述符与原始数据关系的理解。

authors_text: Florin-Alexandru Vasluianu,Andres Romero,Luc Van Gool,Radu Timofte
title: Self-Supervised Shadow Removal
title_zh: 自监督阴影去除
abstract: Shadow removal is an important computer vision task aiming at the detection and successful removal of the shadow produced by an occluded light source and a photo-realistic restoration of the image contents. Decades of re-search produced a multitude of hand-crafted restoration techniques and, more recently, learned solutions from shad-owed and shadow-free training image pairs. In this work,we propose an unsupervised single image shadow removal solution via self-supervised learning by using a conditioned mask. In contrast to existing literature, we do not require paired shadowed and shadow-free images, instead we rely on self-supervision and jointly learn deep models to remove and add shadows to images. We validate our approach on the recently introduced ISTD and USR datasets. We largely improve quantitatively and qualitatively over the compared methods and set a new state-of-the-art performance in single image shadow removal.
summary: Shadow removal is an important computer vision task aiming at the detection and successful removal of the shadow produced by an occluded light source and a photo-realistic restoration of the image contents. Decades of re-search produced a multitude of hand-crafted restoration techniques and, more recently, learned solutions from shad-owed and shadow-free training image pairs. In this work,we propose an unsupervised single image shadow removal solution via self-supervised learning by using a conditioned mask. In contrast to existing literature, we do not require paired shadowed and shadow-free images, instead we rely on self-supervision and jointly learn deep models to remove and add shadows to images. We validate our approach on the recently introduced ISTD and USR datasets. We largely improve quantitatively and qualitatively over the compared methods and set a new state-of-the-art performance in single image shadow removal.
abstract_zh: 阴影去除是一项重要的计算机视觉任务，旨在检测并成功去除遮挡光源产生的阴影，并对图像内容进行逼真的恢复。数十年的研究产生了多种手工制作的恢复技术，最近，从阴影和无阴影训练图像对中学习了解决方案。在这项工作中，我们通过使用条件掩模进行自监督学习，提出了一种无监督的单图像阴影去除解决方案。与现有文献相反，我们不需要配对的阴影和无阴影图像，而是依靠自我监督并共同学习深度模型来去除和添加图像的阴影。我们在最近引入的 ISTD 和 USR 数据集上验证了我们的方法。与比较方法相比，我们在数量和质量上有了很大的改进，并在单图像阴影去除方面设定了新的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督学习的单图像阴影去除方法，无需配对的阴影和无阴影图像。
AI.motivation: 传统阴影去除方法依赖配对的阴影/无阴影图像训练，数据获取困难且限制了方法的适用性。
AI.method: 通过条件掩码实现自监督学习，联合训练阴影去除与生成模型，无需人工标注配对数据。
AI.result: 在ISTD和USR数据集上显著优于现有方法，达到单图像阴影去除领域的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了传统配对数据依赖，为阴影去除任务提供了更高效且实用的解决方案。

authors_text: Unai Zabala,Igor Rodriguez,José María Martínez-Otzeta,Itziar Irigoien,Elena Lazkano
title: Quantitative analysis of robot gesticulation behavior
title_zh: 机器人手势行为的定量分析
abstract: Social robot capabilities, such as talking gestures, are best produced using data driven approaches to avoid being repetitive and to show trustworthiness. However, there is a lack of robust quantitative methods that allow to compare such methods beyond visual evaluation. In this paper a quantitative analysis is performed that compares two Generative Adversarial Networks based gesture generation approaches. The aim is to measure characteristics such as fidelity to the original training data, but at the same time keep track of the degree of originality of the produced gestures. Principal Coordinate Analysis and procrustes statistics are performed and a new Fréchet Gesture Distance is proposed by adapting the Fréchet Inception Distance to gestures. These three techniques are taken together to asses the fidelity/originality of the generated gestures.
summary: Social robot capabilities, such as talking gestures, are best produced using data driven approaches to avoid being repetitive and to show trustworthiness. However, there is a lack of robust quantitative methods that allow to compare such methods beyond visual evaluation. In this paper a quantitative analysis is performed that compares two Generative Adversarial Networks based gesture generation approaches. The aim is to measure characteristics such as fidelity to the original training data, but at the same time keep track of the degree of originality of the produced gestures. Principal Coordinate Analysis and procrustes statistics are performed and a new Fréchet Gesture Distance is proposed by adapting the Fréchet Inception Distance to gestures. These three techniques are taken together to asses the fidelity/originality of the generated gestures.
abstract_zh: 社交机器人的功能（例如说话手势）最好使用数据驱动的方法来生成，以避免重复并表现出可信度。然而，缺乏稳健的定量方法来允许在视觉评估之外对这些方法进行比较。本文进行了定量分析，比较了两种基于生成对抗网络的手势生成方法。目的是测量诸如对原始训练数据的保​​真度之类的特征，但同时跟踪所产生的手势的原创程度。执行主坐标分析和普鲁斯特统计，并通过将 Fréchet 起始距离适应手势来提出新的 Fréchet 手势距离。这三种技术结合在一起来评估生成的手势的保真度/原创性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种定量分析方法，用于评估基于生成对抗网络的机器人手势生成模型的保真度和原创性。
AI.motivation: 现有社会机器人手势生成方法缺乏客观的定量评估手段，依赖主观视觉评价难以准确比较不同模型效果。
AI.method: 结合主坐标分析、Procrustes统计及改进的Fréchet手势距离（改编自Fréchet Inception Distance）三类方法，构建多维度评估体系。
AI.result: 成功量化比较了两种GAN模型在手势生成中的数据保真度与原创性表现，验证了新评估指标的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的定量分析框架为机器人手势生成模型的客观评价提供了新工具，有助于推动社会机器人交互能力的发展。

authors_text: Tongqing Zhai,Yiming Li,Ziqi Zhang,Baoyuan Wu,Yong Jiang,Shu-Tao Xia
title: Backdoor Attack against Speaker Verification
title_zh: 针对说话人验证的后门攻击
comment: Accepted by the ICASSP 2021. The first two authors contributed equally to this work
comments: Accepted by the ICASSP 2021. The first two authors contributed equally to this work
abstract: Speaker verification has been widely and successfully adopted in many mission-critical areas for user identification. The training of speaker verification requires a large amount of data, therefore users usually need to adopt third-party data ($e.g.$, data from the Internet or third-party data company). This raises the question of whether adopting untrusted third-party data can pose a security threat. In this paper, we demonstrate that it is possible to inject the hidden backdoor for infecting speaker verification models by poisoning the training data. Specifically, we design a clustering-based attack scheme where poisoned samples from different clusters will contain different triggers ($i.e.$, pre-defined utterances), based on our understanding of verification tasks. The infected models behave normally on benign samples, while attacker-specified unenrolled triggers will successfully pass the verification even if the attacker has no information about the enrolled speaker. We also demonstrate that existing backdoor attacks cannot be directly adopted in attacking speaker verification. Our approach not only provides a new perspective for designing novel attacks, but also serves as a strong baseline for improving the robustness of verification methods. The code for reproducing main results is available at \url{https://github.com/zhaitongqing233/Backdoor-attack-against-speaker-verification}.
summary: Speaker verification has been widely and successfully adopted in many mission-critical areas for user identification. The training of speaker verification requires a large amount of data, therefore users usually need to adopt third-party data ($e.g.$, data from the Internet or third-party data company). This raises the question of whether adopting untrusted third-party data can pose a security threat. In this paper, we demonstrate that it is possible to inject the hidden backdoor for infecting speaker verification models by poisoning the training data. Specifically, we design a clustering-based attack scheme where poisoned samples from different clusters will contain different triggers ($i.e.$, pre-defined utterances), based on our understanding of verification tasks. The infected models behave normally on benign samples, while attacker-specified unenrolled triggers will successfully pass the verification even if the attacker has no information about the enrolled speaker. We also demonstrate that existing backdoor attacks cannot be directly adopted in attacking speaker verification. Our approach not only provides a new perspective for designing novel attacks, but also serves as a strong baseline for improving the robustness of verification methods. The code for reproducing main results is available at \url{https://github.com/zhaitongqing233/Backdoor-attack-against-speaker-verification}.
abstract_zh: 说话人验证已在许多关键任务领域广泛且成功地用于用户识别。说话人验证的训练需要大量的数据，因此用户通常需要采用第三方数据（例如，来自互联网或第三方数据公司的数据）。这就提出了一个问题：采用不受信任的第三方数据是否会构成安全威胁。在本文中，我们证明可以通过毒害训练数据来注入隐藏的后门来感染说话人验证模型。具体来说，我们根据我们对验证任务的理解，设计了一种基于集群的攻击方案，其中来自不同集群的中毒样本将包含不同的触发器（$i.e.$，预定义的话语）。受感染的模型在良性样本上表现正常，而攻击者指定的未注册触发器将成功通过验证，即使攻击者没有有关注册说话者的信息。我们还证明现有的后门攻击不能直接用于攻击说话人验证。我们的方法不仅为设计新颖的攻击提供了新的视角，而且还为提高验证方法的稳健性提供了强有力的基线。重现主要结果的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/zhaitongqing233/Backdoor-attack-against-speaker-verification} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对语音验证系统的后门攻击方法，通过污染训练数据注入隐藏后门，使模型在正常样本上表现正常，但特定触发词可绕过验证。
AI.motivation: 语音验证系统依赖第三方数据训练，可能存在安全风险。现有后门攻击方法无法直接应用于语音验证任务，需探索针对性攻击方案。
AI.method: 设计基于聚类的攻击框架，在不同聚类的中毒样本中嵌入预定义触发词，使模型对攻击者指定的未注册触发词产生错误验证通过。
AI.result: 实验验证攻击有效性：模型对正常样本表现正常，但特定触发词可绕过验证；现有后门攻击方法不适用于语音验证场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为语音验证攻击研究提供新视角，同时为提升系统鲁棒性提供基准参考。

In this paper, we demonstrate that it is possible to inject the hidden backdoor for infecting speaker verification models by poisoning the training data. Specifically, we design a clustering-based attack scheme where poisoned samples from different clusters will contain different triggers ($i.e.$, pre-defined utterances), based on our understanding of verification tasks. The infected models behave normally on benign samples, while attacker-specified unenrolled triggers will successfully pass the verification even if the attacker has no information about the enrolled speaker. We also demonstrate that existing backdoor attacks cannot be directly adopted in attacking speaker verification. Our approach not only provides a new perspective for designing novel attacks, but also serves as a strong baseline for improving the robustness of verification methods. The code for reproducing main results is available at \url{https://github.com/zhaitongqing233/Backdoor-attack-against-speaker-verification}. 说话人验证已在许多关键任务领域广泛且成功地用于用户识别。说话人验证的训练需要大量的数据，因此用户通常需要采用第三方数据（例如，来自互联网或第三方数据公司的数据）。这就提出了一个问题：采用不受信任的第三方数据是否会构成安全威胁。在本文中，我们证明可以通过毒害训练数据来注入隐藏的后门来感染说话人验证模型。具体来说，我们根据我们对验证任务的理解，设计了一种基于集群的攻击方案，其中来自不同集群的中毒样本将包含不同的触发器（$i.e.$，预定义的话语）。受感染的模型在良性样本上表现正常，而攻击者指定的未注册触发器将成功通过验证，即使攻击者没有有关注册说话者的信息。我们还证明现有的后门攻击不能直接用于攻击说话人验证。我们的方法不仅为设计新颖的攻击提供了新的视角，而且还为提高验证方法的稳健性提供了强有力的基线。重现主要结果的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/zhaitongqing233/Backdoor-attack-against-speaker-verification} 获取。 本文提出一种针对语音验证系统的后门攻击方法，通过污染训练数据注入隐藏后门，使模型在正常样本上表现正常，但特定触发词可绕过验证。 Tongqing Zhai,Yiming Li,Ziqi Zhang,Baoyuan Wu,Yong Jiang,Shu-Tao Xia cs.CR,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: On the Power of Deep but Naive Partial Label Learning
title_zh: 论深度但朴素的部分标签学习的力量
comment: ef:2021 IEEE ICASSP International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing
comments: ef:2021 IEEE ICASSP International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing
abstract: Partial label learning (PLL) is a class of weakly supervised learning where each training instance consists of a data and a set of candidate labels containing a unique ground truth label. To tackle this problem, a majority of current state-of-the-art methods employs either label disambiguation or averaging strategies. So far, PLL methods without such techniques have been considered impractical. In this paper, we challenge this view by revealing the hidden power of the oldest and naivest PLL method when it is instantiated with deep neural networks. Specifically, we show that, with deep neural networks, the naive model can achieve competitive performances against the other state-of-the-art methods, suggesting it as a strong baseline for PLL. We also address the question of how and why such a naive model works well with deep neural networks. Our empirical results indicate that deep neural networks trained on partially labeled examples generalize very well even in the over-parametrized regime and without label disambiguations or regularizations. We point out that existing learning theories on PLL are vacuous in the over-parametrized regime. Hence they cannot explain why the deep naive method works. We propose an alternative theory on how deep learning generalize in PLL problems.
summary: Partial label learning (PLL) is a class of weakly supervised learning where each training instance consists of a data and a set of candidate labels containing a unique ground truth label. To tackle this problem, a majority of current state-of-the-art methods employs either label disambiguation or averaging strategies. So far, PLL methods without such techniques have been considered impractical. In this paper, we challenge this view by revealing the hidden power of the oldest and naivest PLL method when it is instantiated with deep neural networks. Specifically, we show that, with deep neural networks, the naive model can achieve competitive performances against the other state-of-the-art methods, suggesting it as a strong baseline for PLL. We also address the question of how and why such a naive model works well with deep neural networks. Our empirical results indicate that deep neural networks trained on partially labeled examples generalize very well even in the over-parametrized regime and without label disambiguations or regularizations. We point out that existing learning theories on PLL are vacuous in the over-parametrized regime. Hence they cannot explain why the deep naive method works. We propose an alternative theory on how deep learning generalize in PLL problems.
abstract_zh: 部分标签学习（PLL）是一类弱监督学习，其中每个训练实例由一个数据和一组包含唯一真实标签的候选标签组成。为了解决这个问题，当前大多数最先进的方法都采用标签消歧或平均策略。到目前为止，没有这种技术的 PLL 方法被认为是不切实际的。在本文中，我们通过揭示最古老和最简单的 PLL 方法在用深度神经网络实例化时隐藏的力量来挑战这种观点。具体来说，我们表明，通过深度神经网络，朴素模型可以实现与其他最先进方法相比的竞争性能，这表明它是 PLL 的强大基线。我们还解决了这样一个简单的模型如何以及为什么能够与深度神经网络很好地配合的问题。我们的实证结果表明，即使在过度参数化的情况下并且没有标签消歧或正则化，在部分标记示例上训练的深度神经网络也能很好地泛化。我们指出，现有的 PLL 学习理论在过度参数化的情况下是空洞的。因此他们无法解释为什么深层朴素方法有效。我们提出了另一种关于深度学习如何泛化 PLL 问题的理论。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在深度神经网络下，最简单且传统的部分标签学习（PLL）方法的潜力。
AI.motivation: 传统部分标签学习方法通常依赖于标签消歧或平均策略，而最简单的PLL方法被认为不实用。本文旨在挑战这一观点，揭示其在深度学习下的潜力。
AI.method: 本文采用深度神经网络实现最简单的PLL方法，并通过实验验证其性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，深度神经网络在部分标签数据上表现出良好的泛化能力，无需标签消歧或正则化。
AI.conclusion: 现有的PLL理论在过参数化条件下无法解释深度简单方法的有效性，因此本文提出了新的理论解释。

authors_text: Yuanhao Zhai,Le Wang,Wei Tang,Qilin Zhang,Junsong Yuan,Gang Hua
title: Two-Stream Consensus Network for Weakly-Supervised Temporal Action Localization
title_zh: 用于弱监督时间动作本地化的双流共识网络
abstract: Weakly-supervised Temporal Action Localization (W-TAL) aims to classify and localize all action instances in an untrimmed video under only video-level supervision. However, without frame-level annotations, it is challenging for W-TAL methods to identify false positive action proposals and generate action proposals with precise temporal boundaries. In this paper, we present a Two-Stream Consensus Network (TSCN) to simultaneously address these challenges. The proposed TSCN features an iterative refinement training method, where a frame-level pseudo ground truth is iteratively updated, and used to provide frame-level supervision for improved model training and false positive action proposal elimination. Furthermore, we propose a new attention normalization loss to encourage the predicted attention to act like a binary selection, and promote the precise localization of action instance boundaries. Experiments conducted on the THUMOS14 and ActivityNet datasets show that the proposed TSCN outperforms current state-of-the-art methods, and even achieves comparable results with some recent fully-supervised methods.
summary: Weakly-supervised Temporal Action Localization (W-TAL) aims to classify and localize all action instances in an untrimmed video under only video-level supervision. However, without frame-level annotations, it is challenging for W-TAL methods to identify false positive action proposals and generate action proposals with precise temporal boundaries. In this paper, we present a Two-Stream Consensus Network (TSCN) to simultaneously address these challenges. The proposed TSCN features an iterative refinement training method, where a frame-level pseudo ground truth is iteratively updated, and used to provide frame-level supervision for improved model training and false positive action proposal elimination. Furthermore, we propose a new attention normalization loss to encourage the predicted attention to act like a binary selection, and promote the precise localization of action instance boundaries. Experiments conducted on the THUMOS14 and ActivityNet datasets show that the proposed TSCN outperforms current state-of-the-art methods, and even achieves comparable results with some recent fully-supervised methods.
abstract_zh: 弱监督时间动作定位（W-TAL）旨在仅在视频级监督下对未修剪视频中的所有动作实例进行分类和定位。然而，如果没有帧级注释，W-TAL 方法很难识别误报动作建议并生成具有精确时间边界的动作建议。在本文中，我们提出了一个双流共识网络（TSCN）来同时应对这些挑战。所提出的 TSCN 采用迭代细化训练方法，其中迭代更新帧级伪地面事实，并用于提供帧级监督以改进模型训练和消除误报动作建议。此外，我们提出了一种新的注意力归一化损失，以鼓励预测的注意力像二元选择一样起作用，并促进动作实例边界的精确定位。在 THUMOS14 和 ActivityNet 数据集上进行的实验表明，所提出的 TSCN 优于当前最先进的方法，甚至达到了与一些最近的完全监督方法相当的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双流共识网络（TSCN），用于在仅有视频级监督的情况下实现弱监督时间动作定位，解决动作实例分类与精确定位的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督方法因缺乏帧级标注，难以消除伪正样本并精确定位动作边界，需设计新方法提升定位准确性。
AI.method: 提出迭代优化训练框架，通过伪帧级标注更新提升模型训练，并引入注意力归一化损失函数以促进二值化注意力分布，实现精准边界定位。
AI.result: 在THUMOS14和ActivityNet数据集上，TSCN优于现有最先进方法，且性能接近部分全监督方法。
AI.conclusion: TSCN通过双流共识机制和注意力优化有效解决了弱监督动作定位中的关键问题，为该领域提供了新思路。

title: A Technical Report: BUT Speech Translation Systems
title_zh: 技术报告：BUT 语音翻译系统
abstract: The paper describes the BUT's speech translation systems. The systems are English$\longrightarrow$German offline speech translation systems. The systems are based on our previous works \cite{Jointly_trained_transformers}. Though End-to-End and cascade~(ASR-MT) spoken language translation~(SLT) systems are reaching comparable performances, a large degradation is observed when translating ASR hypothesis compared to the oracle input text. To reduce this performance degradation, we have jointly-trained ASR and MT modules with ASR objective as an auxiliary loss. Both the networks are connected through the neural hidden representations. This model has an End-to-End differentiable path with respect to the final objective function and also utilizes the ASR objective for better optimization. During the inference both the modules(i.e., ASR and MT) are connected through the hidden representations corresponding to the n-best hypotheses. Ensembling with independently trained ASR and MT models have further improved the performance of the system.
summary: The paper describes the BUT's speech translation systems. The systems are English$\longrightarrow$German offline speech translation systems. The systems are based on our previous works \cite{Jointly_trained_transformers}. Though End-to-End and cascade~(ASR-MT) spoken language translation~(SLT) systems are reaching comparable performances, a large degradation is observed when translating ASR hypothesis compared to the oracle input text. To reduce this performance degradation, we have jointly-trained ASR and MT modules with ASR objective as an auxiliary loss. Both the networks are connected through the neural hidden representations. This model has an End-to-End differentiable path with respect to the final objective function and also utilizes the ASR objective for better optimization. During the inference both the modules(i.e., ASR and MT) are connected through the hidden representations corresponding to the n-best hypotheses. Ensembling with independently trained ASR and MT models have further improved the performance of the system.
abstract_zh: 该论文描述了 BUT 的语音翻译系统。这些系统是英语$\longrightarrow$德语离线语音翻译系统。该系统基于我们之前的作品\cite{Jointly_trained_transformers}。尽管端到端和级联（ASR-MT）口语翻译（SLT）系统达到了可比的性能，但与预言机输入文本相比，在翻译 ASR 假设时观察到了很大的退化。为了减少这种性能下降，我们联合训练了 ASR 和 MT 模块，并以 ASR 目标作为辅助损失。这两个网络都通过神经隐藏表示连接。该模型对于最终目标函数具有端到端可微分路径，并且还利用 ASR 目标来实现更好的优化。在推理过程中，两个模块（即 ASR 和 MT）通过与 n 个最佳假设相对应的隐藏表示连接。与独立训练的 ASR 和 MT 模型的集成进一步提高了系统的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了布拉格技术大学（BUT）开发的英德离线语音翻译系统，旨在解决基于ASR假设的翻译性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管端到端和级联（ASR-MT）语音翻译系统表现接近，但基于ASR假设的翻译性能显著低于使用原始文本的oracle输入。
AI.method: 通过联合训练ASR和MT模块，以ASR目标作为辅助损失函数，利用神经网络隐藏表示连接两模块，并在推理时通过n-best假设连接模块，结合独立训练模型的集成进一步优化性能。
AI.result: 该方法有效减少了ASR假设带来的性能下降，集成独立模型后系统表现进一步提升。
AI.conclusion: 联合训练ASR与MT模块并结合集成策略，能显著提升语音翻译系统的鲁棒性和准确性。

search_text: A Technical Report: BUT Speech Translation Systems 技术报告：BUT 语音翻译系统 The paper describes the BUT's speech translation systems. The systems are English$\longrightarrow$German offline speech translation systems. The systems are based on our previous works \cite{Jointly_trained_transformers}. Though End-to-End and cascade~(ASR-MT) spoken language translation~(SLT) systems are reaching comparable performances, a large degradation is observed when translating ASR hypothesis compared to the oracle input text. To reduce this performance degradation, we have jointly-trained ASR and MT modules with ASR objective as an auxiliary loss. Both the networks are connected through the neural hidden representations. This model has an End-to-End differentiable path with respect to the final objective function and also utilizes the ASR objective for better optimization. During the inference both the modules(i.e., ASR and MT) are connected through the hidden representations corresponding to the n-best hypotheses. Ensembling with independently trained ASR and MT models have further improved the performance of the system. 该论文描述了 BUT 的语音翻译系统。这些系统是英语$\longrightarrow$德语离线语音翻译系统。该系统基于我们之前的作品\cite{Jointly_trained_transformers}。尽管端到端和级联（ASR-MT）口语翻译（SLT）系统达到了可比的性能，但与预言机输入文本相比，在翻译 ASR 假设时观察到了很大的退化。为了减少这种性能下降，我们联合训练了 ASR 和 MT 模块，并以 ASR 目标作为辅助损失。这两个网络都通过神经隐藏表示连接。该模型对于最终目标函数具有端到端可微分路径，并且还利用 ASR 目标来实现更好的优化。在推理过程中，两个模块（即 ASR 和 MT）通过与 n 个最佳假设相对应的隐藏表示连接。与独立训练的 ASR 和 MT 模型的集成进一步提高了系统的性能。 本文介绍了布拉格技术大学（BUT）开发的英德离线语音翻译系统，旨在解决基于ASR假设的翻译性能下降问题。 Hari Krishna Vydana,Lukas Burget,Jan Cernocky cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Tao Lu,Yuanzhi Wang,Yanduo Zhang,Yu Wang,Wei Liu,Zhongyuan Wang,Junjun Jiang
title: Face Hallucination via Split-Attention in Split-Attention Network
title_zh: 通过分裂注意力网络中的分裂注意力进行面部幻觉
abstract: Recently, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been widely employed to promote the face hallucination due to the ability to predict high-frequency details from a large number of samples. However, most of them fail to take into account the overall facial profile and fine texture details simultaneously, resulting in reduced naturalness and fidelity of the reconstructed face, and further impairing the performance of downstream tasks (e.g., face detection, facial recognition). To tackle this issue, we propose a novel external-internal split attention group (ESAG), which encompasses two paths responsible for facial structure information and facial texture details, respectively. By fusing the features from these two paths, the consistency of facial structure and the fidelity of facial details are strengthened at the same time. Then, we propose a split-attention in split-attention network (SISN) to reconstruct photorealistic high-resolution facial images by cascading several ESAGs. Experimental results on face hallucination and face recognition unveil that the proposed method not only significantly improves the clarity of hallucinated faces, but also encourages the subsequent face recognition performance substantially. Codes have been released at https://github.com/mdswyz/SISN-Face-Hallucination.
summary: Recently, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been widely employed to promote the face hallucination due to the ability to predict high-frequency details from a large number of samples. However, most of them fail to take into account the overall facial profile and fine texture details simultaneously, resulting in reduced naturalness and fidelity of the reconstructed face, and further impairing the performance of downstream tasks (e.g., face detection, facial recognition). To tackle this issue, we propose a novel external-internal split attention group (ESAG), which encompasses two paths responsible for facial structure information and facial texture details, respectively. By fusing the features from these two paths, the consistency of facial structure and the fidelity of facial details are strengthened at the same time. Then, we propose a split-attention in split-attention network (SISN) to reconstruct photorealistic high-resolution facial images by cascading several ESAGs. Experimental results on face hallucination and face recognition unveil that the proposed method not only significantly improves the clarity of hallucinated faces, but also encourages the subsequent face recognition performance substantially. Codes have been released at https://github.com/mdswyz/SISN-Face-Hallucination.
abstract_zh: 最近，卷积神经网络（CNN）由于能够从大量样本中预测高频细节而被广泛应用于促进面部幻觉。然而，大多数方法未能同时考虑整体面部轮廓和精细纹理细节，导致重建面部的自然度和保真度降低，并进一步损害下游任务（例如面部检测、面部识别）的性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的外部-内部分裂注意力组（ESAG），它包含分别负责面部结构信息和面部纹理细节的两条路径。通过融合这两条路径的特征，同时增强了面部结构的一致性和面部细节的保真度。然后，我们提出了分割注意力网络（SISN）中的分割注意力，通过级联多个 ESAG 来重建逼真的高分辨率面部图像。幻脸和人脸识别的实验结果表明，该方法不仅显着提高了幻脸的清晰度，而且大大促进了后续的人脸识别性能。代码已发布于 https://github.com/mdswyz/SISN-Face-Hallucination。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分裂注意力网络（SISN），通过分离处理面部结构和纹理细节，提升人脸超分辨率重建的质量。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN方法在人脸超分辨率重建中难以同时保持整体面部轮廓与细纹理细节，导致重建结果不够自然且影响后续任务性能。
AI.method: 设计外部-内部分裂注意力组（ESAG），包含结构信息路径与纹理细节路径，通过特征融合增强一致性与保真度，并级联多个ESAG构建SISN网络。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法显著提升生成人脸的清晰度，并有效增强后续人脸识别任务的性能。
AI.conclusion: SISN通过分离处理面部结构与纹理，解决了传统方法的不足，在重建质量与下游任务中均取得显著改进。

However, most of them fail to take into account the overall facial profile and fine texture details simultaneously, resulting in reduced naturalness and fidelity of the reconstructed face, and further impairing the performance of downstream tasks (e.g., face detection, facial recognition). Experimental results on face hallucination and face recognition unveil that the proposed method not only significantly improves the clarity of hallucinated faces, but also encourages the subsequent face recognition performance substantially. authors_text: Yao Shi,Hui Bu,Xin Xu,Shaoji Zhang,Ming Li
title: AISHELL-3: A Multi-speaker Mandarin TTS Corpus and the Baselines
title_zh: AISHELL-3：多语者普通话 TTS 语料库和基线
abstract: In this paper, we present AISHELL-3, a large-scale and high-fidelity multi-speaker Mandarin speech corpus which could be used to train multi-speaker Text-to-Speech (TTS) systems. The corpus contains roughly 85 hours of emotion-neutral recordings spoken by 218 native Chinese mandarin speakers. Their auxiliary attributes such as gender, age group and native accents are explicitly marked and provided in the corpus. Accordingly, transcripts in Chinese character-level and pinyin-level are provided along with the recordings. We present a baseline system that uses AISHELL-3 for multi-speaker Madarin speech synthesis. The multi-speaker speech synthesis system is an extension on Tacotron-2 where a speaker verification model and a corresponding loss regarding voice similarity are incorporated as the feedback constraint. We aim to use the presented corpus to build a robust synthesis model that is able to achieve zero-shot voice cloning. The system trained on this dataset also generalizes well on speakers that are never seen in the training process. Objective evaluation results from our experiments show that the proposed multi-speaker synthesis system achieves high voice similarity concerning both speaker embedding similarity and equal error rate measurement. The dataset, baseline system code and generated samples are available online.
summary: In this paper, we present AISHELL-3, a large-scale and high-fidelity multi-speaker Mandarin speech corpus which could be used to train multi-speaker Text-to-Speech (TTS) systems. The corpus contains roughly 85 hours of emotion-neutral recordings spoken by 218 native Chinese mandarin speakers. Their auxiliary attributes such as gender, age group and native accents are explicitly marked and provided in the corpus. Accordingly, transcripts in Chinese character-level and pinyin-level are provided along with the recordings. We present a baseline system that uses AISHELL-3 for multi-speaker Madarin speech synthesis. The multi-speaker speech synthesis system is an extension on Tacotron-2 where a speaker verification model and a corresponding loss regarding voice similarity are incorporated as the feedback constraint. We aim to use the presented corpus to build a robust synthesis model that is able to achieve zero-shot voice cloning. The system trained on this dataset also generalizes well on speakers that are never seen in the training process. Objective evaluation results from our experiments show that the proposed multi-speaker synthesis system achieves high voice similarity concerning both speaker embedding similarity and equal error rate measurement. The dataset, baseline system code and generated samples are available online.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 AISHELL-3，这是一个大规模、高保真多说话人普通话语音语料库，可用于训练多说话人文本转语音 (TTS) 系统。该语料库包含 218 名以中文为母语的普通话使用者的大约 85 小时的情感中性录音。他们的辅助属性，如性别、年龄组和母语口音，在语料库中被明确标记和提供。因此，汉字级别和拼音级别的文字记录与录音一起提供。我们提出了一个使用 AISHELL-3 进行多扬声器 Madarin 语音合成的基线系统。多说话人语音合成系统是 Tacotron-2 的扩展，其中将说话人验证模型和有关语音相似性的相应损失合并为反馈约束。我们的目标是使用所提供的语料库构建一个强大的合成模型，能够实现零样本语音克隆。在此数据集上训练的系统也可以很好地概括训练过程中从未见过的说话者。我们的实验的客观评估结果表明，所提出的多说话人合成系统在说话人嵌入相似度和等错误率测量方面均实现了较高的语音相似度。数据集、基线系统代码和生成的样本可在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了AISHELL-3多说话人普通话TTS语料库及基线系统，旨在提升多说话人语音合成的鲁棒性和零样本克隆能力。
AI.motivation: 现有多说话人TTS数据集存在规模有限或属性标注不足的问题，需构建高质量语料库以支持更精准的语音合成与跨说话人泛化研究。
AI.method: 基于Tacotron-2框架扩展多说话人合成系统，引入说话人验证模型与语音相似度损失函数作为约束条件，同时构建包含85小时情感中性录音及详细属性标注的AISHELL-3语料库。
AI.result: 实验表明系统在未见过的说话人上实现零样本克隆，语音相似度指标（嵌入相似度与等错误率）表现优异，且代码与数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: AISHELL-3为多说话人TTS研究提供高质量基准数据，所提方法有效提升跨说话人语音合成性能，未来可进一步优化模型结构或扩展语料库多样性。

search_text: AISHELL-3: A Multi-speaker Mandarin TTS Corpus and the Baselines AISHELL-3：多语者普通话 TTS 语料库和基线 In this paper, we present AISHELL-3, a large-scale and high-fidelity multi-speaker Mandarin speech corpus which could be used to train multi-speaker Text-to-Speech (TTS) systems. The corpus contains roughly 85 hours of emotion-neutral recordings spoken by 218 native Chinese mandarin speakers. Their auxiliary attributes such as gender, age group and native accents are explicitly marked and provided in the corpus. Accordingly, transcripts in Chinese character-level and pinyin-level are provided along with the recordings. We present a baseline system that uses AISHELL-3 for multi-speaker Madarin speech synthesis. The multi-speaker speech synthesis system is an extension on Tacotron-2 where a speaker verification model and a corresponding loss regarding voice similarity are incorporated as the feedback constraint. We aim to use the presented corpus to build a robust synthesis model that is able to achieve zero-shot voice cloning. The system trained on this dataset also generalizes well on speakers that are never seen in the training process. Objective evaluation results from our experiments show that the proposed multi-speaker synthesis system achieves high voice similarity concerning both speaker embedding similarity and equal error rate measurement. The dataset, baseline system code and generated samples are available online. 在本文中，我们提出了 AISHELL-3，这是一个大规模、高保真多说话人普通话语音语料库，可用于训练多说话人文本转语音 (TTS) 系统。该语料库包含 218 名以中文为母语的普通话使用者的大约 85 小时的情感中性录音。他们的辅助属性，如性别、年龄组和母语口音，在语料库中被明确标记和提供。因此，汉字级别和拼音级别的文字记录与录音一起提供。我们提出了一个使用 AISHELL-3 进行多扬声器 Madarin 语音合成的基线系统。多说话人语音合成系统是 Tacotron-2 的扩展，其中将说话人验证模型和有关语音相似性的相应损失合并为反馈约束。我们的目标是使用所提供的语料库构建一个强大的合成模型，能够实现零样本语音克隆。在此数据集上训练的系统也可以很好地概括训练过程中从未见过的说话者。我们的实验的客观评估结果表明，所提出的多说话人合成系统在说话人嵌入相似度和等错误率测量方面均实现了较高的语音相似度。数据集、基线系统代码和生成的样本可在线获取。 本文介绍了AISHELL-3多说话人普通话TTS语料库及基线系统，旨在提升多说话人语音合成的鲁棒性和零样本克隆能力。 Yao Shi,Hui Bu,Xin Xu,Shaoji Zhang,Ming Li cs.SD,eess.AS

title: DBNET: DOA-driven beamforming network for end-to-end farfield sound source separation
title_zh: DBNET：DOA驱动的波束形成网络，用于端到端远场声源分离
abstract: Many deep learning techniques are available to perform source separation and reduce background noise. However, designing an end-to-end multi-channel source separation method using deep learning and conventional acoustic signal processing techniques still remains challenging. In this paper we propose a direction-of-arrival-driven beamforming network (DBnet) consisting of direction-of-arrival (DOA) estimation and beamforming layers for end-to-end source separation. We propose to train DBnet using loss functions that are solely based on the distances between the separated speech signals and the target speech signals, without a need for the ground-truth DOAs of speakers. To improve the source separation performance, we also propose end-to-end extensions of DBnet which incorporate post masking networks. We evaluate the proposed DBnet and its extensions on a very challenging dataset, targeting realistic far-field sound source separation in reverberant and noisy environments. The experimental results show that the proposed extended DBnet using a convolutional-recurrent post masking network outperforms state-of-the-art source separation methods.
summary: Many deep learning techniques are available to perform source separation and reduce background noise. However, designing an end-to-end multi-channel source separation method using deep learning and conventional acoustic signal processing techniques still remains challenging. In this paper we propose a direction-of-arrival-driven beamforming network (DBnet) consisting of direction-of-arrival (DOA) estimation and beamforming layers for end-to-end source separation. We propose to train DBnet using loss functions that are solely based on the distances between the separated speech signals and the target speech signals, without a need for the ground-truth DOAs of speakers. To improve the source separation performance, we also propose end-to-end extensions of DBnet which incorporate post masking networks. We evaluate the proposed DBnet and its extensions on a very challenging dataset, targeting realistic far-field sound source separation in reverberant and noisy environments. The experimental results show that the proposed extended DBnet using a convolutional-recurrent post masking network outperforms state-of-the-art source separation methods.
abstract_zh: 许多深度学习技术可用于执行源分离并减少背景噪声。然而，使用深度学习和传统声学信号处理技术设计端到端多通道源分离方法仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种到达方向驱动的波束形成网络（DBnet），由到达方向（DOA）估计和用于端到端源分离的波束形成层组成。我们建议使用仅基于分离的语音信号和目标语音信号之间的距离的损失函数来训练 DBnet，而不需要说话者的真实 DOA。为了提高源分离性能，我们还提出了 DBnet 的端到端扩展，其中包含后掩蔽网络。我们在一个非常具有挑战性的数据集上评估了所提出的 DBnet 及其扩展，目标是在混响和噪声环境中实现真实的远场声源分离。实验结果表明，所提出的使用卷积循环后掩蔽网络的扩展 DBnet 优于最先进的源分离方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DBNET，一种结合方向到达估计与波束成形的端到端远场声源分离网络。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习声源分离方法在结合传统声学信号处理技术时仍面临挑战，尤其在混响和噪声环境中难以实现有效分离。
AI.method: 设计包含DOA估计与波束成形层的DBNET，采用基于信号距离的损失函数训练，无需真实DOA标签，并扩展卷积-循环后置掩码网络提升性能。
AI.result: 在复杂混响与噪声数据集上，扩展DBNET的分离效果优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DBNET通过端到端整合DOA估计与波束成形，有效提升了远场声源分离性能，为实际场景应用提供了新思路。

title: Advancing Toward Robust and Scalable Fingerprint Orientation Estimation: From Gradients to Deep Learning
title_zh: 迈向稳健且可扩展的指纹方向估计：从梯度到深度学习
abstract: The study identifies a clear evolution from traditional methods to more advanced machine learning approaches. Current algorithms face persistent challenges, including degraded image quality, damaged ridge structures, and background noise, which impact performance. To overcome these limitations, future research must focus on developing efficient algorithms with lower computational complexity while maintaining robust performance across varied conditions. Hybrid methods that combine the simplicity and efficiency of gradient-based techniques with the adaptability and robustness of machine learning are particularly promising for advancing fingerprint recognition systems. Fingerprint orientation estimation plays a crucial role in improving the reliability and accuracy of biometric systems. This study highlights the limitations of current approaches and underscores the importance of designing next-generation algorithms that can operate efficiently across diverse application domains. By addressing these challenges, future developments could enhance the scalability, reliability, and applicability of biometric systems, paving the way for broader use in security and identification technologies.
summary: The study identifies a clear evolution from traditional methods to more advanced machine learning approaches. Current algorithms face persistent challenges, including degraded image quality, damaged ridge structures, and background noise, which impact performance. To overcome these limitations, future research must focus on developing efficient algorithms with lower computational complexity while maintaining robust performance across varied conditions. Hybrid methods that combine the simplicity and efficiency of gradient-based techniques with the adaptability and robustness of machine learning are particularly promising for advancing fingerprint recognition systems. Fingerprint orientation estimation plays a crucial role in improving the reliability and accuracy of biometric systems. This study highlights the limitations of current approaches and underscores the importance of designing next-generation algorithms that can operate efficiently across diverse application domains. By addressing these challenges, future developments could enhance the scalability, reliability, and applicability of biometric systems, paving the way for broader use in security and identification technologies.
abstract_zh: 该研究确定了从传统方法到更先进的机器学习方法的明显演变。当前的算法面临着持续的挑战，包括图像质量下降、脊结构损坏和背景噪声，这些都会影响性能。为了克服这些限制，未来的研究必须集中于开发计算复杂度较低的高效算法，同时在不同条件下保持稳健的性能。将基于梯度的技术的简单性和效率与机器学习的适应性和鲁棒性相结合的混合方法对于推进指纹识别系统特别有前途。指纹方向估计对于提高生物识别系统的可靠性和准确性起着至关重要的作用。这项研究强调了当前方法的局限性，并强调了设计能够跨不同应用领域高效运行的下一代算法的重要性。通过解决这些挑战，未来的发展可以增强生物识别系统的可扩展性、可靠性和适用性，为安全和识别技术的更广泛应用铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了从传统梯度方法到深度学习的指纹方向估计技术演进，提出结合梯度方法与机器学习的混合方法以提升算法鲁棒性与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有指纹方向估计算法在图像质量退化、噪声干扰等场景下表现不足，亟需开发计算复杂度低且适应性强的下一代算法以提高生物识别系统的可靠性。
AI.method: 通过分析传统梯度方法与深度学习的优缺点，提出融合梯度技术简洁性与机器学习适应性的混合方法框架。
AI.result: 明确了当前算法局限性，验证了混合方法在提升指纹方向估计准确性与鲁棒性方面的潜力，为未来算法设计提供方向。
AI.conclusion: 下一代指纹识别算法需兼顾效率与适应性，混合方法可有效推动生物识别系统在安全与身份验证领域的规模化应用。

By addressing these challenges, future developments could enhance the scalability, reliability, and applicability of biometric systems, paving the way for broader use in security and identification technologies. 该研究确定了从传统方法到更先进的机器学习方法的明显演变。当前的算法面临着持续的挑战，包括图像质量下降、脊结构损坏和背景噪声，这些都会影响性能。为了克服这些限制，未来的研究必须集中于开发计算复杂度较低的高效算法，同时在不同条件下保持稳健的性能。将基于梯度的技术的简单性和效率与机器学习的适应性和鲁棒性相结合的混合方法对于推进指纹识别系统特别有前途。指纹方向估计对于提高生物识别系统的可靠性和准确性起着至关重要的作用。这项研究强调了当前方法的局限性，并强调了设计能够跨不同应用领域高效运行的下一代算法的重要性。通过解决这些挑战，未来的发展可以增强生物识别系统的可扩展性、可靠性和适用性，为安全和识别技术的更广泛应用铺平道路。 本文探讨了从传统梯度方法到深度学习的指纹方向估计技术演进，提出结合梯度方法与机器学习的混合方法以提升算法鲁棒性与效率。 Amit Kumar Trivedi,Jasvinder Pal Singh cs.CV

title: FUEL: Fast UAV Exploration using Incremental Frontier Structure and Hierarchical Planning
title_zh: FUEL：使用增量前沿结构和分层规划进行快速无人机探索
abstract: Autonomous exploration is a fundamental problem for various applications of unmanned aerial vehicles. Existing methods, however, were demonstrated to insufficient exploration rate, due to the lack of efficient global coverage, conservative motion plans and low decision frequencies. In this paper, we propose FUEL, a hierarchical framework that can support Fast UAV Exploration in complex unknown environments. We maintain crucial information in the entire space required by exploration planning by a frontier information structure (FIS), which can be updated incrementally when the space is explored. Supported by the FIS, a hierarchical planner plans exploration motions in three steps, which find efficient global coverage paths, refine a local set of viewpoints and generate minimum-time trajectories in sequence. We present extensive benchmark and real-world tests, in which our method completes the exploration tasks with unprecedented efficiency (3-8 times faster) compared to state-of-the-art approaches. Our method will be made open source to benefit the community.
summary: Autonomous exploration is a fundamental problem for various applications of unmanned aerial vehicles. Existing methods, however, were demonstrated to insufficient exploration rate, due to the lack of efficient global coverage, conservative motion plans and low decision frequencies. In this paper, we propose FUEL, a hierarchical framework that can support Fast UAV Exploration in complex unknown environments. We maintain crucial information in the entire space required by exploration planning by a frontier information structure (FIS), which can be updated incrementally when the space is explored. Supported by the FIS, a hierarchical planner plans exploration motions in three steps, which find efficient global coverage paths, refine a local set of viewpoints and generate minimum-time trajectories in sequence. We present extensive benchmark and real-world tests, in which our method completes the exploration tasks with unprecedented efficiency (3-8 times faster) compared to state-of-the-art approaches. Our method will be made open source to benefit the community.
abstract_zh: 自主探索是无人机各种应用的一个基本问题。然而，由于缺乏有效的全球覆盖、保守的运动计划和低决策频率，现有方法被证明勘探率不足。在本文中，我们提出了 FUEL，这是一个分层框架，可以支持复杂未知环境中的快速无人机探索。我们通过前沿信息结构（FIS）维护探索规划所需的整个空间中的关键信息，这些信息可以在空间探索时增量更新。在 FIS 的支持下，分层规划器分三个步骤规划探索运动，找到有效的全局覆盖路径，细化局部视点集并按顺序生成最短时间轨迹。我们提供了广泛的基准测试和实际测试，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法以前所未有的效率（快 3-8 倍）完成了探索任务。我们的方法将开源以造福社区。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FUEL框架，通过增量前沿结构和分层规划实现无人机在复杂未知环境中的快速自主探索。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机探索方法存在全局覆盖效率低、运动规划保守及决策频率低的问题，导致探索速度不足。
AI.method: 设计前沿信息结构（FIS）动态维护探索所需空间信息，并基于FIS构建分层规划器，依次生成全局覆盖路径、优化局部视角集及最小时间轨迹。
AI.result: 在基准测试和真实场景中，FUEL相比最先进方法效率提升3-8倍，且将开源以促进社区发展。
AI.conclusion: FUEL通过增量信息维护与分层规划有效解决了无人机探索效率问题，为复杂环境自主导航提供了高效方案。

title: Learning Dual Semantic Relations with Graph Attention for Image-Text Matching
title_zh: 使用图注意力学习双重语义关系进行图像文本匹配
comment: 14pages, 9 figures. Accepted at: IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (Early Access Print) | |Codes Available at: https://github.com/kywen1119/DSRAN
comments: 14pages, 9 figures. Accepted at: IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (Early Access Print) | |Codes Available at: https://github.com/kywen1119/DSRAN
abstract: Image-Text Matching is one major task in cross-modal information processing. The main challenge is to learn the unified visual and textual representations. Previous methods that perform well on this task primarily focus on not only the alignment between region features in images and the corresponding words in sentences, but also the alignment between relations of regions and relational words. However, the lack of joint learning of regional features and global features will cause the regional features to lose contact with the global context, leading to the mismatch with those non-object words which have global meanings in some sentences. In this work, in order to alleviate this issue, it is necessary to enhance the relations between regions and the relations between regional and global concepts to obtain a more accurate visual representation so as to be better correlated to the corresponding text. Thus, a novel multi-level semantic relations enhancement approach named Dual Semantic Relations Attention Network(DSRAN) is proposed which mainly consists of two modules, separate semantic relations module and the joint semantic relations module. DSRAN performs graph attention in both modules respectively for region-level relations enhancement and regional-global relations enhancement at the same time. With these two modules, different hierarchies of semantic relations are learned simultaneously, thus promoting the image-text matching process by providing more information for the final visual representation. Quantitative experimental results have been performed on MS-COCO and Flickr30K and our method outperforms previous approaches by a large margin due to the effectiveness of the dual semantic relations learning scheme. Codes are available at https://github.com/kywen1119/DSRAN.
summary: Image-Text Matching is one major task in cross-modal information processing. The main challenge is to learn the unified visual and textual representations. Previous methods that perform well on this task primarily focus on not only the alignment between region features in images and the corresponding words in sentences, but also the alignment between relations of regions and relational words. However, the lack of joint learning of regional features and global features will cause the regional features to lose contact with the global context, leading to the mismatch with those non-object words which have global meanings in some sentences. In this work, in order to alleviate this issue, it is necessary to enhance the relations between regions and the relations between regional and global concepts to obtain a more accurate visual representation so as to be better correlated to the corresponding text. Thus, a novel multi-level semantic relations enhancement approach named Dual Semantic Relations Attention Network(DSRAN) is proposed which mainly consists of two modules, separate semantic relations module and the joint semantic relations module. DSRAN performs graph attention in both modules respectively for region-level relations enhancement and regional-global relations enhancement at the same time. With these two modules, different hierarchies of semantic relations are learned simultaneously, thus promoting the image-text matching process by providing more information for the final visual representation. Quantitative experimental results have been performed on MS-COCO and Flickr30K and our method outperforms previous approaches by a large margin due to the effectiveness of the dual semantic relations learning scheme. Codes are available at https://github.com/kywen1119/DSRAN.
abstract_zh: 图文匹配是跨模态信息处理的一项主要任务。主要挑战是学习统一的视觉和文本表示。以前在该任务上表现良好的方法主要不仅关注图像中的区域特征与句子中相应单词之间的对齐，而且还关注区域与关系单词之间的关系之间的对齐。然而，缺乏区域特征和全局特征的联合学习，会导致区域特征与全局上下文失去联系，导致某些句子中与那些具有全局含义的非宾语词不匹配。在这项工作中，为了缓解这个问题，有必要增强区域之间的关系以及区域和全球概念之间的关系，以获得更准确的视觉表示，从而更好地与相应的文本相关联。因此，提出了一种新颖的多级语义关系增强方法，称为双重语义关系注意网络（DSRAN），该方法主要由两个模块组成，单独语义关系模块和联合语义关系模块。 DSRAN 在两个模块中分别进行图注意力，同时增强区域级关系和区域-全局关系。通过这两个模块，可以同时学习不同层次的语义关系，从而为最终的视觉表示提供更多信息，从而促进图像文本匹配过程。在 MS-COCO 和 Flickr30K 上进行了定量实验结果，由于双语义关系学习方案的有效性，我们的方法大大优于以前的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/kywen1119/DSRAN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DSRAN的双语义关系注意力网络，通过增强图像区域与全局概念之间的语义关系，提升图像-文本匹配效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在图像-文本匹配任务中未能联合学习区域特征与全局特征，导致区域特征脱离全局上下文，无法准确匹配具有全局语义的非目标词。
AI.method: 设计包含分离语义关系模块和联合语义关系模块的DSRAN网络，通过图注意力机制同时增强区域级关系和区域-全局级关系，学习多层级语义关系以优化视觉表示。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO和Flickr30K数据集上，DSRAN方法较之前方法有显著性能提升，验证了双语义关系学习方案的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合建模区域与全局语义关系，DSRAN有效提升了图像-文本匹配的准确性，为跨模态对齐提供了新思路。

authors_text: Shuhei Kato,Yusuke Yasuda,Xin Wang,Erica Cooper,Junichi Yamagishi
title: How Similar or Different Is Rakugo Speech Synthesizer to Professional Performers?
title_zh: 落语语音合成器与专业表演者有何相似或不同？
abstract: We have been working on speech synthesis for rakugo (a traditional Japanese form of verbal entertainment similar to one-person stand-up comedy) toward speech synthesis that authentically entertains audiences. In this paper, we propose a novel evaluation methodology using synthesized rakugo speech and real rakugo speech uttered by professional performers of three different ranks. The naturalness of the synthesized speech was comparable to that of the human speech, but the synthesized speech entertained listeners less than the performers of any rank. However, we obtained some interesting insights into challenges to be solved in order to achieve a truly entertaining rakugo synthesizer. For example, naturalness was not the most important factor, even though it has generally been emphasized as the most important point to be evaluated in the conventional speech synthesis field. More important factors were the understandability of the content and distinguishability of the characters in the rakugo story, both of which the synthesized rakugo speech was relatively inferior at as compared with the professional performers. We also found that fundamental frequency fo modeling should be further improved to better entertain audiences. These results show important steps to reaching authentically entertaining speech synthesis.

abstract_zh: 我们一直致力于单口相声（一种日本传统的语言娱乐形式，类似于单口喜剧）的语音合成，以实现真正娱乐观众的语音合成。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的评估方法，使用合成的落语语音和三个不同级别的专业表演者发出的真实落语语音。合成语音的自然度可以与人类语音相媲美，但合成语音给听众带来的娱乐性却低于任何级别的表演者。然而，为了实现真正有趣的单语合成器，我们对需要解决的挑战获得了一些有趣的见解。例如，自然度并不是最重要的因素，尽管在传统的语音合成领域中它通常被强调为最重要的评估点。更重要的因素是落语故事内容的可理解性和人物的可识别性，而合成的落语语音在这两个方面都比专业表演者要逊色。我们还发现建模的基频还需要进一步提高，以更好地娱乐观众。这些结果显示了实现真正有趣的语音合成的重要步骤。

AI.tldr: 开发一种评估方法，比较合成落语语音与不同等级专业表演者的相似性和差异，以提升合成语音的娱乐性。
AI.motivation: 传统语音合成侧重自然度，但合成语音娱乐性不足，需探索其他关键因素以实现更吸引人的落语合成。
AI.method: 通过比较合成语音与三位不同等级专业表演者的实际表演，评估自然度、内容可理解性和角色区分度等指标。
AI.result: 合成语音自然度与人类相当，但娱乐性低于所有等级表演者，内容可理解性和角色区分度较弱，基频建模需优化。
AI.conclusion: 需提升内容可理解性、角色区分度及基频建模，以实现更吸引人的落语语音合成。

In this paper, we propose a novel evaluation methodology using synthesized rakugo speech and real rakugo speech uttered by professional performers of three different ranks. The naturalness of the synthesized speech was comparable to that of the human speech, but the synthesized speech entertained listeners less than the performers of any rank. However, we obtained some interesting insights into challenges to be solved in order to achieve a truly entertaining rakugo synthesizer. For example, naturalness was not the most important factor, even though it has generally been emphasized as the most important point to be evaluated in the conventional speech synthesis field. More important factors were the understandability of the content and distinguishability of the characters in the rakugo story, both of which the synthesized rakugo speech was relatively inferior at as compared with the professional performers. We also found that fundamental frequency fo modeling should be further improved to better entertain audiences. authors_text: Dongyoung Kim,Myungsung Kwak,Eunji Won,Sejung Shin,Jeongyeon Nam
title: TLGAN: document Text Localization using Generative Adversarial Nets
title_zh: TLGAN：使用生成对抗网络进行文档文本本地化
comment: 17 pages, three figures, 4 tables, methods for IEEE ICDAR RRC SROIE task1 leader board
comments: 17 pages, three figures, 4 tables, methods for IEEE ICDAR RRC SROIE task1 leader board
abstract: Text localization from the digital image is the first step for the optical character recognition task. Conventional image processing based text localization performs adequately for specific examples. Yet, a general text localization are only archived by recent deep-learning based modalities. Here we present document Text Localization Generative Adversarial Nets (TLGAN) which are deep neural networks to perform the text localization from digital image. TLGAN is an versatile and easy-train text localization model requiring a small amount of data. Training only ten labeled receipt images from Robust Reading Challenge on Scanned Receipts OCR and Information Extraction (SROIE), TLGAN achieved 99.83% precision and 99.64% recall for SROIE test data. Our TLGAN is a practical text localization solution requiring minimal effort for data labeling and model training and producing a state-of-art performance.
summary: Text localization from the digital image is the first step for the optical character recognition task. Conventional image processing based text localization performs adequately for specific examples. Yet, a general text localization are only archived by recent deep-learning based modalities. Here we present document Text Localization Generative Adversarial Nets (TLGAN) which are deep neural networks to perform the text localization from digital image. TLGAN is an versatile and easy-train text localization model requiring a small amount of data. Training only ten labeled receipt images from Robust Reading Challenge on Scanned Receipts OCR and Information Extraction (SROIE), TLGAN achieved 99.83% precision and 99.64% recall for SROIE test data. Our TLGAN is a practical text localization solution requiring minimal effort for data labeling and model training and producing a state-of-art performance.
abstract_zh: 数字图像中的文本定位是光学字符识别任务的第一步。基于传统图像处理的文本本地化对于特定示例来说表现得足够好。然而，一般文本本地化仅通过最近基于深度学习的模式来存档。在这里，我们介绍文档文本本地化生成对抗网络（TLGAN），它是一种深度神经网络，用于从数字图像执行文本本地化。 TLGAN 是一种通用且易于训练的文本本地化模型，需要少量数据。 TLGAN 仅对扫描收据 OCR 和信息提取 (SROIE) 上的鲁棒阅读挑战赛中的 10 个标记收据图像进行训练，就 SROIE 测试数据实现了 99.83% 的精确度和 99.64% 的召回率。我们的 TLGAN 是一种实用的文本本地化解决方案，只需最少的努力即可进行数据标记和模型训练，并产生最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出TLGAN模型用于文档图像中的文本定位，以提高OCR任务的效率。
AI.motivation: 传统图像处理方法在文本定位上存在局限性，而现有深度学习方法需要大量标注数据，因此需要一种数据需求少且高效的文本定位模型。
AI.method: 基于生成对抗网络（GAN）构建TLGAN模型，利用少量标注的收据图像数据进行训练，实现文本定位。
AI.result: 在SROIE测试数据上达到99.83%的精确率和99.64%的召回率，性能达到最优。
AI.conclusion: TLGAN是一种高效且数据需求少的文本定位方法，适合实际应用。

authors_text: Jee-weon Jung,Hee-Soo Heo,Ha-Jin Yu,Joon Son Chung
title: Graph Attention Networks for Speaker Verification
title_zh: 用于说话者验证的图注意力网络
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables, accepted for presentation at ICASSP 2021 as a conference paper
comments: 5 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables, accepted for presentation at ICASSP 2021 as a conference paper
abstract: This work presents a novel back-end framework for speaker verification using graph attention networks. Segment-wise speaker embeddings extracted from multiple crops within an utterance are interpreted as node representations of a graph. The proposed framework inputs segment-wise speaker embeddings from an enrollment and a test utterance and directly outputs a similarity score. We first construct a graph using segment-wise speaker embeddings and then input these to graph attention networks. After a few graph attention layers with residual connections, each node is projected into a one-dimensional space using affine transform, followed by a readout operation resulting in a scalar similarity score. To enable successful adaptation for speaker verification, we propose techniques such as separating trainable weights for attention map calculations between segment-wise speaker embeddings from different utterances. The effectiveness of the proposed framework is validated using three different speaker embedding extractors trained with different architectures and objective functions. Experimental results demonstrate consistent improvement over various baseline back-end classifiers, with an average equal error rate improvement of 20% over the cosine similarity back-end without test time augmentation.
summary: This work presents a novel back-end framework for speaker verification using graph attention networks. Segment-wise speaker embeddings extracted from multiple crops within an utterance are interpreted as node representations of a graph. The proposed framework inputs segment-wise speaker embeddings from an enrollment and a test utterance and directly outputs a similarity score. We first construct a graph using segment-wise speaker embeddings and then input these to graph attention networks. After a few graph attention layers with residual connections, each node is projected into a one-dimensional space using affine transform, followed by a readout operation resulting in a scalar similarity score. To enable successful adaptation for speaker verification, we propose techniques such as separating trainable weights for attention map calculations between segment-wise speaker embeddings from different utterances. The effectiveness of the proposed framework is validated using three different speaker embedding extractors trained with different architectures and objective functions. Experimental results demonstrate consistent improvement over various baseline back-end classifiers, with an average equal error rate improvement of 20% over the cosine similarity back-end without test time augmentation.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种使用图注意网络进行说话人验证的新颖后端框架。从话语中的多种裁剪中提取的分段说话人嵌入被解释为图的节点表示。所提出的框架输入来自注册和测试话语的分段说话人嵌入，并直接输出相似度分数。我们首先使用分段说话者嵌入构建一个图，然后将它们输入到图注意网络中。在几个具有残差连接的图注意层之后，使用仿射变换将每个节点投影到一维空间，然后进行读出操作，从而产生标量相似度得分。为了成功适应说话人验证，我们提出了一些技术，例如在不同话语的分段说话人嵌入之间分离用于注意图计算的可训练权重。使用使用不同架构和目标函数训练的三种不同的说话者嵌入提取器来验证所提出框架的有效性。实验结果表明，与各种基线后端分类器相比，得到了一致的改进，与不增加测试时间的余弦相似度后端相比，平均等错误率提高了 20%。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于图注意力网络的说话人验证后端框架，直接计算注册与测试语音片段的相似度分数
AI.motivation: 传统方法未能有效建模语音片段间复杂关系，图注意力网络可捕捉节点间依赖关系，提升验证性能
AI.method: 构建语音片段嵌入图，应用多层图注意力网络与残差连接，通过仿射变换和读出操作生成相似度分数
AI.result: 实验显示在三个不同嵌入提取器上，平均等错误率降低20%，优于基线分类器
AI.conclusion: 验证了图注意力网络在说话人验证中的有效性，为后端建模提供新思路

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种基于图注意力网络的说话人验证后端框架，直接计算注册与测试语音片段的相似度分数

ai_content.conclusion: 验证了图注意力网络在说话人验证中的有效性，为后端建模提供新思路

The proposed framework inputs segment-wise speaker embeddings from an enrollment and a test utterance and directly outputs a similarity score. We first construct a graph using segment-wise speaker embeddings and then input these to graph attention networks. After a few graph attention layers with residual connections, each node is projected into a one-dimensional space using affine transform, followed by a readout operation resulting in a scalar similarity score. To enable successful adaptation for speaker verification, we propose techniques such as separating trainable weights for attention map calculations between segment-wise speaker embeddings from different utterances. The effectiveness of the proposed framework is validated using three different speaker embedding extractors trained with different architectures and objective functions. Experimental results demonstrate consistent improvement over various baseline back-end classifiers, with an average equal error rate improvement of 20% over the cosine similarity back-end without test time augmentation. 这项工作提出了一种使用图注意网络进行说话人验证的新颖后端框架。从话语中的多种裁剪中提取的分段说话人嵌入被解释为图的节点表示。所提出的框架输入来自注册和测试话语的分段说话人嵌入，并直接输出相似度分数。我们首先使用分段说话者嵌入构建一个图，然后将它们输入到图注意网络中。在几个具有残差连接的图注意层之后，使用仿射变换将每个节点投影到一维空间，然后进行读出操作，从而产生标量相似度得分。为了成功适应说话人验证，我们提出了一些技术，例如在不同话语的分段说话人嵌入之间分离用于注意图计算的可训练权重。使用使用不同架构和目标函数训练的三种不同的说话者嵌入提取器来验证所提出框架的有效性。实验结果表明，与各种基线后端分类器相比，得到了一致的改进，与不增加测试时间的余弦相似度后端相比，平均等错误率提高了 20%。 提出一种基于图注意力网络的说话人验证后端框架，直接计算注册与测试语音片段的相似度分数 Jee-weon Jung,Hee-Soo Heo,Ha-Jin Yu,Joon Son Chung eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.SD

title: Defense-guided Transferable Adversarial Attacks
title_zh: 防御引导的可转移对抗性攻击
abstract: Though deep neural networks perform challenging tasks excellently, they are susceptible to adversarial examples, which mislead classifiers by applying human-imperceptible perturbations on clean inputs. Under the query-free black-box scenario, adversarial examples are hard to transfer to unknown models, and several methods have been proposed with the low transferability. To settle such issue, we design a max-min framework inspired by input transformations, which are benificial to both the adversarial attack and defense. Explicitly, we decrease loss values with inputs' affline transformations as a defense in the minimum procedure, and then increase loss values with the momentum iterative algorithm as an attack in the maximum procedure. To further promote transferability, we determine transformed values with the max-min theory. Extensive experiments on Imagenet demonstrate that our defense-guided transferable attacks achieve impressive increase on transferability. Experimentally, we show that our ASR of adversarial attack reaches to 58.38% on average, which outperforms the state-of-the-art method by 12.1% on the normally trained models and by 11.13% on the adversarially trained models. Additionally, we provide elucidative insights on the improvement of transferability, and our method is expected to be a benchmark for assessing the robustness of deep models.
summary: Though deep neural networks perform challenging tasks excellently, they are susceptible to adversarial examples, which mislead classifiers by applying human-imperceptible perturbations on clean inputs. Under the query-free black-box scenario, adversarial examples are hard to transfer to unknown models, and several methods have been proposed with the low transferability. To settle such issue, we design a max-min framework inspired by input transformations, which are benificial to both the adversarial attack and defense. Explicitly, we decrease loss values with inputs' affline transformations as a defense in the minimum procedure, and then increase loss values with the momentum iterative algorithm as an attack in the maximum procedure. To further promote transferability, we determine transformed values with the max-min theory. Extensive experiments on Imagenet demonstrate that our defense-guided transferable attacks achieve impressive increase on transferability. Experimentally, we show that our ASR of adversarial attack reaches to 58.38% on average, which outperforms the state-of-the-art method by 12.1% on the normally trained models and by 11.13% on the adversarially trained models. Additionally, we provide elucidative insights on the improvement of transferability, and our method is expected to be a benchmark for assessing the robustness of deep models.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络出色地执行具有挑战性的任务，但它们很容易受到对抗性示例的影响，这些示例通过对干净的输入应用人类难以察觉的扰动来误导分类器。在无查询的黑盒场景下，对抗样本很难迁移到未知模型，并且已经提出了几种可迁移性较低的方法。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了一个受输入转换启发的最大最小框架，这对于对抗性攻击和防御都有好处。明确地说，我们用输入的仿射变换作为最小过程中的防御来减少损失值，然后用动量迭代算法作为最大过程中的攻击来增加损失值。为了进一步提高可转移性，我们用最大最小理论确定转换值。 Imagenet 上的大量实验表明，我们的防御引导可转移攻击在可转移性方面取得了令人印象深刻的提高。实验表明，我们的对抗攻击 ASR 平均达到 58.38%，在正常训练的模型上比最先进的方法高出 12.1%，在对抗训练的模型上比最先进的方法高出 11.13%。此外，我们还提供了关于可迁移性改进的阐明性见解，并且我们的方法有望成为评估深度模型稳健性的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种防御引导的可迁移对抗攻击方法，旨在解决查询自由黑盒场景下对抗样本迁移性差的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法在黑盒场景中难以有效迁移到未知模型，且迁移性较低，需结合防御机制提升攻击效果。
AI.method: 提出基于输入变换的max-min框架，通过仿射变换降低损失值（防御）与动量迭代算法增加损失值（攻击），并利用max-min理论优化变换参数。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上实验表明，攻击成功率（ASR）平均达58.38%，较现有方法在普通训练模型上提升12.1%，在对抗训练模型上提升11.13%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升对抗攻击的可迁移性，为深度模型鲁棒性评估提供了新基准。

title: Exponential Negation of a Probability Distribution
title_zh: 概率分布的指数负
abstract: Negation operation is important in intelligent information processing. Different with existing arithmetic negation, an exponential negation is presented in this paper. The new negation can be seen as a kind of geometry negation. Some basic properties of the proposed negation is investigated, we find that the fix point is the uniform probability distribution. The negation is an entropy increase operation and all the probability distributions will converge to the uniform distribution after multiple negation iterations. The number of iterations of convergence is inversely proportional to the number of elements in the distribution. Some numerical examples are used to illustrate the efficiency of the proposed negation.
summary: Negation operation is important in intelligent information processing. Different with existing arithmetic negation, an exponential negation is presented in this paper. The new negation can be seen as a kind of geometry negation. Some basic properties of the proposed negation is investigated, we find that the fix point is the uniform probability distribution. The negation is an entropy increase operation and all the probability distributions will converge to the uniform distribution after multiple negation iterations. The number of iterations of convergence is inversely proportional to the number of elements in the distribution. Some numerical examples are used to illustrate the efficiency of the proposed negation.
abstract_zh: 取反运算在智能信息处理中具有重要意义。与现有的算术负数不同，本文提出了指数负数。新的否定可以被视为一种几何否定。研究了所提出的否定的一些基本性质，我们发现固定点是均匀概率分布。求反是一种熵增操作，经过多次求反迭代后，所有概率分布都会收敛到均匀分布。收敛迭代次数与分布中元素的数量成反比。使用一些数值示例来说明所提出的否定的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种概率分布的指数否定操作，并研究其性质与收敛特性。
AI.motivation: 传统算术否定操作存在局限性，需探索新的否定方式以提升智能信息处理能力。
AI.method: 定义指数否定为几何否定形式，通过数学分析与数值实验验证其性质。
AI.result: 发现指数否定的定点为均匀分布，具有熵增特性，多次迭代后所有分布收敛于此，迭代次数与元素数量成反比。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为概率分布处理提供了新视角，具有理论价值和应用潜力。

authors_text: Manuel Kaufmann,Emre Aksan,Jie Song,Fabrizio Pece,Remo Ziegler,Otmar Hilliges
title: Convolutional Autoencoders for Human Motion Infilling
title_zh: 用于人体运动填充的卷积自动编码器
abstract: In this paper we propose a convolutional autoencoder to address the problem of motion infilling for 3D human motion data. Given a start and end sequence, motion infilling aims to complete the missing gap in between, such that the filled in poses plausibly forecast the start sequence and naturally transition into the end sequence. To this end, we propose a single, end-to-end trainable convolutional autoencoder. We show that a single model can be used to create natural transitions between different types of activities. Furthermore, our method is not only able to fill in entire missing frames, but it can also be used to complete gaps where partial poses are available (e.g. from end effectors), or to clean up other forms of noise (e.g. Gaussian). Also, the model can fill in an arbitrary number of gaps that potentially vary in length. In addition, no further post-processing on the model's outputs is necessary such as smoothing or closing discontinuities at the end of the gap. At the heart of our approach lies the idea to cast motion infilling as an inpainting problem and to train a convolutional de-noising autoencoder on image-like representations of motion sequences. At training time, blocks of columns are removed from such images and we ask the model to fill in the gaps. We demonstrate the versatility of the approach via a number of complex motion sequences and report on thorough evaluations performed to better understand the capabilities and limitations of the proposed approach.
summary: In this paper we propose a convolutional autoencoder to address the problem of motion infilling for 3D human motion data. Given a start and end sequence, motion infilling aims to complete the missing gap in between, such that the filled in poses plausibly forecast the start sequence and naturally transition into the end sequence. To this end, we propose a single, end-to-end trainable convolutional autoencoder. We show that a single model can be used to create natural transitions between different types of activities. Furthermore, our method is not only able to fill in entire missing frames, but it can also be used to complete gaps where partial poses are available (e.g. from end effectors), or to clean up other forms of noise (e.g. Gaussian). Also, the model can fill in an arbitrary number of gaps that potentially vary in length. In addition, no further post-processing on the model's outputs is necessary such as smoothing or closing discontinuities at the end of the gap. At the heart of our approach lies the idea to cast motion infilling as an inpainting problem and to train a convolutional de-noising autoencoder on image-like representations of motion sequences. At training time, blocks of columns are removed from such images and we ask the model to fill in the gaps. We demonstrate the versatility of the approach via a number of complex motion sequences and report on thorough evaluations performed to better understand the capabilities and limitations of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种卷积自动编码器来解决 3D 人体运动数据的运动填充问题。给定开始和结束序列，运动填充旨在填补之间缺失的间隙，以便填充的姿势合理地预测开始序列并自然地过渡到结束序列。为此，我们提出了一个单一的、端到端的可训练卷积自动编码器。我们表明，单个模型可用于在不同类型的活动之间创建自然过渡。此外，我们的方法不仅能够填充整个丢失的帧，而且还可以用于完成部分姿势可用的间隙（例如来自末端执行器），或清除其他形式的噪声（例如高斯噪声）。此外，该模型可以填充任意数量的长度可能不同的间隙。此外，不需要对模型的输出进行进一步的后处理，例如平滑或闭合间隙末端的不连续性。我们方法的核心是将运动填充视为修复问题，并在运动序列的类似图像表示上训练卷积去噪自动编码器。在训练时，从这些图像中删除柱块，我们要求模型填补空白。我们通过许多复杂的运动序列展示了该方法的多功能性，并报告了为更好地理解所提出方法的功能和局限性而进行的彻底评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种卷积自编码器，用于补全3D人体运动数据中缺失的中间部分，使动作序列在起始和结束帧之间自然过渡。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理不同长度的缺失帧或部分姿势信息，且需复杂后处理。本文旨在开发一个端到端模型，无需额外处理即可补全多种场景下的运动缺失。
AI.method: 将运动序列转化为图像形式，通过移除图像列块训练卷积去噪自编码器，将其作为图像修复问题处理，实现对缺失运动片段的补全。
AI.result: 模型能成功补全完整缺失帧、部分姿势信息及噪声数据，且可处理任意长度的多段缺失，无需平滑等后处理，经复杂运动序列验证效果良好。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过图像修复思路有效解决了运动补全问题，展示了跨活动类型的自然过渡能力，为运动数据修复提供了灵活且无需后处理的解决方案。
